Surprisingly, we find that CoTs from specialized reasoning models are not consistently more reusable or verifiable than those from general-purpose LLMs like Llama and Gemma.
translated_summary: 在针对搜索与排序等任务的多智能体信息检索流水线中，基于大语言模型的智能体通过链式思维（CoT）向彼此传递中间推理过程。现有对 CoT 的评估仅狭隘地关注目标任务准确度，无法衡量推理过程本身的质量与效用。为此，本文提出两项全新的评测指标：可复用性与可验证性。我们采用 Thinker-Executor（思考器—执行器）框架将 CoT 的生成与执行解耦。可复用性衡量执行器复用思考器 CoT 的难易程度；可验证性衡量执行器能否依据 CoT 恢复出与思考器一致的答案。我们在五个基准数据集上评测了四种思考器模型，并针对由十个执行器模型组成的委员会进行测试。结果表明，可复用性与可验证性均与常规准确度无相关性，揭示了当前以准确度为核心的推理排行榜存在盲视问题。令人意外的是，专用推理模型所生成的 CoT 并不一定比通用 LLM（如 Llama、Gemma）更可复用或可验证。

title: A Picture of Agentic Search
summary: With automated systems increasingly issuing search queries alongside humans, Information Retrieval (IR) faces a major shift. Yet IR remains human-centred, with systems, evaluation metrics, user models, and datasets designed around human queries and behaviours. Consequently, IR operates under assumptions that no longer hold in practice, with changes to workload volumes, predictability, and querying behaviours. This misalignment affects system performance and optimisation: caching may lose effectiveness, query pre-processing may add overhead without improving results, and standard metrics may mismeasure satisfaction. Without adaptation, retrieval models risk satisfying neither humans, nor the emerging user segment of agents. However, datasets capturing agent search behaviour are lacking, which is a critical gap given IR's historical reliance on data-driven evaluation and optimisation. We develop a methodology for collecting all the data produced and consumed by agentic retrieval-augmented systems when answering queries, and we release the Agentic Search Queryset (ASQ) dataset. ASQ contains reasoning-induced queries, retrieved documents, and thoughts for queries in HotpotQA, Researchy Questions, and MS MARCO, for 3 diverse agents and 2 retrieval pipelines. The accompanying toolkit enables ASQ to be extended to new agents, retrievers, and datasets.
translated_summary: 随着自动化系统愈加频繁地与人类一起发出检索请求，信息检索（IR）正面临一场深刻变革。然而，IR 仍以人类为核心：系统架构、评估指标、用户模型和数据集都针对人类的查询与行为进行设计。于是，当前 IR 依赖的诸多假设已与现实脱节——工作负载的体量、可预测性乃至查询模式均发生显著变化。这种失配影响系统性能与优化：缓存效果可能降低，查询预处理可能徒增开销却未提升结果，标准指标也可能错误衡量满意度。倘若不加调整，检索模型将可能既无法满足人类需求，也无法满足正在崛起的智能体用户。然而，当前尚缺能刻画智能体搜索行为的数据集，而数据驱动的评估与优化历来是 IR 的基石，因此这一空缺尤为关键。我们提出了一种方法，全面采集检索增强型智能体系统在答复查询时产生与消费的全部数据，并发布为“智能体搜索查询集”（ASQ）。ASQ 覆盖 HotpotQA、Researchy Questions 和 MS MARCO 中的查询，提供由推理衍生的查询、检索到的文档及思维链，涉及 3 种不同智能体和 2 条检索流水线。伴随发布的工具包支持将 ASQ 扩展到新智能体、新检索器及新数据集。

title: Beyond Pipelines: A Fundamental Study on the Rise of Generative-Retrieval Architectures in Web Research
summary: Web research and practices have evolved significantly over time, offering users diverse and accessible solutions across a wide range of tasks. While advanced concepts such as Web 4.0 have emerged from mature technologies, the introduction of large language models (LLMs) has profoundly influenced both the field and its applications. This wave of LLMs has permeated science and technology so deeply that no area remains untouched. Consequently, LLMs are reshaping web research and development, transforming traditional pipelines into generative solutions for tasks like information retrieval, question answering, recommendation systems, and web analytics. They have also enabled new applications such as web-based summarization and educational tools. This survey explores recent advances in the impact of LLMs-particularly through the use of retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)-on web research and industry. It discusses key developments, open challenges, and future directions for enhancing web solutions with LLMs.
translated_summary: 网页研究与实践在不断发展中持续演进，为用户在各类任务上提供了多元且易用的解决方案。随着 Web 4.0 等前沿概念从成熟技术中孕育而生，大语言模型（LLM）的横空出世对整个领域及其应用产生了深远影响。这一波 LLM 浪潮已深刻渗透到科学与技术，几乎没有哪个领域未被触及。因此，LLM 正在重塑网页研发范式，将信息检索、问答系统、推荐引擎以及网页分析等传统流程转化为面向生成的解决方案，同时也催生了网页摘要、在线教学等全新应用。本文系统回顾了 LLM（尤其是基于检索增强生成 RAG 的技术）给网页研究与产业带来的最新进展，厘清了关键突破、开放挑战，并展望未来借助 LLM 提升网页服务的新方向。

title: WarpRec: Unifying Academic Rigor and Industrial Scale for Responsible, Reproducible, and Efficient Recommendation
summary: Innovation in Recommender Systems is currently impeded by a fractured ecosystem, where researchers must choose between the ease of in-memory experimentation and the costly, complex rewriting required for distributed industrial engines. To bridge this gap, we present WarpRec, a high-performance framework that eliminates this trade-off through a novel, backend-agnostic architecture. It includes 50+ state-of-the-art algorithms, 40 metrics, and 19 filtering and splitting strategies that seamlessly transition from local execution to distributed training and optimization. The framework enforces ecological responsibility by integrating CodeCarbon for real-time energy tracking, showing that scalability need not come at the cost of scientific integrity or sustainability. Furthermore, WarpRec anticipates the shift toward Agentic AI, leading Recommender Systems to evolve from static ranking engines into interactive tools within the Generative AI ecosystem. In summary, WarpRec not only bridges the gap between academia and industry but also can serve as the architectural backbone for the next generation of sustainable, agent-ready Recommender Systems. Code is available at https://github.com/sisinflab/warprec/
translated_summary: 推荐系统的创新目前受到“碎片化生态”的阻碍：研究人员要么选择轻量的内存实验，要么为分布式工业引擎支付高昂、复杂的重写成本。为了弥合这一鸿沟，我们推出了WarpRec——一个高性能框架，凭借新颖的后端无关架构消除了这种折衷。它内嵌50余种最前沿算法、40项评估指标和19种过滤与划分策略，可实现从本地执行向分布式训练与优化的无缝迁移。WarpRec通过集成CodeCarbon进行实时能耗追踪，践行生态责任，证明可扩展性不必以牺牲科学诚信或可持续性为代价。此外，WarpRec预见了向Agentic AI的转变：推荐系统将由静态排序引擎演进为生成式AI生态中的交互式工具。简言之，WarpRec不仅架起了学界与产业界之间的桥梁，更可成为下一代可持续、面向代理的推荐系统的架构基石。代码已开源：https://github.com/sisinflab/warprec/

title: Improving LLM-based Recommendation with Self-Hard Negatives from Intermediate Layers
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown great promise in recommender systems, where supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is commonly used for adaptation. Subsequent studies further introduce preference learning to incorporate negative samples into the training process. However, existing methods rely on sequence-level, offline-generated negatives, making them less discriminative and informative when adapting LLMs to recommendation tasks with large negative item spaces. To address these challenges, we propose ILRec, a novel preference fine-tuning framework for LLM-based recommendation, leveraging self-hard negative signals extracted from intermediate layers to improve preference learning. Specifically, we identify self-hard negative tokens from intermediate layers as fine-grained negative supervision that dynamically reflects the model's preference learning process. To effectively integrate these signals into training, we design a two-stage framework comprising cross-layer preference optimization and cross-layer preference distillation, enabling the model to jointly discriminate informative negatives and enhance the quality of negative signals from intermediate layers. In addition, we introduce a lightweight collaborative filtering model to assign token-level rewards for negative signals, mitigating the risk of over-penalizing false negatives. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate ILRec's effectiveness in enhancing the performance of LLM-based recommender systems.
translated_summary: 大语言模型（LLM）已显示出在推荐系统中的巨大潜力，其中通常采用监督微调（SFT）来进行模型适配。后续研究进一步引入偏好学习，在训练过程中引入负样本。然而，现有方法依赖于序列级、离线生成的负样本，使得它们在面对推荐任务中庞大的负空间时缺乏辨别力且信息有限。为此，我们提出 ILRec——一种面向基于 LLM 的推荐的新颖偏好微调框架，通过从中间层抽取自我困难负信号来提升偏好学习效果。具体而言，我们从中间层定位自我困难负分词，并将其作为细粒度负样本监督，动态反映模型的偏好学习过程。为有效将这些信号融入训练，我们设计了一个由“跨层偏好优化”与“跨层偏好蒸馏”组成的两阶段框架，使模型能够联合甄别有信息量的负样本，并提升中间层负信号的质量。此外，我们引入轻量级协同过滤模型，为负信号提供分词级奖励，以降低误判真负样本的过惩罚风险。在三个数据集上的大量实验验证了 ILRec 在提升基于 LLM 的推荐系统性能方面的有效性。

title: Visual Model Checking: Graph-Based Inference of Visual Routines for Image Retrieval
summary: Information retrieval lies at the foundation of the modern digital industry. While natural language search has seen dramatic progress in recent years largely driven by embedding-based models and large-scale pretraining, the field still faces significant challenges. Specifically, queries that involve complex relationships, object compositions, or precise constraints such as identities, counts and proportions often remain unresolved or unreliable within current frameworks. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that integrates formal verification into deep learning-based image retrieval through a synergistic combination of graph-based verification methods and neural code generation. Our approach aims to support open-vocabulary natural language queries while producing results that are both trustworthy and verifiable. By grounding retrieval results in a system of formal reasoning, we move beyond the ambiguity and approximation that often characterize vector representations. Instead of accepting uncertainty as a given, our framework explicitly verifies each atomic truth in the user query against the retrieved content. This allows us to not only return matching results, but also to identify and mark which specific constraints are satisfied and which remain unmet, thereby offering a more transparent and accountable retrieval process while boosting the results of the most popular embedding-based approaches.
translated_summary: 信息检索是现代数字产业的根基。尽管在自然语言搜索领域，基于嵌入表示的模型与大规模预训练已取得显著突破，复杂关系、对象组合以及对身份、计数、比例等精确约束的查询仍常常难以奏效，且可靠性不足。本文提出一种将形式化验证融合至深度学习驱动的图像检索的新框架，通过图结构形式化验证方法与神经代码生成的协同，在不预设词汇表的前提下支持开放类自然语言查询，并确保检索结果具备可信性与可验证性。该框架将检索结果奠基于形式推理体系，突破了向量表征固有的模糊性和近似性；不再默认不确定性为定局，而是对用户查询中的每项原子真值在检索内容上逐一核验。此举不仅返回匹配图像，还能明确标识哪些约束已满足、哪些未满足，使检索过程更加透明、可追溯，同时显著提升主流嵌入方法的整体效果。

title: Training-free Graph-based Imputation of Missing Modalities in Multimodal Recommendation
summary: Multimodal recommender systems (RSs) represent items in the catalog through multimodal data (e.g., product images and descriptions) that, in some cases, might be noisy or (even worse) missing. In those scenarios, the common practice is to drop items with missing modalities and train the multimodal RSs on a subsample of the original dataset. To date, the problem of missing modalities in multimodal recommendation has still received limited attention in the literature, lacking a precise formalisation as done with missing information in traditional machine learning. In this work, we first provide a problem formalisation for missing modalities in multimodal recommendation. Second, by leveraging the user-item graph structure, we re-cast the problem of missing multimodal information as a problem of graph features interpolation on the item-item co-purchase graph. On this basis, we propose four training-free approaches that propagate the available multimodal features throughout the item-item graph to impute the missing features. Extensive experiments on popular multimodal recommendation datasets demonstrate that our solutions can be seamlessly plugged into any existing multimodal RS and benchmarking framework while still preserving (or even widen) the performance gap between multimodal and traditional RSs. Moreover, we show that our graph-based techniques can perform better than traditional imputations in machine learning under different missing modalities settings. Finally, we analyse (for the first time in multimodal RSs) how feature homophily calculated on the item-item graph can influence our graph-based imputations.
translated_summary:
多模态推荐系统（RSs）通常通过多模态数据（如商品图像和描述）来表示目录中的物品，但这些模态有时可能含有噪声，甚至更糟——直接缺失。在此类场景下，现有做法通常是直接丢弃存在模态缺失的物品，然后在原始数据集的一个子集上训练多模态推荐系统。迄今为止，学界对于「多模态推荐中的模态缺失」问题关注不足，亦尚未像传统机器学习缺失信息研究那样进行严谨的形式化定义。

本文首先对多模态推荐中的模态缺失问题进行了形式化阐述；随后，借助用户-物品图结构，将「缺失模态信息」重新表述为「物品-物品共购图上的图特征插值问题」。在此基础上，我们提出四种无需再训练的解决方案，通过在物品-物品图上传播可用的多模态特征，以插补缺失特征。  
在多个被广泛采用的多模态推荐数据集上的大量实验表明：我们提出的方法可以无缝嵌入任何既有的多模态推荐系统与评测框架，在不破坏（甚至进一步拉大）多模态与传统推荐系统性能差距的同时，显著改善效果。此外，我们首次证明，在不同模态缺失比例下，本文的图基插补方法相较于传统机器学习插补技术更具优势。最后，我们首次在多模态推荐系统中分析了物品-物品图上的特征同配性（feature homophily）如何影响图基插补的表现。

title: WebFAQ 2.0: A Multilingual QA Dataset with Mined Hard Negatives for Dense Retrieval
summary: We introduce WebFAQ 2.0, a new version of the WebFAQ dataset, containing 198 million FAQ-based natural question-answer pairs across 108 languages. Compared to the previous version, it significantly expands multilingual coverage and the number of bilingual aligned QA pairs to over 14.3M, making it the largest FAQ-based resource. Unlike the original release, WebFAQ 2.0 uses a novel data collection strategy that directly crawls and extracts relevant web content, resulting in a substantially more diverse and multilingual dataset with richer context through page titles and descriptions. In response to community feedback, we also release a hard negatives dataset for training dense retrievers, with 1.25M queries across 20 languages. These hard negatives were mined using a two-stage retrieval pipeline and include cross-encoder scores for 200 negatives per query. We further show how this resource enables two primary fine-tuning strategies for dense retrievers: Contrastive Learning with MultipleNegativesRanking loss, and Knowledge Distillation with MarginMSE loss. WebFAQ 2.0 is not a static resource but part of a long-term effort. Since late 2025, structured FAQs are being regularly released through the Open Web Index, enabling continuous expansion and refinement. We publish the datasets and training scripts to facilitate further research in multilingual and cross-lingual IR. The dataset itself and all related resources are publicly available on GitHub and HuggingFace.
translated_summary:
我们推出了 WebFAQ 2.0——WebFAQ 数据集的全新版本，总计 108 种语言的 1.98 亿组基于 FAQ 的自然问答对。相较前一版本，其多语言覆盖范围显著扩大，双语对齐 Q-A 对数量增至 1,430 万以上，成为迄今最大的 FAQ 资源。与最初发布版不同，WebFAQ 2.0 采用全新采集策略：直接抓取并抽取相关网页内容，从而获得了语种更丰富、多样性更高的数据集，并借助页面标题与描述提供更为丰富的上下文。

为满足社区诉求，我们额外发布了专为训练稠密检索器设计的“难负例”数据集，包含 20 种语言的 125 万个查询。这些难负例通过一个两阶段检索流水线挖掘，同时为每个查询提供 200 个负例的交叉编码器评分。我们还展示了如何利用该资源实现稠密检索器的两种主要微调策略：基于 MultipleNegativesRanking 损失的对比学习，以及基于 MarginMSE 损失的知识蒸馏。

WebFAQ 2.0 并非一次性静态资源，而是长期计划的组成部分。自 2025 年末起，结构化 FAQ 已通过 Open Web Index 持续发布，实现持续扩展与细化。我们公开了数据集与训练脚本，以促进多语言及跨语言信息检索（IR）研究。该数据集及所有相关资源均可在 GitHub 和 Hugging Face 免费获取。

title: On the Reliability of User-Centric Evaluation of Conversational Recommender Systems
summary: User-centric evaluation has become a key paradigm for assessing Conversational Recommender Systems (CRS), aiming to capture subjective qualities such as satisfaction, trust, and rapport. To enable scalable evaluation, recent work increasingly relies on third-party annotations of static dialogue logs by crowd workers or large language models. However, the reliability of this practice remains largely unexamined. In this paper, we present a large-scale empirical study investigating the reliability and structure of user-centric CRS evaluation on static dialogue transcripts. We collected 1,053 annotations from 124 crowd workers on 200 ReDial dialogues using the 18-dimensional CRS-Que framework. Using random-effects reliability models and correlation analysis, we quantify the stability of individual dimensions and their interdependencies. Our results show that utilitarian and outcome-oriented dimensions such as accuracy, usefulness, and satisfaction achieve moderate reliability under aggregation, whereas socially grounded constructs such as humanness and rapport are substantially less reliable. Furthermore, many dimensions collapse into a single global quality signal, revealing a strong halo effect in third-party judgments. These findings challenge the validity of single-annotator and LLM-based evaluation protocols and motivate the need for multi-rater aggregation and dimension reduction in offline CRS evaluation.
translated_summary: 用户中心评估已成为对话式推荐系统（CRS）评测的核心范式，旨在捕捉满意度、信任与好感等主观质量。为实现可规模化的评估，近期研究愈发依赖众包工人或大型语言模型对静态对话日志的第三方标注，但此做法的可靠性却基本未被检验。本文开展大规模实证研究，探讨基于静态对话转录的用户中心CRS评估的可靠度与结构。我们采用18维CRS-Que框架，招募124名众包工人对200段ReDial对话进行标注，共得1 053个评价。借助随机效应信度模型与相关分析，我们量化了各维度指标的稳定性及其相互关系。结果显示，像准确率、有用性和满意度这类强调效用与结果的维度，在聚合后具有中等可靠性；而以人性化和好感为代表的社会属性维度则明显不可靠。此外，许多维度最终合并为单一全局质量信号，表明第三方评判受强烈光环效应影响。这些发现质疑单标注者及基于LLM的协议的有效性，呼吁在离线CRS评估中引入多评分者聚合和维度降维策略。

title: When LLM Judges Inflate Scores: Exploring Overrating in Relevance Assessment
summary: Human relevance assessment is time-consuming and cognitively intensive, limiting the scalability of Information Retrieval evaluation. This has led to growing interest in using large language models (LLMs) as proxies for human judges. However, it remains an open question whether LLM-based relevance judgments are reliable, stable, and rigorous enough to match humans for relevance assessment. In this work, we conduct a systematic study of overrating behavior in LLM-based relevance judgments across model backbones, evaluation paradigms (pointwise and pairwise), and passage modification strategies. We show that models consistently assign inflated relevance scores -- often with high confidence -- to passages that do not genuinely satisfy the underlying information need, revealing a system-wide bias rather than random fluctuations in judgment. Furthermore, controlled experiments show that LLM-based relevance judgments can be highly sensitive to passage length and surface-level lexical cues. These results raise concerns about the usage of LLMs as drop-in replacements for human relevance assessors, and highlight the urgent need for careful diagnostic evaluation frameworks when applying LLMs for relevance assessments. Our code and results are publicly available.
translated_summary: 人工相关性评估耗时且认知负荷大，限制了信息检索评测的可扩展性，这促使研究者日益倾向于用大型语言模型（LLM）替代人工评判者。然而，LLM 生成的相关性判断能否如人类般可靠、稳定且严谨，仍未有明确结论。本文系统研究了基于 LLM 的相关性判断中的“过度打分”现象，横跨不同模型骨干、评测范式（逐点式 vs. 成对式）以及段落修改策略。结果表明，模型普遍对并未真正满足信息需求的段落给出过高的相关性评分，且常伴有高度信心，体现出系统级偏差而非随机波动。此外，受控实验揭示，LLM 的相关性判断极易受到段落长度及表层词汇线索的影响。因此，直接将 LLM 用作人工评判者的“即插即用”替代品存在明显风险，亟需建立精细的诊断式评估框架。我们的代码与实验结果已公开。

title: Multiple Index Merge for Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search
summary: Approximate $k$ nearest neighbor (AKNN) search in high-dimensional space is a foundational problem in vector databases with widespread applications. Among the numerous AKNN indexes, Proximity Graph-based indexes achieve state-of-the-art search efficiency across various benchmarks. However, their extensive distance computations of high-dimensional vectors lead to slow construction and substantial memory overhead. The limited memory capacity often prevents building the entire index at once when handling large-scale datasets. A common practice is to build multiple sub-indexes separately. However, directly searching on these separated indexes severely compromises search efficiency, as queries cannot leverage cross-graph connections. Therefore, efficient graph index merging is crucial for multi-index searching. In this paper, we focus on efficient two-index merging and the merge order of multiple indexes for AKNN search. To achieve this, we propose a reverse neighbor sliding merge (RNSM) that exploits structural information to boost merging efficiency. We further investigate merge order selection (MOS) to reduce the merging cost by eliminating redundant merge operations. Experiments show that our approach yields up to a 5.48$\times$ speedup over existing index merge methods and 9.92$\times$ speedup over index reconstruction, while maintaining expected superior search performance. Moreover, our method scales efficiently to 100 million vectors with 50 partitions, maintaining consistent speedups.

title: A Long-term Value Prediction Framework In Video Ranking
summary:
Accurately modeling long-term value (LTV) at the ranking stage of short-video recommendation remains challenging. While delayed feedback and extended engagement have been explored, fine-grained attribution and robust position normalization at billion-scale are still underdeveloped. We propose a practical ranking-stage LTV framework addressing three challenges: position bias, attribution ambiguity, and temporal limitations.
  (1) Position bias: We introduce a Position-aware Debias Quantile (PDQ) module that normalizes engagement via quantile-based distributions, enabling position-robust LTV estimation without architectural changes. (2) Attribution ambiguity: We propose a multi-dimensional attribution module that learns continuous attribution strengths across contextual, behavioral, and content signals, replacing static rules to capture nuanced inter-video influence. A customized hybrid loss with explicit noise filtering improves causal clarity. (3) Temporal limitations: We present a cross-temporal author modeling module that builds censoring-aware, day-level LTV targets to capture creator-driven re-engagement over longer horizons; the design is extensible to other dimensions (e.g., topics, styles).
  Offline studies and online A/B tests show significant improvements in LTV metrics and stable trade-offs with short-term objectives. Implemented as task augmentation within an existing ranking model, the framework supports efficient training and serving, and has been deployed at billion-scale in Taobao's production system, delivering sustained engagement gains while remaining compatible with industrial constraints.
translated_summary:
短视频推荐的排序阶段若想精准建模长期价值（LTV）依然极具挑战。尽管延迟反馈和超长消费时长已受到关注，但在十亿级数据场景下，细粒度归因与鲁棒的位置归一化仍缺乏成熟方案。本文提出一套面向排序阶段的实用 LTV 框架，着力解决三大难题：位置偏差、归因歧义与时间局限。

（1）位置偏差：我们设计 Position-aware Debias Quantile（PDQ）模块，通过基于分位数的交互分布对互动次数进行归一化，在不改动主模型结构的前提下，实现位置鲁棒的 LTV 估计。  
（2）归因歧义：提出多维归因模块，将上下文、行为、内容信号映射为连续的归因强度，替代静态规则，精细刻画用户对视频间隐式影响的敏感性；并通过带显式噪声过滤的自定义混合损失，强化因果可解释性。  
（3）时间局限：引入跨时创作者建模模块，基于审校（censoring）感知构建以天为粒度的 LTV 目标，捕捉创作者驱动的长期再消费动机；该设计可拓展至话题、风格等其他维度。

离线实验与线上 A/B 测试均表明，框架在提升 LTV 指标的同时，能与短期目标保持稳定权衡。它以任务增强的形式嵌入现有排序模型，支持高效训练与线上推理，并已在淘宝十亿级环境中上线，持续带来交互增长，且完全兼容工业级约束。

title: LiveGraph: Active-Structure Neural Re-ranking for Exercise Recommendation
summary: The continuous expansion of digital learning environments has catalyzed the demand for intelligent systems capable of providing personalized educational content. While current exercise recommendation frameworks have made significant strides, they frequently encounter obstacles regarding the long-tailed distribution of student engagement and the failure to adapt to idiosyncratic learning trajectories. We present LiveGraph, a novel active-structure neural re-ranking framework designed to overcome these limitations. Our approach utilizes a graph-based representation enhancement strategy to bridge the information gap between active and inactive students while integrating a dynamic re-ranking mechanism to foster content diversity. By prioritizing the structural relationships within learning histories, the proposed model effectively balances recommendation precision with pedagogical variety. Comprehensive experimental evaluations conducted on multiple real-world datasets demonstrate that LiveGraph surpasses contemporary baselines in both predictive accuracy and the breadth of exercise diversity.
translated_summary: 数字学习环境的持续扩张，推动了对能够提供个性化教育内容的智能系统的需求。尽管当前习题推荐框架取得了显著进展，但仍经常遭遇学生参与度长尾分布的困扰，且难以适应个体化的学习轨迹。本研究提出 LiveGraph——一种新型主动结构神经重排序框架，旨在突破上述限制。该框架借助基于图的表征增强策略弥合活跃与沉寂学生之间的信息缺口，并整合了动态重排序机制以促进内容的多样性。通过在学习历史中优先考虑结构关系，本模型在推荐精度与教学多样性之间实现了有效平衡。在多个真实数据集上进行的大量实验表明，LiveGraph 在预测准确性与习题多样性两个维度均优于现有基线。

title: WSDM Cup 2026 Multilingual Retrieval: A Low-Cost Multi-Stage Retrieval Pipeline
summary: We present a low-cost retrieval system for the WSDM Cup 2026 multilingual retrieval task, where English queries are used to retrieve relevant documents from a collection of approximately ten million news articles in Chinese, Persian, and Russian, and to output the top-1000 ranked results for each query. We follow a four-stage pipeline that combines LLM-based GRF-style query expansion with BM25 candidate retrieval, dense ranking using long-text representations from jina-embeddings-v4, and pointwise re-ranking of the top-20 candidates using Qwen3-Reranker-4B while preserving the dense order for the remaining results. On the official evaluation, the system achieves nDCG@20 of 0.403 and Judged@20 of 0.95. We further conduct extensive ablation experiments to quantify the contribution of each stage and to analyze the effectiveness of query expansion, dense ranking, and top-$k$ reranking under limited compute budgets.
translated_summary: 我们提出了一套低成本的检索系统，面向 WSDM Cup 2026 多语言检索任务：系统使用英文查询，从约 1000 万篇包含中文、波斯语和俄语的新闻文档中召回相关文章，并输出每个查询的排名 top-1000 结果。整套流程分四步：先用基于大模型的 GRF 式查询扩展；再用 BM25 生成候选集；接着用 jina-embeddings-v4 的长文本表示做稠密排序；最后用 Qwen3-Reranker-4B 对 top-20 文档做逐点重排，同时保持其余顺序以节省算力。在官方评测中，系统取得 nDCG@20 = 0.403，Judged@20 = 0.95。我们还进行了大量消融实验，从受限算力角度定量评估每阶段贡献，并分析了查询扩展、稠密排序和 top-k 重排的有效性。

title: Bending the Scaling Law Curve in Large-Scale Recommendation Systems
summary: Learning from user interaction history through sequential models has become a cornerstone of large-scale recommender systems. Recent advances in large language models have revealed promising scaling laws, sparking a surge of research into long-sequence modeling and deeper architectures for recommendation tasks. However, many recent approaches rely heavily on cross-attention mechanisms to address the quadratic computational bottleneck in sequential modeling, which can limit the representational power gained from self-attention. We present ULTRA-HSTU, a novel sequential recommendation model developed through end-to-end model and system co-design. By innovating in the design of input sequences, sparse attention mechanisms, and model topology, ULTRA-HSTU achieves substantial improvements in both model quality and efficiency. Comprehensive benchmarking demonstrates that ULTRA-HSTU achieves remarkable scaling efficiency gains -- over 5x faster training scaling and 21x faster inference scaling compared to conventional models -- while delivering superior recommendation quality. Our solution is fully deployed at scale, serving billions of users daily and driving significant 4% to 8% consumption and engagement improvements in real-world production environments.
translated_summary: 通过序列模型从用户交互历史中学习，已成为大规模推荐系统的核心手段。近期大语言模型揭示了可扩展的“规律”，推动了针对推荐任务的长序列建模与更深网络架构研究热潮。但许多最新方法为应对序列建模中的 O(N²) 计算瓶颈，严重依赖交叉注意力机制，反而牺牲了自注意力赋予的表征能力。为此，我们提出 ULTRA-HSTU——一种通过端到端模型与系统协同设计的序列推荐模型。通过在输入序列构造、稀疏注意力机制及模型拓扑结构上协同创新，ULTRA-HSTU 在模型质量与效率两端均取得显著提升。全面基准测试显示，其可扩展效率前所未有：训练扩展速度提升 5 倍以上，推理扩展速度提升 21 倍，超越传统模型；推荐质量亦不落下风。该方案已全量上线，每日为数亿用户服务，在生产环境中带来 4%~8% 的可见用量与互动增长。

title: Beyond Chunk-Then-Embed: A Comprehensive Taxonomy and Evaluation of Document Chunking Strategies for Information Retrieval
summary:
Document chunking is a critical preprocessing step in dense retrieval systems, yet the design space of chunking strategies remains poorly understood. Recent research has proposed several concurrent approaches, including LLM-guided methods (e.g., DenseX and LumberChunker) and contextualized strategies(e.g., Late Chunking), which generate embeddings before segmentation to preserve contextual information. However, these methods emerged independently and were evaluated on benchmarks with minimal overlap, making direct comparisons difficult.
  This paper reproduces prior studies in document chunking and presents a systematic framework that unifies existing strategies along two key dimensions: (1) segmentation methods, including structure-based methods (fixed-size, sentence-based, and paragraph-based) as well as semantically-informed and LLM-guided methods; and (2) embedding paradigms, which determine the timing of chunking relative to embedding (pre-embedding chunking vs. contextualized chunking). Our reproduction evaluates these approaches in two distinct retrieval settings established in previous work: in-document retrieval (needle-in-a-haystack) and in-corpus retrieval (the standard information retrieval task).
  Our comprehensive evaluation reveals that optimal chunking strategies are task-dependent: simple structure-based methods outperform LLM-guided alternatives for in-corpus retrieval, while LumberChunker performs best for in-document retrieval. Contextualized chunking improves in-corpus effectiveness but degrades in-document retrieval. We also find that chunk size correlates moderately with in-document but weakly with in-corpus effectiveness, suggesting segmentation method differences are not purely driven by chunk size. Our code and evaluation benchmarks are publicly available at (Anonymoused).
translated_summary:
文档分块是稠密检索系统的关键预处理步骤，但分块策略的设计空间尚未得到充分理解。近期研究提出了多种并行方法，包括 LLM 引导方法（如 DenseX 和 LumberChunker）及上下文感知方法（如 Late Chunking），后者在分割前先产生嵌入，以保留上下文信息。由于这些方法独立出现，且在与彼此仅有极小重叠的不同基准上评估，直接比较困难。

本文复现了以往关于文档分块的研究，提出系统化的统一框架，从两个核心维度整合既有策略：(1) 分割方法，包括基于结构的方法（固定长度、基于句子、基于段落）以及语义感知和 LLM 引导的方法；(2) 嵌入范式，即决定在嵌入前还是嵌入后进行分块（嵌入前分块 vs. 上下文感知分块）。我们在两篇既有研究提出的两种检索场景中复现并评价这些方法：一种是“文档内检索”（大海捞针），另一种是“全库检索”（标准信息检索任务）。

全面评估表明，分块策略的最佳选择依赖任务本身：在全库检索中，简单的基于结构的方法优于 LLM 引导方案；而在文档内检索中，LumberChunker 表现最好。上下文感知分块提升了全库检索效果，但却损害了文档内检索性能。此外，我们发现块大小与文档内检索效果呈中等相关，但与全库检索效果关联较弱，表明分割方法带来的差异并非单纯由块大小驱动。本文代码及评价基准已公开（已匿名）。

title: SAGE: Structure Aware Graph Expansion for Retrieval of Heterogeneous Data
summary: Retrieval-augmented question answering over heterogeneous corpora requires connected evidence across text, tables, and graph nodes. While entity-level knowledge graphs support structured access, they are costly to construct and maintain, and inefficient to traverse at query time. In contrast, standard retriever-reader pipelines use flat similarity search over independently chunked text, missing multi-hop evidence chains across modalities. We propose SAGE (Structure Aware Graph Expansion) framework that (i) constructs a chunk-level graph offline using metadata-driven similarities with percentile-based pruning, and (ii) performs online retrieval by running an initial baseline retriever to obtain k seed chunks, expanding first-hop neighbors, and then filtering the neighbors using dense+sparse retrieval, selecting k' additional chunks. We instantiate the initial retriever using hybrid dense+sparse retrieval for implicit cross-modal corpora and SPARK (Structure Aware Planning Agent for Retrieval over Knowledge Graphs) an agentic retriever for explicit schema graphs. On OTT-QA and STaRK, SAGE improves retrieval recall by 5.7 and 8.5 points over baselines.
translated_summary:
针对异构语料库上的检索增强问答系统，需在文本、表格与图节点之间串联跨模态、多跳的关联证据。现有实体级知识图谱虽可提供结构化访问，却面临构建与维护成本高、查询时遍历效率低的困境；而传统的“检索器–阅读器”流水线仅对独立分块的文本作平面相似度搜索，无法跨模态捕获多跳证据链。本文提出 SAGE（Structure Aware Graph Expansion）框架，其核心为：  
(i) 离线构建基于“分块”级别的图，以元数据驱动的相似度为边，并按百分位阈值进行剪枝；  
(ii) 在线检索时，先启动一个基线检索器获得 k 个种子块，再扩展其一跳邻域，并通过稠密+稀疏混合检索过滤，精选 k' 个额外块。  

我们分别用两种检索器实例化 SAGE：  
• 对隐式跨模态语料，采用稠密+稀疏混合检索；  
• 对显式模式图，则引入 SPARK（Structure Aware Planning Agent for Retrieval over Knowledge Graphs）——一个具备策略规划的“智能体”检索器。  

在 OTT-QA 和 STaRK 基准上，SAGE 将检索召回率分别提升 5.7 与 8.5 个百分点，显著超越基线。

title: RankEvolve: Automating the Discovery of Retrieval Algorithms via LLM-Driven Evolution
summary: Retrieval algorithms like BM25 and query likelihood with Dirichlet smoothing remain strong and efficient first-stage rankers, yet improvements have mostly relied on parameter tuning and human intuition. We investigate whether a large language model, guided by an evaluator and evolutionary search, can automatically discover improved lexical retrieval algorithms. We introduce RankEvolve, a program evolution setup based on AlphaEvolve, in which candidate ranking algorithms are represented as executable code and iteratively mutated, recombined, and selected based on retrieval performance across 12 IR datasets from BEIR and BRIGHT. RankEvolve starts from two seed programs: BM25 and query likelihood with Dirichlet smoothing. The evolved algorithms are novel, effective, and show promising transfer to the full BEIR and BRIGHT benchmarks as well as TREC DL 19 and 20. Our results suggest that evaluator-guided LLM program evolution is a practical path towards automatic discovery of novel ranking algorithms.
translated_summary: 尽管 BM25 和带 Dirichlet 平滑的查询似然仍是高效强劲的首轮排序器，近年来的改进大多局限于调参与人工启发。本研究探索：若在评估器引导和进化搜索协同下，大型语言模型能否自动发现更优的词汇级检索算法。我们提出 RankEvolve——一套基于 AlphaEvolve 的程序演化框架，将候选排序算法表示为可执行代码，并通过迭代变异、重组与选择，依据 12 个 BEIR 与 BRIGHT 信息检索数据集上的检索性能进行淘汰。RankEvolve 以两种种子程序（BM25 与带 Dirichlet 平滑的查询似然）起步，最终演化出一组新颖且效果显著的算法。这些算法不仅能在完整 BEIR 和 BRIGHT 基准上泛化，还对 TREC DL 19、20 展现良好迁移性。实验结果表明，由评估器引导的大语言模型程序演化是自动发现新型排序算法的可行途径。

title: VIRAASAT: Traversing Novel Paths for Indian Cultural Reasoning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made significant progress in reasoning tasks across various domains such as mathematics and coding. However, their performance deteriorates in tasks requiring rich socio-cultural knowledge and diverse local contexts, particularly those involving Indian Culture. Existing Cultural benchmarks are (i) Manually crafted, (ii) contain single-hop questions testing factual recall, and (iii) prohibitively costly to scale, leaving this deficiency largely unmeasured. To address this, we introduce VIRAASAT, a novel, semi-automated multi-hop approach for generating cultural specific multi-hop Question-Answering dataset for Indian culture. VIRAASAT leverages a Knowledge Graph comprising more than 700 expert-curated cultural artifacts, covering 13 key attributes of Indian culture (history, festivals, etc). VIRAASAT spans all 28 states and 8 Union Territories, yielding more than 3,200 multi-hop questions that necessitate chained cultural reasoning. We evaluate current State-of-the-Art (SOTA) LLMs on VIRAASAT and identify key limitations in reasoning wherein fine-tuning on Chain-of-Thought(CoT) traces fails to ground and synthesize low-probability facts. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel framework named Symbolic Chain-of-Manipulation (SCoM). Adapting the Chain-of-Manipulation paradigm, we train the model to simulate atomic Knowledge Graph manipulations internally. SCoM teaches the model to reliably traverse the topological structure of the graph. Experiments on Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) demonstrate that SCoM outperforms standard CoT baselines by up to 20%. We release the VIRAASAT dataset along with our findings, laying a strong foundation towards building Culturally Aware Reasoning Models.
translated_summary:
大语言模型（LLM）在数学与编程等推理任务上已取得长足进展，但其一旦遇到需要深厚社会文化知识、尤其涉及印度本土语境的任务，性能便显著下降。现有文化基准主要面临三大局限：（i）完全人工构建，（ii）仅含单跳问题且侧重事实记忆，（iii）规模扩展成本极高，导致这一缺陷长期缺乏系统度量。

针对上述痛点，我们提出 VIRAASAT——一种面向印度文化的全新半自动化多跳数据集生成方法，用于文化特化的多跳问答。VIRAASAT 依托一个包含 700 余件经专家遴选文化遗产的知识图谱，涵盖印度文化的 13 大维度（如历史、节日等），并遍历印度 28 个邦与 8 个联邦属地，最终产出 3,200 余条需链式文化推理的多跳问题。

我们在 VIRAASAT 上评测了当前最先进的 LLM，发现其关键弱点在于缺乏真正落地的文化推理：即便使用链式思维（CoT）训练，模型仍难以整合并推理低频事实。为弥补这一缺口，我们提出“符号链式操纵”（SCoM）框架。该框架借鉴 Chain-of-Manipulation 思想，让模型内部模拟原子级的知识图谱操作，从而可靠遍历图谱拓扑。监督微调实验表明，SCoM 在标准 CoT 基线上最高可提升 20% 的准确率。

最终，我们公开发布 VIRAASAT 数据集及全部实验结果，为构建真正具备文化意识的大语言模型奠定坚实基础。

title: RVR: Retrieve-Verify-Retrieve for Comprehensive Question Answering
summary: Comprehensively retrieving diverse documents is crucial to address queries that admit a wide range of valid answers. We introduce retrieve-verify-retrieve (RVR), a multi-round retrieval framework designed to maximize answer coverage. Initially, a retriever takes the original query and returns a candidate document set, followed by a verifier that identifies a high-quality subset. For subsequent rounds, the query is augmented with previously verified documents to uncover answers that are not yet covered in previous rounds. RVR is effective even with off-the-shelf retrievers, and fine-tuning retrievers for our inference procedure brings further gains. Our method outperforms baselines, including agentic search approaches, achieving at least 10% relative and 3% absolute gain in complete recall percentage on a multi-answer retrieval dataset (QAMPARI). We also see consistent gains on two out-of-domain datasets (QUEST and WebQuestionsSP) across different base retrievers. Our work presents a promising iterative approach for comprehensive answer recall leveraging a verifier and adapting retrievers to a new inference scenario.
translated_summary: 全面覆盖多种文档是处理那些存在大量合理答案查询的关键。我们提出“检索—验证—再检索”（RVR）这一多轮检索框架，旨在最大化答案覆盖率。框架先用一个检索器根据原始查询返回候选文档集合，再由验证器从中筛选出高质量子集。在后续轮次中，查询被进一步扩充之前已验证的文档，以挖掘尚未被覆盖的新答案。RVR 即便配合即用型检索器也表现良好；若针对此推理过程微调检索器，则可获得更大提升。我们的方法在多方答案检索数据集 QAMPARI 上显著优于包括 Agent 式搜索在内的各项基线，完整召回率的相对提升至少为 10%，绝对提升达 3%。在跨领域数据集 QUEST 和 WebQuestionsSP 上，使用不同基础检索器亦取得一致增益。本文展示了一种借助验证器、并通过适配检索器以应对新推理场景的迭代式全面答案召回新思路。

title: A Topology-Aware Positive Sample Set Construction and Feature Optimization Method in Implicit Collaborative Filtering
summary: Negative sampling strategies are widely used in implicit collaborative filtering to address issues like data sparsity and class imbalance. However, these methods often introduce false negatives, hindering the model's ability to accurately learn users' latent preferences. To mitigate this problem, existing methods adjust the negative sampling distribution based on statistical features from model training or the hardness of negative samples. Nevertheless, these methods face two key limitations: (1) over-reliance on the model's current representation capabilities; (2) failure to leverage the potential of false negatives as latent positive samples to guide model learning of user preferences more accurately. To address the above issues, we propose a Topology-aware Positive Sample Set Construction and Feature Optimization method (TPSC-FO). First, we design a simple topological community-aware false negative identification (FNI) method and observe that topological community structures in interaction networks can effectively identify false negatives. Motivated by this, we develop a topology-aware positive sample set construction module. This module employs a differential community detection strategy to capture topological community structures in implicit feedback, coupled with personalized noise filtration to reliably identify false negatives and convert them into positive samples. Additionally, we introduce a neighborhood-guided feature optimization module that refines positive sample features by incorporating neighborhood features in the embedding space, effectively mitigating noise in the positive samples. Extensive experiments on five real-world datasets and two synthetic datasets validate the effectiveness of TPSC-FO.
translated_summary:
负采样策略在隐式协同过滤中被广泛用于解决数据稀疏与类别不平衡等问题。然而，此类方法往往引入虚假负样本，阻碍模型准确学习用户的潜在偏好。为减轻这一问题，现有方法依循模型训练中的统计特征或负样本的“难度”来调整负采样分布，但受限于两大缺陷：（1）过度依赖模型当前的表征能力；（2）未能将虚假负样本视作潜在的正样本并借此更准确地指导用户偏好学习。

为此，我们提出一种“拓扑感知正样本集构建与特征优化方法（TPSC-FO）”。首先，我们设计了一个简洁的拓扑社群感知虚假负样本识别（FNI）策略，并观察到交互网络中的拓扑社群结构可有效定位虚假负样本。受此启发，我们开发了拓扑感知正样本集构建模块：该模块通过可微分社群检测策略捕获隐式反馈中的拓扑社群结构，并结合个性化噪声过滤来可靠地识别虚假负样本，并将其转化为正样本。此外，我们引入了邻域引导的特征优化模块：通过在嵌入空间中融入邻域特征来精炼正样本表示，有效抑制正样本中的噪声。

在五个真实数据集和两个合成数据集上的大量实验验证了TPSC-FO的有效性。

title: HyTRec: A Hybrid Temporal-Aware Attention Architecture for Long Behavior Sequential Recommendation
summary: Modeling long sequences of user behaviors has emerged as a critical frontier in generative recommendation. However, existing solutions face a dilemma: linear attention mechanisms achieve efficiency at the cost of retrieval precision due to limited state capacity, while softmax attention suffers from prohibitive computational overhead. To address this challenge, we propose HyTRec, a model featuring a Hybrid Attention architecture that explicitly decouples long-term stable preferences from short-term intent spikes. By assigning massive historical sequences to a linear attention branch and reserving a specialized softmax attention branch for recent interactions, our approach restores precise retrieval capabilities within industrial-scale contexts involving ten thousand interactions. To mitigate the lag in capturing rapid interest drifts within the linear layers, we furthermore design Temporal-Aware Delta Network (TADN) to dynamically upweight fresh behavioral signals while effectively suppressing historical noise. Empirical results on industrial-scale datasets confirm the superiority that our model maintains linear inference speed and outperforms strong baselines, notably delivering over 8% improvement in Hit Rate for users with ultra-long sequences with great efficiency.
translated_summary: 长序列用户行为建模已成为生成式推荐的关键前沿。现有方法陷入两难：线性注意力机制在降低训练推理成本的同时，由于状态表达容量受限而牺牲了检索精度；而传统的 softmax 注意力虽能精确定位，却伴随不可承受的计算开销。为此，我们提出 HyTRec，采用“混合注意力”架构，显式地将长期稳定偏好与短期兴趣脉冲解耦。具体来说，将海量历史序列输入线性注意力分支，同时用专门的 softmax 注意力分支专注于最近交互，从而在保证工业级万级交互场景线速推断的前提下恢复检索精度。为避免线性模块在捕捉快速兴趣漂移时产生的延迟，我们进一步设计时间感知增量网络（TADN），动态增强新鲜行为信号并有效抑制历史噪声。在多项工业级数据集上的实验表明，HyTRec 以线性推断速度优于多个强基线，对超长序列用户的命中率提升超过 8%。

title: Dual-Tree LLM-Enhanced Negative Sampling for Implicit Collaborative Filtering
summary:
Negative sampling is a pivotal technique in implicit collaborative filtering (CF) recommendation, enabling efficient and effective training by contrasting observed interactions with sampled unobserved ones.
  Recently, large language models (LLMs) have shown promise in recommender systems; however, research on LLM-empowered negative sampling remains underexplored.
  Existing methods heavily rely on textual information and task-specific fine-tuning, limiting practical applicability.
  To address this limitation, we propose a text-free and fine-tuning-free Dual-Tree LLM-enhanced Negative Sampling method (DTL-NS).
  It consists of two modules: (i) an offline false negative identification module that leverages hierarchical index trees to transform collaborative structural and latent semantic information into structured item-ID encodings for LLM inference, enabling accurate identification of false negatives; and (ii) a multi-view hard negative sampling module that combines user-item preference scores with item-item hierarchical similarities from these encodings to mine high-quality hard negatives, thus improving models' discriminative ability.
  Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of DTL-NS. For example, on the Amazon-sports dataset, DTL-NS outperforms the strongest baseline by 10.64% and 19.12% in Recall@20 and NDCG@20, respectively.
  Moreover, DTL-NS can be integrated into various implicit CF models and negative sampling methods, consistently enhancing their performance.
translated_summary:
负采样是隐式协同过滤（CF）推荐中的关键技术，通过将已观察到的交互信号与采样的未观察负样本进行对比来实现高效而有效的训练。
近年来，尽管大语言模型（LLM）在推荐系统中表现出极大潜力，但针对 LLM驱动的负采样研究仍几乎空白。
现有方法严重依赖文本信息并对具体任务进行微调，这在实际应用中具有很大局限。
为此，本文提出了一种完全摆脱文本与微调的树-双重 LLM 增强负采样方法（DTL-NS）。
它包含两个模块：（1）离线假负例识别模块，利用层次化索引树将协同过滤的结构信息和潜在语义信息转化为结构化的物品ID编码，用以支持 LLM 推理，从而实现对假负例的精准定位；（2）多视角困难负采样模块，结合用户-物品偏好评分以及物品间基于上述编码的层级相似度，挖掘高质量困难负例，从而增强模型的判别能力。
大量实验验证了 DTL-NS 的有效性。例如，在 Amazon-sports 数据集上，DTL-NS 在 Recall@20 和 NDCG@20 指标上相较最强基线分别提升 10.64% 和 19.12%。
此外，DTL-NS 可无缝嵌入多种隐式 CF 模型及负采样方法，持续带来性能增益。

title: The Economical-Ecological Benefits of Matching Non-matching Socks
summary: Socks are produced and replaced at a massive scale, yet their paired use makes them unusually vulnerable to waste, as the loss of a single sock can strand usable wear-capacity and trigger premature replacement. In this study, we quantify the economic and ecological value of pairing non-matching \say{orphan} socks, and the social cost that discourages this behaviour. We formalize sock ownership as a sequential decision problem under uncertainty in which socks wear out and disappear stochastically during laundering, while public exposure induces a person-specific mismatch penalty. We conducted an in-person study to estimate mismatch sensitivity and diversity preference, linking behavioural heterogeneity to optimal mixing strategies. Using these results and a computer simulation-based evaluation of interpretable pairing policies, we show that strict matching can appear resource-frugal largely because it generates many sockless days, whereas controlled tolerance for mismatch sustains service and reduces stranded capacity across loss regimes. This study establishes the feasibility of matching non-matching socks while outlining its limitations and challenges.
translated_summary: 袜子在生产与替换方面规模巨大，但因其“成双使用”特性而易遭浪费：只要丢失一只，另一半往往就无法派上用场，导致“穿用能力”被搁置，并提前触发整体更换。本文量化评估了将花色不配的“孤儿袜”重新配对的生态与经济价值，以及阻碍这一行为的社交成本。我们把拥有袜子建模为一个在不确定性下的序贯决策问题：袜子在洗涤过程中随机磨损和消失，而“公开暴露”会使人产生个体差异化的错配心理成本。我们通过线下实验测定人们对花色错配的敏感度以及对多样性本身的偏好，将行为异质性与最优混合策略联系起来。在计算机模拟中对可解释的配对策略进行评估后发现：严格追求同花同式之所以看似节俭，是因为它带来了大量“无袜可穿”的日子；而有控制的错配容忍度既能维持衣物服务，也能在各类遗失情境下显著降低闲置容量。本研究论证了将非配对袜重新配对的可行性，并阐明其局限与挑战。

title: A Simple yet Effective Negative Sampling Plugin for Constructing Positive Sample Pairs in Implicit Collaborative Filtering
summary: Most implicit collaborative filtering (CF) models are trained with negative sampling, where existing work designs sophisticated strategies for high-quality negatives while largely overlooking the exploration of positive samples. Although some denoising recommendation methods can be applied to implicit CF for denoising positive samples, they often sparsify positive supervision. Moreover, these approaches generally overlook user activity bias during training, leading to insufficient learning for inactive users. To address these issues, we propose a simple yet effective negative sampling plugin, PSP-NS, from the perspective of enhancing positive supervision signals. It builds a user-item bipartite graph with edge weights indicating interaction confidence inferred from global and local patterns, generates positive sample pairs via replication-based reweighting to strengthen positive signals, and adopts an activity-aware weighting scheme to effectively learn inactive users' preferences. We provide theoretical insights from a margin-improvement perspective, explaining why PSP-NS tends to improve ranking quality (e.g., Precision@k/Recall@k), and conduct extensive experiments on four real-world datasets to demonstrate its superiority. For instance, PSP-NS boosts Recall@30 and Precision@30 by 32.11% and 22.90% on Yelp over the strongest baselines. PSP-NS can be integrated with various implicit CF recommenders or negative sampling methods to enhance their performance.
translated_summary:
大多数基于隐式反馈的协同过滤（CF）模型采用负采样训练，现有工作聚焦于设计精巧的负采样策略来生成高质量负样本，却鲜有人关注正样本信号的挖掘与放大。尽管部分去噪推荐方法可应用于隐式 CF，但其核心目的是过滤噪声的正样本，往往导致正向监督信号稀疏。此外，这些方法在训练阶段普遍忽视用户活跃度差异，造成模型对低频用户的偏好表征不足。

为解决上述问题，本文提出一个简洁而有效的负采样插件 PSP-NS，从“强化正样本监督信号”的全新视角入手提升隐式 CF。具体而言，该方法：

1) 构建用户–商品二分图，边权由全局与局部模式推断的交互置信度确定；  
2) 通过基于复制（replication-based）的重加权机制生成正样本对，进一步放大正向信号；  
3) 设计活跃度感知加权方案，提升模型对非活跃用户的学习能力。

我们从“Margin Improvement”角度给出理论分析，阐明 PSP-NS 为何能显著提升排序质量（如 Precision@k、Recall@k）。在四个真实世界数据集上的大量实验表明，PSP-NS 具备显著优势。例如，在 Yelp 数据集上，PSP-NS 相较最强基线将 Recall@30 提升 32.11%，Precision@30 提升 22.90%。此外，PSP-NS 可即插即用地集成至多种隐式 CF 模型或负采样方法中，进一步提升其性能。

title: SuiteEval: Simplifying Retrieval Benchmarks
summary: Information retrieval evaluation often suffers from fragmented practices -- varying dataset subsets, aggregation methods, and pipeline configurations -- that undermine reproducibility and comparability, especially for foundation embedding models requiring robust out-of-domain performance. We introduce SuiteEval, a unified framework that offers automatic end-to-end evaluation, dynamic indexing that reuses on-disk indices to minimise disk usage, and built-in support for major benchmarks (BEIR, LoTTE, MS MARCO, NanoBEIR, and BRIGHT). Users only need to supply a pipeline generator. SuiteEval handles data loading, indexing, ranking, metric computation, and result aggregation. New benchmark suites can be added in a single line. SuiteEval reduces boilerplate and standardises evaluations to facilitate reproducible IR research, as a broader benchmark set is increasingly required.
translated_summary: 信息检索评估常因实践碎片化而受损：数据集子集不同、聚合方法各异、流水线配置不一致，这些问题对需要稳健跨域表现的基础嵌入模型尤为严重，阻碍了结果的可复现性与可比性。我们提出 SuiteEval，一个统一框架，支持端到端的自动化评估，引入动态索引以复用磁盘索引、最小化磁盘占用；并提供对主要基准（BEIR、LoTTE、MS MARCO、NanoBEIR、BRIGHT）的内置支持。用户仅需提供流水线生成器，SuiteEval 便接管数据加载、索引构建、排序、指标计算与结果聚合；新增基准套件仅需一行命令。SuiteEval 减少样板代码，标准化评估流程，助力可复现的 IR 研究，契合越来越广泛基准集的迫切需求。

title: Decomposing Retrieval Failures in RAG for Long-Document Financial Question Answering
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation is increasingly used for financial question answering over long regulatory filings, yet reliability depends on retrieving the exact context needed to justify answers in high stakes settings. We study a frequent failure mode in which the correct document is retrieved but the page or chunk that contains the answer is missed, leading the generator to extrapolate from incomplete context. Despite its practical significance, this within-document retrieval failure mode has received limited systematic attention in the Financial Question Answering (QA) literature. We evaluate retrieval at multiple levels of granularity, document, page, and chunk level, and introduce an oracle based analysis to provide empirical upper bounds on retrieval and generative performance. On a 150 question subset of FinanceBench, we reproduce and compare diverse retrieval strategies including dense, sparse, hybrid, and hierarchical methods with reranking and query reformulation. Across methods, gains in document discovery tend to translate into stronger page recall, yet oracle performance still suggests headroom for page and chunk level retrieval. To target this gap, we introduce a domain fine-tuned page scorer that treats pages as an intermediate retrieval unit between documents and chunks. Unlike prior passage-based hierarchical retrieval, we fine-tune a bi-encoder specifically for page-level relevance on financial filings, exploiting the semantic coherence of pages. Overall, our results demonstrate a significant improvement in page recall and chunk retrieval.
translated_summary:
针对金融领域的问答场景，基于检索增强生成（RAG）已被广泛用于从冗长的监管文件中作答，但在高风险的场景里，其可靠性仍高度依赖于能否精准检索到用于支撑答案的上下文。我们研究了一个常见的失败模式：虽已正确召回目标文档，却未能命中含答案的页面或片段，导致生成器只能基于残缺上下文进行推断。尽管该“文档内检索失效”问题在实践中后果严重，金融问答（QA）领域对其缺乏系统性的研究。

本文从三个粒度——文档级、页面级和片段级——对检索能力进行评估，并设计基于 Oracle 的分析方法，给出检索与生成的实证性能上界。在我们从 FinanceBench 中抽取的 150 个问题子集上，复现并比较了多种检索策略，包括稠密、稀疏、混合、层次式方法，并结合重排序与查询改写。实验发现：各方法提升文档发现率的同时通常会同步提高页面召回率，但 Oracle 分析表明页面级与片段级仍有显著差距。

为缩小这一差距，我们提出一种领域微调的页面评分器：将“页面”视为介于“文档”与“片段”的中介检索单元。不同于以往基于段落的层次检索，我们专门针对金融监管文件微调了一个双编码器，用于页面级相关性建模，充分利用了文档页面天然的语义连贯性。综合实验结果表明，该方法显著提升了页面召回率和片段检索精度。

title: Efficient Filtered-ANN via Learning-based Query Planning
summary: Filtered ANN search is an increasingly important problem in vector retrieval, yet systems face a difficult trade-off due to the execution order: Pre-filtering (filtering first, then ANN over the passing subset) requires expensive per-predicate index construction, while post-filtering (ANN first, then filtering candidates) may waste computation and lose recall under low selectivity due to insufficient candidates after filtering. We introduce a learning-based query planning framework that dynamically selects the most effective execution plan for each query, using lightweight predictions derived from dataset and query statistics (e.g., dimensionality, corpus size, distribution features, and predicate statistics). The framework supports diverse filter types, including categorical/keyword and range predicates, and is generic to use any backend ANN index. Experiments show that our method achieves up to 4x acceleration with >= 90% recall comparing to the strong baselines.
translated_summary: 过滤式近似最近邻检索（filtered ANN search）在向量检索中的重要性日益凸显，但现有系统在执行顺序上面临两难抉择：先过滤后检索需在子集上做昂贵的按谓词构建索引；先检索后过滤则可能因低选择率导致候选不足而浪费计算并丢失召回。我们提出一种基于学习的查询调度框架，能够针对每条查询动态选择最优执行方案。该框架利用数据集和查询统计量（维度、语料规模、分布特征及谓词统计）得出的轻量级预测结果做出决策，支持包括类别/关键字和范围谓词在内的多种过滤类型，并可与任意后端 ANN 索引通用。实验表明，相较于强基线，我们的方法在召回率 ≥ 90% 的同时可带来最高 4 倍的加速。

title: Enhancing Scientific Literature Chatbots with Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Performance Evaluation of Vector and Graph-Based Systems
summary: This paper investigates the enhancement of scientific literature chatbots through retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), with a focus on evaluating vector- and graph-based retrieval systems. The proposed chatbot leverages both structured (graph) and unstructured (vector) databases to access scientific articles and gray literature, enabling efficient triage of sources according to research objectives. To systematically assess performance, we examine two use-case scenarios: retrieval from a single uploaded document and retrieval from a large-scale corpus. Benchmark test sets were generated using a GPT model, with selected outputs annotated for evaluation. The comparative analysis emphasizes retrieval accuracy and response relevance, providing insight into the strengths and limitations of each approach. The findings demonstrate the potential of hybrid RAG systems to improve accessibility to scientific knowledge and to support evidence-based decision making.
translated_summary: 本研究探讨了基于检索增强生成（RAG）技术对科学文献聊天机器人的改进，重点评估了基于向量与基于图谱的检索系统。该聊天机器人同时利用结构化（图）和非结构化（向量）数据库访问科研论文与灰色文献，从而能够根据研究目标高效地对信息源进行分类。为了系统评估性能，我们设计了两组实验：从单篇上传文档中检索与从大规模语料库中检索。基准测试集由 GPT 生成，并对其部分输出进行了人工标注。对比分析聚焦于检索准确率和回答相关性，以揭示两种方法的优势与局限。研究结果表明，混合 RAG 系统能够显著提升科学知识的可及性，并支持循证决策。

title: VQPP: Video Query Performance Prediction Benchmark
summary: Query performance prediction (QPP) is an important and actively studied information retrieval task, having various applications, such as query reformulation, query expansion, and retrieval system selection, among many others. The task has been primarily studied in the context of text and image retrieval, whereas QPP for content-based video retrieval (CBVR) remains largely underexplored. To this end, we propose the first benchmark for video query performance prediction (VQPP), comprising two text-to-video retrieval datasets and two CBVR systems, respectively. VQPP contains a total of 56K text queries and 51K videos, and comes with official training, validation and test splits, fostering direct comparisons and reproducible results. We explore multiple pre-retrieval and post-retrieval performance predictors, creating a representative benchmark for future exploration of QPP in the video domain. Our results show that pre-retrieval predictors obtain competitive performance, enabling applications before performing the retrieval step. We also demonstrate the applicability of VQPP by employing the best performing pre-retrieval predictor as reward model for training a large language model (LLM) on the query reformulation task via direct preference optimization (DPO). We release our benchmark and code at https://github.com/AdrianLutu/VQPP.
translated_summary:
查询性能预测（QPP）是一项重要且备受关注的信息检索任务，其应用涵盖查询改写、查询扩展、检索系统选择等诸多方面。该任务目前主要在文本与图像检索场景中得到深入研究，而面向基于内容的视频检索（CBVR）的QPP尚未系统探究。为此，我们提出了首个“视频查询性能预测（VQPP）基准”。该基准涵盖两个文本到视频检索数据集以及两个CBVR系统，共包含56 000条文本查询与51 000支视频，并配有官方的训练、验证与测试划分，以促进直接对比与可重现研究。

我们系统评测了多种检索前（pre-retrieval）与检索后（post-retrieval）的性能预测器，为视频领域的QPP后续研究打造了一个代表性基准。实验证明，检索前预测器即可获得竞争性能，支持在不执行检索步骤的前提下进行应用。进一步地，我们验证了VQPP的实用性：将表现最优的检索前预测器作为奖励模型，通过直接偏好优化（DPO）策略，在大语言模型（LLM）的查询改写任务中带来显著提升。我们在以下网址公开了基准与代码：https://github.com/AdrianLutu/VQPP

title: KNIGHT: Knowledge Graph-Driven Multiple-Choice Question Generation with Adaptive Hardness Calibration
summary: With the rise of large language models (LLMs), they have become instrumental in applications such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Yet evaluating these systems remains bottlenecked by the time and cost of building specialized assessment datasets. We introduce KNIGHT, an LLM-based, knowledge-graph-driven framework for generating multiple-choice question (MCQ) datasets from external sources. KNIGHT constructs a topic-specific knowledge graph, a structured and parsimonious summary of entities and relations, that can be reused to generate instructor-controlled difficulty levels, including multi-hop questions, without repeatedly re-feeding the full source text. This knowledge graph acts as a compressed, reusable state, making question generation a cheap read over the graph. We instantiate KNIGHT on Wikipedia/Wikidata while keeping the framework domain- and ontology-agnostic. As a case study, KNIGHT produces six MCQ datasets in History, Biology, and Mathematics. We evaluate quality on five criteria: fluency, unambiguity (single correct answer), topic relevance, option uniqueness, and answerability given the provided sources (as a proxy for hallucination). Results show that KNIGHT enables token- and cost-efficient generation from a reusable graph representation, achieves high quality across these criteria, and yields model rankings aligned with MMLU-style benchmarks, while supporting topic-specific and difficulty-controlled evaluation.
translated_summary:
随着大型语言模型（LLM）的兴起，它们在检索增强生成（RAG）等应用中的重要性日益凸显。然而，构建专用评估数据集所需的时间与成本仍是系统评估的主要瓶颈。为此，我们提出 KNIGHT：一个基于 LLM、以知识图谱为核心的多选题（MCQ）数据集自动生成框架。KNIGHT 首先针对特定主题构建知识图谱，该图谱以高度结构化的形式总结实体及其关系，可作为压缩且可复用的“中间状态”反复使用，从而在不重喂完整原始文本的情况下，按教师需求生成不同难度的题目，包括多跳推理题。换言之，问题生成仅需对图谱进行一次轻量级的读取即可完成。

我们在 Wikipedia/Wikidata 上实体化该框架，同时保持其与具体领域和本体论的独立性。作为案例研究，KNIGHT 生成了历史、生物、数学等三门学科的共计六个多选题数据集。我们从以下五项指标评估题目质量：语言流畅性、答案唯一性、主题相关性、选项互斥性以及基于给定来源的可答复性（作为幻觉现象的代理）。实验表明，KNIGHT 以图谱作为可复用表征，实现了代币与成本高效的生成，在所有评价维度上均获得高质量表现；其产出的模型排名亦与 MMLU 式基准保持一致，同时支持主题聚焦和难度可控的评测。

title: NanoKnow: How to Know What Your Language Model Knows
summary: How do large language models (LLMs) know what they know? Answering this question has been difficult because pre-training data is often a "black box" -- unknown or inaccessible. The recent release of nanochat -- a family of small LLMs with fully open pre-training data -- addresses this as it provides a transparent view into where a model's parametric knowledge comes from. Towards the goal of understanding how knowledge is encoded by LLMs, we release NanoKnow, a benchmark dataset that partitions questions from Natural Questions and SQuAD into splits based on whether their answers are present in nanochat's pre-training corpus. Using these splits, we can now properly disentangle the sources of knowledge that LLMs rely on when producing an output. To demonstrate NanoKnow's utility, we conduct experiments using eight nanochat checkpoints. Our findings show: (1) closed-book accuracy is strongly influenced by answer frequency in the pre-training data, (2) providing external evidence can mitigate this frequency dependence, (3) even with external evidence, models are more accurate when answers were seen during pre-training, demonstrating that parametric and external knowledge are complementary, and (4) non-relevant information is harmful, with accuracy decreasing based on both the position and the number of non-relevant contexts. We release all NanoKnow artifacts at https://github.com/castorini/NanoKnow.
translated_summary:
大型语言模型（LLM）如何知道自己所知的内容？这一问题长久以来难以回答，因为预训练数据往往如同“黑箱”——既未知又不可访问。近期发布的 NanoChat 模型家族通过完全开放的预训练数据为破解黑箱提供了契机，使我们得以一目了然地追溯模型参数化知识的来源。为了探究 LLM 如何编码知识，我们提出并开源了 NanoKnow 基准数据集：它把 Natural Questions 和 SQuAD 中的问答对按“答案是否出现在 NanoChat 预训练语料”切分成若干子集。借助这些划分，我们首次能够明确区分模型输出所依赖的知识究竟是来源于参数化记忆还是外部资料。

为验证 NanoKnow 的实用价值，我们基于八个 NanoChat 检查点开展实验，发现：  
(1) 闭卷准确率高度受答案在预训练语料中出现频率的支配；  
(2) 给模型提供外部证据可以显著降低这种频率依赖；  
(3) 即便有外部证据，若答案曾在预训练阶段见过，模型准确率仍更高，说明参数化知识与外部知识具有互补性；  
(4) 无关信息会损害性能，准确率随无关上下文的出现位置及数量而下降。  

所有 NanoKnow 数据与工具已开源：https://github.com/castorini/NanoKnow

title: ManCAR: Manifold-Constrained Latent Reasoning with Adaptive Test-Time Computation for Sequential Recommendation
summary: Sequential recommendation increasingly employs latent multi-step reasoning to enhance test-time computation. Despite empirical gains, existing approaches largely drive intermediate reasoning states via target-dominant objectives without imposing explicit feasibility constraints. This results in latent drift, where reasoning trajectories deviate into implausible regions. We argue that effective recommendation reasoning should instead be viewed as navigation on a collaborative manifold rather than free-form latent refinement. To this end, we propose ManCAR (Manifold-Constrained Adaptive Reasoning), a principled framework that grounds reasoning within the topology of a global interaction graph. ManCAR constructs a local intent prior from the collaborative neighborhood of a user's recent actions, represented as a distribution over the item simplex. During training, the model progressively aligns its latent predictive distribution with this prior, forcing the reasoning trajectory to remain within the valid manifold. At test time, reasoning proceeds adaptively until the predictive distribution stabilizes, avoiding over-refinement. We provide a variational interpretation of ManCAR to theoretically validate its drift-prevention and adaptive test-time stopping mechanisms. Experiments on seven benchmarks demonstrate that ManCAR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving up to a 46.88% relative improvement w.r.t. NDCG@10. Our code is available at https://github.com/FuCongResearchSquad/ManCAR.
translated_summary:
顺序推荐正越来越多地采用潜在多步推理，以增加测试阶段的计算量。尽管带来了经验式增益，现有方法通常仅用“以目标为中心”的目标驱动中间推理状态，而缺少显式的可行性约束。这导致潜在漂移——推理轨迹会偏离到不可信区域。我们认为，有效的推荐推理应被视作在协同流形上的导航，而非任意的潜在精调。

为此，我们提出 ManCAR（Manifold-Constrained Adaptive Reasoning），一个将推理牢牢置于全局交互图拓扑中的原则性框架。ManCAR 首先从用户最近行为的协同邻域构造局部意图先验，并将其表示为在项目单纯形上的分布。训练过程中，模型渐进地将其潜在预测分布与该先验对齐，从而使推理轨迹始终保持在有效流形内。测试阶段，推理自适应地进行，直至预测分布趋于稳定，从而避免过度精调。

我们为 ManCAR 提供变分贝叶斯解释，从理论上验证其防止漂移的机制以及自适应测试阶段停止准则。在七个基准数据集上的实验表明，ManCAR 一致地超越现有最好基线，相对 NDCG@10 提升最多达 46.88%。代码已开源：https://github.com/FuCongResearchSquad/ManCAR

title: FairFS: Addressing Deep Feature Selection Biases for Recommender System
summary: Large-scale online marketplaces and recommender systems serve as critical technological support for e-commerce development. In industrial recommender systems, features play vital roles as they carry information for downstream models. Accurate feature importance estimation is critical because it helps identify the most useful feature subsets from thousands of feature candidates for online services. Such selection enables improved online performance while reducing computational cost. To address feature selection problems in deep learning, trainable gate-based and sensitivity-based methods have been proposed and proven effective in industrial practice. However, through the analysis of real-world cases, we identified three bias issues that cause feature importance estimation to rely on partial model layers, samples, or gradients, ultimately leading to inaccurate importance estimation. We refer to these as layer bias, baseline bias, and approximation bias. To mitigate these issues, we propose FairFS, a fair and accurate feature selection algorithm. FairFS regularizes feature importance estimated across all nonlinear transformation layers to address layer bias. It also introduces a smooth baseline feature close to the classifier decision boundary and adopts an aggregated approximation method to alleviate baseline and approximation biases. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FairFS effectively mitigates these biases and achieves state-of-the-art feature selection performance.
translated_summary: 大规模在线市场及推荐系统已成为电子商务发展的关键技术支撑。在工业级推荐系统中，特征承担着向下游模型传递信息的重要职责，精确估计特征重要性至关重要：它能从成千上万的候选特征中识别出最有用的子集，用于线上服务，从而在降低计算成本的同时提升在线性能。针对深度学习中的特征选择问题，业界提出了基于可训练门控和基于敏感度的方法，并在实际应用场景中验证了其有效性。然而，通过对真实案例的分析，我们发现了三种会导致特征重要性估计仅依赖于部分模型层、部分样本或部分梯度，从而导致估计失真的偏置问题，并分别将其概括为“层偏置、基线偏置和近似偏置”。为缓解这些问题，我们提出了 FairFS——一种公平且精准的特征选择算法。FairFS 将所有非线性变换层的特征重要性进行正则化，从而抑制层偏置；同时引入一条接近分类器决策边界的平滑基线特征，并采用聚合近似方法缓解基线与近似偏置。大量实验表明，FairFS 显著降低了上述偏置，并在特征选择任务中达到了最新的先进水平。

title: A Context-Aware Knowledge Graph Platform for Stream Processing in Industrial IoT
summary: Industrial IoT ecosystems bring together sensors, machines and smart devices operating collaboratively across industrial environments. These systems generate large volumes of heterogeneous, high-velocity data streams that require interoperable, secure and contextually aware management. Most of the current stream management architectures, however, still rely on syntactic integration mechanisms, which result in limited flexibility, maintainability and interpretability in complex Industry 5.0 scenarios. This work proposes a context-aware semantic platform for data stream management that unifies heterogeneous IoT/IoE data sources through a Knowledge Graph enabling formal representation of devices, streams, agents, transformation pipelines, roles and rights. The model supports flexible data gathering, composable stream processing pipelines, and dynamic role-based data access based on agents' contexts, relying on Apache Kafka and Apache Flink for real-time processing, while SPARQL and SWRL-based reasoning provide context-dependent stream discovery. Experimental evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness of combining semantic models, context-aware reasoning and distributed stream processing to enable interoperable data workflows for Industry 5.0 environments.
translated_summary: 工业互联网生态系统将传感器、机器与智能设备汇聚于同一工业环境之中，实现协同作业。这些系统持续产生大量异构且高速的数据流，亟需具备互操作性、安全性并能感知具体场景的数据管理机制。然而，现有流管理体系多数仍依赖语法级集成手段，在面对复杂的工业5.0场景时难以兼顾灵活性、可维护性与可解释性。为此，本文提出一种面向数据流管理的上下文感知语义平台，通过知识图谱统一异构物联网/万物互联数据源，可对设备、数据流、智能体、转换管线、角色及权限进行形式化建模。该平台支持灵活的数据采集、可组合的流式处理链，以及基于智能体上下文的动态角色权限数据访问：实时处理依托 Apache Kafka 与 Apache Flink，而情境依赖的数据发现则由 SPARQL 与 SWRL 推理引擎驱动。实验结果表明，将语义模型、上下文感知推理与分布式流处理相结合，能够切实为工业5.0环境提供互操作且流畅的数据工作模式。

title: Counterfactual Understanding via Retrieval-aware Multimodal Modeling for Time-to-Event Survival Prediction
summary: This paper tackles the problem of time-to-event counterfactual survival prediction, aiming to optimize individualized survival outcomes in the presence of heterogeneity and censored data. We propose CURE, a framework that advances counterfactual survival modeling via comprehensive multimodal embedding and latent subgroup retrieval. CURE integrates clinical, paraclinical, demographic, and multi-omics information, which are aligned and fused through cross-attention mechanisms. Complex multi-omics signals can be adaptively refined using a mixture-of-experts architecture, emphasizing the most informative omics components. Building upon this representation, CURE implicitly retrieves patient-specific latent subgroups that capture both baseline survival dynamics and treatment-dependent variations. Experimental results on METABRIC and TCGA-LUAD datasets demonstrate that proposed CURE model consistently outperforms strong baselines in survival analysis, evaluated using the Time-dependent Concordance Index ($C^{td}$) and Integrated Brier Score (IBS). These findings highlight the potential of CURE to enhance multimodal understanding and serve as a foundation for future treatment recommendation models. All code and related resources are publicly available to facilitate the reproducibility https://github.com/L2R-UET/CURE.
translated_summary: 本研究针对时间—事件反事实生存预测问题展开，提出可优化个体生存结局的新方法，以应对人群异质性与数据右删失带来的挑战。我们设计了 CURE 框架，借助全面的多模态嵌入与潜在子群检索推动反事实生存建模。CURE 整合临床、化验、人口学及多组学信息，利用交叉注意力机制实现多模态对齐与融合；复杂组学信号则通过混合专家架构自适应精炼，突出最具信息量的组学特征。在此表示基础上，CURE 隐式检索患者特异性潜在子群，同时刻画基线生存动态与疗效差异。在 METABRIC 和 TCGA-LUAD 上的实验结果表明，采用时间依赖性一致性指数（$C^{td}$）与综合布里尔评分（IBS）评估时，CURE 始终优于现有强基线，彰显其在提升多模态理解与未来治疗推荐模型开发中的潜力。所有代码及相关资源均已开源，链接：https://github.com/L2R-UET/CURE。

title: Unlocking Multimodal Document Intelligence: From Current Triumphs to Future Frontiers of Visual Document Retrieval
summary: With the rapid proliferation of multimodal information, Visual Document Retrieval (VDR) has emerged as a critical frontier in bridging the gap between unstructured visually rich data and precise information acquisition. Unlike traditional natural image retrieval, visual documents exhibit unique characteristics defined by dense textual content, intricate layouts, and fine-grained semantic dependencies. This paper presents the first comprehensive survey of the VDR landscape, specifically through the lens of the Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) era. We begin by examining the benchmark landscape, and subsequently dive into the methodological evolution, categorizing approaches into three primary aspects: multimodal embedding models, multimodal reranker models, and the integration of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Agentic systems for complex document intelligence. Finally, we identify persistent challenges and outline promising future directions, aiming to provide a clear roadmap for future multimodal document intelligence.
translated_summary: 随着多模态信息飞速涌现，视觉文档检索（VDR）已成为弥合非结构化富视觉数据与精准信息获取之间鸿沟的关键前沿领域。与传统自然图像检索不同，视觉文档具有独特特征：文本内容高度密集、版式结构复杂，且依赖细粒度的语义关联。本文首次针对“多模态大语言模型（MLLM）时代”全面剖析了VDR研究全景：我们首先审视现有基准数据集，随后围绕方法学演进展开深度探讨，将现有工作聚焦于三大主线——多模态嵌入模型、多模态重排序模型，以及面向复杂文档智能的检索增强生成（RAG）与代理系统的融合范式。最后，我们梳理尚未解决的核心挑战，并指明未来可行的发展方向，旨在为后续多模态文档智能研究提供清晰的发展路线图。

title: Enhancing Automatic Chord Recognition via Pseudo-Labeling and Knowledge Distillation
summary: Automatic Chord Recognition (ACR) is constrained by the scarcity of aligned chord labels, as well-aligned annotations are costly to acquire. At the same time, open-weight pre-trained models are currently more accessible than their proprietary training data. In this work, we present a two-stage training pipeline that leverages pre-trained models together with unlabeled audio. The proposed method decouples training into two stages. In the first stage, we use a pre-trained BTC model as a teacher to generate pseudo-labels for over 1,000 hours of diverse unlabeled audio and train a student model solely on these pseudo-labels. In the second stage, the student is continually trained on ground-truth labels as they become available, with selective knowledge distillation (KD) from the teacher applied as a regularizer to prevent catastrophic forgetting of the representations learned in the first stage. In our experiments, two models (BTC, 2E1D) were used as students. In stage 1, using only pseudo-labels, the BTC student achieves over 98% of the teacher's performance, while the 2E1D model achieves about 96% across seven standard mir_eval metrics. After a single training run for both students in stage 2, the resulting BTC student model surpasses the traditional supervised learning baseline by 2.5% and the original pre-trained teacher model by 1.55% on average across all metrics. And the resulting 2E1D student model improves from the traditional supervised learning baseline by 3.79% on average and achieves almost the same performance as the teacher. Both cases show the large gains on rare chord qualities.
translated_summary:
自动和弦识别（ACR）受限于对齐和弦标签稀缺的问题，因为高质量的标注成本极高。虽然开源预训练模型的权重已易于获取，但对应的专有训练数据仍然难以获得。本文提出一种两阶段训练管线，充分利用预训练模型与无标签音频。该方法将训练分为互相独立的两个阶段：第一阶段，我们以预训练 BTC 模型作为“教师”，为超过 1000 小时、风格多样的无标签音频生成伪标签，并仅利用这些伪标签训练“学生”模型；第二阶段，当真实标签逐渐可用时，对学生模型进行持续训练，同时采用选择性知识蒸馏（KD）作为正则化手段，防止对第一阶段所学表征的灾难性遗忘。

实验采用 BTC 和 2E1D 两种架构作为学生模型。在仅用伪标签训练的第一阶段，BTC 学生即可在多档 mir_eval 指标上达到教师性能的 98% 以上，而 2E1D 学生达到约 96%。在第二阶段单次迭代后，BTC 学生模型最终以各指标平均提升 2.5% 的幅度超越传统的全监督学习基线，并以 1.55% 平均优势超越原预训练教师；2E1D 学生模型则相对基线平均提升 3.79%，几乎追平教师性能。两种模型在稀有和弦性质上均表现出显著提升。

title: GrIT: Group Informed Transformer for Sequential Recommendation
summary: Sequential recommender systems aim to predict a user's future interests by extracting temporal patterns from their behavioral history. Existing approaches typically employ transformer-based architectures to process long sequences of user interactions, capturing preference shifts by modeling temporal relationships between items. However, these methods often overlook the influence of group-level features that capture the collective behavior of similar users. We hypothesize that explicitly modeling temporally evolving group features alongside individual user histories can significantly enhance next-item recommendation. Our approach introduces latent group representations, where each user's affiliation to these groups is modeled through learnable, time-varying membership weights. The membership weights at each timestep are computed by modeling shifts in user preferences through their interaction history, where we incorporate both short-term and long-term user preferences. We extract a set of statistical features that capture the dynamics of user behavior and further refine them through a series of transformations to produce the final drift-aware membership weights. A group-based representation is derived by weighting latent group embeddings with the learned membership scores. This representation is integrated with the user's sequential representation within the transformer block to jointly capture personal and group-level temporal dynamics, producing richer embeddings that lead to more accurate, context-aware recommendations. We validate the effectiveness of our approach through extensive experiments on five benchmark datasets, where it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art sequential recommendation methods.
translated_summary: 顺序式推荐系统旨在通过从用户行为历史中提炼时序模式来预测用户未来的兴趣。现有方法通常采用基于 Transformer 的架构来处理用户的长期交互序列，并通过建模物品之间的时序关系来捕捉用户偏好的转移。然而，这些方法往往忽视了能够反映相似用户整体行为的群体级特征。我们假设，将随时间演化的群体特征与用户个体历史显式建模可以显著提升下一项物品的推荐效果。为此，我们引入了一组潜在的群体表征，并通过可学习、随时间变化的成员权重对用户与这些群体的隶属关系进行建模。在每一个时间步，成员权重通过同时考虑用户长短期偏好的交互历史，来刻画用户偏好的动态转移。我们提取了一组能够体现用户行为动态的统计特征，并经过一系列变换得到最终的漂移感知成员权重。随后，利用这些权重对潜群体嵌入进行加权聚合，得到群体表征。该表征在 Transformer 模块中与用户的顺序表示进行融合，共同刻画个人与群体级的时间动态，从而生成更丰富、兼顾上下文感知的用户嵌入。在五个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法均稳定优于当前最先进的顺序推荐算法。

title: A Three-stage Neuro-symbolic Recommendation Pipeline for Cultural Heritage Knowledge Graphs
summary: The growing volume of digital cultural heritage resources highlights the need for advanced recommendation methods capable of interpreting semantic relationships between heterogeneous data entities. This paper presents a complete methodology for implementing a hybrid recommendation pipeline integrating knowledge-graph embeddings, approximate nearest-neighbour search, and SPARQL-driven semantic filtering. The work is evaluated on the JUHMP (Jagiellonian University Heritage Metadata Portal) knowledge graph developed within the CHExRISH project, which at the time of experimentation contained ${\approx}3.2$M RDF triples describing people, events, objects, and historical relations affiliated with the Jagiellonian University (Kraków, PL). We evaluate four embedding families (TransE, ComplEx, ConvE, CompGCN) and perform hyperparameter selection for ComplEx and HNSW. Then, we present and evaluate the final three-stage neuro-symbolic recommender. Despite sparse and heterogeneous metadata, the approach produces useful and explainable recommendations, which were also proven with expert evaluation.
translated_summary: 数字文化遗产资源日益增长的规模凸显了对能够在异构数据实体之间解读语义关系的先进推荐方法的需求。本文提出了一套完整的混合推荐流程实现方法，融合知识图谱嵌入、近似最近邻搜索以及由 SPARQL 驱动的语义过滤。该系统在 CHExRISH 项目构建的 JUHMP（雅盖隆大学遗产元数据门户）知识图谱上进行评估；实验时，该图谱包含约 320 万条 RDF 三元组，描述与雅盖隆大学（波兰克拉科夫）相关的人员、事件、物品及历史关系。我们评测了四类嵌入模型（TransE、ComplEx、ConvE、CompGCN），并为 ComplEx 和 HNSW 进行了超参数优化。随后，我们提出并评估了一款最终的三阶段神经符号推荐器。即便面对稀疏且异构的元数据，该方法仍能生成有用且可解释的推荐结果，并已由专家评估验证。

title: DReX: An Explainable Deep Learning-based Multimodal Recommendation Framework
summary: Multimodal recommender systems leverage diverse data sources, such as user interactions, content features, and contextual information, to address challenges like cold-start and data sparsity. However, existing methods often suffer from one or more key limitations: processing different modalities in isolation, requiring complete multimodal data for each interaction during training, or independent learning of user and item representations. These factors contribute to increased complexity and potential misalignment between user and item embeddings. To address these challenges, we propose DReX, a unified multimodal recommendation framework that incrementally refines user and item representations by leveraging interaction-level features from multimodal feedback. Our model employs gated recurrent units to selectively integrate these fine-grained features into global representations. This incremental update mechanism provides three key advantages: (1) simultaneous modeling of both nuanced interaction details and broader preference patterns, (2) eliminates the need for separate user and item feature extraction processes, leading to enhanced alignment in their learned representation, and (3) inherent robustness to varying or missing modalities. We evaluate the performance of the proposed approach on three real-world datasets containing reviews and ratings as interaction modalities. By considering review text as a modality, our approach automatically generates interpretable keyword profiles for both users and items, which supplement the recommendation process with interpretable preference indicators. Experiment results demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods across all evaluated datasets.
translated_summary:
多模态推荐系统综合利用用户交互数据、物品内容特征以及情境信息等多种数据源，用以缓解冷启动及数据稀疏等难题。然而，现有方法普遍存在以下关键缺陷：仅在孤立模式下处理不同模态；训练时必须为每次交互均提供完整的多模态数据；用户与物品的表征被独立学习。这些问题既增加了模型复杂度，又易导致用户—物品表征错位。

为此，我们提出 DReX——一种统一的多模态推荐框架，通过利用来自多模态反馈的“交互级特征”逐步精炼用户与物品的表征。模型采用门控循环单元（GRU），以选择性地将这些细粒度特征整合进全局表示。该递增式更新机制带来三重优势： (1) 能够同步刻画微观的交互细节与宏观的偏好模式；(2) 无需独立的用户侧和物品侧特征提取流程，显著提升两方表征的一致性；(3) 对模态不全或缺失天然鲁棒。

我们在含有评论文本和评分记录的三个真实世界数据集上评估模型。通过将评论文本视为一种模态，DReX 能自动为用户与物品生成可解释的关键词画像，从而在推荐过程中提供直观的偏好指示。实验结果表明，DReX 在所有数据集上均显著优于现有最优方法。

title: Iconographic Classification and Content-Based Recommendation for Digitized Artworks
summary: We present a proof-of-concept system that automates iconographic classification and content-based recommendation of digitized artworks using the Iconclass vocabulary and selected artificial intelligence methods. The prototype implements a four-stage workflow for classification and recommendation, which integrates YOLOv8 object detection with algorithmic mappings to Iconclass codes, rule-based inference for abstract meanings, and three complementary recommenders (hierarchical proximity, IDF-weighted overlap, and Jaccard similarity). Although more engineering is still needed, the evaluation demonstrates the potential of this solution: Iconclass-aware computer vision and recommendation methods can accelerate cataloging and enhance navigation in large heritage repositories. The key insight is to let computer vision propose visible elements and to use symbolic structures (Iconclass hierarchy) to reach meaning.
translated_summary: 我们提出了一套概念验证系统，可基于 Iconclass 词汇并利用精选的人工智能方法，自动实现数字化艺术作品的图像学分类与内容推荐。原型系统采用四阶段工作流进行分类与推荐：先以 YOLOv8 目标检测提取可见元素，再经算法映射到 Iconclass 代码，继而通过规则化推理获得抽象含义，最后融合三种互补推荐策略（层次邻近度、IDF 加权重叠度和 Jaccard 相似度）。尽管尚需继续工程化，评估结果表明该方案极具潜力：具备 Iconclass 感知能力的计算机视觉与推荐方法可显著加快编目速度，并改善大型文化遗产库的可探索性。其核心洞见在于：让计算机视觉提出可见要素，再借助符号结构（Iconclass 的层次体系）抵达意义。

title: Sculpting the Vector Space: Towards Efficient Multi-Vector Visual Document Retrieval via Prune-then-Merge Framework
summary: Visual Document Retrieval (VDR), which aims to retrieve relevant pages within vast corpora of visually-rich documents, is of significance in current multimodal retrieval applications. The state-of-the-art multi-vector paradigm excels in performance but suffers from prohibitive overhead, a problem that current efficiency methods like pruning and merging address imperfectly, creating a difficult trade-off between compression rate and feature fidelity. To overcome this dilemma, we introduce Prune-then-Merge, a novel two-stage framework that synergizes these complementary approaches. Our method first employs an adaptive pruning stage to filter out low-information patches, creating a refined, high-signal set of embeddings. Subsequently, a hierarchical merging stage compresses this pre-filtered set, effectively summarizing semantic content without the noise-induced feature dilution seen in single-stage methods. Extensive experiments on 29 VDR datasets demonstrate that our framework consistently outperforms existing methods, significantly extending the near-lossless compression range and providing robust performance at high compression ratios.
translated_summary: 视觉文档检索（VDR）旨在从海量富视觉文档中检索相关页面，在当前多模态检索应用中至关重要。主流多向量范式尽管性能卓越，但计算开销巨大；现有的剪枝、合并等效率方法在压缩率与特征保真之间顾此失彼，取舍艰难。为破解这一困境，我们提出“先剪后合”（Prune-then-Merge）这一新型两阶段框架，巧妙融合两种互补策略：首先在自适应剪枝阶段筛除低信息量图块，得到高信噪比的精炼嵌入集合；随后通过分层合并阶段进一步压缩，高效总结语义内容，避免单阶段方法因噪音导致的特征稀释。在 29 个 VDR 数据集的广泛实验表明，该框架全面超越现有方法，显著拓宽近无损压缩范围，并在高压缩比下依旧表现稳健。

title: Hyper-KGGen: A Skill-Driven Knowledge Extractor for High-Quality Knowledge Hypergraph Generation
summary: Knowledge hypergraphs surpass traditional binary knowledge graphs by encapsulating complex $n$-ary atomic facts, providing a more comprehensive paradigm for semantic representation. However, constructing high-quality hypergraphs remains challenging due to the \textit{scenario gap}: generic extractors struggle to generalize across diverse domains with specific jargon, while existing methods often fail to balance structural skeletons with fine-grained details.
