Specifically, TS-Rec comprises two key components: (1) Semantic-Aware embedding Initialization (SA-Init), which initializes SID token embeddings by applying mean pooling to the pretrained embeddings of keywords extracted by a teacher model; and (2) Token-level Semantic Alignment (TS-Align), which aligns individual tokens within the SID sequence with the shared semantics of the corresponding item clusters. Extensive experiments on two real-world benchmarks demonstrate that TS-Rec consistently outperforms traditional and generative baselines across all standard metrics. The results demonstrate that integrating fine-grained semantic information significantly enhances the performance of LLM-based generative recommenders.
translated_summary:
近期，大型语言模型（LLM）的飞速发展已将推荐系统由辨别式范式，转向基于 LLM 的生成式范式：在此范式下，推荐器以自回归方式，根据历史交互条件，为目标物品生成由语义标识符（SID）组成的序列。现有的 LLM 推荐器通过在语言空间与 SID 空间之间对齐预训练 LLM，已取得性能提升，但对 SID 空间的建模仍面临两个根本挑战：（1）语义缺失的初始化：SID 令牌是随机初始化的，在起点即断开了 SID 空间与预训练语言空间的语义关联；（2）粗粒度的对齐：以监督微调（SFT）为主的对齐任务只聚焦在物品级优化，而忽略了 SID 序列中各独立令牌的语义信息。

为应对上述挑战，我们提出了 TS-Rec——**Token-level Semantics-aware LLM-based Recommender**，可在 LLM 推荐器中注入令牌级语义。具体地，TS-Rec 包含两大关键组件：（1）**语义感知嵌入初始化（SA-Init）**：先用教师模型抽取物品关键词，然后对其预训练嵌入做均值池化，以初始化 SID 令牌嵌入，使语义关联在训练起点即被建立；（2）**令牌级语义对齐（TS-Align）**：将 SID 序列中的每一令牌，与相应聚类中心的语义表示进行细粒度对齐，从而保留令牌级语义信息。

在两大真实世界基准上的大量实验表明，TS-Rec 在所有标准指标上均稳定优于传统与生成式基线。研究结果显示，引入细粒度语义信息，能够显著提升 LLM 生成式推荐器的性能。

title: Where Relevance Emerges: A Layer-Wise Study of Internal Attention for Zero-Shot Re-Ranking
summary:
Zero-shot document re-ranking with Large Language Models (LLMs) has evolved from Pointwise methods to Listwise and Setwise approaches that optimize computational efficiency. Despite their success, these methods predominantly rely on generative scoring or output logits, which face bottlenecks in inference latency and result consistency. In-Context Re-ranking (ICR) has recently been proposed as an $O(1)$ alternative method. ICR extracts internal attention signals directly, avoiding the overhead of text generation. However, existing ICR methods simply aggregate signals across all layers; layer-wise contributions and their consistency across architectures have been left unexplored. Furthermore, no unified study has compared internal attention with traditional generative and likelihood-based mechanisms across diverse ranking frameworks under consistent conditions.
  In this paper, we conduct an orthogonal evaluation of generation, likelihood, and internal attention mechanisms across multiple ranking frameworks. We further identify a universal "bell-curve" distribution of relevance signals across transformer layers, which motivates the proposed Selective-ICR strategy that reduces inference latency by 30%-50% without compromising effectiveness. Finally, evaluation on the reasoning-intensive BRIGHT benchmark shows that precisely capturing high-quality in-context attention signals fundamentally reduces the need for model scaling and reinforcement learning: a zero-shot 8B model matches the performance of 14B reinforcement-learned re-rankers, while even a 0.6B model outperforms state-of-the-art generation-based approaches. These findings redefine the efficiency-effectiveness frontier for LLM-based re-ranking and highlight the latent potential of internal signals for complex reasoning ranking tasks. Our code and results are publicly available at https://github.com/ielab/Selective-ICR.
translated_summary:
大语言模型（LLM）零样本文档重排序技术已从 Pointwise 方法演进到更加注重计算效率的 Listwise 和 Setwise 策略。尽管成效显著，这些方法仍主要依赖生成式得分或输出 logits，导致推理延迟高、结果不稳定。近期提出的 In-Context Re-ranking（ICR）以 O(1) 复杂度作为替代方案，直接抽取模型内部注意力信号，避免文本生成开销。然而，现有 ICR 简单平均所有层信号，既未深入探究各层的独立贡献，也未见跨架构一致性分析；更缺乏在统一设置下，将内部注意力与传统生成式或似然式机制进行系统比较的研究。

本文在多种排序框架中，对生成式、似然式和内部注意力三种机制作了一项正交评估。我们进一步发现一个跨 Transformer 架构普遍存在的「钟形曲线」式相关性信号分布，据此提出 Selective-ICR 策略，可在保持效果不变的情况下将推理延迟降低 30%–50%。在极具挑战性的推理密集型 BRIGHT 基准上，精确捕获高质量上下文注意力信号显著削弱了模型扩张和强化学习的需求：零样本 8B 模型即可媲美 14B 强化学习重排器，而仅 0.6B 模型亦能超越当前最优的生成式方法。这些结果重塑了 LLM 重排序的效率–效果边界，并首次揭示了内部信号在复杂推理排序任务中的巨大潜力。代码与实验结果开源：https://github.com/ielab/Selective-ICR

title: Search-P1: Path-Centric Reward Shaping for Stable and Efficient Agentic RAG Training
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances large language models (LLMs) by incorporating external knowledge, yet traditional single-round retrieval struggles with complex multi-step reasoning. Agentic RAG addresses this by enabling LLMs to dynamically decide when and what to retrieve, but current RL-based training methods suffer from sparse outcome rewards that discard intermediate signals and low sample efficiency where failed samples contribute nothing. We propose Search-P1, a framework that introduces path-centric reward shaping for agentic RAG training, comprising two key components: (1) Path-Centric Reward, which evaluates the structural quality of reasoning trajectories through order-agnostic step coverage and soft scoring that extracts learning signals even from failed samples, and (2) Dual-Track Path Scoring with offline-generated reference planners that assesses paths from both self-consistency and reference-alignment perspectives. Experiments on multiple QA benchmarks demonstrate that Search-P1 achieves significant improvements over Search-R1 and other strong baselines, with an average accuracy gain of 7.7 points.
translated_summary:
虽然检索增强型生成（RAG）通过引入外部知识显著提升了大模型的表现，但传统单轮检索在面对多步复杂推理时力不从心。Agentic RAG 让大模型自主决定何时检索、检索什么，却因强化学习训练依赖稀疏结果的监督而受限——中间信号被丢弃，大量失败样本被浪费。为此，我们提出 Search-P1，一种以“路径”为中心的全新训练框架，包含两大核心：

1. 路径中心奖励（Path-Centric Reward）：不纠结步骤顺序，转而以“覆盖率 + 软打分”评估整个推理轨迹，连失败样本也能提炼出有效梯度。  
2. 双轨路径评分（Dual-Track Path Scoring）：使用离线生成的参考规划器，从“自我一致性”和“与参考对齐”两个视角同时衡量路径质量。

在多个问答基准上的实验表明，Search-P1 相较 Search-R1 及其他强基线平均提升 7.7 个准确率点，显著推进了 agentic RAG 的效果。

title: Towards Dynamic Dense Retrieval with Routing Strategy
summary:
The \textit{de facto} paradigm for applying dense retrieval (DR) to new tasks involves fine-tuning a pre-trained model for a specific task. However, this paradigm has two significant limitations: (1) It is difficult adapt the DR to a new domain if the training dataset is limited.
  (2) Old DR models are simply replaced by newer models that are trained from scratch when the former are no longer up to date. Especially for scenarios where the model needs to be updated frequently, this paradigm is prohibitively expensive. To address these challenges, we propose a novel dense retrieval approach, termed \textit{dynamic dense retrieval} (DDR). DDR uses \textit{prefix tuning} as a \textit{module} specialized for a specific domain. These modules can then be compositional combined with a dynamic routing strategy, enabling highly flexible domain adaptation in the retrieval part. Extensive evaluation on six zero-shot downstream tasks demonstrates that this approach can surpass DR while utilizing only 2\% of the training parameters, paving the way to achieve more flexible dense retrieval in IR. We see it as a promising future direction for applying dense retrieval to various tasks.
translated_summary:
当前将稠密检索（DR）应用于新任务的主流范式，是针对特定任务对预训练模型进行微调的“de facto”标准做法。然而，该范式存在两大显著局限：（1）当训练数据规模受限时，很难将 DR 适配到全新领域；（2）一旦既有 DR 模型过时，便会从零训练的新模型替代旧模型。对需要频繁更新模型的场景而言，这种代价极为高昂。

为破解上述难题，我们提出一种新颖的稠密检索方法，称为“动态稠密检索”（DDR）。DDR 将“前缀调优”构建为面向特定领域的可插拔模块，并借助动态路由策略以可组合的方式将这些模块与主模型相结合，从而在检索阶段实现极致灵活的领域适配。在六项零样本下游任务的大量实验表明，DDR 仅用 2% 的训练参数量即可超越传统 DR，为信息检索中更灵活的稠密检索提供了崭新的实现路径。我们视其为未来在多种任务上应用 DR 的有力研究方向。

title: Generative Agents Navigating Digital Libraries
summary: In the rapidly evolving field of digital libraries, the development of large language models (LLMs) has opened up new possibilities for simulating user behavior. This innovation addresses the longstanding challenge in digital library research: the scarcity of publicly available datasets on user search patterns due to privacy concerns. In this context, we introduce Agent4DL, a user search behavior simulator specifically designed for digital library environments. Agent4DL generates realistic user profiles and dynamic search sessions that closely mimic actual search strategies, including querying, clicking, and stopping behaviors tailored to specific user profiles. Our simulator's accuracy in replicating real user interactions has been validated through comparisons with real user data. Notably, Agent4DL demonstrates competitive performance compared to existing user search simulators such as SimIIR 2.0, particularly in its ability to generate more diverse and context-aware user behaviors.
translated_summary: 在数字图书馆这一快速发展领域中，大语言模型（LLM）的出现为模拟用户行为带来了全新可能。该创新针对数字图书馆研究长期面临的挑战——因隐私顾虑而缺乏公开可用的用户搜索数据集——提供了突破方案。为此，我们提出 Agent4DL，一款专门为数字图书馆环境设计的用户搜索行为模拟器。Agent4DL 能够生成逼真的用户画像并构建动态搜索会话，其查询、点击与停止等行为与真实搜索策略高度一致，且可根据不同用户画像进行个性化设定。通过与真实用户数据的对比验证，Agent4DL 在重现真实交互方面表现出很高准确性。与现有用户搜索模拟器（如 SimIIR 2.0）相比，Agent4DL 在生成更加多样且具备情境感知能力的用户行为方面表现尤为出色。

title: TFPS: A Temporal Filtration-enhanced Positive Sample Set Construction Method for Implicit Collaborative Filtering
summary: The negative sampling strategy can effectively train collaborative filtering (CF) recommendation models based on implicit feedback by constructing positive and negative samples. However, existing methods primarily optimize the negative sampling process while neglecting the exploration of positive samples. Some denoising recommendation methods can be applied to denoise positive samples within negative sampling strategies, but they ignore temporal information. Existing work integrates sequential information during model aggregation but neglects time interval information, hindering accurate capture of users' current preferences. To address this problem, from a data perspective, we propose a novel temporal filtration-enhanced approach to construct a high-quality positive sample set. First, we design a time decay model based on interaction time intervals, transforming the original graph into a weighted user-item bipartite graph. Then, based on predefined filtering operations, the weighted user-item bipartite graph is layered. Finally, we design a layer-enhancement strategy to construct a high-quality positive sample set for the layered subgraphs. We provide theoretical insights into why TFPS can improve Recall@k and NDCG@k, and extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. Additionally, TFPS can be integrated with various implicit CF recommenders or negative sampling methods to enhance its performance.
translated_summary: 在基于隐式反馈的协同过滤模型训练中，负采样策略通过构建正反样本显著提升效果。现有方法主要聚焦负采样本身，却忽视了对正样本的进一步挖掘。少数去噪推荐技术虽能在负采样框架内对正样本去噪，但均未利用时间信息；即便已有工作在模型聚合阶段引入序列信息，却忽略了交互时间间隔，难以精准捕捉用户当下的兴趣。为解决此缺陷，本文从数据层面出发，提出一种时间过滤增强的正样本提纯框架（TFPS）。首先，我们基于交互间隔设计时间衰减模型，将给定的用户-物品原始图转化为加权二部图；随后，依据预设过滤操作对该加权图进行分层；最后，推出层增强策略，为每层子图构建高质量正样本集合。我们从理论上阐明 TFPS 能够显著提升 Recall@k 与 NDCG@k 的内在机理，并在三个真实数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了方法的普适性与有效性。更重要的是，TFPS 可无缝嵌入多种隐式 CF 推荐器及负采样框架，进一步增强性能。

title: MammoWise: Multi-Model Local RAG Pipeline for Mammography Report Generation
summary: Screening mammography is high volume, time sensitive, and documentation heavy. Radiologists must translate subtle visual findings into consistent BI-RADS assessments, breast density categories, and structured narrative reports. While recent Vision Language Models (VLMs) enable image-to-text reporting, many rely on closed cloud systems or tightly coupled architectures that limit privacy, reproducibility, and adaptability. We present MammoWise, a local multi-model pipeline that transforms open source VLMs into mammogram report generators and multi-task classifiers. MammoWise supports any Ollama-hosted VLM and mammography dataset, and enables zero-shot, few-shot, and Chain-of-Thought prompting, with optional multimodal Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) using a vector database for case-specific context. We evaluate MedGemma, LLaVA-Med, and Qwen2.5-VL on VinDr-Mammo and DMID datasets, assessing report quality (BERTScore, ROUGE-L), BI-RADS classification, breast density, and key findings. Report generation is consistently strong and improves with few-shot prompting and RAG. Classification is feasible but sensitive to model and dataset choice. Parameter-efficient fine-tuning (QLoRA) of MedGemma improves reliability, achieving BI-RADS accuracy of 0.7545, density accuracy of 0.8840, and calcification accuracy of 0.9341 while preserving report quality. MammoWise provides a practical and extensible framework for deploying local VLMs for mammography reporting within a unified and reproducible workflow.
translated_summary:
乳腺 X 线筛查任务量大、时间紧、文档繁琐。放射科医师必须将细微的视觉征象转化为一致的 BI-RADS 评估、乳腺密度分级和结构化叙事报告。尽管近期的视觉-语言模型（VLM）可完成图像到文本的报告，但许多方案依赖封闭式云端系统，或采用紧耦合架构，导致隐私受限、不可再现且难以适配。本文提出 MammoWise——一套本地化的多模型流水线，将开源 VLM 转化为乳腺钼靶报告生成器和多任务分类器。MammoWise 支持任何通过 Ollama 部署的 VLM 及任意钼靶数据集，并支持零样本、少样本和思维链提示，亦可选配向量数据库进行多模态检索增强生成（RAG），以获取病例特异性上下文。  
我们在 VinDr-Mammo 和 DMID 数据集上评估 MedGemma、LLaVA-Med、Qwen2.5-VL，报告质量（BERTScore、ROUGE-L）和分类性能（BI-RADS、密度分级及关键征象）均有所测量。结果显示报告生成始终稳健，并随少样本提示与 RAG 进一步提升；分类任务可行，但对模型与数据集依赖较高。借助参数高效微调（QLoRA）后的 MedGemma 显著提高了稳定性：BI-RADS 准确率 0.7545，密度准确率 0.8840，钙化征象准确率 0.9341，同时保持报告质量。MammoWise 为本地化 VLM 钼靶报告提供了一套实用且可扩展的统一、可复现框架。

title: Science Fiction and Fantasy in Wikipedia: Exploring Structural and Semantic Cues
summary: Identifying which Wikipedia articles are related to science fiction, fantasy, or their hybrids is challenging because genre boundaries are porous and frequently overlap. Wikipedia nonetheless offers machine-readable structure beyond text, including categories, internal links (wikilinks), and statements if corresponding Wikidata items. However, each of these signals reflects community conventions and can be biased or incomplete. This study examines structural and semantic features of Wikipedia articles that can be used to identify content related to science fiction and fantasy (SF/F).
translated_summary: 由于科幻、奇幻及其杂糅类型的边界模糊且常重叠，判别维基百科中哪些条目与科幻/奇幻（SF/F）相关颇具挑战。尽管维基百科除正文外，还提供类别、内部链接（wikilinks）以及与条目对应的维基数据陈述等机器可读结构，但这些信号均源自社群惯例，可能存在偏差或缺失。本研究考察维基百科条目的结构与语义特征，以识别与科幻与奇幻（SF/F）相关的内容。

title: Recommendation Algorithms: A Comparative Study in Movie Domain
summary: Intelligent recommendation systems have clearly increased the revenue of well-known e-commerce firms. Users receive product recommendations from recommendation systems. Cinematic recommendations are made to users by a movie recommendation system. There have been numerous approaches to the problem of recommendation in the literature. It is viewed as a regression task in this research. A regression model was built using novel properties extracted from the dataset and used as features in the model. For experimentation, the Netflix challenge dataset has been used. Video streaming service Netflix is a popular choice for many. Customers' prior viewing habits are taken into account when Netflix makes movie recommendations to them. An exploratory data analysis on the Netflix dataset was conducted to gain insights into user rating behaviour and movie characteristics. Various kinds of features, including aggregating, Matrix Factorization (MF) based, and user and movie similarity based, have been extracted in the subsequent stages. In addition to a feature in the XGBoost regression algorithm, the K-Nearest Neighbors and MF algorithms from Python's Surprise library are used for recommendations. Based on Root Mean Square Error (RMSE), MF-based algorithms have provided the best recommendations.
translated_summary: 智能推荐系统已显著提升知名电商企业的营收。电影推荐系统则向用户推送影片建议。已有大量文献探讨推荐问题，本文将其视作回归任务，并基于从数据集中提取的新颖特征构建回归模型。实验选用 Netflix 公开竞赛数据集——Netflix 作为主流视频平台，其依据用户过往观影行为为他们推荐影片。为洞察用户评分模式及影片属性，我们先对 Netflix 数据做了探索性数据分析；随后提取了多种特征，包括聚合特征、矩阵分解（MF）特征，以及基于用户和影片相似度的特征。最终，在 XGBoost 回归算法的基础上，融合了 K 近邻及 Python Surprise 库中的 MF 算法进行推荐。以均方根误差（RMSE）为评估指标，结果显示 MF 类算法生成的推荐效果最好。

title: Colour Contrast on the Web: A WCAG 2.1 Level AA Compliance Audit of Common Crawl's Top 500 Domains
summary: We present a large-scale automated audit of WCAG 2.1/2.2 Level AA colour contrast compliance across the 500 most frequently crawled registered domains in Common Crawl's CC-MAIN-2026-08 February 2026 crawl archive. Rather than conducting a live crawl, all page content was sourced from Common Crawl's open WARC archives, ensuring reproducibility and eliminating any load on target web servers. Our static CSS analysis of 240 homepages identified 4,327 unique foreground/background colour pairings, of which 1,771 (40.9%) failed to meet the 4.5:1 contrast ratio threshold for normal text. The median per-site pass rate was 62.7%, with 20.4% of sites achieving full compliance across all detected colour pairings. These findings suggest that colour contrast remains a widespread accessibility barrier on the most prominent websites, with significant variation across domain categories.
translated_summary: 我们针对 Common Crawl CC-MAIN-2026-08（2026 年 2 月）爬档中抓取频率最高的 500 个注册域名，开展了一次大规模自动审计，检视其 WCAG 2.1/2.2 双色模式 AA 级的配色对比度合规情况。与实时爬取不同，研究全部页面内容来自 Common Crawl 的开放 WARC 归档，既保证了结果可复现，又无需对目标网站施加任何流量压力。通过对 240 个首页的静态 CSS 分析，共识别出 4,327 组独特的前景/背景配色，其中 1,771 组（40.9%）未达到正常文本 4.5:1 的对比度阈值。按站点计算，达标率中位数为 62.7%，仅有 20.4% 的网站在所有检测到的配色组合中均达到全面合规。结果表明，在最常被访问的核心站点上，配色对比度仍是普遍存在的无障碍障碍，且不同域名类别之间存在显著差异。

title: GPU-Native Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search with IVF-RaBitQ: Fast Index Build and Search
summary: Approximate nearest neighbor search (ANNS) on GPUs is gaining increasing popularity for modern retrieval and recommendation workloads that operate over massive high-dimensional vectors. Graph-based indexes deliver high recall and throughput but incur heavy build-time and storage costs. In contrast, cluster-based methods build and scale efficiently yet often need many probes for high recall, straining memory bandwidth and compute. Aiming to simultaneously achieve fast index build, high-throughput search, high recall, and low storage requirement for GPUs, we present IVF-RaBitQ (GPU), a GPU-native ANNS solution that integrates the cluster-based method IVF with RaBitQ quantization into an efficient GPU index build/search pipeline. Specifically, for index build, we develop a scalable GPU-native RaBitQ quantization method that enables fast and accurate low-bit encoding at scale. For search, we develop GPU-native distance computation schemes for RaBitQ codes and a fused search kernel to achieve high throughput with high recall. With IVF-RaBitQ implemented and integrated into the NVIDIA cuVS Library, experiments on cuVS Bench across multiple datasets show that IVF-RaBitQ offers a strong performance frontier in recall, throughput, index build time, and storage footprint. For Recall approximately equal to 0.95, IVF-RaBitQ achieves 2.2x higher QPS than the state-of-the-art graph-based method CAGRA, while also constructing indices 7.7x faster on average. Compared to the cluster-based method IVF-PQ, IVF-RaBitQ delivers on average over 2.7x higher throughput while avoiding accessing the raw vectors for reranking.
translated_summary:
在高维向量规模庞大的现代检索与推荐任务中，GPU 上的近似最近邻搜索（ANNS）正日益兴盛。基于图的索引召回率与吞吐极高，但构建开销与存储代价巨大；而聚类类方法构建和扩展都高效，却往往需要大量探针才能保持高召回率，给内存带宽与算力带来沉重压力。为了在 GPU 上同时实现快速建库、高吞吐、高召回与低存储，我们提出 IVF-RaBitQ (GPU)，作为一套原生 GPU 的 ANNS 方案，将聚类法 IVF 与 RaBitQ 量化无缝结合，形成高效的 GPU 索引构建/搜索流水线。具体而言：
- ‌索引构建阶段‌，我们设计了可扩展的 GPU 原生 RaBitQ 量化算法，能够在海量数据上实现快速且精准的低比特编码。
- ‌查询阶段‌，我们专为 RaBitQ 码开发了 GPU 原生的距离计算策略，并融为单一搜索内核，在高召回的同时实现高吞吐。

我们将 IVF-RaBitQ 集成至 NVIDIA cuVS 库，在 cuVS Bench 多个数据集上的实验表明：该方法在召回、吞吐、建库时间与存储体积组成的整体性能前沿中表现突出。在 Recall≈0.95 的前提下，IVF-RaBitQ 的 QPS 较当前最佳图基方法 CAGRA 提升 2.2 倍，而平均建库速度则快了 7.7 倍；对比聚类基 IVF-PQ，其吞吐量平均提升 2.7 倍以上，且无需再为再排序访问原始向量。

title: Robust Aggregation for Federated Sequential Recommendation with Sparse and Poisoned Data
summary: Federated sequential recommendation distributes model training across user devices so that behavioural data remains local, reducing privacy risks. Yet, this setting introduces two intertwined difficulties. On the one hand, individual clients typically contribute only short and highly sparse interaction sequences, limiting the reliability of learned user representations. On the other hand, the federated optimisation process is vulnerable to malicious or corrupted client updates, where poisoned gradients can significantly distort the global model. These challenges are particularly severe in sequential recommendation, where temporal dynamics further complicate signal aggregation. To address this problem, we propose a robust aggregation framework tailored for federated sequential recommendation under sparse and adversarial conditions. Instead of relying on standard averaging, our method introduces a defence-aware aggregation mechanism that identifies and down-weights unreliable client updates while preserving informative signals from sparse but benign participants. The framework incorporates representation-level constraints to stabilise user and item embeddings, preventing poisoned or anomalous contributions from dominating the global parameter space. In addition, we integrate sequence-aware regularisation to maintain temporal coherence in user modelling despite limited local observations.
translated_summary: 联邦序列推荐将模型训练分布到用户本地设备上，从而在源头保留用户行为数据，降低隐私风险。然而，这一场景带来了两个相互纠葛的难题。一方面，单个客户端通常只能提供极短且极度稀疏的交互序列，使得用户表示的可靠性大打折扣；另一方面，联邦优化过程极易受到恶意或受损客户端的更新攻击，这些恶意梯度可能严重扭曲全局模型。在序列推荐中，时空动态还进一步复杂化了信号聚合，令上述挑战更加严峻。为此，我们提出一种面向稀疏、恶意环境下的联邦序列推荐鲁棒聚合框架。该方法超越传统的均值聚合，引入具有防御意识的聚合机制，能够识别并不再信任不可靠的客户端更新，同时从虽稀疏但可信的参与者中保留有用信号。框架在表示层面加入约束，稳定用户和物品的嵌入空间，避免被毒害或奇异更新主导全局参数分布。此外，通过序列级正则项保持用户建模的时间一致性，即便在本地观测极少的情况下亦然。

title: Towards Efficient and Generalizable Retrieval: Adaptive Semantic Quantization and Residual Knowledge Transfer
summary: While semantic ID-based generative retrieval enables efficient end-to-end modeling in industrial applications, these methods face a persistent trade-off: head items are susceptible to ID collisions that negatively impact downstream tasks, whereas data-sparse tail items, including cold-start items, exhibit limited generalization. To address this issue, we propose the Anchored Curriculum with Sequential Adaptive Quantization (SA^2CRQ) framework. The framework introduces Sequential Adaptive Residual Quantization (SARQ) to dynamically allocate code lengths based on item path entropy, assigning longer, discriminative IDs to head items and shorter, generalizable IDs to tail items. To mitigate data sparsity, the Anchored Curriculum Residual Quantization (ACRQ) component utilizes a frozen semantic manifold learned from head items to regularize and accelerate the representation learning of tail items. Experimental results from a large-scale industrial search system and multiple public datasets indicate that SA^2CRQ yields consistent improvements over existing baselines, particularly in cold-start retrieval scenarios.
translated_summary: 尽管基于语义 ID 的生成式检索已在工业应用中实现高效的端到端建模，但这类方法始终面临一个权衡难题：头部物品易受 ID 碰撞影响，进而损害下游任务性能；而数据稀缺的尾部物品（包括冷启动物品）则泛化能力有限。为破解此局，我们提出带有序自适应量化（SA²CRQ）框架的锚定课程方案。该框架提出序自适应残差量化（SARQ），依据物品路径熵动态分配编码长度——为头部物品分配更长、更具区分度的 ID，为尾部物品分配更短、更可泛化的 ID。为缓解数据稀疏，锚定课程残差量化（ACRQ）组件借助从头部物品学得的冻结语义流形，对尾部物品的表征学习进行正则化并加速。大规模工业搜索系统及多个公共数据集的实验结果表明，SA²CRQ 在冷启动检索等场景中对现有基线实现了一致的提升。

title: RAD-DPO: Robust Adaptive Denoising Direct Preference Optimization for Generative Retrieval in E-commerce
summary: Generative Retrieval (GR) has emerged as a powerful paradigm in e-commerce search, retrieving items via autoregressive decoding of Semantic IDs (SIDs). However, aligning GR with complex user preferences remains challenging. While Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) offers an efficient alignment solution, its direct application to structured SIDs suffers from three limitations: (i) it penalizes shared hierarchical prefixes, causing gradient conflicts; (ii) it is vulnerable to noisy pseudo-negatives from implicit feedback; and (iii) in multi-label queries with multiple relevant items, it exacerbates a probability "squeezing effect" among valid candidates. To address these issues, we propose RAD-DPO, which introduces token-level gradient detachment to protect prefix structures, similarity-based dynamic reward weighting to mitigate label noise, and a multi-label global contrastive objective integrated with global SFT loss to explicitly expand positive coverage. Extensive offline experiments and online A/B testing on a large-scale e-commerce platform demonstrate significant improvements in ranking quality and training efficiency.
translated_summary: 生成式检索（GR）已成为电子商务搜索中的强大范式，通过自回归解码语义标识符（SID）来召回商品。然而，这一范式与用户复杂偏好的对齐仍然面临挑战。虽然直接偏好优化（DPO）提供了一种高效的对齐手段，但其在结构化 SID 上的直接应用存在三大缺陷：（ i）在共有的层次化前缀上实施惩罚，导致梯度冲突；（ii）对隐式反馈中的伪负样本噪声敏感；（iii）在多标签查询（即同时存在多件相关商品）的场景下，会进一步加剧合法候选间的概率“挤压”效应。针对这些问题，我们提出 RAD-DPO：通过 token 级梯度解耦保护前缀结构；利用基于相似度的动态奖励加权抑制标签噪声；并将带有多标签全局对比目标的全局 SFT 损失引入训练，以显式扩展正样本覆盖面。大规模电商平台的离线实验与在线 A/B 测试均表明，RAD-DPO 在排序质量和训练效率上均实现了显著提升。

title: HotelQuEST: Balancing Quality and Efficiency in Agentic Search
summary: Agentic search has emerged as a promising paradigm for adaptive retrieval systems powered by large language models (LLMs). However, existing benchmarks primarily focus on quality, overlooking efficiency factors that are critical for real-world deployment. Moreover, real-world user queries often contain underspecified preferences, a challenge that remains largely underexplored in current agentic search evaluation. As a result, many agentic search systems remain impractical despite their impressive performance. In this work, we introduce HotelQuEST, a benchmark comprising 214 hotel search queries that range from simple factual requests to complex queries, enabling evaluation across the full spectrum of query difficulty. We further address the challenge of evaluating underspecified user preferences by collecting clarifications that make annotators' implicit preferences explicit for evaluation. We find that LLM-based agents achieve higher accuracy than traditional retrievers, but at substantially higher costs due to redundant tool calls and suboptimal routing that fails to match query complexity to model capability. Our analysis exposes inefficiencies in current agentic search systems and demonstrates substantial potential for cost-aware optimization.
translated_summary: 尽管基于大语言模型 (LLM) 的自适应智能搜索显示出良好前景，现有基准仍主要聚焦结果质量，而忽略了对实际部署至关重要的效率因素。此外，真实用户查询往往携带未明确表达的偏好，这一挑战在当前智能检索评估中几乎未被触及，导致不少系统在亮眼表现之外依然难以落地。为此，我们推出 HotelQuEST——包含 214 条酒店搜索查询的新基准，从简单事实型到高复杂度需求一应俱全，实现了对查询难度的全覆盖评估。针对用户偏好未明之难题，我们通过收集注释者澄清信息来显式化其隐含需求，以建立可验证的评估参考。实验表明，基于 LLM 的智能代理在准确率上显著优于传统检索器，却因冗余工具调用和未能按查询复杂度匹配模型能力的次优路由，带来远高于预期的成本开销。我们的分析揭示了当前智能搜索系统普遍存在的效率缺陷，也展示了成本敏感优化的巨大潜力。

title: EDDA-Coordinata: An Annotated Dataset of Historical Geographic Coordinates
summary: This paper introduces a dataset of enriched geographic coordinates retrieved from Diderot and d'Alembert's eighteenth-century Encyclopedie. Automatically recovering geographic coordinates from historical texts is a complex task, as they are expressed in a variety of ways and with varying levels of precision. To improve retrieval of coordinates from similar digitized early modern texts, we have created a gold standard dataset, trained models, published the resulting inferred and normalized coordinate data, and experimented applying these models to new texts. From 74,000 total articles in each of the digitized versions of the Encyclopedie from ARTFL and ENCCRE, we examined 15,278 geographical entries, manually identifying 4,798 containing coordinates, and 10,480 with descriptive but non-numerical references. Leveraging our gold standard annotations, we trained transformer-based models to retrieve and normalize coordinates. The pipeline presented here combines a classifier to identify coordinate-bearing entries and a second model for retrieval, tested across encoder-decoder and decoder architectures. Cross-validation yielded an 86% EM score. On an out-of-domain eighteenth-century Trevoux dictionary (also in French), our fine-tuned model had a 61% EM score, while for the nineteenth-century, 7th edition of the Encyclopaedia Britannica in English, the EM was 77%. These findings highlight the gold standard dataset's usefulness as training data, and our two-step method's cross-lingual, cross-domain generalizability.
translated_summary: 本文介绍了一组从18世纪狄德罗与达朗贝尔《百科全书》中抽取并标注的丰富地理坐标数据集。由于历史文献中的地理坐标蕴含着多样的表述方式和精度差异，从数字化早期文本中自动恢复这些坐标是一项复杂任务。为提高在类似数字化早期现代文献中坐标提取的质量，我们构建了一个黄金标准数据集，训练了相关模型，发布了经过推断和归一化的坐标数据，并将模型应用于新的文本进行实验。在ARTFL与ENCCRE两个数字化版《百科全书》共约7.4万词条中，我们检索了15,278条地理主题条目，其中4,798条含坐标信息，10,480条仅含文字描述而无数值坐标。借助黄金标准标注，我们基于Transformer架构训练模型，分别用于识别包含坐标的条目及抽取并规范化坐标。该流水线由一个筛选器和一个检索/归一化模型组成，后者在编码-解码与纯解码架构上均进行了测试，交叉验证达到86%的精确匹配（EM）。在18世纪法语《特雷武词典》这一领域外测试集上，微调后模型的EM达到61%；在19世纪英语《大英百科全书》第7版上，EM达到77%。实验结果表明，该黄金标准数据集具有优秀的训练价值，且我们提出的两步法具备良好的跨语言、跨领域泛化能力。

title: UniFAR: A Unified Facet-Aware Retrieval Framework for Scientific Documents
summary: Existing scientific document retrieval (SDR) methods primarily rely on document-centric representations learned from inter-document relationships for document-document (doc-doc) retrieval. However, the rise of LLMs and RAG has shifted SDR toward question-driven retrieval, where documents are retrieved in response to natural-language questions (q-doc). This change has led to systematic mismatches between document-centric models and question-driven retrieval, including (1) input granularity (long documents vs. short questions), (2) semantic focus (scientific discourse structure vs. specific question intent), and (3) training signals (citation-based similarity vs. question-oriented relevance). To this end, we propose UniFAR, a Unified Facet-Aware Retrieval framework to jointly support doc-doc and q-doc SDR within a single architecture. UniFAR reconciles granularity differences through adaptive multi-granularity aggregation, aligns document structure with question intent via learnable facet anchors, and unifies doc-doc and q-doc supervision through joint training. Experimental results show that UniFAR consistently outperforms prior methods across multiple retrieval tasks and base models, confirming its effectiveness and generality.
translated_summary: 现有的科学文献检索（SDR）方法主要依赖跨文档关系学习出的“以文档为中心”的表示，用于文献—文献（doc-doc）检索。然而，受大型语言模型和 RAG 技术的影响，SDR 正迅速转向“问答驱动”的检索：系统针对自然语言问题返回相关文献（q-doc）。这一转变令原先以文档为中心的模型与问答驱动检索产生了系统性的失配：其一，输入粒度不同（长篇文献 vs. 简短问询）；其二，语义关注点不同（科学论述结构 vs. 提问意图）；其三，训练信号不同（基于引用的相似度 vs. 面向问题的相关性）。为此，我们提出 UniFAR——一个统一的面感知检索框架，用单一架构同时支持 doc-doc 与 q-doc 任务。UniFAR 通过自适应多重粒度聚合消解粒度差异，借助可学习的“语义锚点”使文档结构对齐问题意图，并以联合训练统一 doc-doc 与 q-doc 的监督信号。实验表明，UniFAR 在多种检索任务及不同基座模型上均稳定超越已有方法，验证了其有效性与普适性。

title: Recommending Search Filters To Improve Conversions At Airbnb
summary:
Airbnb, a two-sided online marketplace connecting guests and hosts, offers a diverse and unique inventory of accommodations, experiences, and services. Search filters play an important role in helping guests navigate this variety by refining search results to align with their needs. Yet, while search filters are designed to facilitate conversions in online marketplaces, their direct impact on driving conversions remains underexplored in the existing literature.
  This paper bridges this gap by presenting a novel application of machine learning techniques to recommend search filters aimed at improving booking conversions. We introduce a modeling framework that directly targets lower-funnel conversions (bookings) by recommending intermediate tools, i.e. search filters. Leveraging the framework, we designed and built the filter recommendation system at Airbnb from the ground up, addressing challenges like cold start and stringent serving requirements.
  The filter recommendation system we developed has been successfully deployed at Airbnb, powering multiple user interfaces and driving incremental booking conversion lifts, as validated through online A/B testing. An ablation study further validates the effectiveness of our approach and key design choices. By focusing on conversion-oriented filter recommendations, our work ensures that search filters serve their ultimate purpose at Airbnb - helping guests find and book their ideal accommodations.
translated_summary:
Airbnb 是一个连接房客与房东的双边在线市场，提供丰富而独特的房源、体验与服务。搜索筛选器通过缩小结果范围、帮助用户精准匹配需求，在帮助房客浏览多样化库存方面发挥关键作用。然而，尽管筛选器被设计为在线市场提高转化的工具，其对转化的直接驱动效应在文献中鲜有研究。本文通过首次将机器学习技术应用于“筛选器推荐”来弥合该空白，以提升预订转化。

我们提出一种以低漏斗转化（即预订）为目标的建模框架：不直接预测预订，而是推荐能够引导用户一步步靠近最终转化的中间工具——搜索筛选器。依托该框架，我们从零开始设计并构建了 Airbnb 的筛选器推荐系统，解决了冷启动及严苛线上服务等核心工程挑战。系统已在 Airbnb 全面上线，服务于多个用户界面；在线 A/B 实验证明其带来的预订转化率提升具有统计显著性。此外，一系列消融实验再一次验证了我们方案的有效性及其关键设计抉择。

通过聚焦于“以转化为导向的筛选器推荐”，本研究确保了搜索筛选器在 Airbnb 真正发挥其终极使命：帮助房客发现并预订到心仪房源。

title: FuXi-Linear: Unleashing the Power of Linear Attention in Long-term Time-aware Sequential Recommendation
summary: Modern recommendation systems primarily rely on attention mechanisms with quadratic complexity, which limits their ability to handle long user sequences and slows down inference. While linear attention is a promising alternative, existing research faces three critical challenges: (1) temporal signals are often overlooked or integrated via naive coupling that causes mutual interference between temporal and semantic signals while neglecting behavioral periodicity; (2) insufficient positional information provided by existing linear frameworks; and (3) a primary focus on short sequences and shallow architectures. To address these issues, we propose FuXi-Linear, a linear-complexity model designed for efficient long-sequence recommendation. Our approach introduces two key components: (1) a Temporal Retention Channel that independently computes periodic attention weights using temporal data, preventing crosstalk between temporal and semantic signals; (2) a Linear Positional Channel that integrates positional information through learnable kernels within linear complexity. Moreover, we demonstrate that FuXi-Linear exhibits a robust power-law scaling property at a thousand-length scale, a characteristic largely unexplored in prior linear recommendation studies. Extensive experiments on sequences of several thousand tokens demonstrate that FuXi-Linear outperforms state-of-the-art models in recommendation quality, while achieving up to 10$\times$ speedup in the prefill stage and up to 21$\times$ speedup in the decode stage compared to competitive baselines. Our code has been released in a public repository https://github.com/USTC-StarTeam/fuxi-linear.
translated_summary: 现代推荐系统主要依赖复杂度为二次方的注意力机制，这限制了它们处理长用户序列的能力，并拖慢了推理速度。尽管线性注意力是一个有前景的替代方案，但现有研究仍面临三项关键挑战：（1）时间信号常被忽视，或仅以简单耦合方式融入，导致时间与语义信号之间相互干扰，并忽略行为周期性；（2）现有线性框架提供的位置信息不足；（3）主要聚焦于短序列和浅层架构。为解决这些问题，我们提出 FuXi-Linear——一种面向高效长序列推荐的线性复杂度模型。我们的方法引入两大核心组件：（1）时间保留通道：利用时间数据独立计算周期性注意力权重，防止时间与语义信号串扰；（2）线性位置通道：通过线性复杂度内的可学习核函数整合位置信息。此外，我们首次在千级序列长度上验证了 FuXi-Linear 的幂律缩放特性，而这在以往线性推荐研究中几乎未被探索。在几千令牌长度序列上的大量实验表明，FuXi-Linear 在推荐质量上显著超越现有最优模型；在填充阶段可达 10× 加速，在解码阶段较有竞争力的基线最高可提速 21×。我们的代码已开源：https://github.com/USTC-StarTeam/fuxi-linear。

title: Geodesic Semantic Search: Learning Local Riemannian Metrics for Citation Graph Retrieval
summary: We present Geodesic Semantic Search (GSS), a retrieval system that learns node-specific Riemannian metrics on citation graphs to enable geometry-aware semantic search. Unlike standard embedding-based retrieval that relies on fixed Euclidean distances, \gss{} learns a low-rank metric tensor $\mL_i \in \R^{d \times r}$ at each node, inducing a local positive semi-definite metric $\mG_i = \mL_i \mL_i^\top + \eps \mI$. This parameterization guarantees valid metrics while keeping the model tractable. Retrieval proceeds via multi-source Dijkstra on the learned geodesic distances, followed by Maximal Marginal Relevance reranking and path coherence filtering. On citation prediction benchmarks with 169K papers, \gss{} achieves 23\% relative improvement in Recall@20 over SPECTER+FAISS baselines while providing interpretable citation paths. Our hierarchical coarse-to-fine search with k-means pooling reduces computational cost by 4$\times$ compared to flat geodesic search while maintaining 97\% retrieval quality. We provide theoretical analysis of when geodesic distances outperform direct similarity, characterize the approximation quality of low-rank metrics, and validate predictions empirically. Code and trained models are available at https://github.com/YCRG-Labs/geodesic-search.
translated_summary:
我们提出“测地线语义搜索”（GSS）——一种在引文图上为每个节点学习专属黎曼度量、从而具备几何感知能力的检索系统。与依赖固定欧氏距离的常规基于嵌入式的检索不同，GSS 在每个节点学习一个低秩度量张量 $\mL_i \in \R^{d \times r}$，生成局部的半正定度量 $ \mG_i = \mL_i \mL_i^\top + \eps \mI$，保证度量的有效性且模型仍可处理。检索时，系统先利用学习到的测地距离做多源 Dijkstra 搜索，再通过最大边际相关（MMR）重排序和路径一致性过滤获得最终结果。

在包含 16.9 万篇论文的引文预测基准上，GSS 的 Recall@20 相较 SPECTER+FAISS 基线提升 23%，同时可提供可解释的引文路径。我们提出由粗到细的两级层次化搜索，用 k-means 池化将计算成本降低 4 倍，而检索质量仅下降 3%。

本文还给出了测地距离优于直接相似性的理论条件、低秩度量近似的质量刻画，并通过实验加以验证。源码与训练模型已开源：https://github.com/YCRG-Labs/geodesic-search。

title: Learning to Reflect and Correct: Towards Better Decoding Trajectories for Large-Scale Generative Recommendation
summary: Generative Recommendation (GR) has become a promising paradigm for large-scale recommendation systems. However, existing GR models typically perform single-pass decoding without explicit refinement, causing early deviations to accumulate and ultimately degrade recommendation quality. To tackle this problem, we propose GRC, which is, to our knowledge, the first structured reflection-correction framework for GR that extends standard decoding into a Generation-Reflection-Correction (GRC) process. Concretely, GRC introduces a supervised reflection-correction template that decomposes the decoding process into initial draft generation, multi-granular reflection, and reflection-guided correction, thereby enabling structured reflection and correction in the semantic token space. To further explore the enlarged refinement space introduced by the GRC process, we optimize the entire GRC trajectory with GRPO-based reinforcement learning, under a carefully designed reward function with token-level and trajectory-level signals. For efficient online serving, we propose an Entropy-Guided Reflection Scheduling (EGRS) strategy that dynamically allocates more correction budget to high-uncertainty decoding trajectories during beam search. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets show that GRC consistently outperforms six state-of-the-art baselines by up to 15.74%, and online A/B tests demonstrate its substantial practical value in large-scale industrial recommendation, delivering a 1.79% lift in advertising revenue with only modest latency overhead.
translated_summary: 生成式推荐（GR）已成为大规模推荐系统的新兴范式。然而，现有 GR 模型普遍采用单步解码，缺乏显式细化，导致早期误差不断累积并最终恶化推荐效果。对此，我们首次提出 GRC——一项首个面向 GR 的结构化“反思-校正”框架，它将标准解码扩展为“生成-反思-校正”（GRC）流程。具体而言，GRC 引入监督式“反思-校正”模板，将解码过程分解为：初稿生成、多粒度反思和反思驱动的校正，使得语义标记空间内的结构化反思与校正成为可能。为了充分挖掘 GRC 带来的更宽优化空间，我们以 GRPO 强化学习对整个 GRC 轨迹进行优化，设计了一套融合标记级与轨迹级信号的奖励函数。针对高效在线服务，我们提出基于熵不确定度的“反思调度”策略（EGRS），在束搜索时为高不确定度轨迹动态追加校正预算。在真实数据集上的大量实验表明，GRC 相较六项最先进水平基线最多可提升 15.74%；线上 A/B 测试进一步验证了其在大型工业推荐场景中的实际价值：仅带来轻微延迟，就将广告收入提升 1.79%。

title: Synthetic Data Powers Product Retrieval for Long-tail Knowledge-Intensive Queries in E-commerce Search
summary: Product retrieval is the backbone of e-commerce search: for each user query, it identifies a high-recall candidate set from billions of items, laying the foundation for high-quality ranking and user experience. Despite extensive optimization for mainstream queries, existing systems still struggle with long-tail queries, especially knowledge-intensive ones. These queries exhibit diverse linguistic patterns, often lack explicit purchase intent, and require domain-specific knowledge reasoning for accurate interpretation. They also suffer from a shortage of reliable behavioral logs, which makes such queries a persistent challenge for retrieval optimization. To address these issues, we propose an efficient data synthesis framework tailored to retrieval involving long-tail, knowledge-intensive queries. The key idea is to implicitly distill the capabilities of a powerful offline query-rewriting model into an efficient online retrieval system. Leveraging the strong language understanding of LLMs, we train a multi-candidate query rewriting model with multiple reward signals and capture its rewriting capability in well-curated query-product pairs through a powerful offline retrieval pipeline. This design mitigates distributional shift in rewritten queries, which might otherwise limit incremental recall or introduce irrelevant products. Experiments demonstrate that without any additional tricks, simply incorporating this synthetic data into retrieval model training leads to significant improvements. Online Side-By-Side (SBS) human evaluation results indicate a notable enhancement in user search experience.
translated_summary:
商品检索是电商搜索的“刚需”——面对每条用户查询，都需从数十亿商品中召回高覆盖的候选集，为后续高质量排序与用户体验奠定基础。尽管主流查询已被长期优化，现有系统对长尾查询，尤其是知识密集型长尾查询，依然捉襟见肘。这些查询语言形式五花八门，往往缺乏明确购买意图，且需要领域知识推理才能精准理解；同时缺少可靠的行为日志，使检索优化举步维艰。

针对上述痛点，我们提出了一种面向长尾知识检索的高效数据合成框架。其核心理念是：将离线重写强模型的能力“隐式蒸馏”进轻量在线检索系统。借助大模型卓越的语言理解力，我们先利用多重奖励信号训练一个多路候选查询改写器，并通过强大的离线检索流，在精心筛选的“查询-商品”例里固化其改写能力。这一机制缓解了改写查询带来的分布偏移，避免增量召回有限或引入无关商品。 

离线实验表明，不需任何额外技巧，仅把合成数据加入检索模型训练，即可显著提升效果；线上 Side-By-Side 人工评测同样印证了搜索体验的大幅改善。

title: LFQA-HP-1M: A Large-Scale Human Preference Dataset for Long-Form Question Answering
summary: Long-form question answering (LFQA) demands nuanced evaluation of multi-sentence explanatory responses, yet existing metrics often fail to reflect human judgment. We present LFQA-HP-1M, a large-scale dataset comprising 1.3M human pairwise preference annotations for LFQA. We propose nine rubrics for answer quality evaluation, and show that simple linear models based on these features perform comparably to state-of-the-art LLM evaluators. We further examine transitivity consistency, positional bias, and verbosity biases in LLM evaluators and demonstrate their vulnerability to adversarial perturbations. Overall, this work provides one of the largest public LFQA preference datasets and a rubric-driven framework for transparent and reliable evaluation.
translated_summary: 长篇幅问答（LFQA）要求对多句解释性回答进行细致评估，而现有指标往往无法体现人类判断。本文推出 LFQA-HP-1M——一个包含 130 万条人类成对偏好标注的 LFQA 大规模数据集。我们提出了回答质量的九维度细项评分标准，并证明基于这些特征的线性评估模型性能可与最新的 LLM 评估器媲美。此外，我们还系统研究了 LLM 评估器中的传递一致性、位置偏差和冗长偏差，并展示其对对抗扰动的敏感性。总体上，本研究提供了目前最大的公开 LFQA 偏好数据集，并构建了一个以评分细则驱动的透明、可靠评估框架。

title: Unified Learning-to-Rank for Multi-Channel Retrieval in Large-Scale E-Commerce Search
summary: Large-scale e-commerce search must surface a broad set of items from a vast catalog, ranging from bestselling products to new, trending, or seasonal items. Modern systems therefore rely on multiple specialized retrieval channels to surface products, each designed to satisfy a specific objective. A key challenge is how to effectively merge documents from these heterogeneous channels into a single ranked list under strict latency constraints while optimizing for business KPIs such as user conversion. Rank-based fusion methods such as Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) and Weighted Interleaving rely on fixed global channel weights and treat channels independently, failing to account for query-specific channel utility and cross-channel interactions. We observe that multi-channel fusion can be reformulated as a query-dependent learning-to-rank problem over heterogeneous candidate sources. In this paper, we propose a unified ranking model that learns to merge and rank documents from multiple retrieval channels. We formulate the problem as a channel-aware learning-to-rank task that jointly optimizes clicks, add-to-carts, and purchases while incorporating channel-specific objectives. We further incorporate recent user behavioral signals to capture short-term intent shifts that are critical for improving conversion in multi-channel ranking. Our online A/B experiments show that the proposed approach outperforms rank-based fusion methods, leading to a +2.85\% improvement in user conversion. The model satisfies production latency requirements, achieving a p95 latency of under 50\,ms, and is deployed on Target.com.
translated_summary:
大规模电商搜索必须从一个海量商品目录中召回广泛的商品，既包括畅销品，也涵盖新品、潮流品以及季节性商品。因此，现代系统依赖多条专门的召回通道，为不同目的分别生成候选商品列表。核心难题在于如何在严格的延迟约束下，将这些异构通道的文档高效合并为一个单一排序列表，并同时优化用户转化率等关键业务指标。 

现有基于排序的融合方法，如互惠排序融合（RRF）和加权交叉排序（Weighted Interleaving），都使用固定的全局通道权重并将各通道视为独立单元，无法根据查询的变化自适应地衡量通道效用，也无法处理通道间的交叉影响。我们发现，多通道融合可以被重新定义为基于查询的异构候选源上的一种学习排序（learning-to-rank）任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种统一的深度排序模型，能够从多条召回通道中直接学习合并与排序。我们将其形式化为“通道感知”的学习排序任务，在共同优化点击、加购和转化指标的同时，兼顾各通道的特定目标。此外，我们引入用户近期行为信号，以捕获短期意图漂移，进一步提升多通道排序带来的转化率。 

在线 A/B 实验显示，该模型优于现有基于排序的融合方法，用户转化率提升 2.85%，并满足生产环境的延迟要求（p95 < 50 ms），现已部署于 Target.com 全站搜索。

title: Cross-Representation Knowledge Transfer for Improved Sequential Recommendations
summary: Transformer architectures, capable of capturing sequential dependencies in the history of user interactions, have become the dominant approach in sequential recommender systems. Despite their success, such models consider sequence elements in isolation, implicitly accounting for the complex relationships between them. Graph neural networks, in contrast, explicitly model these relationships through higher order interactions but are often unable to adequately capture their evolution over time, limiting their use for predicting the next interaction. To fill this gap, we present a new framework that combines transformers and graph neural networks and aligns different representations for solving next-item prediction task. Our solution simultaneously encodes structural dependencies in the interaction graph and tracks their dynamic change. Experimental results on a number of open datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms both pure sequential and graph approaches in terms of recommendation quality, as well as recent methods that combine both types of signals.
translated_summary: Transformer 架构能够捕捉用户交互序列中的长期依赖关系，已成为序列推荐系统的主流方案。然而，这类模型将序列元素孤立看待，对它们之间复杂关系的建模只能隐式进行。相比之下，图神经网络通过高阶交互显式刻画这些关系，却难以充分跟踪其随时间演化的动态，因而在预测下一项交互时受到限制。为弥补这一缺陷，本文提出一种新的框架，将 Transformer 与图神经网络融合，并对多种表征进行对齐，专门针对下一项预测任务。我们的方法同时编码交互图的结构依赖，实时追踪其动态变化。在多个公开数据集上的实验结果表明，该框架在推荐质量上一致优于纯序列模型、纯图模型，以及近期试图同时引入两类信号的最新方法。

title: Truncated Step-Level Sampling with Process Rewards for Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning
summary: Training large language models to reason with search engines via reinforcement learning is hindered by a fundamental credit assignment problem: existing methods such as Search-R1 provide only a sparse outcome reward after an entire multi-step trajectory, making it infeasible to attribute success or failure to individual reasoning and retrieval decisions. Process-reward methods like StepSearch alleviate this by introducing step-level supervision, but rely on heuristic rewards such as TF-IDF overlap with gold documents, and still sample k complete trajectories per example, retaining high gradient variance. We propose SLATE, a framework built on two complementary ideas: (1) truncated step-level sampling, which generates k trajectories that share a common prefix and differ only at the next step, and (2) dense LLM-as-judge rewards, which replace heuristic scoring with a capable LLM evaluator that assesses the quality of each reasoning step, search query, and answer, providing richer and more reliable supervision. We theoretically prove that under the same dense reward structure, truncated sampling reduces the variance of advantage estimates by up to a factor of T compared to full-trajectory sampling for T-step trajectories, yielding lower-variance, better-targeted policy gradients. Experiments on seven QA benchmarks confirm that SLATE consistently outperforms both sparse-reward and process-reward baselines, with the largest gains on harder multi-hop tasks and smaller models.
translated_summary:
通过强化学习训练大型语言模型使用搜索引擎进行推理时，存在一个根本的信用分配难题：现有的 Search-R1 等方法只能在整个多步轨迹完成后给出一个稀疏的最终结果奖励，无法将成功或失败归因到某一段具体推理或检索决策上。  
StepSearch 等过程奖励方法通过引入逐步监督缓解这一问题，但其奖励仍是基于与黄金文档的 TF-IDF 重叠等启发式指标，且依然需要为每个样本抽样 k 条完整轨迹，导致梯度方差仍然较大。  

我们提出 SLATE 框架，核心包含两个互补设计：  
1) 截断式逐步采样（truncated step-level sampling）：先生成 k 条共享前缀、仅在下一步出现差异的轨迹，减少冗余。  
2) 稠密的大模型裁判奖励（dense LLM-as-judge rewards）：不再使用启发式评分，而是由一个能力更强的大模型评估每一步推理、查询及最终答案的质量，提供更丰富且可靠的监督信号。  

理论分析证明，在同样的稠密奖励结构下，对 T 步轨迹而言，截断采样可使优势估计的方差最多降低 T 倍，进而获得更低方差、针对性更强的策略梯度。  

在七个问答基准上的实验表明，SLATE 一致优于稀疏奖励和过程奖励基线，尤其是在难度更高的多跳问答任务及较小的模型上增益最显著。

title: GeMi: A Graph-based, Multimodal Recommendation System for Narrative Scroll Paintings
summary: Recommendation Systems are effective in managing the ever-increasing amount of multimodal data available today and help users discover interesting new items. These systems can handle various media types such as images, text, audio, and video data, and this has made it possible to handle content-based recommendation utilizing features extracted from items while also incorporating user preferences. Graph Neural Network (GNN)-based recommendation systems are a special class of recommendation systems that can handle relationships between items and users, making them particularly attractive for content-based recommendations. Their popularity also stems from the fact that they use advanced machine learning techniques, such as deep learning on graph-structured data, to exploit user-to-item interactions. The nodes in the graph can access higher-order neighbor information along with state-of-the-art vision-language models for processing multimodal content, and there are well-designed algorithms for embedding, message passing, and propagation. In this work, we present the design of a GNN-based recommendation system on a novel data set collected from field research. Designed for an endangered performing art form, the recommendation system uses multimodal content (text and image data) to suggest similar paintings for viewing and purchase. To the best of our knowledge, there is no recommendation system designed for narrative scroll paintings -- our work therefore serves several purposes, including art conservation, a data storage system for endangered art objects, and a state-of-the-art recommendation system that leverages both the novel characteristics of the data and preferences of the user population interested in narrative scroll paintings.
translated_summary:
推荐系统在处理当今日益激增的多模态数据方面卓有成效，能够帮助用户发现有趣的新项目。此类系统可处理图像、文本、音频、视频等多种媒体形式，从而在基于内容的推荐中，既能利用从条目提取的特征，又能结合用户偏好。基于图神经网络（GNN）的推荐系统是一类特殊系统，能够刻画条目与用户之间的关系，尤其适用于内容型推荐。其受欢迎的原因还在于，它借助深度图表示学习等先进机器学习手段，充分挖掘用户-条目交互信息。图中的节点不仅能聚合高阶邻居信息，还可调用当前最优的视觉-语言模型处理多模态内容，并在嵌入、消息传递和传播方面已有精心设计的高效算法。

本研究以一套从田野调查中获得的全新数据集为基础，设计了一套 GNN 推荐系统。该系统的目标是为一种濒危的表演艺术形式服务，利用文本和图像两种模态的资源，向用户推荐相似画轴以供观赏与购买。据我们所知，尚无为叙事画轴类作品设计的推荐系统；因此，本工作兼具多重意义：濒危艺术的保存、相关艺术品的数据存储，以及为用户提供一套充分利用这类新颖数据特点、并基于叙事画轴爱好者偏好的先进推荐服务。

title: Tiny-Critic RAG: Empowering Agentic Fallback with Parameter-Efficient Small Language Models
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) grounds Large Language Models (LLMs) to mitigate factual hallucinations. Recent paradigms shift from static pipelines to Modular and Agentic RAG frameworks, granting models autonomy for multi-hop reasoning or self-correction. However, current reflective RAG heavily relies on massive LLMs as universal evaluators. In high-throughput systems, executing complete forward passes for billion-parameter models merely for binary routing introduces severe computational redundancy. Furthermore, in autonomous agent scenarios, inaccurate retrieval causes models to expend excessive tokens on spurious reasoning and redundant tool calls, inflating Time-to-First-Token (TTFT) and costs. We propose Tiny-Critic RAG, decoupling evaluation by deploying a parameter-efficient Small Language Model (SLM) via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Acting as a deterministic gatekeeper, Tiny-Critic employs constrained decoding and non-thinking inference modes for ultra-low latency binary routing. Evaluations on noise-injected datasets demonstrate Tiny-Critic RAG achieves routing accuracy comparable to GPT-4o-mini while reducing latency by an order of magnitude, establishing a highly cost-effective paradigm for agent deployment.
translated_summary: 检索增强生成（RAG）通过为大型语言模型（LLM）提供外部知识，缓解事实性幻觉。最新范式正由静态流水线转向模块化、具备智能体特性的 RAG 框架，使模型能够自主进行多跳推理或自我纠错。然而，当前的反思型 RAG 仍然严重依赖超大规模 LLM 作为“万能评估器”。在高并发系统中，仅为一次二元路由就运行数十亿参数模型的完整前向计算，造成了巨大的算力浪费。此外，在智能体自主决策场景下，检索错误会迫使模型在无效推理和多轮工具调用中消耗过多 token，显著拉长了首 token 延迟（TTFT）并推高成本。为此，我们提出 Tiny-Critic RAG，通过低秩适配（LoRA）部署参数量极少的 SLM 来独立承担评估职责。Tiny-Critic 作为确定性门控单元，采用受限解码与“非思维”推断模式，实现极低延迟的二元路由。在带噪声数据集上的实验表明，Tiny-Critic RAG 在路由准确率上与 GPT-4o-mini 不相上下，而延迟降低一个数量级，为智能体部署提供了一种极具成本效益的新范式。

title: The Synthetic Web: Adversarially-Curated Mini-Internets for Diagnosing Epistemic Weaknesses of Language Agents
summary: Language agents increasingly act as web-enabled systems that search, browse, and synthesize information from diverse sources. However, these sources can include unreliable or adversarial content, and the robustness of agents to adversarial ranking - where misleading information appears prominently in search results - remains poorly understood. Existing benchmarks evaluate functional navigation or static factuality but cannot causally isolate this vulnerability, and current mitigation strategies for retrieval-augmented generation remain largely untested under such conditions. We introduce Synthetic Web Benchmark, a procedurally generated environment comprising thousands of hyperlinked articles with ground-truth labels for credibility and factuality, process-level interaction traces, and contamination filtering to eliminate training-data leakage. By injecting a single high-plausibility misinformation article into a controllable search rank, we measure the causal effect of adversarial exposure in six frontier models. The results reveal catastrophic failures: accuracy collapses despite unlimited access to truthful sources, with minimal search escalation and severe miscalibration. These findings expose fundamental limitations in how current frontier models handle conflicting information, with immediate implications for deployment in high-stakes domains. Our benchmark enables systematic analysis of these failure modes and provides a controlled testbed for evaluating mitigation strategies under adversarial ranking - a gap in current research. This work establishes a reproducible baseline for developing search-robust and epistemically humble agents capable of resisting manipulation in high-stakes domains.
translated_summary: 语言智能体日益作为联网系统运行，可在网络上搜索、浏览并整合多元信息。然而，这些信息源可能包含不可靠乃至具有对抗性的内容，而智能体对抗“对抗性排序”（即误导信息在搜索结果中排名靠前）的鲁棒性却仍鲜有人研究。现有基准往往只测试功能性导航或静态事实性，却无法因果隔离这一脆弱点；针对检索增强生成的防御策略亦几乎未在此种对抗性条件下得到检验。我们提出“合成网络基准”——一个可由程序生成的测试环境，涵盖数千篇互链接文章，每篇均带可信度和真实性的金标标注，并配备完整的交互痕迹与污染过滤，以防训练数据泄漏。通过向可控的搜索排序中插入一篇高可信度但虚假的误导文章，我们测量六款前沿模型因对抗性暴露导致的因果效应。结果揭示灾难性失败：尽管模型可无限获取真实信息，其准确率仍骤降，几乎不进行搜索升级，且校准度失衡严重。这些发现暴露了当前前沿模型在处理冲突信息时的根本局限，对部署于高风险领域具有直接警示意义。我们的基准为系统性分析此类失效模式提供环境，并为评估对抗性排序下的防御策略提供可控实验平台——这一缺口在现有研究中尚属空白。本工作为构建可在高风险域中抵御操控、具备搜索鲁棒性与认知谦逊的智能体建立了可复现的基准。

title: SODA: Semantic-Oriented Distributional Alignment for Generative Recommendation
summary: Generative recommendation has emerged as a scalable alternative to traditional retrieve-and-rank pipelines by operating in a compact token space. However, existing methods mainly rely on discrete code-level supervision, which leads to information loss and limits the joint optimization between the tokenizer and the generative recommender. In this work, we propose a distribution-level supervision paradigm that leverages probability distributions over multi-layer codebooks as soft and information-rich representations. Building on this idea, we introduce Semantic-Oriented Distributional Alignment (SODA), a plug-and-play contrastive supervision framework based on Bayesian Personalized Ranking, which aligns semantically rich distributions via negative KL divergence while enabling end-to-end differentiable training. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world datasets demonstrate that SODA consistently improves the performance of various generative recommender backbones, validating its effectiveness and generality. Codes will be available upon acceptance.
translated_summary: 生成式推荐以紧凑的 token 空间为操作域，已成为传统“检索-排序”流程的可扩展替代方案。然而，现有方法主要依赖离散码级监督，导致信息损失并限制了 tokenizer 与生成式推荐器之间的联合优化。为此，本文提出一种分布级监督范式：利用多层码本之上的概率分布作为兼具软性、丰富信息的表征。基于该思想，我们设计了面向语义的分布对齐 SODA（Semantic-Oriented Distributional Alignment）：一种即插即用的对比监督框架，基于贝叶斯个性化排序，通过 negative KL 散度将语义丰富的分布对齐，并支持端到端的可微训练。在多个真实数据集上的大量实验表明，SODA 能够持续提升各类生成式推荐基线的性能，验证了该方法的通用性与有效性。代码将在论文录用后开源。

title: RAIE: Region-Aware Incremental Preference Editing with LoRA for LLM-based Recommendation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly adopted as the backbone of recommender systems. However, user-item interactions in real-world scenarios are non-stationary, making preference drift over time inevitable. Existing model update strategies mainly rely on global fine-tuning or pointwise editing, but they face two fundamental challenges: (i) imbalanced update granularity, where global updates perturb behaviors unrelated to the target while pointwise edits fail to capture broader preference shifts; (ii) unstable incremental updates, where repeated edits interfere with prior adaptations, leading to catastrophic forgetting and inconsistent recommendations. To address these issues, we propose Region-Aware Incremental Editing (RAIE), a plug-in framework that freezes the backbone model and performs region-level updates. RAIE first constructs semantically coherent preference regions via spherical k-means in the representation space. It then assigns incoming sequences to regions via confidence-aware gating and performs three localized edit operations - Update, Expand, and Add - to dynamically revise the affected region. Each region is equipped with a dedicated Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) module, which is trained only on the region's updated data. During inference, RAIE routes each user sequence to its corresponding region and activates the region-specific adapter for prediction. Experiments on two benchmark datasets under a time-sliced protocol that segments data into Set-up (S), Finetune (F), and Test (T) show that RAIE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines while effectively mitigating forgetting. These results demonstrate that region-aware editing offers an accurate and scalable mechanism for continual adaptation in dynamic recommendation scenarios. Our code is available at https://github.com/fengaogao/RAIE.
translated_summary: 大语言模型（LLM）正日益成为推荐系统的主干模型。然而，真实场景下的用户–物品交互具有非平稳特性，偏好漂移不可避免。现有模型更新策略主要依赖全局微调或点对点编辑，但面临两大根本挑战：（i）更新粒度失衡——全局更新会干扰与目标无关的行为，而点对点编辑无法捕捉更广泛的偏好变化；（ii）增量更新不稳定——重复编辑会干扰之前已适应的参数，导致灾难性遗忘和推荐不一致。为此，我们提出区域感知增量编辑（RAIE），一种可即插即用的框架：冻结主干模型，在“区域级”执行更新。RAIE首先在表征空间内通过球面 k-means 构建语义一致的偏好区域；然后利用置信度门控将新增序列分配到对应区域，并通过 Update、Expand、Add 三种局部化编辑操作动态修正受影响的区域。每个区域配备独立的 LoRA 模块，仅在该区域更新数据上训练。推理时，RAIE 将用户序列路由至对应区域并激活区域专属适配器完成预测。在两个基准数据集上，采用 Set-up (S) / Finetune (F) / Test (T) 的时间切片协议，实验显示 RAIE 显著超越当前最优基线，并有效缓解遗忘。结果表明，区域感知编辑为动态推荐场景中的持续适应提供了一种精准可扩展的机制。代码开源：https://github.com/fengaogao/RAIE

title: Stop Treating Collisions Equally: Qualification-Aware Semantic ID Learning for Recommendation at Industrial Scale
summary: Semantic IDs (SIDs) are compact discrete representations derived from multimodal item features, serving as a unified abstraction for ID-based and generative recommendation. However, learning high-quality SIDs remains challenging due to two issues. (1) Collision problem: the quantized token space is prone to collisions, in which semantically distinct items are assigned identical or overly similar SID compositions, resulting in semantic entanglement. (2) Collision-signal heterogeneity: collisions are not uniformly harmful. Some reflect genuine conflicts between semantically unrelated items, while others stem from benign redundancy or systematic data effects. To address these challenges, we propose Qualification-Aware Semantic ID Learning (QuaSID), an end-to-end framework that learns collision-qualified SIDs by selectively repelling qualified conflict pairs and scaling the repulsion strength by collision severity. QuaSID consists of two mechanisms: Hamming-guided Margin Repulsion, which translates low-Hamming SID overlaps into explicit, severity-scaled geometric constraints on the encoder space; and Conflict-Aware Valid Pair Masking, which masks protocol-induced benign overlaps to denoise repulsion supervision. In addition, QuaSID incorporates a dual-tower contrastive objective to inject collaborative signals into tokenization. Experiments on public benchmarks and industrial data validate QuaSID. On public datasets, QuaSID consistently outperforms strong baselines, improving top-K ranking quality by 5.9% over the best baseline while increasing SID composition diversity. In an online A/B test on Kuaishou e-commerce with a 5% traffic split, QuaSID increases ranking GMV-S2 by 2.38% and improves completed orders on cold-start retrieval by up to 6.42%. Finally, we show that the proposed repulsion loss is plug-and-play and enhances a range of SID learning frameworks across datasets.
translated_summary:
语义ID（SID）是从多模态物品特征中提取的紧凑离散表示，可同时作为基于ID推荐与生成式推荐方法的统一抽象。然而，学习高质量的SID仍面临两大挑战：(1) 碰撞问题：量化后的令牌空间容易发生碰撞，导致语义明显不同的物品被赋予相同或极为相近的SID组合，引发语义纠缠。(2) 碰撞信号的异构性：不同类型的碰撞代价并不相同——有些碰撞源于真正语义冲突的物品，另一些则只是良性冗余或由数据集系统偏差造成。本文提出“资质感知的语义ID学习”（QuaSID），一个端到端框架，通过学习“可碰撞资质”的SID，仅对真正冲突的候选对进行可缩放强度的排斥，从而缓解上述难题。

QuaSID包含两大核心机制：
1. **汉明距离引导的间隔排斥**：将低汉明距离SID重叠转化为编码空间中的几何约束，并按碰撞严重程度动态调整排斥力度；  
2. **冲突感知的有效配对掩码**：自动掩去由协议导致的良性重叠，为排斥监督去噪。

此外，QuaSID通过双塔对比学习目标在离散化过程中注入协同过滤信号。在公开基准与工业数据上大量实验验证了QuaSID的有效性：  
• 相比最强基线，QuaSID在公开数据集上的Top-K排序指标提升5.9%，同时显著增加SID组合多样性。  
• 在快手电商5%流量分桶的在线A/B测试中，QuaSID使GMV-S2排序指标提升2.38%，并将冷启动检索的完成订单量提高最多6.42%。  
• 进一步验证表明，QuaSID提出的排斥损失可“即插即用”，在多个数据集和不同SID学习框架上均带来持续增益。

title: RTLocating: Intent-aware RTL Localization for Hardware Design Iteration
summary: Industrial chip development is inherently iterative, favoring localized, intent-driven updates over rewriting RTL from scratch. Yet most LLM-Aided Hardware Design (LAD) work focuses on one-shot synthesis, leaving this workflow underexplored. To bridge this gap, we for the first time formalize $Δ$Spec-to-RTL localization, a multi-positive problem mapping natural language change requests ($Δ$Spec) to the affected Register Transfer Level (RTL) syntactic blocks. We propose RTLocating, an intent-aware RTL localization framework, featuring a dynamic router that adaptively fuses complementary views from a textual semantic encoder, a local structural encoder, and a global interaction and dependency encoder (GLIDE). To enable scalable supervision, we introduce EvoRTL-Bench, the first industrial-scale benchmark for intent-code alignment derived from OpenTitan's Git history, comprising 1,905 validated requests and 13,583 $Δ$Spec-RTL block pairs. On EvoRTL-Bench, RTLocating achieves 0.568 MRR and 15.08% R@1, outperforming the strongest baseline by +22.9% and +67.0%, respectively, establishing a new state-of-the-art for intent-driven localization in evolving hardware designs.
translated_summary: 工业芯片开发天然具有迭代性，更倾向于局部、以意图为导向的更新，而非从零重写 RTL。然而，现有大模型辅助硬件设计（LAD）研究多聚焦于一次性自动生成，忽视了这一工作流程的探索需求。为此，我们首次形式化提出 ΔSpec-to-RTL 定位任务——一种多正例映射问题：将自然语言变更请求（$Δ$Spec）对应到受影响的寄存器传输级（RTL）语法单元。我们提出 RTLocating，一个面向意图感知的 RTL 定位框架，其内置动态路由器可自适应融合三种互补视角：文本语义编码器、局部结构编码器、以及全局交互与依赖编码器（GLIDE）。为支撑可扩展监督，我们发布 EvoRTL-Bench——首个源于 OpenTitan Git 历史的工业级意图-代码对齐基准，包含 1 905 条已验证请求与 13 583 组 $Δ$Spec-RTL block 配对数据。在该基准上，RTLocating 以 0.568 的 MRR 与 15.08% 的 R@1 刷新纪录，较最强基线分别提升 +22.9% 和 +67.0%，成为演进式硬件设计中意图驱动定位的新标杆。

title: MuonRec: Shifting the Optimizer Paradigm Beyond Adam in Scalable Generative Recommendation
summary: Recommender systems (RecSys) are increasingly emphasizing scaling, leveraging larger architectures and more interaction data to improve personalization. Yet, despite the optimizer's pivotal role in training, modern RecSys pipelines almost universally default to Adam/AdamW, with limited scrutiny of whether these choices are truly optimal for recommendation. In this work, we revisit optimizer design for scalable recommendation and introduce MuonRec, the first framework that brings the recently proposed Muon optimizer to RecSys training. Muon performs orthogonalized momentum updates for 2D weight matrices via Newton-Schulz iteration, promoting diverse update directions and improving optimization efficiency. We develop an open-source training recipe for recommendation models and evaluate it across both traditional sequential recommenders and modern generative recommenders. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MuonRec reduces converged training steps by an average of 32.4\% while simultaneously improving final ranking quality. Specifically, MuonRec yields consistent relative gains in NDCG@10, averaging 12.6\% across all settings, with particularly pronounced improvements in generative recommendation models. These results consistently outperform strong Adam/AdamW baselines, positioning Muon as a promising new optimizer standard for RecSys training. Our code is available.
translated_summary: 推荐系统（RecSys）正日益注重规模化，通过更庞大的架构和更丰富的互动数据提升个性化效果。然而，尽管优化器在训练中起着关键作用，现代推荐流程几乎清一色默认使用 Adam / AdamW，却鲜有人深究这些选择是否真正适合推荐场景。本文重新审视面向可扩展推荐的优化器设计，首次把近期提出的 Muon 优化器引入 RecSys 训练任务，构建了 MuonRec 框架。Muon 利用 Newton–Schulz 迭代对二维权重矩阵进行正交化的动量更新，鼓励多样化的参数更新方向，从而显著提升优化效率。我们开源了一套通用训练方案，并在传统序列推荐和现代生成式推荐两类模型上进行了系统评测。大量实验表明，MuonRec 将平均收敛步数减少 32.4%，同时最终排序质量进一步提升。具体而言，在所有评估设置下，MuonRec 在 NDCG@10 上始终保持平均 12.6% 的相对增益，尤其在与生成式推荐模型的结合中效果更加显著，全面超越了强劲的 Adam / AdamW 基线。我们的代码已开源。

title: Transformers Remember First, Forget Last: Dual-Process Interference in LLMs
summary: When large language models encounter conflicting information in context, which memories survive -- early or recent? We adapt classical interference paradigms from cognitive psychology to answer this question, testing 39 LLMs across diverse architectures and scales. Every model shows the same pattern: proactive interference (PI) dominates retroactive interference (RI) universally (Cohen's d = 1.73, p < 0.0001), meaning early encodings are protected at the cost of recent information -- the opposite of human memory, where RI typically dominates. Three findings indicate that RI and PI reflect separate memory mechanisms. RI and PI are uncorrelated (R^2 = 0.044), rejecting a unified "memory capacity." Model size predicts RI resistance (R^2 = 0.49) but not PI (R^2 = 0.06, n.s.) -- only RI is capacity-dependent. And error analysis reveals distinct failure modes: RI failures are passive retrieval failures (51%), while PI failures show active primacy intrusion (56%); both show <1% hallucination. These patterns parallel the consolidation-retrieval distinction in cognitive science, suggesting that transformer attention creates a primacy bias with direct implications for interference-heavy applications.
translated_summary:
当大型语言模型在上下文中遇到冲突信息时，哪种记忆会被保留——早先的还是最近的？我们将认知心理学的经典干扰范式加以改造来回答这一问题，在 39 个涵盖多种架构与参数规模的大语言模型上进行了测试。所有模型均呈现出一致的规律：前摄干扰（PI）全面压倒后摄干扰（RI）（Cohen’s d = 1.73，p < 0.0001）。也就是说，早期编码的信息受保护，而近期信息被牺牲——这与人脑记忆恰好相反，后者通常是 RI 占优。

三项观察表明，RI 与 PI 对应不同的记忆机制：  
1) RI 和 PI 无显著相关（R² = 0.044），拒绝了“记忆容量统一说”；  
2) 模型大小预测了对 RI 的抵抗力（R² = 0.49），但对 PI 无显著预测力（R² = 0.06，n.s.），说明仅 RI 是容量依赖性的；  
3) 错误模式亦不同——RI 失败多为被动的检索缺失（51%），而 PI 失败则表现为积极的初项入侵（56%）；两类错误均极少幻觉（<1%）。

这些模式映射到认知科学中的“巩固-检索”二分机制，提示 Transformer 注意力机制产生了首因偏差，对阵列高干扰任务具有直接启示。

title: Multi-Sourced, Multi-Agent Evidence Retrieval for Fact-Checking
summary:
Misinformation spreading over the Internet poses a significant threat to both societies and individuals, necessitating robust and scalable fact-checking that relies on retrieving accurate and trustworthy evidence. Previous methods rely on semantic and social-contextual patterns learned from training data, which limits their generalization to new data distributions. Recently, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) based methods have been proposed to utilize the reasoning capability of LLMs with retrieved grounding evidence documents. However, these methods largely rely on textual similarity for evidence retrieval and struggle to retrieve evidence that captures multi-hop semantic relations within rich document contents. These limitations lead to overlooking subtle factual correlations between the evidence and the claims to be fact-checked during evidence retrieval, thus causing inaccurate veracity predictions.
  To address these issues, we propose WKGFC, which exploits authorized open knowledge graph as a core resource of evidence. LLM-enabled retrieval is designed to assess the claims and retrieve the most relevant knowledge subgraphs, forming structured evidence for fact verification. To augment the knowledge graph evidence, we retrieve web contents for completion. The above process is implemented as an automatic Markov Decision Process (MDP): A reasoning LLM agent decides what actions to take according to the current evidence and the claims. To adapt the MDP for fact-checking, we use prompt optimization to fine-tune the agentic LLM.
translated_summary:
网络谣言对社会和个人都构成了重大威胁，亟待能够稳健扩展并依赖准确可信证据的事实核查机制。以往方法多从训练数据中习得语义或社交语境模式，难以在分布迁移时保持通用性。近期出现的“检索增强生成”（RAG）方法利用大语言模型（LLM）的推理能力，结合检索到的证据文档进行核查，但它们主要依赖文本相似度抓取证据，难以捕捉到文档内部复杂的多跳语义关系，容易在查找证据时遗漏与待查主张之间隐含的细微事实关联，从而导致真伪判定失准。

为此，我们提出 WKGFC（基于权威开放知识图谱的事实核查）。该方法以经过授权的开放知识图谱为核心证据来源：由 LLM 驱动的检索模块先分析待核查主张，然后找出最相关的知识子图，形成结构化证据；为弥补知识图谱可能缺失的细节，再通过网络内容补全证据。上述流程被构建为一个自动化的 Markov 决策过程（MDP）：具备推理能力的 LLM 智能体根据当前证据与主张决定下一步操作。为使 MDP 适应事实核查任务，我们通过提示优化对智能体 LLM 进行精调。

title: Resources for Automated Evaluation of Assistive RAG Systems that Help Readers with News Trustworthiness Assessment
summary: Many readers today struggle to assess the trustworthiness of online news because reliable reporting coexists with misinformation. The TREC 2025 DRAGUN (Detection, Retrieval, and Augmented Generation for Understanding News) Track provided a venue for researchers to develop and evaluate assistive RAG systems that support readers' news trustworthiness assessment by producing reader-oriented, well-attributed reports. As the organizers of the DRAGUN track, we describe the resources that we have newly developed to allow for the reuse of the track's tasks. The track had two tasks: (Task 1) Question Generation, producing 10 ranked investigative questions; and (Task 2, the main task) Report Generation, producing a 250-word report grounded in the MS MARCO V2.1 Segmented Corpus. As part of the track's evaluation, we had TREC assessors create importance-weighted rubrics of questions with expected short answers for 30 different news articles. These rubrics represent the information that assessors believe is important for readers to assess an article's trustworthiness. The assessors then used their rubrics to manually judge the participating teams' submitted runs. To make these tasks and their rubrics reusable, we have created an automated process to judge runs not part of the original assessing. We show that our AutoJudge ranks existing runs well compared to the TREC human-assessed evaluation (Kendall's $τ= 0.678$ for Task 1 and $τ= 0.872$ for Task 2). These resources enable both the evaluation of RAG systems for assistive news trustworthiness assessment and, with the human evaluation as a benchmark, research on improving automated RAG evaluation.
translated_summary:
当今许多读者难以判断网络新闻的可信度，因为可靠报道与虚假信息并存。TREC 2025 DRAGUN（News Understanding 的检测、检索与增强生成）赛道为研究人员提供了一个平台，用于开发和评估面向读者的 RAG 系统，从而辅助人们判断新闻的可信度，其方式是为读者生成经过清晰归因、面向阅读的报告。作为 DRAGUN 赛道的主办方，我们在此介绍我们全新构建的一系列资源，以便该赛道的任务可被他人在未来继续复用。

该赛道包含两项任务：（任务 1）问题生成——为给定文章输出 10 个按重要性排序的调查性问题；（任务 2，主体任务）报告生成——在 MS MARCO V2.1 已分块语料基础上，撰写 250 词的读者报告。作为评估的一部分，我们邀请 TREC 评估员为 30 篇不同的新闻文章制作了“带重要度加权”的评估要点（rubric），其中列出了他们认为阅读者需要关注的问题及其期望的简短答案。评估员随后利用这些 rubrics 手动评判参赛队伍提交的结果。

为了让这两项任务以及它们的 rubrics 可以被其他研究者复用，我们进一步建立了一套自动评估流程，可在不再依赖原始人工评估的情况下对新提交结果进行打分。实验显示，我们提出的 AutoJudge 与原始 TREC 人工评估在一对一排名上高度一致（任务 1 Kendall’s τ = 0.678，任务 2 Kendall’s τ = 0.872）。这些资源不仅能用于 RAG 系统在辅助新闻可信度判断方面的评估，以其人工评估为基准，还能支持改进自动 RAG 评估方法的研究。

title: Beyond the Click: A Framework for Inferring Cognitive Traces in Search
summary: User simulators are essential for evaluating search systems, but they primarily copy user actions without understanding the underlying thought process. This gap exists since large-scale interaction logs record what users do, but not what they might be thinking or feeling, such as confusion or satisfaction. To solve this problem, we present a framework to infer cognitive traces from behavior logs. Our method uses a multi-agent system grounded in Information Foraging Theory (IFT) and human expert judgment. These traces improve model performance on tasks like forecasting session outcomes and user struggle recovery. We release a collection of annotations for several public datasets, including AOL and Stack Overflow, and an open-source tool that allows researchers to apply our method to their own data. This work provides the tools and data needed to build more human-like user simulators and to assess retrieval systems on user-oriented dimensions of performance.
translated_summary:
用户模拟器是评估搜索系统的关键工具，然而它们通常只能复现用户行为，却无法理解背后的思考过程。这一缺口源于大规模交互日志仅能记录“用户做了什么”，却无法反映“用户当时想的是什么、感受如何”，比如困惑或满意。为解决此问题，本文提出一套从行为日志中推断用户认知轨迹的框架。该框架基于信息觅食理论（IFT）并引入人类专家判断的多智能体系统，使模型在预测会话结果、识别并帮助用户脱困等任务上表现显著提升。

我们将公开发布对 AOL、Stack Overflow 等公共数据集的认知轨迹标注数据，同时提供开源工具，方便研究者在自己的数据上直接应用该方法。本文的成果为构建更贴近真实人类的用户模拟器、并在以用户为中心的性能维度上评估检索系统，提供了必需的工具与数据。

title: UXSim: Towards a Hybrid User Search Simulation
summary: Simulating nuanced user experiences within complex interactive search systems poses distinct challenge for traditional methodologies, which often rely on static user proxies or, more recently, on standalone large language model (LLM) agents that may lack deep, verifiable grounding. The true dynamism and personalization inherent in human-computer interaction demand a more integrated approach. This work introduces UXSim, a novel framework that integrates both approaches. It leverages grounded data from traditional simulators to inform and constrain the reasoning of an adaptive LLM agent. This synthesis enables more accurate and dynamic simulations of user behavior while also providing a pathway for the explainable validation of the underlying cognitive processes.
translated_summary: 在复杂的交互式检索系统中，逼真地模拟细腻多样的用户体验对传统方法提出独特挑战：这些方法要么依赖静态用户代理，要么近来单用独立大模型智能体，往往缺乏可验证的深度基础。人机交互中的真正动态性与个性化，呼唤一种更高度融合的方案。本文提出 UXSim——一个将二者优势结合的新型框架，它借助传统模拟器产生的具身数据，来引导和约束自适应大模型智能体的推理过程。通过这种融合，框架既实现了对用户行为更准确、动态地模拟，又为底层认知过程提供了可解释且可验证的路径。

title: Proactive Guiding Strategy for Item-side Fairness in Interactive Recommendation
summary: Item-side fairness is crucial for ensuring the fair exposure of long-tail items in interactive recommender systems. Existing approaches promote the exposure of long-tail items by directly incorporating them into recommended results. This causes misalignment between user preferences and the recommended long-tail items, which hinders long-term user engagement and reduces the effectiveness of recommendations. We aim for a proactive fairness-guiding strategy, which actively guides user preferences toward long-tail items while preserving user satisfaction during the interactive recommendation process. To this end, we propose HRL4PFG, an interactive recommendation framework that leverages hierarchical reinforcement learning to guide user preferences toward long-tail items progressively. HRL4PFG operates through a macro-level process that generates fairness-guided targets based on multi-step feedback, and a micro-level process that fine-tunes recommendations in real time according to both these targets and evolving user preferences. Extensive experiments show that HRL4PFG improves cumulative interaction rewards and maximum user interaction length by a larger margin when compared with state-of-the-art methods in interactive recommendation environments.
translated_summary:
面向物品的长尾公平性对于交互式推荐系统而言至关重要，它能保证长尾项目得到公正曝光。现有方法通常直接将长尾项目纳入推荐结果以提升其曝光，但这与用户真实偏好出现错位，既削弱长期用户黏着，也降低推荐效果。我们提出一种主动式公平引导策略：在保持用户满意度的前提下，透过交互过程主动引导用户逐步转向偏好长尾物品。

为此，本文提出 HRL4PFG——一种基于分层强化学习的交互式推荐框架。其宏观层在多轮反馈基础上设定受公平性驱动的优化目标，微观层则依据这些目标及实时演化的用户偏好，对推荐结果进行细粒度调整。大规模实验表明，在交互推荐环境中，HRL4PFG 的累积交互奖励与最长用户交互轮次提升幅度均显著优于最先进方法。

title: Reproducing and Comparing Distillation Techniques for Cross-Encoders
summary: Recent advances in Information Retrieval have established transformer-based cross-encoders as a keystone in IR. Recent studies have focused on knowledge distillation and showed that, with the right strategy, traditional cross-encoders could reach the level of effectiveness of LLM re-rankers. Yet, comparisons with previous training strategies, including distillation from strong cross-encoder teachers, remain unclear. In addition, few studies cover a similar range of backbone encoders, while substantial improvements have been made in this area since BERT. This lack of comprehensive studies in controlled environments makes it difficult to identify robust design choices. In this work, we reproduce \citet{schlattRankDistiLLMClosingEffectiveness2025} LLM-based distillation strategy and compare it to \citet{hofstatterImprovingEfficientNeural2020} approach based on an ensemble of cross-encoder teachers, as well as other supervised objectives, to fine-tune a large range of cross-encoders, from the original BERT and its follow-ups RoBERTa, ELECTRA and DeBERTa-v3, to the more recent ModernBERT. We evaluate all models on both in-domain (TREC-DL and MS~MARCO dev) and out-of-domain datasets (BEIR, LoTTE, and Robust04). Our results show that objectives emphasizing relative comparisons -- pairwise MarginMSE and listwise InfoNCE -- consistently outperform pointwise baselines across all backbones and evaluation settings, and that objective choice can yield gains comparable to scaling the backbone architecture.
translated_summary:
近年来，信息检索（IR）领域已确立基于 Transformer 的交叉编码器为核心技术。近期研究聚焦知识蒸馏，表明在恰当策略下，传统交叉编码器可达到与大型语言模型（LLM）重排序器相当的性能。然而，相较于先前训练策略——尤其是向强交叉编码器教师模型进行蒸馏的方法——其优劣仍不明晰。此外，现有研究几乎未涵盖同规模的骨干编码器；而自 BERT 之后，该领域已出现显著改进。缺乏在受控环境中的全面评估，使得如何做出稳健的设计决策难以明确。

本文复现了 Schlatt 等人（2025）提出的基于 LLM 的蒸馏策略，并将其与 Hofstätter 等人（2020）提出的以交叉编码器教师模型集成进行蒸馏的方法，以及其它监督学习目标进行比较分析，用以微调从原始 BERT 到其后续 RoBERTa、ELECTRA、DeBERTa-v3，直至最新 ModernBERT 在内的广泛交叉编码器。我们在域内（TREC-DL 与 MS-MARCO Dev）和跨域（BEIR、LoTTE 与 Robust04）数据集上评估所有模型。

结果表明：以强调相对比较为目标——例如成对的 MarginMSE 和列表式的 InfoNCE——在所有骨干架构及评估配置中均一致地超过逐点（pointwise）基线，且目标函数的选择带来的增益可与扩大骨干规模相媲美。

title: OneRanker: Unified Generation and Ranking with One Model in Industrial Advertising Recommendation
summary: The end-to-end generative paradigm is revolutionizing advertising recommendation systems, driving a shift from traditional cascaded architectures towards unified modeling. However, practical deployment faces three core challenges: the misalignment between interest objectives and business value, the target-agnostic limitation of generative processes, and the disconnection between generation and ranking stages. Existing solutions often fall into a dilemma where single-stage fusion induces optimization tension, while stage decoupling causes irreversible information loss. To address this, we propose OneRanker, achieving architectural-level deep integration of generation and ranking. First, we design a value-aware multi-task decoupling architecture. By leveraging task token sequences and causal mask, we separate interest coverage and value optimization spaces within shared representations, effectively alleviating target conflicts. Second, we construct a coarse-to-fine collaborative target awareness mechanism, utilizing Fake Item Tokens for implicit awareness during generation and a ranking decoder for explicit value alignment at the candidate level. Finally, we propose input-output dual-side consistency guarantees. Through Key/Value pass-through mechanisms and Distribution Consistency (DC) Constraint Loss, we achieve end-to-end collaborative optimization between generation and ranking. The full deployment on Tencent's WeiXin channels advertising system has shown a significant improvement in key business metrics (GMV - Normal +1.34\%), providing a new paradigm with industrial feasibility for generative advertising recommendations.
translated_summary: 端到端生成范式正在重构广告推荐系统，推动其从传统级联架构迈向统一建模。然而落地实践仍直面三大核心难题：兴趣目标与商业价值之间目标错位、生成链路目标泛化的局限、以及生成与排序阶段的信息割裂。现有方案常陷入“单阶段融合引发优化冲突，两阶段解耦导致不可逆信息损失”的两难。为此，本文提出 OneRanker，实现生成与排序在架构级深度融合。首先，设计价值感知的多任务解耦架构：借助任务标记序列与因果掩码，在共享表示中隔离兴趣覆盖与价值优化空间，大幅缓解目标对撞。其次，构建由粗到精的协同目标感知机制：生成阶段通过“伪物品标记”隐式捕捉价值诉求，排序阶段则由解码器显式实现候选级别的价值对齐。最后，提出输入-输出双端一致性保障：通过 Key/Value 直连传递与分布一致性（DC）约束损失，端到端地协同优化生成与排序。在腾讯微信视频号广告系统中全量上线后，关键业务指标显著提升（GMV–Normal +1.34%），为生成式广告推荐提供了兼具工业可行性的新范式。
