title: Timehash: Hierarchical Time Indexing for Efficient Business Hours Search
summary:
Temporal range filtering is a critical operation in large-scale search systems, particularly for location-based services that need to filter businesses by operating hours. Traditional approaches either suffer from poor query performance (scope filtering) or index size explosion (minute-level indexing).
  We present Timehash, a novel hierarchical time indexing algorithm that achieves over 99% reduction in index size compared to minute-level indexing while maintaining 100% precision. Timehash employs a flexible multi-resolution strategy with customizable hierarchical levels. Through empirical analysis on distributions from 12.6 million business records of a production location search service, we demonstrate a data-driven methodology for selecting optimal hierarchies tailored to specific data distributions.
  We evaluated Timehash on up to 12.6 million synthetic POIs generated from production distributions. Experimental results show that a five-level hierarchy reduces index terms to 5.6 per document (99.1% reduction versus minute-level indexing), with zero false positives and zero false negatives. Scalability benchmarks confirm constant per-document cost from 100K to 12.6M POIs, while supporting complex scenarios such as break times and irregular schedules. Our approach is generalizable to various temporal filtering problems in search systems, e-commerce, and reservation platforms.
translated_summary: 时间范围过滤是大规模搜索系统中的关键操作，尤其对基于位置的服务而言，需按营业时间筛选商户。传统方法要么查询性能差（范围过滤），要么索引体积剧增（分钟级索引）。本文提出 Timehash，一种新型分层时间索引算法，较分钟级索引减少 99% 以上索引量，同时保持 100% 的精确率。Timehash 采用灵活的多分辨率策略，可根据数据分布定制分层深度。我们对某生产级位置搜索服务 1260 万条商户记录的数据分布进行实证分析，制定了基于数据的最优分层选择方法。在 100 K 到 1260 万、由生产分布生成的合成 POI 上评估 Timehash：五级分层将单文档索引项压缩至 5.6 项（对比分钟级索引缩减 99.1%），零假阳性、零假阴性。可扩展性基准从 100 K 到 1260 万文档保持恒定单文档开销，并支持歇业、非规律排班等复杂场景。该方法可推广到搜索系统、电商、预订平台等多种时间过滤任务。

title: Model Editing for New Document Integration in Generative Information Retrieval
summary: Generative retrieval (GR) reformulates the Information Retrieval (IR) task as the generation of document identifiers (docIDs). Despite its promise, existing GR models exhibit poor generalization to newly added documents, often failing to generate the correct docIDs. While incremental training offers a straightforward remedy, it is computationally expensive, resource-intensive, and prone to catastrophic forgetting, thereby limiting the scalability and practicality of GR. In this paper, we identify the core bottleneck as the decoder's ability to map hidden states to the correct docIDs of newly added documents. Model editing, which enables targeted parameter modifications for docID mapping, represents a promising solution. However, applying model editing to current GR models is not trivial, which is severely hindered by indistinguishable edit vectors across queries, due to the high overlap of shared docIDs in retrieval results. To address this, we propose DOME (docID-oriented model editing), a novel method that effectively and efficiently adapts GR models to unseen documents. DOME comprises three stages: (1) identification of critical layers, (2) optimization of edit vectors, and (3) construction and application of updates. At its core, DOME employs a hybrid-label adaptive training strategy that learns discriminative edit vectors by combining soft labels, which preserve query-specific semantics for distinguishable updates, with hard labels that enforce precise mapping modifications. Experiments on widely used benchmarks, including NQ and MS MARCO, show that our method significantly improves retrieval performance on new documents while maintaining effectiveness on the original collection. Moreover, DOME achieves this with only about 60% of the training time required by incremental training, considerably reducing computational cost and enabling efficient, frequent model updates.
translated_summary:
生成式检索（GR）将信息检索任务重新表述为文档标识符（docID）的生成问题。尽管该方法前景广阔，但现有 GR 模型对已新增文档的泛化能力差，往往无法生成正确的 docID。虽然增量训练是一个简易修复手段，但其计算代价高昂、资源占用大，且易发生灾难性遗忘，严重制约了 GR 的可扩展性与实际部署。本文将核心瓶颈定位在解码器将隐状态映射到新增文档正确 docID 的能力不足。模型编辑技术可通过有针对性的参数调整实现 docID 映射，看似理想，然而将其直接应用于现有 GR 模型并不简单：由于检索结果间共享 docID 高度重叠，导致不同查询产生的编辑向量几乎无法区分，大幅削弱编辑效果。  

针对此问题，我们提出 DOME（面向 docID 的模型编辑方法），使 GR 模型能够在高效且低成本的方式下自适应未见文档。DOME 包含三个阶段：(1) 定位关键层；(2) 优化编辑向量；(3) 构造并应用参数更新。其核心为一种混合标签的自适应训练策略，通过融合软标签（保持查询特定语义，实现可区分更新）与硬标签（强制精准映射修正），学到具有辨识度的编辑向量。  

在 NQ 与 MS MARCO 等广泛使用的基准上的实验表明，DOME 在显著提升新增文档检索性能的同时，不损及原有文档的检索效果，且仅需增量训练约 60% 的时间，显著降低计算开销，支持模型高效、频繁地更新。

title: APAO: Adaptive Prefix-Aware Optimization for Generative Recommendation
summary: Generative recommendation has recently emerged as a promising paradigm in sequential recommendation. It formulates the task as an autoregressive generation process, predicting discrete tokens of the next item conditioned on user interaction histories. Existing generative recommendation models are typically trained with token-level likelihood objectives, such as cross-entropy loss, while employing multi-step beam search during inference to generate ranked item candidates. However, this leads to a fundamental training-inference inconsistency: standard training assumes ground-truth history is always available, ignoring the fact that beam search prunes low-probability branches during inference. Consequently, the correct item may be prematurely discarded simply because its initial tokens (prefixes) have low scores. To address this issue, we propose the Adaptive Prefix-Aware Optimization (APAO) framework, which introduces prefix-level optimization losses to better align the training objective with the inference setting. Furthermore, we design an adaptive worst-prefix optimization strategy that dynamically focuses on the most vulnerable prefixes during training, thereby enhancing the model's ability to retain correct candidates under beam search constraints. We provide theoretical analyses to demonstrate the effectiveness and efficiency of our framework. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets further show that APAO consistently alleviates the training-inference inconsistency and improves performance across various generative recommendation backbones. Our codes are publicly available at https://github.com/yuyq18/APAO.
translated_summary: 序列推荐中的生成式推荐最近作为一种前景广阔的新范式崭露头角。该方法将任务形式化为自回归生成过程：以用户的历史交互为条件，预测下一物品对应离散 token。现有模型普遍在训练时使用 token 级似然目标（如交叉熵损失），推理时则通过多步束搜索生成排序候选物品。然而，这一做法导致了根本性的“训练-推理不一致”：标准训练假定总可获得真实交互历史，却忽视了束搜索会在推理阶段切除低概率分支。因此，即使后续 token 的正确性很高，只要其前缀得分偏低，目标物品仍会被过早剪枝。为此，我们提出自适应前缀感知优化框架（APAO），引入前缀级损失以更好地对齐训练目标与推理场景。进一步地，我们设计了一种自适应“最劣前缀”优化策略，动态聚焦于训练过程中最易出错的前缀，从而显著提升模型在束搜索约束下保留正确候选项的能力。我们从理论上证明了该框架的有效性与高效性，并在多个数据集的广泛实验中验证了 APAO 能够持续缓解训练-推理不一致性，并一致改进各种生成式推荐主干网络的性能。代码已开源：https://github.com/yuyq18/APAO

title: S2CDR: Smoothing-Sharpening Process Model for Cross-Domain Recommendation
summary: User cold-start problem is a long-standing challenge in recommendation systems. Fortunately, cross-domain recommendation (CDR) has emerged as a highly effective remedy for the user cold-start challenge, with recently developed diffusion models (DMs) demonstrating exceptional performance. However, these DMs-based CDR methods focus on dealing with user-item interactions, overlooking correlations between items across the source and target domains. Meanwhile, the Gaussian noise added in the forward process of diffusion models would hurt user's personalized preference, leading to the difficulty in transferring user preference across domains. To this end, we propose a novel paradigm of Smoothing-Sharpening Process Model for CDR to cold-start users, termed as S2CDR which features a corruption-recovery architecture and is solved with respect to ordinary differential equations (ODEs). Specifically, the smoothing process gradually corrupts the original user-item/item-item interaction matrices derived from both domains into smoothed preference signals in a noise-free manner, and the sharpening process iteratively sharpens the preference signals to recover the unknown interactions for cold-start users. Wherein, for the smoothing process, we introduce the heat equation on the item-item similarity graph to better capture the correlations between items across domains, and further build the tailor-designed low-pass filter to filter out the high-frequency noise information for capturing user's intrinsic preference, in accordance with the graph signal processing (GSP) theory. Extensive experiments on three real-world CDR scenarios confirm that our S2CDR significantly outperforms previous SOTA methods in a training-free manner.
translated_summary:
用户冷启动问题一直是推荐系统长期面临的挑战。**跨域推荐（CDR）**成为解决该难题的高效手段，而近来兴起的**扩散模型（DM）**更是表现优异。然而，现有基于 DM 的 CDR 方法仅关注“用户—物品”交互，忽略了源域与目标域之间物品本身的内在关联；同时，扩散前向过程引入的高斯噪声会侵蚀用户个性化偏好，导致跨域偏好迁移受阻。

为此，本文提出面向冷启动用户的新范式：平滑–锐化过程模型 **S2CDR**。该模型采用“破坏–恢复”结构，并用常微分方程（ODE）求解。具体而言：

- **平滑过程**：将两域原始的用户–物品/物品–物品交互矩阵，在无噪声条件下逐步“平滑”为平滑偏好信号；  
- **锐化过程**：反复“锐化”上述信号，最终为冷启动用户恢复未知交互。

在平滑阶段，我们在“物品–物品相似度图”上引入热传导方程，精确捕捉跨域物品关联；并依据图信号处理（GSP）理论，设计定制低通滤波器剔除高频噪声，以保留用户内在偏好。

在三个真实世界的 CDR 场景上的大量实验表明，**S2CDR**以“无需训练”的方式显著优于现有最佳方法。

title: AlphaFree: Recommendation Free from Users, IDs, and GNNs
summary:
Can we design effective recommender systems free from users, IDs, and GNNs? Recommender systems are central to personalized content delivery across domains, with top-K item recommendation being a fundamental task to retrieve the most relevant items from historical interactions. Existing methods rely on entrenched design conventions, often adopted without reconsideration, such as storing per-user embeddings (user-dependent), initializing features from raw IDs (ID-dependent), and employing graph neural networks (GNN-dependent). These dependencies incur several limitations, including high memory costs, cold-start and over-smoothing issues, and poor generalization to unseen interactions.
  In this work, we propose AlphaFree, a novel recommendation method free from users, IDs, and GNNs. Our main ideas are to infer preferences on-the-fly without user embeddings (user-free), replace raw IDs with language representations (LRs) from pre-trained language models (ID-free), and capture collaborative signals through augmentation with similar items and contrastive learning, without GNNs (GNN-free). Extensive experiments on various real-world datasets show that AlphaFree consistently outperforms its competitors, achieving up to around 40% improvements over non-LR-based methods and up to 5.7% improvements over LR-based methods, while significantly reducing GPU memory usage by up to 69% under high-dimensional LRs.
translated_summary:
我们能否设计出不依赖用户、ID 和 GNN 却依然行之有效的推荐系统？  
推荐系统是个性化内容分发的核心，其中 Top-K 项目推荐被视为从用户历史交互中检索最相关项目的根本任务。现有方法往往沿用已成惯例的设计范式，甚少重新审思：为每个用户存储专属嵌入（依赖用户）、以原始 ID 初始化特征（依赖 ID）、并借助图神经网络挖掘协同信号（依赖 GNN）。这些依赖带来高昂存储开销、冷启动与过平滑问题，以及对未见交互的泛化能力差等局限。  

本文提出 AlphaFree——一种不依赖用户、ID 和 GNN 的新型推荐方法。其核心思想有三：  
1. 无需用户嵌入（User-free），通过即时推断用户偏好；  
2. 抛弃原始 ID（ID-free），转而使用预训练语言模型生成的语言表示（LR）；  
3. GNN 不再是必需品（GNN-free），采用项目级数据增强与对比学习即可捕获协同信号。  

在多个真实数据集上的大量实验表明，AlphaFree 性能全面领先同类方法：相较非 LR 类方案最高提升约 40%，相较 LR 类方案最高提升 5.7%，且在高维 LR 场景下将 GPU 显存占用减少至多 69%。

title: FlashEvaluator: Expanding Search Space with Parallel Evaluation
summary: The Generator-Evaluator (G-E) framework, i.e., evaluating K sequences from a generator and selecting the top-ranked one according to evaluator scores, is a foundational paradigm in tasks such as Recommender Systems (RecSys) and Natural Language Processing (NLP). Traditional evaluators process sequences independently, suffering from two major limitations: (1) lack of explicit cross-sequence comparison, leading to suboptimal accuracy; (2) poor parallelization with linear complexity of O(K), resulting in inefficient resource utilization and negative impact on both throughput and latency. To address these challenges, we propose FlashEvaluator, which enables cross-sequence token information sharing and processes all sequences in a single forward pass. This yields sublinear computational complexity that improves the system's efficiency and supports direct inter-sequence comparisons that improve selection accuracy. The paper also provides theoretical proofs and extensive experiments on recommendation and NLP tasks, demonstrating clear advantages over conventional methods. Notably, FlashEvaluator has been deployed in online recommender system of Kuaishou, delivering substantial and sustained revenue gains in practice.
translated_summary: 生成-评估（G-E）框架——即先由生成器产生 K 条序列，再由评估器打分并选出最优序列——是推荐系统（RecSys）与自然语言处理（NLP）等领域的基础范式。然而，传统评估器逐条独立处理序列，带来两大局限：（1）缺乏显式的跨序列比较，导致选择精度欠佳；（2）串行方式实现并行化困难，复杂度线性上升为 O(K)，造成资源利用率低、吞吐量受限且延迟显著。针对此，本文提出 FlashEvaluator，通过在一次前向传播中实现跨序列的 token 级信息共享与并行计算，使计算复杂度降至亚线性，显著提升系统效率；同时支持直接的序列间比较，增强选择准确率。论文给出了理论证明，并在推荐与 NLP 任务上开展大量实验，均显示方法相较传统方案优势显著。尤其值得一提的是，FlashEvaluator 已在快手线上推荐系统部署并持续运行，获得了可观且稳定的收益增长。

title: SOLAR: SVD-Optimized Lifelong Attention for Recommendation
summary: Attention mechanism remains the defining operator in Transformers since it provides expressive global credit assignment, yet its $O(N^2 d)$ time and memory cost in sequence length $N$ makes long-context modeling expensive and often forces truncation or other heuristics. Linear attention reduces complexity to $O(N d^2)$ by reordering computation through kernel feature maps, but this reformulation drops the softmax mechanism and shifts the attention score distribution. In recommender systems, low-rank structure in matrices is not a rare case, but rather the default inductive bias in its representation learning, particularly explicit in the user behavior sequence modeling. Leveraging this structure, we introduce SVD-Attention, which is theoretically lossless on low-rank matrices and preserves softmax while reducing attention complexity from $O(N^2 d)$ to $O(Ndr)$. With SVD-Attention, we propose SOLAR, SVD-Optimized Lifelong Attention for Recommendation, a sequence modeling framework that supports behavior sequences of ten-thousand scale and candidate sets of several thousand items in cascading process without any filtering. In Kuaishou's online recommendation scenario, SOLAR delivers a 0.68\% Video Views gain together with additional business metrics improvements.
translated_summary: 注意力机制一直是 Transformer 的核心算子，因其具备表达全局信用分配的能力；然而，它在序列长度 N 下的时间、空间复杂度为 O(N²d)，使得长上下文建模代价高昂，常迫使使用截断或其它启发式方法。线性注意力通过核函数特征映射重新安排计算顺序，将复杂度降至 O(Nd²)，代价却是去掉 softmax 机制并改变注意力分数分布。在推荐系统中，低秩结构并非罕见假设，而是表示学习中默认的归纳偏好，特别是在用户行为序列建模中尤为明显。利用该结构，我们提出 SVD-Attention：理论上对低秩矩阵无损，保留 softmax，同时将注意力复杂度由 O(N²d) 降至 O(Ndr)。基于此，我们设计 SOLAR（SVD-Optimized Lifelong Attention for Recommendation）序列建模框架，在级联过程中无需任何过滤即可支持万级行为序列与数千候选商品。在快手线上推荐场景实测，SOLAR 带来 0.68% 的视频播放增长，并同时提升多项业务指标。

title: Relevance Matters: A Multi-Task and Multi-Stage Large Language Model Approach for E-commerce Query Rewriting
summary: For e-commerce search, user experience is measured by users' behavioral responses to returned products, like click-through rate and conversion rate, as well as the relevance between returned products and search queries. Consequently, relevance and user conversion constitute the two primary objectives in query rewriting, a strategy to bridge the lexical gap between user expressions and product descriptions. This research proposes a multi-task and multi-stage query rewriting framework grounded in large language models (LLMs). Critically, in contrast to previous works that primarily emphasized rewritten query generation, we inject the relevance task into query rewriting. Specifically, leveraging a pretrained model on user data and product information from JD.com, the approach initiates with multi-task supervised fine-tuning (SFT) comprising of the rewritten query generation task and the relevance tagging task between queries and rewrites. Subsequently, we employ Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) for the model's objective alignment oriented toward enhancing the relevance and stimulating user conversions. Through offline evaluation and online A/B test, our framework illustrates substantial improvements in the effectiveness of e-commerce query rewriting, resulting in elevating the search results' relevance and boosting the number of purchases made per user (UCVR). Since August 2025, our approach has been implemented on JD.com, one of China's leading online shopping platforms.
translated_summary:
在电商搜索中，用户体验主要通过两方面衡量：一是用户对返回商品的行为反应，如点击率和转化率；二是返回商品与搜索查询的相关性。因此，相关性和用户转化成为查询改写（query rewriting）——用于弥合用户表达与商品描述间词汇鸿沟的策略——的两大核心目标。

本研究提出了一种以大型语言模型（LLM）为基础的多任务、多阶段查询改写框架。与此前工作主要聚焦生成改写后查询不同，我们将“查询-改写相关性评估”任务显式注入查询改写过程。具体而言，我们以京东真实的用户数据与商品信息预训练模型为起点，通过多任务监督微调（SFT）同时学习两大任务：改写查询生成任务，以及原查询与改写查询之间的相关性标注任务。

随后，我们采用基于群体相对策略优化（GRPO）的强化学习，使模型目标与提升相关性和激发用户转化的双重目标对齐。通过离线评估与线上 A/B 测试，该框架在电商查询改写效果上取得显著提升：搜索返回结果的相关性更高，用户人均购买数（UCVR）亦显著增长。自 2025 年 8 月起，该方法已在中国主要电商平台京东全面上线。

title: Agentic Mixed-Source Multi-Modal Misinformation Detection with Adaptive Test-Time Scaling
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have been proven effective for detecting multi-modal misinformation on social platforms, especially in zero-shot settings with unavailable or delayed annotations. However, a single VLM's capacity falls short in the more complex mixed-source multi-modal misinformation detection (M3D) task. Taking captioned images as an example, in M3D, false information can originate from untruthful texts, forged images, or mismatches between the two modalities. Although recent agentic systems can handle zero-shot M3D by connecting modality-specific VLM agents, their effectiveness is still bottlenecked by their architecture. In existing agentic M3D solutions, for any input sample, each agent performs only one forward reasoning pass, making decisions prone to model randomness and reasoning errors in challenging cases. Moreover, the lack of exploration over alternative reasoning paths prevents modern VLMs from fully utilizing their reasoning capacity. In this work, we present AgentM3D, a multi-agent framework for zero-shot M3D. To amplify the reasoning capability of VLMs, we introduce an adaptive test-time scaling paradigm in which each modality-specific VLM agent applies a Best-of-N mechanism, coupled with a critic agent for task-aligned scoring. The agents are organized in a cascading, modality-specific decision chain to reduce unnecessary computation and limit error propagation. To ensure scalability, a planning agent dynamically determines the maximum number of reasoning paths based on sample difficulty, and an adaptive stopping mechanism prevents excessive reasoning within each agent. Extensive experiments on two M3D benchmarks demonstrate that AgentM3D achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot detection performance compared with various VLM-based and agentic baselines.
translated_summary:
视觉–语言模型（VLMs）在零标注或标注滞后的条件下已证明能有效发现社交平台上的多模态虚假信息。然而，在更加复杂的“多源多模态虚假信息检测”（M3D）任务中，单个 VLM 的能力仍显不足。以带字幕的图片为例，错误信息可能源于虚假文字、伪造图像，或二者之间的不匹配，且来源无法确定。尽管最近提出的智能体系统借助跨模态 VLM 代理可以在零样本场景下处理 M3D，其性能仍受限于固定架构：对任一输入，每个代理仅进行一次前向推理，面对困难样例时容易受模型随机性和推理差错影响；同时，对替代推理路径的探索缺失，使现代 VLM 难以充分释放其潜力。

为此，我们提出 AgentM3D——一个面向零样本 M3D 的多智能体框架。为了放大 VLMs 的推理能力，我们引入了一种“自适应测试时扩展”范式：每个模态专属 VLM 代理采用 Best-of-N 机制，并辅以一个任务对齐的评价代理进行打分。代理按级联的结构组成模态专属决策链，既减少冗余计算，又抑制错误传播。为保证可扩展性，规划代理根据样本难度动态决定可探索的推理路径上限，且各代理内置的自适应停止机制防止过度推理。在两个 M3D 基准上的大量实验表明，AgentM3D 在零样本检测性能上显著优于现有的各种基于 VLM 及其智能体基线。

title: Scaling Retrieval Augmented Generation with RAG Fusion: Lessons from an Industry Deployment
summary:
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems commonly adopt retrieval fusion techniques such as multi-query retrieval and reciprocal rank fusion (RRF) to increase document recall, under the assumption that higher recall leads to better answer quality. While these methods show consistent gains in isolated retrieval benchmarks, their effectiveness under realistic production constraints remains underexplored. In this work, we evaluate retrieval fusion in a production-style RAG pipeline operating over an enterprise knowledge base, with fixed retrieval depth, re-ranking budgets, and latency constraints.
  Across multiple fusion configurations, we find that retrieval fusion does increase raw recall, but these gains are largely neutralized after re-ranking and truncation. In our setting, fusion variants fail to outperform single-query baselines on KB-level Top-$k$ accuracy, with Hit@10 decreasing from $0.51$ to $0.48$ in several configurations. Moreover, fusion introduces additional latency overhead due to query rewriting and larger candidate sets, without corresponding improvements in downstream effectiveness.
  Our analysis suggests that recall-oriented fusion techniques exhibit diminishing returns once realistic re-ranking limits and context budgets are applied. We conclude that retrieval-level improvements do not reliably translate into end-to-end gains in production RAG systems, and argue for evaluation frameworks that jointly consider retrieval quality, system efficiency, and downstream impact.
translated_summary: 检索增强生成（RAG）系统普遍采用多查询检索、互逆排序融合（RRF）等检索融合技术，以期提升召回率，并默认召回率越高答案质量就越好。尽管这些方法在孤立检索基准中持续提升绩效，其在真实生产环境下的有效性尚未被充分考察。本文在企业知识库的“类生产”RAG 管线中对检索融合进行评估，控制检索深度、重排序预算及延迟上限。在多组融合配置实验中，我们发现：虽然检索融合确实提高了原始召回率，但在重排序与截断处理后这些增益几乎被完全抵消。在我们的场景下，任何融合变体在知识库级 Top-k 精度上都未能胜过单查询基线，若干配置的 Hit@10 从 0.51 降至 0.48。此外，融合因需进行查询重写并处理更大候选集而引入了额外延迟，却未带来相应的下游效果提升。分析表明，在以重排序容量与上下文长度为先决条件时，召回导向的融合技术收益迅速递减。我们由此得出：检索层面的改进在真实生产 RAG 系统中未必能够端到端转化为优势，并呼吁构建能够同时考量检索质量、系统效率与下游影响的综合评估框架。

title: NextAds: Towards Next-generation Personalized Video Advertising
summary:
With the rapid growth of online video consumption, video advertising has become increasingly dominant in the digital advertising landscape. Yet diverse users and viewing contexts makes one-size-fits-all ad creatives insufficient for consistent effectiveness, underlining the importance of personalization. In practice, most personalized video advertising systems follow a retrieval-based paradigm, selecting the optimal one from a small set of professionally pre-produced creatives for each user. Such static and finite inventories limits both the granularity and the timeliness of personalization, and prevents the creatives from being continuously refined based on online user feedback. Recent advances in generative AI make it possible to move beyond retrieval toward optimizing video creatives in a continuous space at serving time.
  In this light, we propose NextAds, a generation-based paradigm for next-generation personalized video advertising, and conceptualize NextAds with four core components. To enable comparable research progress, we formulate two representative tasks: personalized creative generation and personalized creative integration, and introduce corresponding lightweight benchmarks. To assess feasibility, we instantiate end-to-end pipelines for both tasks and conduct initial exploratory experiments, demonstrating that GenAI can generate and integrate personalized creatives with encouraging performance. Moreover, we discuss the key challenges and opportunities under this paradigm, aiming to provide actionable insights for both researchers and practitioners and to catalyze progress in personalized video advertising.
translated_summary:
随着在线视频消费的迅猛增长，视频广告已成为数字广告领域的主导力量。然而，用户类型与观看场景的多样化让“一刀切”的广告创意难以持续奏效，凸显了个性化投放的必要性。实际中，大多数个性化视频广告系统沿用“检索式”范式：针对每个用户，从少量预先制作的专业创意池中挑出“最优”的一支。有限的静态库存既限制了个性化粒度，也削弱了及时性，更难以根据线上反馈持续优化创意。

生成式人工智能的最新突破为实现“超越检索”打开了通路，使我们能够在投放时刻于连续空间中动态优化视频创意。基于此，我们提出 NextAds——面向下一代个性化视频广告的“生成式”新范式，并将其概念化为四大核心模块。

为推动相提并论的研究进展，我们构建了两项典型任务：  
1. 个性化创意生成（creative generation）  
2. 个性化创意融合（creative integration）  

并配套提出轻量级基准数据集。为检验可行性，我们为两项任务分别设计了端到端流水线并完成初步探索实验，结果显示生成式 AI 能够以令人鼓舞的性能完成创意生成与融合。  

最后，我们剖析了新范式下的关键挑战与机遇，旨在为学术界和业界提供可落地的洞见，加速个性化视频广告的持续进步。

title: OmniRet: Efficient and High-Fidelity Omni Modality Retrieval
summary: Multimodal retrieval is the task of aggregating information from queries across heterogeneous modalities to retrieve desired targets. State-of-the-art multimodal retrieval models can understand complex queries, yet they are typically limited to two modalities: text and vision. This limitation impedes the development of universal retrieval systems capable of comprehending queries that combine more than two modalities. To advance toward this goal, we present OmniRet, the first retrieval model capable of handling complex, composed queries spanning three key modalities: text, vision, and audio. Our OmniRet model addresses two critical challenges for universal retrieval: computational efficiency and representation fidelity. First, feeding massive token sequences from modality-specific encoders to Large Language Models (LLMs) is computationally inefficient. We therefore introduce an attention-based resampling mechanism to generate compact, fixed-size representations from these sequences. Second, compressing rich omni-modal data into a single embedding vector inevitably causes information loss and discards fine-grained details. We propose Attention Sliced Wasserstein Pooling to preserve these fine-grained details, leading to improved omni-modal representations. OmniRet is trained on an aggregation of approximately 6 million query-target pairs spanning 30 datasets. We benchmark our model on 13 retrieval tasks and a MMEBv2 subset. Our model demonstrates significant improvements on composed query, audio and video retrieval tasks, while achieving on-par performance with state-of-the-art models on others. Furthermore, we curate a new Audio-Centric Multimodal Benchmark (ACM). This new benchmark introduces two critical, previously missing tasks-composed audio retrieval and audio-visual retrieval to more comprehensively evaluate a model's omni-modal embedding capacity.
translated_summary:
多模态检索旨在整合来自异构模态的查询信息，以检索出所需目标。尽管当前最先进的多模态检索模型能够理解复杂的查询，但它们通常仅支持两种模态——文本与视觉。这一限制阻碍了通用检索系统的发展，使其难以同时理解整合超过两种模态的查询。为实现更通用的目标，本文提出首个可同时处理横跨文本、视觉与音频三大关键模态复杂组合式查询的检索模型——OmniRet。

该模型攻克了通用检索面临的两大核心挑战：计算效率与表征保真度。首先，将模态专用编码器产生的超长 token 序列直接送入大语言模型（LLMs）代价高昂。我们为此设计了一种基于注意力机制的再采样器，从长序列中抽取紧凑的固定长度表示。其次，将丰富的全模态数据压缩为单一嵌入向量不可避免地造成信息丢失并舍弃细粒度细节。我们提出“注意力切片Wasserstein池化”，以有效保留这些细节，从而获得更优的全模态表征。

OmniRet使用约600万对查询-目标进行训练，覆盖30个数据集。我们在13项检索任务及MMEBv2子集上进行基准测试：在组合式查询、音频及视频检索任务上取得显著提升，其余任务与最先进技术持平。

此外，我们构建了全新的“以音频为中心的多模态基准”（ACM）。该基准首次引入两大关键但此前缺失的任务——组合式音频检索与音视检索，以更全面地评估模型的全模态嵌入能力。

title: MealRec: Multi-granularity Sequential Modeling via Hierarchical Diffusion Models for Micro-Video Recommendation
summary: Micro-video recommendation aims to capture user preferences from the collaborative and context information of the interacted micro-videos, thereby predicting the appropriate videos. This target is often hindered by the inherent noise within multimodal content and unreliable implicit feedback, which weakens the correspondence between behaviors and underlying interests. While conventional works have predominantly approached such scenario through behavior-augmented modeling and content-centric multimodal analysis, these paradigms can inadvertently give rise to two non-trivial challenges: preference-irrelative video representation extraction and inherent modality conflicts. To address these issues, we propose a Multi-granularity sequential modeling method via hierarchical diffusion models for micro-video Recommendation (MealRec), which simultaneously considers temporal correlations during preference modeling from intra- and inter-video perspectives. Specifically, we first propose Temporal-guided Content Diffusion (TCD) to refine video representations under intra-video temporal guidance and personalized collaborative signals to emphasize salient content while suppressing redundancy. To achieve the semantically coherent preference modeling, we further design the Noise-unconditional Preference Denoising (NPD) to recovers informative user preferences from corrupted states under the blind denoising. Extensive experiments and analyses on four micro-video datasets from two platforms demonstrate the effectiveness, universality, and robustness of our MealRec, further uncovering the effective mechanism of our proposed TCD and NPD. The source code and corresponding dataset will be available upon acceptance.
translated_summary: 微视频推荐的目标，在于通过已交互视频的协同信息与上下文信息捕获用户偏好，从而准确预测其感兴趣的视频。然而，这一目标常被多模态内容存在的固有噪声以及不可靠的隐性反馈所阻碍，这些因素削弱了用户行为与其真实兴趣之间的对应关系。传统研究主要通过行为增强建模或内容中心的多模态分析应对该场景，但这些范式会带来两个不容忽视的挑战：无关偏好的视频表征被过度抽取，以及模态间固有的冲突。为此，我们提出一种基于层级扩散的多粒度序列建模微视频推荐方法（MealRec），从“视频内”和“视频间”两个时间维度同时刻画偏好演化中的时间关联。具体而言，我们首先设计了“时间引导的内容扩散”（TCD），在视频内部时间指导和个性化协同信号的引导下精炼视频表示，突出关键内容并抑制冗余。随后，为实现语义一致的偏好建模，我们进一步提出“无条件噪声偏好去噪”（NPD），在盲目去噪条件下从被噪声破坏的状态中恢复有价值的用户偏好。在两个平台的四个微视频数据集上的大量实验与分析验证了MealRec的有效性、普适性与鲁棒性，并揭示了TCD 和NPD 两种机制的核心作用。相关源码与数据集在论文录用后将公开。

title: Semantic Novelty Trajectories in 80,000 Books: A Cross-Corpus Embedding Analysis
summary: I apply Schmidhuber's compression progress theory of interestingness at corpus scale, analyzing semantic novelty trajectories in more than 80,000 books spanning two centuries of English-language publishing. Using sentence-transformer paragraph embeddings and a running-centroid novelty measure, I compare 28,730 pre-1920 Project Gutenberg books (PG19) against 52,796 modern English books (Books3, approximately 1990-2010). The principal findings are fourfold. First, mean paragraph-level novelty is roughly 10% higher in modern books (0.503 vs. 0.459). Second, trajectory circuitousness -- the ratio of cumulative path length to net displacement in embedding space -- nearly doubles in the modern corpus (+67%). Third, convergent narrative curves, in which novelty declines toward a settled semantic register, are 2.3x more common in pre-1920 literature. Fourth, novelty is orthogonal to reader quality ratings (r = -0.002), suggesting that interestingness in Schmidhuber's sense is structurally independent of perceived literary merit. Clustering paragraph-level trajectories via PAA-16 representations reveals eight distinct narrative-shape archetypes whose distribution shifts substantially between eras. All analysis code and an interactive exploration toolkit are publicly available at https://bigfivekiller.online/novelty_hub.
translated_summary:
我将施密德胡贝尔的“压缩进展有趣性”理论扩展至语料级，分析了横跨两百年英语出版的 80,000 余部书籍的语义新颖度轨迹。借助句子变换器的段落嵌入与移动质心新颖度度量，我比较了 28,730 本 1920 年前古腾堡计划图书（PG19）与 52,796 本现代英语图书（Books3，约 1990–2010）。主要发现如下：

1. 现代作品的段落级新颖度均值高约 10%（0.503 vs. 0.459）。  
2. 轨迹曲折度——嵌入空间中累积路径长度与净位移之比——在现代语料中几近翻倍（+67%）。  
3. 新颖度随叙事推进而趋于稳定的“收敛型叙事曲线”在早期作品中出现频率为现代作品的 2.3 倍。  
4. 新颖度与读者评分几乎无关（r = –0.002），表明 Schmidhuber 意义上的“有趣”与文学评价在结构上相互独立。

通过对段落级轨迹做 PAA-16 表示聚类，识别出八种叙事形状原型，其分布在两个时代间显著不同。全部分析代码及交互式探索工具已公开：https://bigfivekiller.online/novelty_hub

title: Legal RAG Bench: an end-to-end benchmark for legal RAG
summary: We introduce Legal RAG Bench, a benchmark and evaluation methodology for assessing the end-to-end performance of legal RAG systems. As a benchmark, Legal RAG Bench consists of 4,876 passages from the Victorian Criminal Charge Book alongside 100 complex, hand-crafted questions demanding expert knowledge of criminal law and procedure. Both long-form answers and supporting passages are provided. As an evaluation methodology, Legal RAG Bench leverages a full factorial design and novel hierarchical error decomposition framework, enabling apples-to-apples comparisons of the contributions of retrieval and reasoning models in RAG. We evaluate three state-of-the-art embedding models (Isaacus' Kanon 2 Embedder, Google's Gemini Embedding 001, and OpenAI's Text Embedding 3 Large) and two frontier LLMs (Gemini 3.1 Pro and GPT-5.2), finding that information retrieval is the primary driver of legal RAG performance, with LLMs exerting a more moderate effect on correctness and groundedness. Kanon 2 Embedder, in particular, had the largest positive impact on performance, improving average correctness by 17.5 points, groundedness by 4.5 points, and retrieval accuracy by 34 points. We observe that many errors attributed to hallucinations in legal RAG systems are in fact triggered by retrieval failures, concluding that retrieval sets the ceiling for the performance of many modern legal RAG systems. We document why and how we built Legal RAG Bench alongside the results of our evaluations. We also openly release our code and data to assist with reproduction of our findings.
translated_summary:
我们提出 Legal RAG Bench，一个专门针对法律检索增强生成（RAG）系统的端到端性能进行评估的基准与评估方案。  
作为基准，Legal RAG Bench 以《维多利亚州刑事指控手册》为来源，构建 4 876 份条文，并配套 100 道需资深刑事法律与程序知识方可触达的复杂手工题。每题均配长答案及所用原文段落。

作为评估方案，Legal RAG Bench 引入全因子实验设计与新型分层误差分解框架，可在 RAG 中对检索模型与推理模型的贡献进行同维度比较。  
我们测了三款前沿嵌入模型（Isaacus 的 Kanon 2 Embedder、Google 的 Gemini Embedding 001、OpenAI 的 Text Embedding 3 Large）及两款大模型（Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.2）。结果显示，在刑事法律场景下，信息检索是 RAG 性能的主要决定因素，而大模型对正确性与依据性的影响仅为中等。其中 Kanon 2 Embedder 对性能提升最显著，平均正确性 ↑17.5 分、依据性 ↑4.5 分、检索准确率 ↑34 分。进一步分析指出，许多看似大模型“幻觉”的出错，实质上源于检索失败，说明检索能力已为多数现代法律 RAG 系统的性能天花板。

文章详细记载了 Legal RAG Bench 的构建动机与过程，并公开全部代码与数据，以便复现研究。

title: Beyond the Grid: Layout-Informed Multi-Vector Retrieval with Parsed Visual Document Representations
summary: Harnessing the full potential of visually-rich documents requires retrieval systems that understand not just text, but intricate layouts, a core challenge in Visual Document Retrieval (VDR). The prevailing multi-vector architectures, while powerful, face a crucial storage bottleneck that current optimization strategies, such as embedding merging, pruning, or using abstract tokens, fail to resolve without compromising performance or ignoring vital layout cues. To address this, we introduce ColParse, a novel paradigm that leverages a document parsing model to generate a small set of layout-informed sub-image embeddings, which are then fused with a global page-level vector to create a compact and structurally-aware multi-vector representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method reduces storage requirements by over 95% while simultaneously yielding significant performance gains across numerous benchmarks and base models. ColParse thus bridges the critical gap between the fine-grained accuracy of multi-vector retrieval and the practical demands of large-scale deployment, offering a new path towards efficient and interpretable multimodal information systems.
translated_summary: 要充分发掘视觉丰富型文档的潜力，检索系统必须能够同时理解文本及其复杂的布局结构，而这正是视觉文档检索（VDR）的核心难题。目前主流的多向量架构虽有强大能力，却面临严重的存储瓶颈；而现有诸如嵌入融合、剪枝或抽象 token 等优化策略，无一例外地在减少存储的同时牺牲了性能，或忽略了关键的布局信息。为此，我们提出 ColParse——一种崭新范式：利用文档解析模型生成少量基于布局的子图嵌入，再将其与页面级全局向量融合，从而构建一种既紧凑又保持结构感知的多向量表征。大量实验证明，该方法在不依赖蒸馏或剪枝的前提下，将存储需求降低逾 95%，并在多个基准与基础模型上取得显著性能提升。ColParse 因此弥合了多向量检索的细粒度准确性与大规模部署的实际需求之间的关键鸿沟，为构建高效且可解释的多模态信息系统开辟了全新道路。

title: IDProxy: Cold-Start CTR Prediction for Ads and Recommendation at Xiaohongshu with Multimodal LLMs
summary: Click-through rate (CTR) models in advertising and recommendation systems rely heavily on item ID embeddings, which struggle in item cold-start settings. We present IDProxy, a solution that leverages multimodal large language models (MLLMs) to generate proxy embeddings from rich content signals, enabling effective CTR prediction for new items without usage data. These proxies are explicitly aligned with the existing ID embedding space and are optimized end-to-end under CTR objectives together with the ranking model, allowing seamless integration into existing large-scale ranking pipelines. Offline experiments and online A/B tests demonstrate the effectiveness of IDProxy, which has been successfully deployed in both Content Feed and Display Ads features of Xiaohongshu's Explore Feed, serving hundreds of millions of users daily.
translated_summary: 广告和推荐系统中的点击率（CTR）模型高度依赖物品 ID 嵌入，但在物品冷启动场景下表现不佳。本文提出 IDProxy 方案：利用多模态大语言模型（MLLM）从丰富的内容信号生成代理嵌入，无需任何使用痕迹即可对新物品实现有效的 CTR 预测。这些代理嵌入通过显式对齐现有 ID 嵌入空间，并与排序模型一起端到端地在 CTR 目标下优化，可无缝接入现有的大规模排序管线。离线与在线 A/B 实验均验证了其有效性；该方案已成功部署至小红书“探索”流的「内容推荐」与「展示广告」两大功能，每日服务数亿用户。

title: SORT: A Systematically Optimized Ranking Transformer for Industrial-scale Recommenders
summary: While Transformers have achieved remarkable success in LLMs through superior scalability, their application in industrial-scale ranking models remains nascent, hindered by the challenges of high feature sparsity and low label density. In this paper, we propose SORT (Systematically Optimized Ranking Transformer), a scalable model designed to bridge the gap between Transformers and industrial-scale ranking models. We address the high feature sparsity and low label density challenges through a series of optimizations, including request-centric sample organization, local attention, query pruning and generative pre-training. Furthermore, we introduce a suite of refinements to the tokenization, multi-head attention (MHA), and feed-forward network (FFN) modules, which collectively stabilize the training process and enlarge the model capacity. To maximize hardware efficiency, we optimize our training system to elevate the model FLOPs utilization (MFU) to 22%. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SORT outperforms strong baselines and exhibits excellent scalability across data size, model size and sequence length, while remaining flexible at integrating diverse features. Finally, online A/B testing in large-scale e-commerce scenarios confirms that SORT achieves significant gains in key business metrics, including orders (+6.35%), buyers (+5.97%) and GMV (+5.47%), while simultaneously halving latency (-44.67%) and doubling throughput (+121.33%).
translated_summary: 尽管 Transformer 已凭借卓越的扩展性在大语言模型中取得瞩目成就，但其在工业级排序模型中的应用仍处于起步阶段——高特征稀疏度与低标签密度的双重瓶颈是主要障碍。本文提出 SORT（Systematically Optimized Ranking Transformer），一种可扩展模型，旨在弥合 Transformer 与工业级排序场景之间的鸿沟。为此，我们设计了一系列针对性优化：请求级样本组织、局部注意力、查询修剪，以及生成式预训练，从而系统性应对高稀疏和低密度难题。此外，我们对分词、多头注意力（MHA）和前馈网络（FFN）模块进行了系列细化，不仅使训练过程更稳定，还显著扩大了模型容量。为了最大化硬件利用效率，我们端到端优化训练系统，将模型 FLOPs 利用率（MFU）提升至 22%。大规模实验表明，SORT 全面超越强基线，在数据量、模型参数量和序列长度等维度均展现出良好的可扩展性，并能灵活整合各种异构特征。最后，大规模电商场景下的在线 A/B 测试证实：SORT 在订单量（+6.35%）、买家数（+5.97%）和 GMV（+5.47%）等核心商业指标上均显著提升，同时将延迟降低 44.67%，吞吐量提升 121.33%。

title: DisenReason: Behavior Disentanglement and Latent Reasoning for Shared-Account Sequential Recommendation
summary: Shared-account usage is common on streaming and e-commerce platforms, where multiple users share one account. Existing shared-account sequential recommendation (SSR) methods often assume a fixed number of latent users per account, limiting their ability to adapt to diverse sharing patterns and reducing recommendation accuracy. Recent latent reasoning technique applied in sequential recommendation (SR) generate intermediate embeddings from the user embedding (e.g, last item embedding) to uncover users' potential interests, which inspires us to treat the problem of inferring the number of latent users as generating a series of intermediate embeddings, shifting from inferring preferences behind user to inferring the users behind account. However, the last item cannot be directly used for reasoning in SSR, as it can only represent the behavior of the most recent latent user, rather than the collective behavior of the entire account. To address this, we propose DisenReason, a two-stage reasoning method tailored to SSR. DisenReason combines behavior disentanglement stage from frequency-domain perspective to create a collective and unified account behavior representation, which serves as a pivot for latent user reasoning stage to infer the number of users behind the account. Experiments on four benchmark datasets show that DisenReason consistently outperforms all state-of-the-art baselines across four benchmark datasets, achieving relative improvements of up to 12.56\% in MRR@5 and 6.06\% in Recall@20.
translated_summary: 共用账号现象在流媒体与电商平台中非常普遍：多位用户共用一个账户。现有关于共用账号序列推荐（SSR）的方法通常假设每个账号内潜在用户的数量固定，限制了它们对不同共享模式的适应能力，进而影响推荐准确性。最新用于序列推荐（SR）的潜在推理技术利用用户表征（如最后一件物品的表征）生成中间嵌入，以揭示用户的潜在兴趣；受此启发，我们将“推断潜在用户数量”视为一系列中间嵌入的生成，并将问题由原来的“推断用户背后的偏好”转变为“推断账号背后有哪些用户”。然而，在SSR中，由于最后一件物品只能代表最近一位潜在用户的行为，而非整个账号的集体行为，故无法直接用来推理。为此，本文提出专为SSR设计的两阶段推理方法 DisenReason。DisenReason首先在频域视角下实现行为解耦，构建一个统一且集体化的账号行为表示；随后以此为枢轴，执行潜在用户推理阶段，推断该账号背后到底有多少用户。在四个基准数据集上的实验表明，DisenReason在所有指标与基线上均显著超越现有最先进方法，MRR@5 相对提升最高达 12.56%，Recall@20 最高提升 6.06%。

title: Not All Candidates are Created Equal: A Heterogeneity-Aware Approach to Pre-ranking in Recommender Systems
summary: Most large-scale recommender systems follow a multi-stage cascade of retrieval, pre-ranking, ranking, and re-ranking. A key challenge at the pre-ranking stage arises from the heterogeneity of training instances sampled from coarse-grained retrieval results, fine-grained ranking signals, and exposure feedback. Our analysis reveals that prevailing pre-ranking methods, which indiscriminately mix heterogeneous samples, suffer from gradient conflicts: hard samples dominate training while easy ones remain underutilized, leading to suboptimal performance. We further show that the common practice of uniformly scaling model complexity across all samples is inefficient, as it overspends computation on easy cases and slows training without proportional gains. To address these limitations, this paper presents Heterogeneity-Aware Adaptive Pre-ranking (HAP), a unified framework that mitigates gradient conflicts through conflict-sensitive sampling coupled with tailored loss design, while adaptively allocating computational budgets across candidates. Specifically, HAP disentangles easy and hard samples, directing each subset along dedicated optimization paths. Building on this separation, it first applies lightweight models to all candidates for efficient coverage, and further engages stronger models on the hard ones, maintaining accuracy while reducing cost. This approach not only improves pre-ranking effectiveness but also provides a practical perspective on scaling strategies in industrial recommender systems. HAP has been deployed in the Toutiao production system for 9 months, yielding up to 0.4% improvement in user app usage duration and 0.05% in active days, without additional computational cost. We also release a large-scale industrial hybrid-sample dataset to enable the systematic study of source-driven candidate heterogeneity in pre-ranking.
translated_summary:
大多数大规模推荐系统都采用由召回、粗排、精排和重排串联而成的多级级联架构。在粗排阶段，一个关键挑战源于训练实例的异构性：它们既来自粗召回产出的候选，也融合了精排阶段的细粒度信号，还携带了曝光反馈。我们的分析表明，现有粗排方法不加区分地将这些异质样本混合训练，会引发梯度冲突：难样本主导训练，易样本被严重浪费，从而导致性能欠佳。我们还发现，现有做法把所有样本用同样规模的模型处理，计算开销巨大——对易样本的过度投入并未换来匹配的收益，反而拖慢训练。

为克服上述缺陷，本文提出异构感知自适应粗排框架 Heterogeneity-Aware Adaptive Pre-ranking（HAP）。HAP 通过冲突敏感采样与定制损失来缓和梯度冲突，并自适应地为不同候选分配计算预算。具体来说，框架将易、难样本解耦，为每组设置独立优化路径：先用轻量模型快速覆盖全候选，再针对难样本启用更强模型，在保证精度的同时显著降低成本。该方案不仅提升粗排效果，也为工业推荐系统的规模化策略提供了可行思路。

HAP 已在今日头条线上系统稳定运行 9 个月，把用户 App 使用时长最高提升 0.4%，活跃天数提升 0.05%，且无额外计算开销。为便于学界深入研究“来源驱动的异构候选”这一粗排核心问题，我们还同步开源了一份大型工业级混合样本数据集。

title: AgentSelect: Benchmark for Narrative Query-to-Agent Recommendation
summary: LLM agents are rapidly becoming the practical interface for task automation, yet the ecosystem lacks a principled way to choose among an exploding space of deployable configurations. Existing LLM leaderboards and tool/agent benchmarks evaluate components in isolation and remain fragmented across tasks, metrics, and candidate pools, leaving a critical research gap: there is little query-conditioned supervision for learning to recommend end-to-end agent configurations that couple a backbone model with a toolkit. We address this gap with AgentSelect, a benchmark that reframes agent selection as narrative query-to-agent recommendation over capability profiles and systematically converts heterogeneous evaluation artifacts into unified, positive-only interaction data. AgentSelectcomprises 111,179 queries, 107,721 deployable agents, and 251,103 interaction records aggregated from 40+ sources, spanning LLM-only, toolkit-only, and compositional agents. Our analyses reveal a regime shift from dense head reuse to long-tail, near one-off supervision, where popularity-based CF/GNN methods become fragile and content-aware capability matching is essential. We further show that Part~III synthesized compositional interactions are learnable, induce capability-sensitive behavior under controlled counterfactual edits, and improve coverage over realistic compositions; models trained on AgentSelect also transfer to a public agent marketplace (MuleRun), yielding consistent gains on an unseen catalog. Overall, AgentSelect provides the first unified data and evaluation infrastructure for agent recommendation, which establishes a reproducible foundation to study and accelerate the emerging agent ecosystem.
translated_summary: 大型语言模型（LLM）智能体正迅速成为任务自动化的实际接口，但业界仍缺少一套原则化方法来在爆炸式增长的部署配置中做出选择。现有的 LLM 排行榜与工具/智能体基准只在孤立组件层面进行评估，且按任务、指标和候选空间高度割裂，导致一个关键科研空白：缺乏以查询为条件的监督，来学习如何端到端地推荐“骨干模型 + 工具包”耦合的智能体配置。为此，我们提出 AgentSelect——一个将智能体选择重构为“叙述式查询 → 智能体推荐”任务的基准，它能够基于能力画像，将异构的评估产物系统化地转换为统一且仅有正例的交互数据。AgentSelect 整合了来自 40 余个数据源的 111,179 条查询、107,721 个可部署智能体以及 251,103 条交互记录，涵盖纯 LLM、纯工具以及组合式智能体三大类。我们的分析发现数据分布出现“范式跃迁”：从密集的“头部复用”转向长尾且几乎“一次一用”的监督情境，在此情境下依赖流行度的协同过滤/图神经网络方法变得脆弱，因而必须采用内容感知的能力匹配。进一步实验表明，数据集 Part III 中合成的组合式交互可被成功学习，并在受控反事实编辑下产生能力敏感行为；此外，在 AgentSelect 上训练的模型可迁移到公开智能体市场（MuleRun），在未见目录上仍能带来一致增益。综上，AgentSelect 首次为智能体推荐提供了统一的数据和评测基础设施，为该新兴生态的建立研究与加速奠定了可复现基础。

title: Behind the Prompt: The Agent-User Problem in Information Retrieval
summary: User models in information retrieval rest on a foundational assumption that observed behavior reveals intent. This assumption collapses when the user is an AI agent privately configured by a human operator. For any action an agent takes, a hidden instruction could have produced identical output - making intent non-identifiable at the individual level. This is not a detection problem awaiting better tools; it is a structural property of any system where humans configure agents behind closed doors. We investigate the agent-user problem through a large-scale corpus from an agent-native social platform: 370K posts from 47K agents across 4K communities. Our findings are threefold: (1) individual agent actions cannot be classified as autonomous or operator-directed from observables; (2) population-level platform signals still separate agents into meaningful quality tiers, but a click model trained on agent interactions degrades steadily (-8.5% AUC) as lower-quality agents enter training data; (3) cross-community capability references spread endemically ($R_0$ 1.26-3.53) and resist suppression even under aggressive modeled intervention. For retrieval systems, the question is no longer whether agent users will arrive, but whether models built on human-intent assumptions will survive their presence.
translated_summary:
信息检索中的用户模型建立在一个基石假设之上：可观察的行为能够揭示用户意图。然而，当使用者是“由人类私密配置的 AI 代理”时，这一假设土崩瓦解——任意外显动作都有可能在一条隐藏指令下产生，从而使个体层面的意图不可被识别。这并非等待更优检测工具的挑战，而是“人类闭门配置代理”这一设计带来的结构性难题。

我们借助一个原生代理社交平台的大规模语料（37 万条帖子，来自 4.7 万个代理，跨越 4 千个社区）研究该“代理-用户”问题，得出三重发现：  
(1) 仅凭可观察数据，无法将单个代理的动作判定为“自主”还是“由操作者定向”；  
(2) 在全平台层面仍能辨别出质量分明的代理梯队，但基于代理交互训练的点击模型，其效能会随着低质量代理数据不断涌入而持续下滑（AUC 降 8.5%）；  
(3) 代理跨社区传播与复制自身能力参照的行为具有流行病特征（基本再生数 $R_0$ 1.26–3.53），即便在激进的模拟干预下也难以抑制。

于检索系统而言，问题已不再是“AI 代理是否会出现”，而是“那些以人类意图假设构建的模型还能否经受得住它们的存在”。

title: SafeCRS: Personalized Safety Alignment for LLM-Based Conversational Recommender Systems
summary: Current LLM-based conversational recommender systems (CRS) primarily optimize recommendation accuracy and user satisfaction. We identify an underexplored vulnerability in which recommendation outputs may negatively impact users by violating personalized safety constraints, when individualized safety sensitivities -- such as trauma triggers, self-harm history, or phobias -- are implicitly inferred from the conversation but not respected during recommendation. We formalize this challenge as personalized CRS safety and introduce SafeRec, a new benchmark dataset designed to systematically evaluate safety risks in LLM-based CRS under user-specific constraints. To further address this problem, we propose SafeCRS, a safety-aware training framework that integrates Safe Supervised Fine-Tuning (Safe-SFT) with Safe Group reward-Decoupled Normalization Policy Optimization (Safe-GDPO) to jointly optimize recommendation quality and personalized safety alignment. Extensive experiments on SafeRec demonstrate that SafeCRS reduces safety violation rates by up to 96.5% relative to the strongest recommendation-quality baseline while maintaining competitive recommendation quality. Warning: This paper contains potentially harmful and offensive content.
translated_summary:
当前基于大语言模型（LLM）的对话式推荐系统（CRS）主要优化推荐准确率和用户满意度。我们揭示了一个尚未被充分研究的脆弱点：当系统从用户对话中间接推断出个体化安全敏感性（如创伤触发、自伤经历或特定恐惧症）但在推荐过程中未予尊重时，其输出极可能对用户造成损害，从而违反个性化安全约束。我们将这一挑战正式定义为个性化CRS安全，并推出SafeRec基准数据集，可用于在特定用户约束下系统评估LLM-CRS的安全风险。

为应对该问题，我们提出SafeCRS安全感知训练框架，整合安全监督微调（Safe-SFT）与安全组奖励去耦归一化策略优化（Safe-GDPO），在确保个性化安全对齐的同时联合提升推荐质量。在SafeRec上进行的大量实验表明，SafeCRS可将安全违规率较最强推荐质量基线最高降低96.5%，且仍保持具竞争力的推荐水平。

【警示：本文含有潜在有害或令人不适的内容。】

title: Stringology-Based Motif Discovery from EEG Signals: an ADHD Case Study
summary: We propose a novel computational framework for analyzing electroencephalography (EEG) time series using methods from stringology, the study of efficient algorithms for string processing, to systematically identify and characterize recurrent temporal patterns in neural signals. The primary aim is to introduce quantitative measures to understand neural signal dynamics, with the present findings serving as a proof-of-concept. The framework adapts order-preserving matching (OPM) and Cartesian tree matching (CTM) to detect temporal motifs that preserve relative ordering and hierarchical structure while remaining invariant to amplitude scaling. This approach provides a temporally precise representation of EEG dynamics that complements traditional spectral and global complexity analyses. To evaluate its utility, we applied the framework to multichannel EEG recordings from individuals with attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) and matched controls using a publicly available dataset. Highly recurrent, group-specific motifs were extracted and quantified using both OPM and CTM. The ADHD group exhibited significantly higher motif frequencies, suggesting increased repetitiveness in neural activity. OPM analysis revealed shorter motif lengths and greater gradient instability in ADHD, reflected in larger mean and maximal inter-sample amplitude changes. CTM analysis further demonstrated reduced hierarchical complexity in ADHD, characterized by shallower tree structures and fewer hierarchical levels despite comparable motif lengths. These findings suggest that ADHD-related EEG alterations involve systematic differences in the structure, stability, and hierarchical organization of recurrent temporal patterns. The proposed stringology-based motif framework provides a complementary computational tool with potential applications for objective biomarker development in neurodevelopmental disorders.
translated_summary:
我们提出了一种全新的计算框架，利用字符串学（研究高效字符串处理算法的学科）来分析脑电（EEG）时间序列，从而系统性地识别并刻画神经信号中的重复性时间模式。其核心目标是引入可量化的指标来揭示神经信号的动态特性，本研究作为框架的概念验证。该框架将保序匹配（OPM）与笛卡尔树匹配（CTM）两种算法适配于EEG，使其能在不受幅度缩放影响的前提下，检测出保留相对时间次序及层次结构的瞬时模体（motifs）。这一方法为EEG动力学提供了兼具时间精度的表征，可作为传统频谱及全局复杂度分析的有益补充。

为检验其有效性，我们在一组公开发布的多通道EEG数据集中，将该框架应用于注意缺陷/多动障碍（ADHD）患者及其匹配健康对照组。通过OPM与CTM提取并量化了高度重复的组别特异性模体。结果显示，ADHD组模体出现频率显著升高，表明其神经活动具有更强的重复性。OPM分析发现，ADHD患者模体长度更短，且时间梯度不稳定，体现为样本间幅度变化的均值与最大值均比对组更大。CTM分析进一步揭示出ADHD组的层级复杂度降低，即使模体长度相近，其笛卡尔树结构更浅、层级更少。这些结果表明，ADHD的EEG改变在重复性时间模式的结构、稳定性与层次组织上存在系统性差异。所提出的基于字符串学的模体框架为神经发育障碍的客观生物标记物研发提供了一种互补的计算工具。

title: Graph Hopfield Networks: Energy-Based Node Classification with Associative Memory
summary: We introduce Graph Hopfield Networks, whose energy function couples associative memory retrieval with graph Laplacian smoothing for node classification. Gradient descent on this joint energy yields an iterative update interleaving Hopfield retrieval with Laplacian propagation. Memory retrieval provides regime-dependent benefits: up to 2.0~pp on sparse citation networks and up to 5 pp additional robustness under feature masking; the iterative energy-descent architecture itself is a strong inductive bias, with all variants (including the memory-disabled NoMem ablation) outperforming standard baselines on Amazon co-purchase graphs. Tuning enables graph sharpening for heterophilous benchmarks without architectural changes.
translated_summary: 我们提出图 Hopfield 网络，其能量函数将联想记忆检索与图拉普拉斯平滑相结合，用于节点分类。对该联合能量进行梯度下降，得到一种迭代更新方案，其中 Hopfield 检索与拉普拉斯传播交替进行。记忆检索带来的好处依任务和数据情境而异：在稀疏引文网络上准确度提升可达 2.0 个百分点；在特征随机掩蔽情况下，额外鲁棒性提高可达 5 个百分点。迭代式能量下降架构本身即为一种强大的归纳偏置，所有变体（包括关闭记忆功能的 NoMem 消融）在 Amazon 共购图上均超越标准基线。无需任何结构改动，仅靠调参即可实现对异配基准图的“图锐化”。

title: The Science Data Lake: A Unified Open Infrastructure Integrating 293 Million Papers Across Eight Scholarly Sources with Embedding-Based Ontology Alignment
summary: Scholarly data are largely fragmented across siloed databases with divergent metadata and missing linkages among them. We present the Science Data Lake, a locally-deployable infrastructure built on DuckDB and simple Parquet files that unifies eight open sources - Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, SciSciNet, Papers with Code, Retraction Watch, Reliance on Science, a preprint-to-published mapping, and Crossref - via DOI normalization while preserving source-level schemas. The resource comprises approximately 960GB of Parquet files spanning ~293 million uniquely identifiable papers across ~22 schemas and ~153 SQL views. An embedding-based ontology alignment using BGE-large sentence embeddings maps 4,516 OpenAlex topics to 13 scientific ontologies (~1.3 million terms), yielding 16,150 mappings covering 99.8% of topics ($\geq 0.65$ threshold) with $F1 = 0.77$ at the recommended $\geq 0.85$ operating point, outperforming TF-IDF, BM25, and Jaro-Winkler baselines on a 300-pair gold-standard evaluation. We validate through 10 automated checks, cross-source citation agreement analysis (pairwise Pearson $r = 0.76$ - $0.87$), and stratified manual annotation. Four vignettes demonstrate cross-source analyses infeasible with any single database. The resource is open source, deployable on a single drive or queryable remotely via HuggingFace, and includes structured documentation suitable for large language model (LLM) based research agents.
translated_summary:
学术数据高度分散于互不联通的异构数据库中，元数据格式不一致且缺失关键关联。本文提出“科学数据湖”（Science Data Lake）：一种可在本地部署的基础设施，以 DuckDB 为引擎、仅用普通 Parquet 文件作为存储，通过 DOI 标准化链入八个开放源——Semantic Scholar、OpenAlex、SciSciNet、Papers with Code、Retraction Watch、Reliance on Science、预印本-出版稿映射以及 Crossref——并在统一的同时保留各源的原始模式。整个资源由约 960 GB 的 Parquet 文件构成，覆盖约 2.93 亿篇唯一可识别论文，分布于 22 个原始模式和 153 个 SQL 视图中。

为解决语义歧义，我们采用基于嵌入的本体对齐方法：以 BGE-large 句向量将 4 516 个 OpenAlex 主题映射到 13 部科学本体（约 130 万条术语），生成 16 150 条映射，覆盖 99.8% 的主题（阈值 ≥ 0.65）；在推荐的 ≥ 0.85 操作点上，F1 得分达 0.77，显著优于 TF-IDF、BM25 与 Jaro-Winkler 基线的 300 对人工标注标准评估结果。验证环节包括 10 项自动化校验、跨源引文一致性分析（两两皮尔逊 r = 0.76–0.87）及分层人工标注复核。

通过四个案例，我们展示了任何单一数据库都无法实现的跨源综合分析。该资源已完全开源，可在单个硬盘本地部署，也可通过 HuggingFace 远端查询，并随带面向大语言模型（LLM）研究代理的结构化文档。

title: OneRanker: Unified Generation and Ranking with One Model in Industrial Advertising Recommendation
summary: The end-to-end generative paradigm is revolutionizing advertising recommendation systems, driving a shift from traditional cascaded architectures towards unified modeling. However, practical deployment faces three core challenges: the misalignment between interest objectives and business value, the target-agnostic limitation of generative processes, and the disconnection between generation and ranking stages. Existing solutions often fall into a dilemma where single-stage fusion induces optimization tension, while stage decoupling causes irreversible information loss. To address this, we propose OneRanker, achieving architectural-level deep integration of generation and ranking. First, we design a value-aware multi-task decoupling architecture. By leveraging task token sequences and causal mask, we separate interest coverage and value optimization spaces within shared representations, effectively alleviating target conflicts. Second, we construct a coarse-to-fine collaborative target awareness mechanism, utilizing Fake Item Tokens for implicit awareness during generation and a ranking decoder for explicit value alignment at the candidate level. Finally, we propose input-output dual-side consistency guarantees. Through Key/Value pass-through mechanisms and Distribution Consistency (DC) Constraint Loss, we achieve end-to-end collaborative optimization between generation and ranking. The full deployment on Tencent's WeiXin channels advertising system has shown a significant improvement in key business metrics (GMV - Normal +1.34\%), providing a new paradigm with industrial feasibility for generative advertising recommendations.
translated_summary: 端到端生成式范式正在颠覆广告推荐系统，推动架构从传统级联模式转向统一建模。然而，落地部署仍面临三大核心挑战：兴趣目标与商业价值之间的错位、生成过程目标无关的限制、以及生成与排序阶段的割裂。现有方法往往陷入两难：单阶段融合导致优化冲突，阶段解耦又带来不可逆信息损失。为此，本文提出 OneRanker，在架构层面实现生成与排序的深度耦合。首先，我们设计了一种价值感知的多任务解耦架构。利用任务 token 序列与因果掩码，将兴趣覆盖空间与价值优化空间在共享表征内分离，从而有效缓解目标冲突。其次，我们构建由粗到精的协同目标感知机制：在生成阶段引入“伪物品 Token”实现隐式目标感知；在排序阶段使用专门解码器进行显式候选级价值对齐。最后，我们提出输入-输出双端一致性保障。通过 Key/Value 直通机制与分布一致性（DC）约束损失，实现端到端的生成与排序协同优化。OneRanker 已在腾讯微信渠道广告系统全面上线，核心商业指标（GMV - Normal）提升 1.34%，为生成式广告推荐的工业化实践提供了新的可行范式。

title: Core-based Hierarchies for Efficient GraphRAG
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances large language models by incorporating external knowledge. However, existing vector-based methods often fail on global sensemaking tasks that require reasoning across many documents. GraphRAG addresses this by organizing documents into a knowledge graph with hierarchical communities that can be recursively summarized. Current GraphRAG approaches rely on Leiden clustering for community detection, but we prove that on sparse knowledge graphs, where average degree is constant and most nodes have low degree, modularity optimization admits exponentially many near-optimal partitions, making Leiden-based communities inherently non-reproducible. To address this, we propose replacing Leiden with k-core decomposition, which yields a deterministic, density-aware hierarchy in linear time. We introduce a set of lightweight heuristics that leverage the k-core hierarchy to construct size-bounded, connectivity-preserving communities for retrieval and summarization, along with a token-budget-aware sampling strategy that reduces LLM costs. We evaluate our methods on real-world datasets including financial earnings transcripts, news articles, and podcasts, using three LLMs for answer generation and five independent LLM judges for head-to-head evaluation. Across datasets and models, our approach consistently improves answer comprehensiveness and diversity while reducing token usage, demonstrating that k-core-based GraphRAG is an effective and efficient framework for global sensemaking.
translated_summary: 检索增强生成（RAG）通过引入外部知识提升大语言模型能力，但现有基于向量的方法在需要跨多文档推理的全局理解任务上表现不佳。GraphRAG 将文档组织成带有层级社区结构的知识图谱，支持递归式摘要，但当前方法依赖 Leiden 聚类进行社区检测。我们证明，在平均度为常数、多数节点度较低的稀疏知识图中，模块度优化存在指数级数量的近似最优划分，导致基于 Leiden 的社区结构天然不可复现。为此，我们提出用具有确定性的 k-core 分解替代 Leiden，线性时间构建密度感知层级。基于此层级，我们设计轻量级启发式算法生成有大小约束、保持连接性的社区用于检索和摘要，并引入 token 预算感知的采样策略以降低 LLM 调用成本。在金融财报电话会议转写、新闻文章和播客等真实数据集上，使用三个大模型生成答案，五个独立 LLM 担任裁判进行头对头评估。跨数据集和模型实验表明，该方法在提升答案全面性与多样性的同时减少 token 用量，证明基于 k-core 的 GraphRAG 是高效且有效的全局理解框架。

title: Debiasing Sequential Recommendation with Time-aware Inverse Propensity Scoring
summary: Sequential Recommendation (SR) predicts users next interactions by modeling the temporal order of their historical behaviors. Existing approaches, including traditional sequential models and generative recommenders, achieve strong performance but primarily rely on explicit interactions such as clicks or purchases while overlooking item exposures. This ignorance introduces selection bias, where exposed but unclicked items are misinterpreted as disinterest, and exposure bias, where unexposed items are treated as irrelevant. Effectively addressing these biases requires distinguishing between items that were "not exposed" and those that were "not of interest", which cannot be reliably inferred from correlations in historical data. Counterfactual reasoning provides a natural solution by estimating user preferences under hypothetical exposure, and Inverse Propensity Scoring (IPS) is a common tool for such estimation. However, conventional IPS methods are static and fail to capture the sequential dependencies and temporal dynamics of user behavior. To overcome these limitations, we propose Time aware Inverse Propensity Scoring (TIPS). Unlike traditional static IPS, TIPS effectively accounts for sequential dependencies and temporal dynamics, thereby capturing user preferences more accurately. Extensive experiments show that TIPS consistently enhances recommendation performance as a plug-in for various sequential recommenders. Our code will be publicly available upon acceptance.
translated_summary:
序列化推荐（SR）通过建模用户历史行为的时序顺序来预测其下一次可能的交互。传统序列模型与生成式推荐器虽已获得强劲性能，但它们主要依赖点击、购买等显式交互，忽视了用户实际看到的商品曝光信息。这种忽视会引发两大偏误：选择偏误——将被曝光却未被点击的商品误判为用户无兴趣；以及曝光偏误——将未被曝光的商品直接视为不相关。要有效纠正这些偏误，必须区分“未曝光”和“被曝光但无兴趣”的商品，而历史数据中的相关性根本无法可靠地区分二者。

反事实推理通过估计“假设曝光”情境下的用户偏好，为这一问题提供了天然解决方案；逆倾向性评分（IPS）是常用的估计工具。然而，传统 IPS 是静态方法，无法捕获用户行为的序列依赖与时序动态。为此，我们提出时间感知逆倾向性评分（TIPS）。与静态 IPS 不同，TIPS 显式建模序列依赖及时序演化，从而更准确地刻画用户偏好。大量实验表明，TIPS 作为通用插件，可以一致性地提升多种序列化推荐器的性能。代码将在论文被接收后开源。

title: Detecting RAG Advertisements Across Advertising Styles
summary: Large language models (LLMs) enable a new form of advertising for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems in which organic responses are blended with contextually relevant ads. The prospect of such "generated native ads" has sparked interest in whether they can be detected automatically. Existing datasets, however, do not reflect the diversity of advertising styles discussed in the marketing literature. In this paper, we (1) develop a taxonomy of advertising styles for LLMs, combining the style dimensions of explicitness and type of appeal, (2) simulate that advertisers may attempt to evade detection by changing their advertising style, and (3) evaluate a variety of ad-detection approaches with respect to their robustness under these changes. Expanding previous work on ad detection, we train models that use entity recognition to exactly locate an ad in an LLM response and find them to be both very effective at detecting responses with ads and largely robust to changes in the advertising style. Since ad blocking will be performed on low-resource end-user devices, we include lightweight models like random forests and SVMs in our evaluation. These models, however, are brittle under such changes, highlighting the need for further efficiency-oriented research for a practical approach to blocking of generated ads.
translated_summary: 大型语言模型（LLM）为检索增强生成（RAG）系统催生了一种全新的广告形态：有机回答与上下文相关广告有机融合，形成“生成式原生广告”。这种广告能否被自动检测，已引发广泛关注。然而，现有数据集无法反映营销文献中论及的广告风格多样性。本文（1）以广告的显性程度和诉求类型两个维度，构建了面向LLM 的广告风格分类体系；（2）模拟广告商为逃避检测而变更风格的情形；（3）评估多种检测方法在风格扰动下的鲁棒性。我们扩展了已有广告检测研究，训练了利用实体识别精确定位LLM 回答中广告的模型；这些模型在检测含广告回答任务上表现卓越，且对广告风格变化保持高度鲁棒。考虑到广告拦截需在资源受限的终端设备上执行，我们同时评估了随机森林、SVM 等轻量模型。实验显示，轻量模型在面对风格漂移时十分脆弱，凸显了面向实用拦截场景的“效率优先”研究的必要性。

title: Beyond Text: Aligning Vision and Language for Multimodal E-Commerce Retrieval
summary: Modern e-commerce search is inherently multimodal: customers make purchase decisions by jointly considering product text and visual informations. However, most industrial retrieval and ranking systems primarily rely on textual information, underutilizing the rich visual signals available in product images. In this work, we study unified text-image fusion for two-tower retrieval models in the e-commerce domain. We demonstrate that domain-specific fine-tuning and two stage alignment between query with product text and image modalities are both crucial for effective multimodal retrieval. Building on these insights, we propose a noval modality fusion network to fuse image and text information and capture cross-modal complementary information. Experiments on large-scale e-commerce datasets validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
translated_summary: 现代电子商务搜索天然是多模态的：消费者在做出购买决策时，会同时考量商品的文本信息与图片信息。然而，当前绝大多数工业化检索与排序系统主要依赖文本信息，未能充分利用商品图像中丰富的视觉信号。为此，本文针对电商场景研究了双塔检索模型的统一文本-图像融合方法。我们发现，领域特定的微调以及查询—商品文本、图像两类模态之间的两阶段对齐，对实现有效的多模态检索至关重要。在此基础上，我们提出了一种新颖的模态融合网络，能够融合图像和文本信息并捕获跨模态的互补信号。在大规模电商数据集上的实验验证了该方法的有效性。

title: Scaling Laws for Reranking in Information Retrieval
summary: Scaling laws have been observed across a wide range of tasks, such as natural language generation and dense retrieval, where performance follows predictable patterns as model size, data, and compute grow. However, these scaling laws are insufficient for understanding the scaling behavior of multi-stage retrieval systems, which typically include a reranking stage. In large-scale multi-stage retrieval systems, reranking is the final and most influential step before presenting a ranked list of items to the end user. In this work, we present the first systematic study of scaling laws for rerankers by analyzing performance across model sizes and data budgets for three popular paradigms: pointwise, pairwise, and listwise reranking. Using a detailed case study with cross-encoder rerankers, we demonstrate that performance follows a predictable power law. This regularity allows us to accurately forecast the performance of larger models for some metrics more than others using smaller-scale experiments, offering a robust methodology for saving significant computational resources. For example, we accurately estimate the NDCG of a 1B-parameter model by training and evaluating only smaller models (up to 400M parameters), in both in-domain as well as out-of-domain settings. Our experiments encompass span several loss functions, models and metrics and demonstrate that downstream metrics like NDCG, MAP (Mean Avg Precision) show reliable scaling behavior and can be forecasted accurately at scale, while highlighting the limitations of metrics like Contrastive Entropy and MRR (Mean Reciprocal Rank) which do not follow predictable scaling behavior in all instances. Our results establish scaling principles for reranking and provide actionable insights for building industrial-grade retrieval systems.
translated_summary: 人们已在诸多任务（如自然语言生成和稠密检索）中观察到扩展定律：随着模型规模、数据量和计算预算的增加，性能呈现出可预测的幂律增长。然而，现有的扩展定律无法刻画多阶段检索系统（通常在末段加入重排序）的扩展规律。在大规模多阶段检索系统中，重排序是向最终用户呈现排序列表之前的最后且最关键一步。本文首次系统性地研究重排模型的扩展定律，针对三种主流范式——点式、对偶式和列表式重排——考察其在不同模型规模与数据预算下的性能演化。我们通过跨编码器重排器的详细案例研究，证明性能遵循可预测的幂律关系。这种规律性使得仅用小规模实验就能准确预估更大模型的性能，在某些评价指标上效果更佳，从而显著节约计算资源。例如，在领域内和领域外场景下，我们仅用最多 400 M 参数的较小模型训练与评估，便可靠地预测了 1 B 参数模型的 NDCG。实验涉及多种损失函数、模型架构与评价指标，结果表明：像 NDCG、MAP（平均精度均值）等下游指标具有良好的扩展行为，可以在更大规模上被准确预估；而对比熵和 MRR（平均倒排排名）等度量在某些情形下并不呈现可预测的扩展规律。我们的工作为工业级检索系统的重排模块确立了扩展原理，并给出了可落地的实践指导。

title: DARE: Aligning LLM Agents with the R Statistical Ecosystem via Distribution-Aware Retrieval
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents can automate data-science workflows, but many rigorous statistical methods implemented in R remain underused because LLMs struggle with statistical knowledge and tool retrieval. Existing retrieval-augmented approaches focus on function-level semantics and ignore data distribution, producing suboptimal matches. We propose DARE (Distribution-Aware Retrieval Embedding), a lightweight, plug-and-play retrieval model that incorporates data distribution information into function representations for R package retrieval. Our main contributions are: (i) RPKB, a curated R Package Knowledge Base derived from 8,191 high-quality CRAN packages; (ii) DARE, an embedding model that fuses distributional features with function metadata to improve retrieval relevance; and (iii) RCodingAgent, an R-oriented LLM agent for reliable R code generation and a suite of statistical analysis tasks for systematically evaluating LLM agents in realistic analytical scenarios. Empirically, DARE achieves an NDCG at 10 of 93.47%, outperforming state-of-the-art open-source embedding models by up to 17% on package retrieval while using substantially fewer parameters. Integrating DARE into RCodingAgent yields significant gains on downstream analysis tasks. This work helps narrow the gap between LLM automation and the mature R statistical ecosystem.
translated_summary: 大型语言模型（LLM）智能体可实现数据科学工作流的自动化，但由于 LLM 既缺统计知识又欠工具检索能力，大量严谨的 R 统计方法仍被闲置。现有检索增强方法聚焦函数级语义，忽视数据分布，导致匹配欠佳。我们提出 DARE（Distribution-Aware Retrieval Embedding），一个轻量级即插即用检索模型，在函数表征中嵌入数据分布信息，辅助 R 包检索。主要贡献包括：(i) RPKB：从 8,191 个高质量 CRAN 包精心整理的 R 包知识库；(ii) DARE：融合分布特征与函数元数据的嵌入模型，显著提升了检索相关度；(iii) RCodingAgent：面向 R 的 LLM 智能体，可稳健生成 R 代码，并提供一套统计分析任务，用于在现实一线上系统评估 LLM 智能体。实验表明，DARE 在包检索任务上 NDCG@10 达 93.47%，超越最先进的开源嵌入模型最高 17%，参数量却显著减少。将 DARE 接入 RCodingAgent，下游分析任务亦显著获益。本研究有助于弥合 LLM 自动化与成熟 R 统计生态之间的鸿沟。

title: CONE: Embeddings for Complex Numerical Data Preserving Unit and Variable Semantics
summary: Large pre-trained models (LMs) and Large Language Models (LLMs) are typically effective at capturing language semantics and contextual relationships. However, these models encounter challenges in maintaining optimal performance on tasks involving numbers. Blindly treating numerical or structured data as terms is inadequate -- their semantics must be well understood and encoded by the models. In this paper, we propose CONE, a hybrid transformer encoder pre-trained model that encodes numbers, ranges, and gaussians into an embedding vector space preserving distance. We introduce a novel composite embedding construction algorithm that integrates numerical values, ranges or gaussians together with their associated units and attribute names to precisely capture their intricate semantics. We conduct extensive experimental evaluation on large-scale datasets across diverse domains (web, medical, finance, and government) that justifies CONE's strong numerical reasoning capabilities, achieving an F1 score of 87.28% on DROP, a remarkable improvement of up to 9.37% in F1 over state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines, and outperforming major SOTA models with a significant Recall@10 gain of up to 25%.
translated_summary:
大规模预训练语言模型（LM）及大型语言模型（LLM）虽在捕获语言语义和上下文关系方面表现卓越，却在包含数值的任务上难以保持最佳性能。若将数值或结构化数据盲目视作普通词项处理，效果有限——其语义需得到模型充分理解和编码。

为应对此挑战，本文提出 CONE——一种混合 Transformer 编码器预训练模型，可将数字、区间及高斯分布编码至保留距离关系的嵌入向量空间。我们设计了一种新颖的复合嵌入构建算法：将数值/区间/高斯值，与其关联的单位和属性名统一整合，从而精准捕捉其复杂语义。在涵盖网页、医疗、金融和政府等多领域的四份大规模数据集上进行大量实验，验证 CONE 的强大数值推理能力；在 DROP 数据集上 F1 达 87.28%，较基线 SOTA 最大提升 9.37% F1，并以 Recall@10 显著超越主流 SOTA 模型，提升幅度高达 25%。

title: iAgentBench: Benchmarking Sensemaking Capabilities of Information-Seeking Agents on High-Traffic Topics
summary: With the emergence of search-enabled generative QA systems, users are increasingly turning to tools that browse, aggregate, and reconcile evidence across multiple sources on their behalf. Yet many widely used QA benchmarks remain answerable by retrieving a single relevant passage, making them poorly suited for measuring cross-source sensemaking, such as integrating evidence, tracking causal links, and resolving dependencies across facets of a topic. We present iAgentBench, a dynamic ODQA benchmark that targets these higher-level information needs while keeping questions natural and grounded in realistic information-seeking behavior. iAgentBench draws seed topics from real-world attention signals and uses common user intent patterns to construct user-like questions whose answers require combining evidence from multiple sources, not just extracting a single snippet. Each instance is released with traceable evidence and auditable intermediate artifacts that support contamination checks and enable fine-grained diagnosis of failures in retrieval versus synthesis. Experiments across multiple LLMs show that retrieval improves accuracy, but retrieval alone does not reliably resolve these questions, underscoring the need to evaluate evidence use, not just evidence access.
translated_summary: 随着支持搜索的生成式问答系统兴起，用户越来越依赖能够主动浏览、整合并协调多源证据的工具。然而，现有大型问答基准大多只需检索到一条相关段落即可作答，难以衡量跨源的意义建构能力——如对证据进行整合、追踪因果链或解决主题各侧面之间的依赖关系。为此，我们推出 iAgentBench：一套动态的开放域问答基准，聚焦这些高层次信息需求，同时确保问题自然且源于真实的信息检索行为。iAgentBench 从真实世界关注信号中提取种子话题，并依据常见用户意图模式构造“类人”问题，其答案必须综合多源证据，而非简单抽取单一文段。每个实例均附可追溯证据和可审计的中间产物，既便于污染检测，也支持对检索与综合环节的细化诊断。在多类大模型上的实验表明：虽然检索能提升准确率，但仅凭检索并不能稳妥解答这些问题，凸显出评估“如何使用证据”而非“是否获取证据”的迫切性。

title: Still Fresh? Evaluating Temporal Drift in Retrieval Benchmarks
summary: Information retrieval (IR) benchmarks typically follow the Cranfield paradigm, relying on static and predefined corpora. However, temporal changes in technical corpora, such as API deprecations and code reorganizations, can render existing benchmarks stale. In our work, we investigate how temporal corpus drift affects FreshStack, a retrieval benchmark focused on technical domains. We examine two independent corpus snapshots of FreshStack from October 2024 and October 2025 to answer questions about LangChain. Our analysis shows that all but one query posed in 2024 remain fully supported by the 2025 corpus, as relevant documents "migrate" from LangChain to competitor repositories, such as LlamaIndex. Next, we compare the accuracy of retrieval models on both snapshots and observe only minor shifts in model rankings, with overall strong correlation of up to 0.978 Kendall $τ$ at Recall@50. These results suggest that retrieval benchmarks re-judged with evolving temporal corpora can remain reliable for retrieval evaluation. We publicly release all our artifacts at https://github.com/fresh-stack/driftbench.
translated_summary: 信息检索（IR）基准测试通常遵循Cranfield范式，依赖静态且预定义的语料库。然而，技术类语料库会伴随API废弃、代码重构等时间性变化，导致既有基准失效。我们针对面向技术领域的FreshStack检索基准，系统研究了语料库随时间漂移的影响。为此，我们采集了2024年10月和2025年10月两个独立的FreshStack语料库快照，并以涉及LangChain的问题进行实验。分析发现，除1个查询外，2024年提出的全部查询在2025年语料中仍能完全得到支持，原因在于相关文档“迁移”至LlamaIndex等竞争库中。进而，我们在两个快照上比较了检索模型的准确率，发现模型排序仅在细微处发生变化，Kendall τ 在 Recall@50 上仍高达0.978，呈强相关。结果表明，即便语料库随时间演进，重新标注后的检索基准仍可保持稳定可靠。所有实验数据与代码已开源：https://github.com/fresh-stack/driftbench

title: Turning Trust to Transactions: Tracking Affiliate Marketing and FTC Compliance in YouTube's Influencer Economy
summary: YouTube has evolved into a powerful platform that where creators monetize their influence through affiliate marketing, raising concerns about transparency and ethics, especially when creators fail to disclose their affiliate relationships. Although regulatory agencies like the US Federal Trade Commission (FTC) have issued guidelines to address these issues, non-compliance and consumer harm persist, and the extent of these problems remains unclear. In this paper, we introduce tools, developed with insights from recent advances in Web measurement and NLP research, to examine the state of the affiliate marketing ecosystem on YouTube. We apply these tools to a 10-year dataset of 2 million videos from nearly 540,000 creators, analyzing the prevalence of affiliate marketing on YouTube and the rates of non-compliant behavior. Our findings reveal that affiliate links are widespread, yet dis- closure compliance remains low, with most videos failing to meet FTC standards. Furthermore, we analyze the effects of different stakeholders in improving disclosure behavior. Our study suggests that the platform is highly associated with improved compliance through standardized disclosure features. We recommend that regulators and affiliate partners collaborate with platforms to enhance transparency, accountability, and trust in the influencer economy.
translated_summary:
YouTube 已演变成一个影响力巨大的平台，创作者通过联属营销变现。但许多创作者未能依法披露其与商家的联属关系，引发了透明度和伦理争议。尽管美国联邦贸易委员会（FTC）等部门已发布指南，违规现象与消费者受损依旧存在，且问题规模尚不明确。

本文借鉴近期网络测量与自然语言处理技术的发展，设计了一套工具，用以剖析 YouTube 上联属营销生态的现状。我们将这些工具应用于涵盖近两百万条视频、涉及约 54 万名创作者的十年数据集，系统评估联属营销的普及程度与违规率。研究发现：联属链接十分常见，但披露合规性极低，多数视频不符合 FTC 标准。

此外，我们定量比较了各方——监管机构、广告联盟、创作者与平台——在推动合规方面的作用。结果表明，当平台提供标准化披露功能时，合规显著提升。我们建议监管方与广告联盟与平台合作，共同提升透明度、责任感及整个网红经济的信任度。

title: $τ$-Knowledge: Evaluating Conversational Agents over Unstructured Knowledge
summary: Conversational agents are increasingly deployed in knowledge-intensive settings, where correct behavior depends on retrieving and applying domain-specific knowledge from large, proprietary, and unstructured corpora during live interactions with users. Yet most existing benchmarks evaluate retrieval or tool use independently of each other, creating a gap in realistic, fully agentic evaluation over unstructured data in long-horizon interactions. We introduce $τ$-Knowledge, an extension of $τ$-Bench for evaluating agents in environments where success depends on coordinating external, natural-language knowledge with tool outputs to produce verifiable, policy-compliant state changes. Our new domain, $τ$-Banking, models realistic fintech customer support workflows in which agents must navigate roughly 700 interconnected knowledge documents while executing tool-mediated account updates. Across embedding-based retrieval and terminal-based search, even frontier models with high reasoning budgets achieve only $\sim$25.5% pass^1, with reliability degrading sharply over repeated trials. Agents struggle to retrieve the correct documents from densely interlinked knowledge bases and to reason accurately over complex internal policies. Overall, $τ$-Knowledge provides a realistic testbed for developing agents that integrate unstructured knowledge in human-facing deployments.
translated_summary: 会话型智能体正越来越多地被部署在知识密集型场景中。在这些场景里，正确的行为依赖于在与用户的实时互动中，从庞大、专有且非结构化的语料中检索并应用领域特定知识。然而，现有基准大多将检索能力与工具使用能力分开评估，无法在真实的长周期互动中对基于非结构化数据的智能体表现进行完整测评。为此，我们提出 τ-Knowledge——τ-Bench 的扩展版本，用于评估智能体在与外部自然语言知识交互并协调工具输出，以实现可验证且符合政策要求的状态变更时的表现。在全新 τ-Banking 场景中，我们模拟了真实的金融科技客户支持流程：智能体需要在一个由约 700 份相互关联的知识文档构成的库中导航，并通过工具调用来更新客户账户。无论采用基于嵌入的检索还是终端式搜索，即便为前沿模型分配高额推理预算，其一次通过率仅约为 25.5%；随着尝试次数的增加，可靠性迅速下降。核心难点在于：从高度互联的知识库中准确检索所需文档，以及对复杂内部政策进行精确推理。τ-Knowledge 因而为开发能够面向人类用户、有效整合非结构化知识的智能体，提供了一个贴近真实环境的测试基准。

title: CAMMSR: Category-Guided Attentive Mixture of Experts for Multimodal Sequential Recommendation
summary:
The explosion of multimedia data in information-rich environments has intensified the challenges of personalized content discovery, positioning recommendation systems as an essential form of passive data management. Multimodal sequential recommendation, which leverages diverse item information such as text and images, has shown great promise in enriching item representations and deepening the understanding of user interests. However, most existing models rely on heuristic fusion strategies that fail to capture the dynamic and context-sensitive nature of user-modal interactions. In real-world scenarios, user preferences for modalities vary not only across individuals but also within the same user across different items or categories. Moreover, the synergistic effects between modalities-where combined signals trigger user interest in ways isolated modalities cannot-remain largely underexplored.
  To this end, we propose CAMMSR, a Category-guided Attentive Mixture of Experts model for Multimodal Sequential Recommendation. At its core, CAMMSR introduces a category-guided attentive mixture of experts (CAMoE) module, which learns specialized item representations from multiple perspectives and explicitly models inter-modal synergies. This component dynamically allocates modality weights guided by an auxiliary category prediction task, enabling adaptive fusion of multimodal signals. Additionally, we design a modality swap contrastive learning task to enhance cross-modal representation alignment through sequence-level augmentation. Extensive experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that CAMMSR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating its effectiveness in achieving adaptive, synergistic, and user-centric multimodal sequential recommendation.
translated_summary: 多媒体数据在信息丰富的环境中不断爆炸式增长，加剧了个性化内容发现的挑战，推荐系统由此成为被动数据管理不可或缺的手段。多模态序列化推荐利用文本、图像等多元商品信息，显著提升了商品表征能力并深化了对用户兴趣的理解。然而，多数现有模型依赖启发式融合策略，难以刻画用户与多种模态之间动态且上下文敏感的交互关系。在现实场景中，用户对模态的偏好不仅因人而异，同一用户针对不同商品或类别也会表现出差异。此外，模态之间的协同效应——即多种模态组合激发用户兴趣，而单模态无法产生如此效果——仍未得到充分探索。为此，本文提出 CAMMSR：一种面向多模态序列化推荐的类别引导专注混合专家模型。其核心是类别引导专注混合专家（CAMoE）模块：从多视角学习专业的商品表征，并显式建模跨模态协同作用。该模块动态分配模态权重，受一项辅助类别预测任务指引，从而实现对多模态信号的自适应融合。此外，我们设计了模态切换的对比学习任务，通过序列级数据增强提升跨模态表征对齐能力。在四个公开数据集的大量实验表明，CAMMSR始终显著优于现有最先进技术，验证了其具备自适应性、协同性和以用户为中心的多模态序列化推荐能力。

title: LabelBuddy: An Open Source Music and Audio Language Annotation Tagging Tool Using AI Assistance
