summary: The advancement of Machine learning (ML), Large Audio Language Models (LALMs), and autonomous AI agents in Music Information Retrieval (MIR) necessitates a shift from static tagging to rich, human-aligned representation learning. However, the scarcity of open-source infrastructure capable of capturing the subjective nuances of audio annotation remains a critical bottleneck. This paper introduces \textbf{LabelBuddy}, an open-source collaborative auto-tagging audio annotation tool designed to bridge the gap between human intent and machine understanding. Unlike static tools, it decouples the interface from inference via containerized backends, allowing users to plug in custom models for AI-assisted pre-annotation. We describe the system architecture, which supports multi-user consensus, containerized model isolation, and a roadmap for extending agents and LALMs. Code available at https://github.com/GiannisProkopiou/gsoc2022-Label-buddy.
translated_summary: 机器学习（ML）、大型音频语言模型（LALM）以及音乐信息检索（MIR）中自主 AI 智能体的迅猛发展，迫切要求我们从静态标签转向丰富且与人类感知对齐的表征学习。然而，能够捕捉音频标注主观细微差异的开源基础设施仍然稀缺，成为关键瓶颈。本文推出开源协作式自动标注音频注释工具 \textbf{LabelBuddy}，旨在弥合人类意图与机器理解之间的鸿沟。不同于传统静态工具，它通过容器化后端将界面与模型推理解耦，允许用户插入自定义模型实现 AI 辅助预标注。我们详细介绍了系统架构：支持多用户达成共识、容器化模型隔离，并给出了扩展智能体与 LALM 的未来路线图。代码已开源：https://github.com/GiannisProkopiou/gsoc2022-Label-buddy

title: Constraint-Aware Generative Re-ranking for Multi-Objective Optimization in Advertising Feeds
summary:
Optimizing reranking in advertising feeds is a constrained combinatorial problem, requiring simultaneous maximization of platform revenue and preservation of user experience. Recent generative ranking methods enable listwise optimization via autoregressive decoding, but their deployment is hindered by high inference latency and limited constraint handling.
  We propose a constraint-aware generative reranking framework that transforms constrained optimization into bounded neural decoding. Unlike prior approaches that separate generator and evaluator models, our framework unifies sequence generation and reward estimation into a single network.
  We further introduce constraint-aware reward pruning, integrating constraint satisfaction directly into decoding to efficiently generate optimal sequences. Experiments on large-scale industrial feeds and online A/B tests show that our method improves revenue and user engagement while meeting strict latency requirements, providing an efficient neural solution for constrained listwise optimization.
translated_summary: 在广告信息流中优化重排序是一个受约束的组合优化问题，必须同时最大化平台收益并保障用户体验。尽管最新的生成式排序方法可通过自回归解码实现列表级优化，但其落地仍受高推理延迟和低约束处理能力限制。为此，本文提出一种“约束感知”的生成重排序框架，将带约束的优化任务转化为有界的神经解码过程。不同于以往把生成器与评估器分开设计的做法，该框架把序列生成和奖励估计统一到一个网络中。我们进一步提出约束感知的奖励剪枝机制，直接在解码过程中考量约束满足度，从而高效产出最优序列。大规模工业信息流实验与在线 A/B 测试表明，新方法在严格延迟约束下持续提升收益和用户参与度，为受约束列表级优化提供了一种高效的神经解决方案。

title: Efficient, Property-Aligned Fan-Out Retrieval via RL-Compiled Diffusion
summary:
Many modern retrieval problems are set-valued: given a broad intent, the system must return a collection of results that optimizes higher-order properties
  (e.g., diversity, coverage, complementarity, coherence) while remaining grounded with respect to a fixed database. Set-valued objectives are typically
  non-decomposable and are not captured by existing supervised (query, content) datasets which only prioritize top-1 retrieval. Consequently, fan-out
  retrieval is often employed to generate diverse subqueries to retrieve item sets. While reinforcement learning (RL) can optimize set-level objectives via
  interaction, deploying an RL-tuned LLM for fan-out retrieval is prohibitively expensive at inference time. Conversely, diffusion-based generative
  retrieval enables efficient single-pass fan-out in embedding space, but requires objective-aligned training targets. To address these issues, we propose
  R4T (Retrieve-for-Train), which uses RL once as an objective transducer in a three-step process: (i) train a fan-out LLM with composite set-level rewards,
  (ii) synthesize objective-consistent training pairs, and (iii) train a lightweight diffusion retriever to model the conditional distribution of set-valued
  outputs. Across large-scale fashion and music benchmarks consisting of curated item sets, we show that R4T improves retrieval quality relative to strong
  baselines while reducing query-time fan-out latency by an order of magnitude.
translated_summary: 许多现代检索任务本质上是以集合为输出：给定一个宽泛的查询意图，系统需返回一组结果，在保证与固定数据库相吻合的同时，优化更宏观的集合级指标（如多样性、覆盖率、互补性和一致性）。然而，这些目标往往不可分解，且现有监督的（查询、内容）数据集仅关注 top-1 命中率，无法提供支持。为给出多样集合，业界常用“扇出检索”——生成多个子查询并行检索。基于强化学习（RL）的方法可通过交互直接优化集合级目标，但直接在推理阶段使用 RL 精调的 LLM 做扇出成本极高；而以扩散模型为代表的生成式检索能一次性在嵌入空间中完成扇出，却又要求训练目标与集合级指标严格对齐。本文提出 R4T（Retrieve-for-Train），把 RL 一次性用作“目标转导器”，完成三步流程：① 以组合式集合级奖励训练扇出 LLM；② 由其合成与目标一致的成对训练数据；③ 训练轻量级扩散检索器，直接学习以查询为条件的集合输出分布。在时尚和音乐两个包含人工标注商品/曲目集合的大规模基准中，R4T 相较强基线显著提升了检索质量，并将查询时的扇出延迟降低了一个数量级。

title: MLLMRec-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in Large Language Models for Multimodal Sequential Recommendation
summary: Group relative policy optimization (GRPO) has become a standard post-training paradigm for improving reasoning and preference alignment in large language models (LLMs), and has recently shown strong effectiveness in LLM-based recommender systems. However, extending GRPO-based reasoning pipelines to multimodal sequential recommendation (MSR) with multimodal large language models (MLLMs) faces fundamental obstacles. First, MSR requires jointly encoding visual content for both historical interactions and multiple candidate items, causing visual tokens to dominate the input and making the cost of group-based rollout scale with history length and candidate set size, which renders GRPO-based training prohibitively expensive. Second, existing Chain-of-Thought (CoT) supervision suffers from reward inflation in recommendation scenarios, where higher training rewards do not reliably translate into improved ranking performance and may induce shortcut learning. To address these challenges, we propose MLLMRec-R1, an efficient and stable GRPO-based reasoning framework for multimodal sequential recommendation. MLLMRec-R1 textualizes visual signals offline to eliminate expensive visual tokens while preserving multimodal semantics, and constructs high-quality multimodal CoT supervision through refinement and confidence-aware assessment. Furthermore, a mixed-grained data augmentation strategy selectively injects reliable CoT samples while retaining standard training data, mitigating reward inflation and improving generalization stability. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that MLLMRec-R1 consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, establishing a practical and effective GRPO-based reasoning pipeline for multimodal sequential recommendation. The code is available at https://github.com/wangyu0627/MLLMRec-R1.
translated_summary:
群体相对策略优化（GRPO）已成为提升大语言模型（LLM）推理能力与偏好对齐的通用后训练范式，并在基于 LLM 的推荐系统中表现出强劲效果。然而，将 GRPO 推理流程扩展至基于多模态大语言模型（MLLM）的多模态序列推荐（MSR）仍面临两大根本障碍。首先，MSR 需同时编码历史交互和多个候选商品的视觉内容，导致视觉 token 淹没输入空间，其规模与历史长度及候选集大小成正比，使基于组采样的训练成本高昂得无法接受。其次，现有思维链（CoT）监督在推荐场景存在严重“奖励膨胀”：训练阶段的高奖励并不能稳定对应排序指标的提升，反而易诱导捷径学习。

针对上述难题，本文提出 MLLMRec-R1——一种高效且稳定的 GRPO 多模态序列推荐推理框架。MLLMRec-R1 先将视觉信号离线文本化，以剔除昂贵视觉 token，同时完整保留多模态语义；随后通过精炼及置信度感知评估构建高质量多模态 CoT 监督。此外，混合粒度数据增广策略在确保标准训练数据留存的同时，仅注入可信 CoT 样本，有效缓解奖励膨胀并提升泛化稳健性。在三个基准数据集上的大量实验表明，MLLMRec-R1 持续超越当前最佳方法，为 GRPO 在多模态序列推荐中的实用化提供了切实可行的高效流程。代码已开源：https://github.com/wangyu0627/MLLMRec-R1。

title: Efficient Vector Search in the Wild: One Model for Multi-K Queries
summary: Learned top-K search is a promising approach for serving vector queries with both high accuracy and performance. However, current models trained for a specific K value fail to generalize to real-world multi-K queries: they suffer from accuracy degradation (for larger Ks) and performance loss (for smaller Ks). Training the model to generalize on different Ks requires orders of magnitude more preprocessing time and is not suitable for serving vector queries in the wild. We present OMEGA, a K-generalizable learned top-K search method that simultaneously achieves high accuracy, high performance, and low preprocessing cost for multi-K vector queries. The key idea is that a base model properly trained on K=1 with our trajectory-based features can be used to accurately predict larger Ks with a dynamic refinement procedure and smaller Ks with minimal performance loss. To make our refinements efficient, we further leverage the statistical properties of top-K searches to reduce excessive model invocations. Extensive evaluations on multiple public and production datasets show that, under the same preprocessing budgets, OMEGA achieves 6-33% lower average latency compared to state-of-the-art learned search methods, while all systems achieve the same recall target. With only 16-30% of the preprocessing time, OMEGA attains 1.01-1.28x of the optimal average latency of these baselines.
translated_summary: 学习式 top-K 搜索兼顾高准确率和高性能，是一种极具前景的向量查询服务方案。然而，当前仅为特定 K 值训练的模型难以泛化到真实世界的多 K 查询：在 K 较大时准确率下降，在 K 较小时性能受损。为了让模型跨不同 K 值具备泛化能力，业界做法需将预处理时间放大多个数量级，仍然无法高效应对现实场景中的向量查询需求。我们提出 OMEGA——一种可泛化至任意 K 的学习式 top-K 搜索方法，在保证高准确率和性能的同时，将预处理开销降至最低。其核心洞察是：用轨迹特征将模型仅在 K = 1 上完成基础训练后，通过动态精化流程即可对更大的 K 精确预测，而对更小的 K 仅需极小的性能损失。为进一步加速精化，我们利用 top-K 搜索的分布统计特性大幅减少冗余模型调用。在多套公开与生产数据集上的广泛评估表明：在一致预处理预算下，OMEGA 比当前最佳学习式搜索方法的平均延迟降低 6‒33%，双方的召回率相等；而仅以 16‒30% 的预处理时间，OMEGA 平均延迟仍可达这些基线最优值的 1.01‒1.28 倍。

title: ChatShopBuddy: Towards Reliable Conversational Shopping Agents via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Conversational shopping agents represent a critical consumer-facing application of Large Language Model (LLM)-powered agents, yet how to effectively apply post-training Reinforcement Learning (RL) to optimize such agents remains underexplored. This work investigates RL-based optimization for shopping agents in real-world scenarios, where agents must simultaneously satisfy multiple interdependent objectives spanning objective metrics (product correctness), subjective qualities (persuasiveness), outcome rewards (final response quality), and process rewards (tool efficiency). We present a complete methodology to address this challenge. Specifically, we first construct SmartShopBench, a benchmark that captures diverse shopping intents with a hierarchical evaluation that decomposes complex quality requirements into measurable levels. Building on this evaluation framework, we design Hierarchical Reward Modeling (HRM) to structure mixed reward types through conditional gating that reflects their logical dependencies. To enable efficient training, we further propose Dynamic Contrastive Policy Optimization (DCPO), which balances response quality with operational efficiency through dynamic trajectory selection based on reward and reasoning length. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our RL-trained agent, namely ChatShopBuddy, consistently outperforms larger models relying on generic reasoning, achieving superior stability rather than merely higher peaks. Our work provides valuable guidance for applying RL to real-world conversational agents.
translated_summary: 对话型购物智能体是以大语言模型（LLM）为核心的面向消费者的重要应用场景，然而如何借助后训练强化学习（RL）有效优化这类智能体仍缺乏深入探索。本文在真实购物流境中研究基于 RL 的优化方法，其中的智能体需同时满足多个相互关联的目标：客观指标（商品准确性）、主观品质（说服力）、结果奖励（最终回复质量）以及过程奖励（工具使用效率）。为应对这一挑战，我们提出了一套完整的解决方案。具体而言，首先构建了 SmartShopBench 基准，该基准通过分层评估将复杂质量需求拆解为可测量的层级，并覆盖多样的购物意图。依托该评估体系，我们进一步设计层次化奖励建模（HRM），以条件门控机制结构化整合多种奖励类型，体现其逻辑依赖关系。为实现高效训练，我们还提出动态对比策略优化（DCPO），根据奖励与推理长度动态选择轨迹，从而在回复质量与操作效率之间取得平衡。大量实验表明，经 RL 训练的智能体 ChatShopBuddy 在稳定性上始终优于依赖通用推理的更大规模模型，而不仅仅是峰值更高。本研究为将 RL 应用于真实场景对话型智能体提供了宝贵的实践指南。

title: Sensitivity-Aware Retrieval-Augmented Intent Clarification
summary: In conversational search systems, a key component is to determine and clarify the intent behind complex queries. We view intent clarification in light of the exploratory search paradigm, where users, through an iterative, evolving process of selection, exploration and retrieval, transform a visceral or conscious need into a formalized one. Augmenting the clarification component with a retrieval step (retrieval-augmented intent clarification) can seriously enhance clarification performance, especially in domains where Large Language Models (LLMs) lack parametric knowledge. However, in more sensitive domains, such as healthcare, government (e.g. FOIA search) or legal contexts, the retrieval database may contain sensitive information that needs protection. In this paper, we explore the research challenge of developing a retrieval-augmented conversational agent that can act as a mediator and gatekeeper for the sensitive collection. To do that, we also need to know what we are protecting and against what. We propose to tackle this research challenge in three steps: 1) define an attack model, 2) design sensitivity-aware defenses on the retrieval level and 3) develop evaluation methods to measure the trade-off between the level of protection and the system's utility.
translated_summary:
在对话式检索系统中，关键任务之一是确定并澄清复杂查询背后的意图。我们把意图澄清置于探索式检索视域之中：用户通过“选择—探索—检索”的迭代演化过程，将一种内在或潜在的信息需求逐步形式化。为澄清环节补充检索步骤（即“检索增强式意图澄清”），可以显著提升澄清效果，尤其是在大型语言模型（LLM）对领域知识覆盖有限的情况下。

然而，在医疗、政府（如《信息自由法》检索）或法律等敏感领域，检索数据库往往包含必须受到保护的涉密信息。本文聚焦于构建一个既能做“中介”又能当“守门人”的检索增强式对话代理，使其在接入敏感馆藏的同时保障信息隐私。为此，我们需要首先弄清楚“我们要保护的是什么，所要防范的威胁是什么”。

本文提出分三步应对上述研究挑战：  
1) 定义威胁模型；  
2) 在检索层设计感知敏感性的防御机制；  
3) 建立评估方法，衡量保护程度与系统效用之间的权衡。

title: Balancing Domestic and Global Perspectives: Evaluating Dual-Calibration and LLM-Generated Nudges for Diverse News Recommendation
summary: In this study, we applied the ``personalized diversity nudge framework'' with the goal of expanding user reading coverage in terms of news locality (i.e., domestic and world news). We designed a novel topic-locality dual calibration algorithmic nudge and a large language model-based news personalization presentation nudge, then launched a 5-week real-user study with 120 U.S. news readers on the news recommendation experiment platform POPROX. With user interaction logs and survey responses, we found that algorithmic nudges can successfully increase exposure and consumption diversity, while the impact of LLM-based presentation nudges varied. User-level topic interest is a strong predictor of user clicks, while highlighting the relevance of news articles to prior read articles outperforms generic topic-based and no personalization. We also demonstrate that longitudinal exposure to calibrated news may shift readers' reading habits to value a balanced news digest from both domestic and world articles. Our results provide direction for future work on nudging for diverse consumption in news recommendation systems.
translated_summary: 本研究采用“个性化多样性助推框架”，力求在新闻地域（即国内与全球新闻）维度上拓展用户的阅读覆盖面。我们提出了一种全新的“主题-地域双校准算法式助推”方法，以及一种基于大语言模型的新闻个性化呈现式助推，随后在新闻推荐实验平台 POPROX 上开展了为期 5 周、含 120 名美国新闻读者的真实用户实验。通过用户交互日志与问卷反馈，我们发现算法式助推能够显著提升用户的曝光与消费多样性；而基于 LLM 的呈现式助推效果存在差异。用户的个体主题兴趣是点击行为的强预测因子，且与过往阅读记录相关的高亮新闻，其效果优于通用主题式和无个性化方式。我们还证实，长期的校准新闻曝光可能促使读者逐渐倾向于兼顾国内外新闻的平衡阅读。研究结果为未来新闻推荐系统中推动多样性消费的干预设计指明方向。

title: The DSA's Blind Spot: Algorithmic Audit of Advertising and Minor Profiling on TikTok
summary: Adolescents spend an increasing amount of their time in digital environments where their still-developing cognitive capacities leave them unable to recognize or resist commercial persuasion. Article 28(2) of the Digital Service Act (DSA) responds to this vulnerability by prohibiting profiling-based advertising to minors. However, the regulation's narrow definition of "advertisement" excludes current advertising practices including influencer marketing and promotional content that serve functionally equivalent commercial purposes. We provide the first empirical evidence of how this definitional gap operates in practice through an algorithmic audit of TikTok. Our approach deploys sock-puppet accounts simulating a pair of minor and adult users with distinct interest profiles. The content recommended to these users is automatically annotated, enabling systematic statistical analysis across four video categories: containing formal, disclosed, undisclosed and none advertisement; as well as advertisement topical relevance to user's interest. Our findings reveal a stark regulatory paradox. TikTok demonstrates formal compliance with Article 28(2) by shielding minors from profiled formal advertisements, yet both disclosed and undisclosed ads exhibit significant profiling aligned with user interests (5-8 times stronger than for adult formal advertising). The strongest profiling emerges within undisclosed commercial content, where brands/creators fail to label promotional content/paid partnership and the platform neither corrects this omission nor prevents its personalized delivery to minors. We argue that protecting minors requires expanding the regulatory definition of advertisement to encompass brand/influencer marketing and extending the Article 28(2) prohibition accordingly, ensuring that commercial content cannot circumvent protections merely by operating outside formal advertising channels.
translated_summary: 青少年越来越多地将时间投入数字环境，而他们的认知能力尚未成熟，难以识别或抵御商业劝服。《数字服务法》（DSA）第28(2)条正是针对这一脆弱性，禁止对未成年人投放基于画像的广告。然而，该条款所采用的“广告”概念过于狭窄，将影响力营销和具有同等商业目的的推广内容排除在外，从而使现行广告实践得以规避监管。本文首次通过算法审计实证揭示这一概念漏洞在实践中的具体表现，研究对象为TikTok。我们采用“sock-puppet”账号，分别模拟未成年人与成年人两种截然不同兴趣画像的用户；系统对其推送内容作自动标注，并就四条视频类别进行统计比较：1) 正式标明广告；2) 已披露广告；3) 未披露广告；4) 无广告，并进一步分析广告主题与用户兴趣的匹配度。结果显示出一个鲜明的监管悖论：TikTok在形式上遵守第28(2)条，不再向未成年人推送画像化的正式广告，但已披露和未披露的广告却呈现出显著基于兴趣的精准投放——其画像强度是成年人正式广告的5-8倍。其中，未披露商业内容的画像力度最强：当品牌或创作者未标注合作推广信息时，平台既不补标，也未阻止该内容向未成年人个性化推送。我们认为，欲真正保护未成年人，必须拓宽监管对“广告”的定义，将品牌与网红营销一并纳入，并将第28(2)条的禁令延伸至这些隐形渠道，确保商业内容无法仅因脱离“正式广告”通道而绕过保护机制。

title: CBR-to-SQL: Rethinking Retrieval-based Text-to-SQL using Case-based Reasoning in the Healthcare Domain
summary: Extracting insights from Electronic Health Record (EHR) databases often requires SQL expertise, creating a barrier for healthcare decision-making and research. While a promising approach is to use Large Language Models (LLMs) to translate natural language questions to SQL via Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), adapting this approach to the medical domain is non-trivial. Standard RAG relies on single-step retrieval from a static pool of examples, which struggles with the variability and noise of medical terminology and jargon. This often leads to anti-patterns such as expanding the task demonstration pool to improve coverage, which in turn introduces noise and scalability problems. To address this, we introduce CBR-to-SQL, a framework inspired by Case-Based Reasoning (CBR). It represents question-SQL pairs as reusable, abstract case templates and utilizes a two-stage retrieval process that first captures logical structure and then resolves relevant entities. Evaluated on MIMICSQL, CBR-to-SQL achieves state-of-the-art logical form accuracy and competitive execution accuracy. More importantly, it demonstrates higher sample efficiency and robustness than standard RAG approaches, particularly under data scarcity and retrieval perturbations.
translated_summary:
从电子健康记录（EHR）数据库中提取洞见往往依赖 SQL 专业技能，这成为医疗决策与研究的一大障碍。虽然利用大型语言模型（LLM）通过检索增强生成（RAG）将自然语言问题转化为 SQL 是一条可行路径，但将该方法适配到医疗领域却远非坦途。传统 RAG 仅基于示例池进行一次式检索，既难应对医疗术语与行话的变异性和噪声，又常常催生反模式：为提升覆盖面不断扩充任务示例池，反而引入噪声并带来可扩展性弊端。

为此，我们提出了 CBR-to-SQL 框架，其思想源于案例推理（CBR）。框架将问题-SQL 对抽象为可复用、可泛化的案例模板，并采用两阶段检索：首先捕获逻辑结构，再解析相关实体。在 MIMIC-SQL 基准上的实验表明，CBR-to-SQL 取得了当前最高的逻辑形式准确率，并在执行准确率上表现优异。最关键的是，它在样本高效性和鲁棒性方面显著超越标准 RAG，尤其在数据稀缺和检索扰动情境下优势更为突出。

title: AutothinkRAG: Complexity-Aware Control of Retrieval-Augmented Reasoning for Image-Text Interaction
summary: Information-intensive Document Question Answering (DocQA) is often constrained by long contexts and information overload, which hinders Vision-Language Models (VLMs) from performing precise direct reasoning. Although multimodal GraphRAG has achieved preliminary breakthroughs, existing frameworks still face dual challenges: (1) the necessity of large-scale models for handling queries of diverse complexities and (2) the inherent reasoning bottlenecks of end-to-end VLMs. To address these issues, we propose AutoThinkRAG, a framework that enhances the understanding of complex documents by synergizing the capabilities of multiple models. Specifically, we introduce a Query Complexity Router to allocate reasoning paths based on the analysis of query difficulty. Furthermore, to overcome the reasoning boundaries of VLM, we propose a functional decoupling architecture: a small-scale VLM serves as a high-fidelity visual interpreter to transform query-relevant visual cues into textual representations, which are subsequently processed by an LLM for logical deduction and synthesis. Extensive experiments on DocBench and MMLongBench demonstrate that AutoThinkRAG significantly reduces inference costs while achieving new state-of-the-art performance. Further ablation studies verifies the effectiveness of our proposed method.
translated_summary: 信息密集型文本文档问答（DocQA）常常因上下文冗长、信息过载而受限，阻碍了视觉-语言模型（VLM）进行精准的直接推理。尽管多模态 GraphRAG 已取得初步突破，现有框架仍面临双重挑战：1）必须以大规模模型承载复杂度各异的查询；2）端到端 VLM 的固有限制导致的推理瓶颈。为此，我们提出 AutoThinkRAG——一个通过整合多种模型能力来深化复杂文档理解的框架。具体而言，我们设计了查询复杂度路由器，依据查询难度分析为推理路径动态分配合适的模型。同时，为突破 VLM 的推理边界，我们引入“功能解耦”架构：小规模 VLM 以高精度视觉释读器身份提取查询相关的视觉信息并转换为文本表征，继而由 LLM 完成逻辑推理与综合。在 DocBench 和 MMLongBench 上的大量实验表明，AutoThinkRAG 显著降低推理成本，并刷新最佳性能。进一步消融研究验证了我们方法的有效性。

title: UIS-Digger: Towards Comprehensive Research Agent Systems for Real-world Unindexed Information Seeking
summary: Recent advancements in LLM-based information-seeking agents have achieved record-breaking performance on established benchmarks. However, these agents remain heavily reliant on search-engine-indexed knowledge, leaving a critical blind spot: Unindexed Information Seeking (UIS). This paper identifies and explores the UIS problem, where vital information is not captured by search engine crawlers, such as overlooked content, dynamic webpages, and embedded files. Despite its significance, UIS remains an underexplored challenge. To address this gap, we introduce UIS-QA, the first dedicated UIS benchmark, comprising 110 expert-annotated QA pairs. Notably, even state-of-the-art agents experience a drastic performance drop on UIS-QA (e.g., from 70.90 on GAIA and 46.70 on BrowseComp-zh to 24.55 on UIS-QA), underscoring the severity of the problem. To mitigate this, we propose UIS-Digger, a novel multi-agent framework that incorporates dual-mode browsing and enables simultaneous webpage searching and file parsing. With a relatively small $\sim$30B-parameter backbone LLM optimized using SFT and RFT training strategies, UIS-Digger sets a strong baseline at 27.27\%, outperforming systems integrating sophisticated LLMs such as O3 and GPT-4.1. This demonstrates the importance of proactive interaction with unindexed sources for effective and comprehensive information-seeking. Our work not only uncovers a fundamental limitation in current agent evaluation paradigms but also provides the first toolkit for advancing UIS research, defining a new and promising direction for robust information-seeking systems.
translated_summary: 基于大语言模型的信息检索智能体近期在权威基准上屡创佳绩，却仍严重依赖搜索引擎索引的知识，导致—未索引信息检索（Unindexed Information Seeking，UIS）—成为致命盲区。本文提出并深入探讨这一盲区：搜索引擎抓取不到的动态网页、被忽视的内容、嵌套文件等，都属于关键却未被充分关注的UIS挑战。为填补空白，我们发布首个专用基准——UIS-QA，含110个人工标注的问答对。令人警醒的是，顶尖智能体在UIS-QA上的得分骤降（GAIA 70.90 分、BrowseComp-zh 46.70 分，落至 24.55 分），凸显问题之严重。为此，我们提出创新多智能体框架 UIS-Digger，具备双模式浏览能力，可同时检索网页与解析文件。实验表明，仅用约300亿参数骨干模型，经 SFT+RFT 训练，UIS-Digger便以 27.27% 的成绩超越集成 O3、GPT-4.1 等大型模型之系统，证明了主动交互非索引源的必要性。我们的研究不仅揭示了现行评估范式的基本面缺陷，更为 UIS 研究提供了首套工具包，为构建强健的信息检索系统指明新方向。

title: Why Large Language Models can Secretly Outperform Embedding Similarity in Information Retrieval
summary: With the emergence of Large Language Models (LLMs), new methods in Information Retrieval are available in which relevance is estimated directly through language understanding and reasoning, instead of embedding similarity. We argue that similarity is a short-sighted interpretation of relevance, and that LLM-Based Relevance Judgment Systems (LLM-RJS) (with reasoning) have potential to outperform Neural Embedding Retrieval Systems (NERS) by overcoming this limitation. Using the TREC-DL 2019 passage retrieval dataset, we compare various LLM-RJS with NERS, but observe no noticeable improvement. Subsequently, we analyze the impact of reasoning by comparing LLM-RJS with and without reasoning. We find that human annotations also suffer from short-sightedness, and that false-positives in the reasoning LLM-RJS are primarily mistakes in annotations due to short-sightedness. We conclude that LLM-RJS do have the ability to address the short-sightedness limitation in NERS, but that this cannot be evaluated with standard annotated relevance datasets.
translated_summary: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）的兴起，信息检索出现了新方法：直接借助语言理解和推理来判断文档相关性，而非传统的嵌入相似度。我们认为，将“相关”简化为“相似”是一种短视的做法；引入推理的 LLM 相关性评估系统（LLM-RJS）有望突破这一局限，从而在性能上超越神经嵌入检索系统（NERS）。然而在 TREC-DL 2019 段落检索基准上，我们对多种 LLM-RJS 与 NERS 进行比对，却未观察到显著优势。进一步分析后，我们将有无推理能力的 LLM-RJS 进行对比，发现人类标注同样存在短视问题；带推理的 LLM-RJS 中出现的大部分“假正例”，实质上是人类短视标注造成的冤假错案。结论指出，LLM-RJS 确实具备纠正 NERS 短视性的潜质，但现有的标准人工标注相关性数据集已无法公允评估这一进步。

title: Structure-Preserving Graph Contrastive Learning for Mathematical Information Retrieval
summary: This paper introduces Variable Substitution as a domain-specific graph augmentation technique for graph contrastive learning (GCL) in the context of searching for mathematical formulas. Standard GCL augmentation techniques often distort the semantic meaning of mathematical formulas, particularly for small and highly structured graphs. Variable Substitution, on the other hand, preserves the core algebraic relationships and formula structure. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our technique, we apply it to a classic GCL-based retrieval model. Experiments show that this straightforward approach significantly improves retrieval performance compared to generic augmentation strategies. We release the code on GitHub.\footnote{https://github.com/lazywulf/formula_ret_aug}.
translated_summary: 本文提出“变量替换”这一面向数学公式搜索场景的特定领域图数据增强技术，用于图对比学习（GCL）。传统 GCL 增强方法常在小规模、高度结构化的数学公式图上破坏其语义。变量替换则能在增强过程保持公式核心代数关系与结构完整。我们将其应用于一种经典 GCL 检索模型并进行实验，结果表明这一简单策略在检索性能上显著优于通用增强方法。相关代码已开源于 GitHub。\footnote{https://github.com/lazywulf/formula_ret_aug}.

title: SynPlanResearch-R1: Encouraging Tool Exploration for Deep Research with Synthetic Plans
summary: Research Agents enable models to gather information from the web using tools to answer user queries, requiring them to dynamically interleave internal reasoning with tool use. While such capabilities can in principle be learned via reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), we observe that agents often exhibit poor exploration behaviors, including premature termination and biased tool usage. As a result, RLVR alone yields limited improvements. We propose SynPlanResearch-R1, a framework that synthesizes tool-use trajectories that encourage deeper exploration to shape exploration during cold-start supervised fine-tuning, providing a strong initialization for subsequent RL. Across seven multi-hop and open-web benchmarks, \framework improves performance by up to 6.0% on Qwen3-8B and 5.8% on Qwen3-4B backbones respectively compared to SOTA baselines. Further analyses of tool-use patterns and training dynamics compared to baselines shed light on the factors underlying these gains. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/HansiZeng/syn-plan-research.
translated_summary:
研究型智能体具备调用工具从网络获取信息、并用其回答用户查询的能力，这要求模型必须能够在内部推理与工具使用之间动态交替执行。尽管这种能力原则上可通过带有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）习得，但我们发现智能体在探索行为上表现不佳，常出现提前终止和工具使用存在偏差等问题，导致仅凭 RLVR 难以带来显著提升。  
为此，我们提出 SynPlanResearch-R1 框架：在冷启动监督式微调阶段合成了具有深层探索倾向的工具使用轨迹，以此引导智能体培养探索能力，为后续 RL 提供强有力的初始化。在七个多跳与开放网络基准上的实验显示，相比当前 SOTA 基线，该框架在 Qwen3-8B 上提升最高达 6.0%，在 Qwen3-4B 上提升最高达 5.8%。进一步对工具使用模式和训练动态与基线的对比分析，揭示了这些性能增益背后的关键因素。  
代码已开源：https://github.com/HansiZeng/syn-plan-research

title: Verifiable Reasoning for LLM-based Generative Recommendation
summary: Reasoning in Large Language Models (LLMs) has recently shown strong potential in enhancing generative recommendation through deep understanding of complex user preference. Existing approaches follow a {reason-then-recommend} paradigm, where LLMs perform step-by-step reasoning before item generation. However, this paradigm inevitably suffers from reasoning degradation (i.e., homogeneous or error-accumulated reasoning) due to the lack of intermediate verification, thus undermining the recommendation. To bridge this gap, we propose a novel \textbf{\textit{reason-verify-recommend}} paradigm, which interleaves reasoning with verification to provide reliable feedback, guiding the reasoning process toward more faithful user preference understanding. To enable effective verification, we establish two key principles for verifier design: 1) reliability ensures accurate evaluation of reasoning correctness and informative guidance generation; and 2) multi-dimensionality emphasizes comprehensive verification across multi-dimensional user preferences. Accordingly, we propose an effective implementation called VRec. It employs a mixture of verifiers to ensure multi-dimensionality, while leveraging a proxy prediction objective to pursue reliability. Experiments on four real-world datasets demonstrate that VRec substantially enhances recommendation effectiveness and scalability without compromising efficiency. The codes can be found at https://github.com/Linxyhaha/Verifiable-Rec.
translated_summary:
大型语言模型（LLM）的推理能力在生成式推荐中因对用户偏好的深入理解而展现出巨大潜力。现有方法遵循“先推理，再推荐”的范式，即先让LLM逐步生成推理，再产出推荐项目。然而，该范式因缺乏对中间推理的验证，不可避免地导致推理质量退化（如出现同质化或误差累积等），最终削弱推荐性能。针对这一局限，我们提出全新的“推理–验证–推荐”范式，通过在推理过程中插入验证环节，为推理提供可信反馈，从而引导模型更准确、全面地理解用户真实偏好。  

为实现有效验证，我们为验证器设计确立两条核心原则：  
1) **可靠性**：准确评估推理正确性，并生成富含信息的指导；  
2) **多维度**：对用户偏好的多个维度进行全面的验证。  

基于此，我们提出具体框架 VRec——通过验证器混合模型实现多维度验证，并借助代理预测目标确保验证可靠性。四个真实数据集的实验表明，VRec 在显著提升推荐效果与可扩展性的同时，未牺牲效率。代码开源：https://github.com/Linxyhaha/Verifiable-Rec

title: Deep Research for Recommender Systems
summary: The technical foundations of recommender systems have progressed from collaborative filtering to complex neural models and, more recently, large language models. Despite these technological advances, deployed systems often underserve their users by simply presenting a list of items, leaving the burden of exploration, comparison, and synthesis entirely on the user. This paper argues that this traditional "tool-based" paradigm fundamentally limits user experience, as the system acts as a passive filter rather than an active assistant. To address this limitation, we propose a novel deep research paradigm for recommendation, which replaces conventional item lists with comprehensive, user-centric reports. We instantiate this paradigm through RecPilot, a multi-agent framework comprising two core components: a user trajectory simulation agent that autonomously explores the item space, and a self-evolving report generation agent that synthesizes the findings into a coherent, interpretable report tailored to support user decisions. This approach reframes recommendation as a proactive, agent-driven service. Extensive experiments on public datasets demonstrate that RecPilot not only achieves strong performance in modeling user behaviors but also generates highly persuasive reports that substantially reduce user effort in item evaluation, validating the potential of this new interaction paradigm.
translated_summary: 推荐系统的技术基础已从早期的协同过滤演进至复杂的神经模型，再到最新的大语言模型。然而，尽管技术日新月异，实际部署的系统仍常常“亏欠”用户——它们往往只呈现一份简单的物品列表，将探索、比较与归纳的重担全部推给用户。本文指出，这种传统的“工具论”范式本质上限制了用户体验，因为系统只是一部被动过滤器，而非主动助手。为解决这一局限，我们提出一种全新的“深度研究式”推荐范式：以全面、以用户为中心的研究报告取代现有的物品列表。我们通过 RecPilot 实现该范式——一个多智能体框架，由两大核心组件构成：一是用户轨迹模拟智能体，自主探索整个物品空间；二是自进化的报告生成智能体，将探索结果综合成连贯、可解释且面向用户决策的研究报告。该方法将推荐重新界定为一项由代理主动驱动的服务。在公开数据集上的大量实验表明，RecPilot 不仅在建模用户行为方面表现优异，还能生成极具说服力的报告，显著降低用户在物品评估中的心智负荷，从而验证了这一全新交互范式的巨大潜力。

title: GP-Tree: An in-memory spatial index combining adaptive grid cells with a prefix tree for efficient spatial querying
summary: Efficient spatial indexing is crucial for processing large-scale spatial data. Traditional spatial indexes, such as STR-Tree and Quad-Tree, organize spatial objects based on coarse approximations, such as their minimum bounding rectangles (MBRs). However, this coarse representation is inadequate for complex spatial objects (e.g., district boundaries and trajectories), limiting filtering accuracy and query performance of spatial indexes. To address these limitations, we propose GP-Tree, a fine-grained spatial index that organizes approximated grid cells of spatial objects into a prefix tree structure. GP-Tree enhances filtering ability by replacing coarse MBRs with fine-grained cell-based approximations of spatial objects. The prefix tree structure optimizes data organization and query efficiency by leveraging the shared prefixes in the hierarchical grid cell encodings between parent and child cells. Additionally, we introduce optimization strategies, including tree pruning and node optimization, to reduce search paths and memory consumption, further enhancing GP-Tree's performance. Finally, we implement a variety of spatial query operations on GP-Tree, including range queries, distance queries, and k-nearest neighbor queries. Extensive experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that GP-Tree significantly outperforms traditional spatial indexes, achieving up to an order-of-magnitude improvement in query efficiency.
translated_summary: 高效的空间索引是处理大规模空间数据的关键。传统空间索引（如 STR-Tree、Quad-Tree）依赖于用最小外接矩形（MBR）等粗粒度近似来组织空间对象，但面对复杂空间对象（如行政区划边界或轨迹线）时，这种粗略表达既影响筛选精度，也限制了索引的查询性能。为此，我们提出 GP-Tree：一种细粒度空间索引，它将空间对象的网格近似单元组织成前缀树。通过用细粒度的单元级近似取代粗粒度 MBR，GP-Tree 大幅提升了过滤能力；前缀树结构则利用父子网格单元在层次编码中的公共前缀，优化了数据组织与查询效率。此外，我们设计了树剪枝和节点优化策略，以进一步缩减搜索路径、降低内存消耗。我们在 GP-Tree 上实现了范围查询、距离查询和 k 近邻查询等多种操作，并在真实数据集上进行了大量实验。结果显示，GP-Tree 相对传统空间索引可获得最高一个数量级的查询效率提升。

title: SeDa: A Unified System for Dataset Discovery and Multi-Entity Augmented Semantic Exploration
summary: The continuous expansion of open data platforms and research repositories has led to a fragmented dataset ecosystem, posing significant challenges for cross-source data discovery and interpretation. To address these challenges, we introduce SeDa--a unified framework for dataset discovery, semantic annotation, and multi-entity augmented navigation. SeDa integrates more than 7.6 million datasets from over 200 platforms, spanning governmental, academic, and industrial domains. The framework first performs semantic extraction and standardization to harmonize heterogeneous metadata representations. On this basis, a topic-tagging mechanism constructs an extensible tag graph that supports thematic retrieval and cross-domain association, while a provenance assurance module embedded within the annotation process continuously validates dataset sources and monitors link availability to ensure reliability and traceability. Furthermore, SeDa employs a multi-entity augmented navigation strategy that organizes datasets within a knowledge space of sites, institutions, and enterprises, enabling contextual and provenance-aware exploration beyond traditional search paradigms. Comparative experiments with popular dataset search platforms, such as ChatPD and Google Dataset Search, demonstrate that SeDa achieves superior coverage, timeliness, and traceability. Taken together, SeDa establishes a foundation for trustworthy, semantically enriched, and globally scalable dataset exploration.
translated_summary: 随着开放数据平台与研究资料库的持续增长，整个数据集生态系统日益碎片化，给跨源数据的发现与理解带来了巨大挑战。为此，我们提出了 SeDa——一个集数据集发现、语义注释与多实体增强导航于一体的统一框架。SeDa 已从 200 余个平台整合超过 760 万个数据集，覆盖政府、学术与工业三大领域。框架首先执行语义抽取与标准化，以统一各种异构元数据表示；继而通过主题标签机制构建可扩展的标签图谱，支持主题检索与跨域关联。同时，注释流程中嵌入的来源保障模块可持续验证数据集来源并监控链接可达性，确保信息的可靠性与可追溯性。此外，SeDa 创新性地采用多实体增强导航策略，将数据集置于由站点、机构与企业构成的知识空间中进行组织，从而突破传统搜索范式，实现面向上下文与来源的探究。与 ChatPD、Google Dataset Search 等主流数据集搜索平台的对比实验显示，SeDa 在覆盖度、时效性与可追溯性方面均显著优于现有系统。综上，SeDa 为全球范围可信、语义丰富且可扩展的数据集探索奠定了坚实基础。

title: Dial: A Knowledge-Grounded Dialect-Specific NL2SQL System
summary:
Enterprises commonly deploy heterogeneous database systems, each of which owns a distinct SQL dialect with different syntax rules, built-in functions, and execution constraints. However, most existing NL2SQL methods assume a single dialect (e.g., SQLite) and struggle to produce queries that are both semantically correct and executable on target engines. Prompt-based approaches tightly couple intent reasoning with dialect syntax, rule-based translators often degrade native operators into generic constructs, and multi-dialect fine-tuning suffers from cross-dialect interference.
  In this paper, we present Dial, a knowledge-grounded framework for dialect-specific NL2SQL. Dial introduces: (1) a Dialect-Aware Logical Query Planning module that converts natural language into a dialect-aware logical query plan via operator-level intent decomposition and divergence-aware specification; (2) HINT-KB, a hierarchical intent-aware knowledge base that organizes dialect knowledge into (i) a canonical syntax reference, (ii) a declarative function repository, and (iii) a procedural constraint repository; and (3) an execution-driven debugging and semantic verification loop that separates syntactic recovery from logic auditing to prevent semantic drift. We construct DS-NL2SQL, a benchmark covering six major database systems with 2,218 dialect-specific test cases. Experimental results show that Dial consistently improves translation accuracy by 10.25% and dialect feature coverage by 15.77% over state-of-the-art baselines. The code is at https://github.com/weAIDB/Dial.
translated_summary:
企业通常部署异构数据库系统，每种数据库都使用不同的 SQL 方言，其语法规则、内置函数和执行约束各不相同。然而，现有的 NL2SQL（自然语言转 SQL）方法大多假设仅有单一方言（如 SQLite），难以同时兼顾查询的语义正确性与在目标引擎上的可执行性。基于提示的方法把意图推理与方言语法紧耦合；规则驱动的翻译器常把原生算子降级为通用构造；多方言微调则受跨方言干扰所困。本文提出 Dial——一个面向方言的知识驱动 NL2SQL 框架，包含：  
(1) 方言感知逻辑查询规划模块（DALQP），通过算子级意图分解及差异感知规范，将自然语言转换为方言感知的逻辑查询计划；  
(2) HINT-KB，一个分层意图感知知识库，将方言知识组织成 (i) 规范语法参考、(ii) 声明式函数库、(iii) 过程式约束库；  
(3) 执行驱动的调试与语义验证循环，引入句法恢复与逻辑审计相分离，以防语义漂移。  
我们构建了覆盖六大主流数据库、共 2,218 条方言专用测试案例的新基准 DS-NL2SQL。实验表明，Dial 相较最强基线平均提升翻译准确率 10.25%、方言特性覆盖率 15.77%。代码开源：https://github.com/weAIDB/Dial

title: SoK: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG): Taxonomy, Architectures, Evaluation, and Research Directions
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are increasingly evolving into agentic architectures where large language models autonomously coordinate multi-step reasoning, dynamic memory management, and iterative retrieval strategies. Despite rapid industrial adoption, current research lacks a systematic understanding of Agentic RAG as a sequential decision-making system, leading to highly fragmented architectures, inconsistent evaluation methodologies, and unresolved reliability risks. This Systematization of Knowledge (SoK) paper provides the first unified framework for understanding these autonomous systems. We formalize agentic retrieval-generation loops as finite-horizon partially observable Markov decision processes, explicitly modeling their control policies and state transitions. Building upon this formalization, we develop a comprehensive taxonomy and modular architectural decomposition that categorizes systems by their planning mechanisms, retrieval orchestration, memory paradigms, and tool-invocation behaviors. We further analyze the critical limitations of traditional static evaluation practices and identify severe systemic risks inherent to autonomous loops, including compounding hallucination propagation, memory poisoning, retrieval misalignment, and cascading tool-execution vulnerabilities. Finally, we outline key doctoral-scale research directions spanning stable adaptive retrieval, cost-aware orchestration, formal trajectory evaluation, and oversight mechanisms, providing a definitive roadmap for building reliable, controllable, and scalable agentic retrieval systems.
translated_summary:
检索增强生成（RAG）系统正迅速演变为一种“智能体”（agentic）结构：大型语言模型可自主协调多步推理、动态记忆管理和迭代式检索策略。尽管业界部署如火如荼，现有研究却缺少对 Agentic RAG 作为顺序决策系统的系统性理解，导致架构割裂、评估方法不一致、可靠性隐患悬而未决。本文是一篇系统化知识（SoK）论文，首次为理解这类自主系统提供统一框架。

我们提出：将“智能体检索–生成循环”形式化为有限时段、部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），显式建模其控制策略与状态转移。在此基础上，构建一套全面分类法与模块化架构分解体系，对系统的规划机制、检索编排、记忆范式及工具调用行为进行系统归类。

我们进一步剖析传统“静态”评估实践的关键局限，并揭示自主循环带来的系统性风险：累积幻觉传播、记忆污染、检索失配及级联式工具执行漏洞等。最后，我们提出面向博士层级的核心研究方向，包括稳健自适应检索、成本感知编排、轨迹形式化评估及 oversight（可监管）机制，为构建可靠、可控、可扩展的智能体检索系统提供明确路线图。

title: Do Deployment Constraints Make LLMs Hallucinate Citations? An Empirical Study across Four Models and Five Prompting Regimes
summary: LLMs are increasingly used to draft academic text and to support software engineering (SE) evidence synthesis, but they often hallucinate bibliographic references that look legitimate. We study how deployment-motivated prompting constraints affect citation verifiability in a closed-book setting. Using 144 claims (24 in SE&CS) and a deterministic verification pipeline (Crossref + Semantic Scholar), we evaluate two proprietary models (Claude Sonnet, GPT-4o) and two open-weight models (LLaMA~3.1-8B, Qwen~2.5-14B) across five regimes: Baseline, Temporal (publication-year window), Survey-style breadth, Non-Disclosure policy, and their combination. Across 17,443 generated citations, no model exceeds a citation-level existence rate of 0.475; Temporal and Combo conditions produce the steepest drops while outputs remain format-compliant (well-formed bibliographic fields). Unresolved outcomes dominate (36-61%); a 100-citation audit indicates that a substantial fraction of Unresolved cases are fabricated. Results motivate post-hoc citation verification before LLM outputs enter SE literature reviews or tooling pipelines.
translated_summary: 尽管大型语言模型（LLM）越来越多地被用于起草学术论文并支撑软件工程（SE）的证据综合，但它们常会臆造看似可信的参考文献。我们研究了面向实际部署的提示约束——尤其是不允许联网的闭卷环境——如何影响引用的可验证性。依托 144 条科研声明（其中 24 条来自 SE 与计算机科学），并借助一条基于 Crossref 与 Semantic Scholar 的确定性验证管线，我们评估了两款闭源模型（Claude Sonnet、GPT-4o）与两款开源权重模型（LLaMA 3.1-8B、Qwen 2.5-14B）在五种工况下的表现：基线、时限（限定发表年份窗口）、综述导向的广度、非公开政策，以及这些约束的组合。在 17,443 条生成的引用中，没有任何模型的“确实存在率”（真引/总引）超过 0.475；时限与组合工况导致明显下降，但输出格式依旧合规（参考文献元数据完整）。未解析结果（无法确认存在与否）在 36–61% 之间分布；对 100 条未解析引用的抽检显示，其中相当大一部分为虚构。研究结果强调，所有 LLM 输出在进入 SE 文献综述或工具链之前，都必须经过事后验证。

title: AutoDataset: A Lightweight System for Continuous Dataset Discovery and Search
summary: The continuous expansion of task-specific datasets has become a major driver of progress in machine learning. However, discovering newly released datasets remains difficult, as existing platforms largely depend on manual curation or community submissions, leading to limited coverage and substantial delays. To address this challenge, we introduce AutoDataset, a lightweight, automated system for real-time dataset discovery and retrieval. AutoDataset adopts a paper-first approach by continuously monitoring arXiv to detect and index datasets directly from newly published research. The system operates through a low-overhead multi-stage pipeline. First, a lightweight classifier rapidly filters titles and abstracts to identify papers releasing datasets, achieving an F1 score of 0.94 with an inference latency of 11 ms. For identified papers, we parse PDFs with GROBID and apply a sentence-level extractor to extract dataset descriptions. Dataset URLs are extracted from the paper text with an automated fallback to LaTeX source analysis when needed. Finally, the structured records are indexed using a dense semantic retriever, enabling low-latency natural language search. We deploy AutoDataset as a live system that continuously ingests new papers and provides up-to-date dataset discovery. In practice, it has been shown to significantly reduce the time required for researchers to locate newly released datasets, improving dataset discovery efficiency by up to 80%.
translated_summary:
任务特定数据集的持续扩展已成为推动机器学习进步的主要动力。然而，新发布数据集的获取依旧困难，现有平台大多依赖人工整理或社区提交，导致覆盖面有限且存在明显延迟。为应对这一挑战，我们推出了 AutoDataset——一个轻量级、自动化的实时数据集发现与检索系统。AutoDataset 采用“论文优先”策略，持续监测 arXiv，并从最新发表的研究中自动检测并索引数据集。

系统通过一个低开销的多阶段流水线运作：首先，轻量级分类器在 11 毫秒内对标题和摘要进行快速筛选，定位发布数据集的文章，F1 值达到 0.94。对于命中文章，我们使用 GROBID 解析 PDF，并基于句子级抽取器提取数据集描述；若文本中找不到 URL，则自动回溯 LaTeX 源码以补全。最终，结构化的数据集记录通过稠密语义检索器建立索引，支持低延迟的自然语言查询。

目前，AutoDataset 已作为实时系统部署，持续吸纳最新论文并提供最新的数据集发现服务。实践证明，它能将研究人员定位新数据集的时间缩短多达 80%，显著提升数据集发现的效率。

title: Rethinking Deep Research from the Perspective of Web Content Distribution Matching
summary: Despite the integration of search tools, Deep Search Agents often suffer from a misalignment between reasoning-driven queries and the underlying web indexing structures. Existing frameworks treat the search engine as a static utility, leading to queries that are either too coarse or too granular to retrieve precise evidence. We propose WeDas, a Web Content Distribution Aware framework that incorporates search-space structural characteristics into the agent's observation space. Central to our method is the Query-Result Alignment Score, a metric quantifying the compatibility between agent intent and retrieval outcomes. To overcome the intractability of indexing the dynamic web, we introduce a few-shot probing mechanism that iteratively estimates this score via limited query accesses, allowing the agent to dynamically recalibrate sub-goals based on the local content landscape. As a plug-and-play module, WeDas consistently improves sub-goal completion and accuracy across four benchmarks, effectively bridging the gap between high-level reasoning and low-level retrieval.
translated_summary: 尽管已集成搜索工具，深度搜索Agent仍常因推理派生查询与底层网页索引结构之间的错位而效果受限。现有框架将搜索引擎视为静态工具，导致查询要么过于粗糙，要么过于精细，难以获得精准证据。我们提出WeDas——一种“网页内容分布感知”框架，将搜索空间的结构特征嵌入Agent的观测空间。其核心为查询-结果对齐分数（Query-Result Alignment Score），用于量化用户意图与检索结果之间的匹配程度。针对动态网页难以完整索引的问题，我们设计了一种基于少量示例的探测机制，通过有限的查询访问来迭代估计该分数；Agent可依此在局部内容景观中动态重校准子目标。作为即插即用模块，WeDas在四项基准测试上持续提升子目标完成率和检索精确性，有效弥合了高层次推理与底层检索之间的鸿沟。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Predicting Cellular Responses to Gene Perturbation
summary: Predicting how cells respond to genetic perturbations is fundamental to understanding gene function, disease mechanisms, and therapeutic development. While recent deep learning approaches have shown promise in modeling single-cell perturbation responses, they struggle to generalize across cell types and perturbation contexts due to limited contextual information during generation. We introduce PT-RAG (Perturbation-aware Two-stage Retrieval-Augmented Generation), a novel framework that extends Retrieval-Augmented Generation beyond traditional language-model applications to cellular biology. Unlike standard RAG systems designed for text retrieval with pre-trained LLMs, perturbation retrieval lacks established similarity metrics and requires learning what constitutes relevant context, making differentiable retrieval essential. PT-RAG addresses this through a two-stage pipeline: first, retrieving candidate perturbations $K$ using GenePT embeddings, then adaptively refining the selection through Gumbel-Softmax discrete sampling conditioned on both the cell state and the input perturbation. This cell-type-aware differentiable retrieval enables end-to-end optimization of the retrieval objective jointly with generation. On the Replogle-Nadig single-gene perturbation dataset, we demonstrate that PT-RAG outperforms both STATE and vanilla RAG under identical experimental conditions, with the strongest gains in distributional similarity metrics ($W_1$, $W_2$). Notably, vanilla RAG's dramatic failure is itself a key finding: it demonstrates that differentiable, cell-type-aware retrieval is essential in this domain, and that naive retrieval can actively harm performance. Our results establish retrieval-augmented generation as a promising paradigm for modelling cellular responses to gene perturbation. The code to reproduce our experiments is available at https://github.com/difra100/PT-RAG_ICLR.
translated_summary: 预测细胞对基因扰动的反应对于理解基因功能、阐明疾病机制以及开发疗法至关重要。尽管最新的深度学习方法在建模单细胞干扰反应方面显示出潜力，但由于生成阶段缺乏足够的上下文信息，它们难以在不同细胞类型和扰动场景中泛化。我们提出了 PT-RAG（Perturbation-aware Two-stage Retrieval-Augmented Generation），首次将检索增强生成从自然语言任务扩展到细胞生物学领域。与传统借助预训练大语言模型进行文本检索的 RAG 不同，扰动检索尚未建立有效的相似度度量，且需要学习什么构成“相关上下文”，因而可微分检索成为必需。PT-RAG 采用两阶段流程：首先利用 GenePT 嵌入检索候选扰动集合 $K$；随后，在细胞状态和输入扰动的条件下，通过 Gumbel-Softmax 离散采样自适应地精炼检索结果。这种兼顾细胞类型信息的可微分检索使得检索目标可以与生成模型端到端联合优化。在 Replogle-Nadig 单基因扰动数据集上，PT-RAG 在相同实验配置下显著优于 STATE 和原始 RAG，其中分布相似度指标 ($W_1$，$W_2$) 的提升最为明显。值得注意的是，原始 RAG 的失效本身就是一项关键发现：它揭示了本领域对可微分、细胞类型感知检索的绝对依赖，并表明简单检索反而会损害性能。我们的结果确立了检索增强生成作为建模细胞基因扰动响应的新范式。实验复现代码已开源：https://github.com/difra100/PT-RAG_ICLR

title: Detecting Cryptographically Relevant Software Packages with Collaborative LLMs
summary: IT systems are facing an increasing number of security threats, including advanced persistent attacks and future quantum-computing vulnerabilities. The move towards crypto-agility and post-quantum cryptography (PQC) requires a reliable inventory of cryptographic assets across heterogeneous IT environments. Due to the sheer amount of packets, it is infeasible to manually detect cryptographically relevant software. Further, static code analysis pipelines often fail to address the diversity of modern ecosystems. Our research explores the use of large language models (LLMs) as heuristic tools for cryptographic asset discovery. We propose a collaborative framework that employs multiple LLMs to assess software relevance and aggregates their outputs through majority voting. To preserve data privacy, the approach operates on-premises without reliance on external servers. Using over 65,000 Fedora Linux packages, we evaluate the reliability of this method through statistical analysis, inter-model agreement, and manual validation. Preliminary results suggest that~LLM ensembles can serve as an efficient first-pass filter for identifying cryptographic software, resulting in reduced manual workload and assisting PQC transition. The study also compares on-premises and online LLM configurations, highlighting key advantages, limitations, and future directions for automated cryptographic asset discovery.
translated_summary: 随着 IT 系统日益面临高级持续威胁及未来量子计算漏洞等安全挑战，向加密敏捷（crypto-agility）和后量子密码（PQC）迁移需对异构 IT 环境中的密码资产建立可靠清单。鉴于数据包规模庞大，人工识别与密码相关的软件已不现实；同时，静态代码分析流水线往往难以覆盖现代生态的多样性。本研究探索将大语言模型（LLM）作为启发式工具用于密码资产发现。我们提出一种协作框架，利用多套 LLM 评估软件的相关性，并通过多数投票机制聚合结果。为保护数据隐私，整套方法在本地部署，无需依赖外部服务器。借助 6.5 万余个 Fedora Linux 软件包，我们从统计可靠性、模型间一致性以及人工复核三方面评估该方法。初步结果表明，LLM 集成可作为识别密码软件的有效“首轮筛选”，显著减少人力成本，并为 PQC 过渡提供支持。研究还比较了本地与在线 LLM 配置，阐明了其各自优势、局限及未来自动化密码资产发现的发展方向。

title: Retrieving Minimal and Sufficient Reasoning Subgraphs with Graph Foundation Models for Path-aware GraphRAG
summary: Graph-based retrieval-augmented generation (GraphRAG) exploits structured knowledge to support knowledge-intensive reasoning. However, most existing methods treat graphs as intermediate artifacts, and the few subgraph-based retrieval methods depend on heuristic rules coupled with domain-specific distributions. They fail in typical cold-start scenarios where data in target domains is scarce, thus yielding reasoning contexts that are either informationally incomplete or structurally redundant. In this work, we revisit retrieval from a structural perspective, and propose GFM-Retriever that directly responds to user queries with a subgraph, where a pre-trained Graph Foundation Model acts as a cross-domain Retriever for multi-hop path-aware reasoning. Building on this perspective, we repurpose a pre-trained GFM from an entity ranking function into a generalized retriever to support cross-domain retrieval. On top of the retrieved graph, we further derive a label-free subgraph selector optimized by a principled Information Bottleneck objective to identify the query-conditioned subgraph, which contains informationally sufficient and structurally minimal golden evidence in a self-contained "core set". To connect structure with generation, we explicitly extract and reorganize relational paths as in-context prompts, enabling interpretable reasoning. Extensive experiments on multi-hop question answering benchmarks demonstrate that GFM-Retriever achieves state-of-the-art performance in both retrieval quality and answer generation, while maintaining efficiency.
translated_summary: 图增强检索生成（GraphRAG）通过结构化知识支持知识密集型推理。然而，现有方法大多只是把图作为中间产物使用，少数基于子图的检索方法又依赖启发式规则与领域特定分布，在数据稀缺的目标领域往往无法适应，导致推理上下文或信息不足，或结构冗余。本文从结构视角重新审视检索任务，提出 GFM-Retriever：利用预训练图基础模型作为跨域检索器，直接输出对应用户查询的子图，实现多跳路径感知推理。基于此思路，我们将原本用于实体排序的预训练图模型改造成通用检索器以完成跨域检索；进一步在检索所得图上设计无需标签的子图选择器，通过信息瓶颈原则优化，只保留对查询而言最充分且结构最简的“核心子图”作为自洽证据。为使结构与生成紧密耦合，我们显式抽取并重排关系路径作为上下文提示，推理过程可解释。在多跳问答基准上的广泛实验表明，GFM-Retriever 在检索质量与答案生成上均达到 SOTA，同时保持高效。

title: Fine-Grained Table Retrieval Through the Lens of Complex Queries
summary: Enabling question answering over tables and databases in natural language has become a key capability in the democratization of insights from tabular data sources. These systems first require retrieval of data that is relevant to a given natural language query, for which several methods have been introduced. In this work we present and study a table retrieval mechanism devising fine-grained typed query decomposition and global connectivity-awareness (DCTR), to handle the challenges induced by open-domain question answering over relational databases in complex usage contexts. We evaluate the effectiveness of the two mechanisms through the lens of retrieval complexity which we measure along the axes of query- and data complexity. Our analyses over industry-aligned benchmarks illustrate the robustness of DCTR for highly composite queries and densely connected databases.
translated_summary: 实现以自然语言对表格和数据库进行问答，已成为推动表格数据源洞察民主化的核心能力。此类系统首先需检索与给定自然语言查询相关的数据，目前已提出多种方法。本文提出并研究一种新型表格检索机制——DCTR，该机制通过细粒度类型化查询分解及全局连接感知设计，旨在应对复杂使用场景中关系型数据库开放领域问答带来的挑战。我们从检索复杂性的视角评估这两种机制的有效性，检索复杂性分别沿查询复杂性和数据复杂性两个维度衡量。针对产业对齐基准的实验分析表明，DCTR在处理高度复合查询及稠密连接数据库方面具有显著鲁棒性。

title: Efficient Personalized Reranking with Semi-Autoregressive Generation and Online Knowledge Distillation
summary: Generative models offer a promising paradigm for the final stage reranking in multi-stage recommender systems, with the ability to capture inter-item dependencies within reranked lists. However, their practical deployment still faces two key challenges: (1) an inherent conflict between achieving high generation quality and ensuring low-latency inference, making it difficult to balance the two, and (2) insufficient interaction between user and item features in existing methods. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Personalized Semi-Autoregressive with online knowledge Distillation (PSAD) framework for reranking. In this framework, the teacher model adopts a semi-autoregressive generator to balance generation quality and efficiency, while its ranking knowledge is distilled online into a lightweight scoring network during joint training, enabling real-time and efficient inference. Furthermore, we propose a User Profile Network (UPN) that injects user intent and models interest dynamics, enabling deeper interactions between users and items. Extensive experiments conducted on three large-scale public datasets demonstrate that PSAD significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both ranking performance and inference efficiency.
translated_summary: 生成式模型在多阶段推荐系统的最终重排序阶段展现出良好的前景，能够捕获待重排序列表中的项目间依赖关系。然而，其实际部署仍面临两大关键挑战：（1）高生成质量与低延迟推断之间存在固有冲突，难以兼顾；（2）现有方法对用户特征与物品特征的交互建模不足。为解决上述问题，本文提出一种新颖的个性化半自回归在线知识蒸馏（Personalized Semi-Autoregressive with online knowledge Distillation，PSAD）重排序框架。该框架中，教师模型采用半自回归生成器以平衡生成质量与效率，并通过在线联合训练将排序知识蒸馏至轻量级打分网络，实现实时、高效的推断。此外，我们设计了用户画像网络（User Profile Network，UPN），通过注入用户意图并建模兴趣动态，实现用户与物品特征间更深层次的交互。在三个大规模公开数据集上的大量实验表明，PSAD在排名性能与推断效率两方面均显著优于现有最优基线方法。

title: Multi-TAP: Multi-criteria Target Adaptive Persona Modeling for Cross-Domain Recommendation
summary: Cross-domain recommendation (CDR) aims to alleviate data sparsity by transferring knowledge across domains, yet existing methods primarily rely on coarse-grained behavioral signals and often overlook intra-domain heterogeneity in user preferences. We propose Multi-TAP, a multi-criteria target-adaptive persona framework that explicitly captures such heterogeneity through semantic persona modeling. To enable effective transfer, Multi-TAP selectively incorporates source-domain signals conditioned on the target domain, preserving relevance during knowledge transfer. Experiments on real-world datasets demonstrate that Multi-TAP consistently outperforms state-of-the-art CDR methods, highlighting the importance of modeling intra-domain heterogeneity for robust cross-domain recommendation. The codebase of Multi-TAP is currently available at https://github.com/archivehee/Multi-TAP.
translated_summary: 跨域推荐（CDR）旨在通过跨领域知识迁移来缓解数据稀疏问题，然而现有方法主要依赖粗粒度的行为信号，往往忽视用户偏好内在域内的异质性。我们提出 Multi-TAP——一种多准则、目标自适应的 persona 框架，该框架通过语义化的 persona 建模显式捕捉这种域内异质性。为实现有效迁移，Multi-TAP 依据目标域有针对性地选择融合源域信号，从而在知识迁移过程中保持相关性。在真实数据集上的实验表明，Multi-TAP 一致性地优于当前最先进的 CDR 方法，凸显建模域内异质性对于强健跨域推荐的重要性。Multi-TAP 的代码已开源：https://github.com/archivehee/Multi-TAP。

title: Leveraging Large Language Models for Automated Scalable Development of Open Scientific Databases
summary: With the exponential increase in online scientific literature, identifying reliable domain-specific data has become increasingly important but also very challenging. Manual data collection and filtering for domain-specific scientific literature is not only time-consuming but also labor-intensive and prone to errors and inconsistencies. To facilitate automated data collection, the paper introduces a web-based tool that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) for automated and scalable development of open scientific databases. More specifically, the tool is based on an automated and unified framework that combines keyword-based querying, API-enabled data retrieval, and LLM-powered text classification to construct domain-specific scientific databases. Data is collected from multiple reliable data sources and search engines using a parallel querying technique to construct a combined unified dataset. The dataset is subsequently filtered using LLMs queried with prompts tailored for each keyword-based query to extract the relevant data to a scientific query of interest. The approach was tested across a set of variable keyword-based searches for different domain-specific tasks related to agriculture and crop yield. The results and analysis show 90\% overlap with small domain expert-curated databases, suggesting that the proposed tool can be used to significantly reduce manual workload. Furthermore, the proposed framework is both scalable and domain-agnostic and can be applied across diverse fields for building scalable open scientific databases.
translated_summary: 随着在线科学文献量呈指数级增长，辨识可靠的领域特定数据愈发关键却也极具挑战。传统手动的采集与筛选不仅耗时费力，还易出错且前后不一致。为实现数据获取的自动化，本文提出了一款基于网络的工具，依托大语言模型（LLM）自动且可扩展地构建开放科学数据库。该工具采用一套自动化统一框架，将关键词查询、API 数据获取与 LLM 文本分类融为一体：首先并行向多个可信数据源和搜索引擎发起查询，汇整合并数据；随后针对每个关键词查询定制提示语，调用 LLM 筛选并最终提取与特定科学问题相关的核心条目。作者以农业和作物产量相关的多项领域任务为例，测试了不同关键词组合，结果与由领域专家手动构建的小型数据库达到 90% 的重叠率，显著减少人工工作量。此外，该框架具有良好扩展性且与领域无关，可广泛应用于各学科，构建可扩展的开放科学数据库。

title: A Voronoi Cell Formulation for Principled Token Pruning in Late-Interaction Retrieval Models
summary: Late-interaction models like ColBERT offer a competitive performance across various retrieval tasks, but require storing a dense embedding for each document token, leading to a substantial index storage overhead. Past works address this by attempting to prune low-importance token embeddings based on statistical and empirical measures, but they often either lack formal grounding or are ineffective. To address these shortcomings, we introduce a framework grounded in hyperspace geometry and cast token pruning as a Voronoi cell estimation problem in the embedding space. By interpreting each token's influence as a measure of its Voronoi region, our approach enables principled pruning that retains retrieval quality while reducing index size. Through our experiments, we demonstrate that this approach serves not only as a competitive pruning strategy but also as a valuable tool for improving and interpreting token-level behavior within dense retrieval systems.
translated_summary: 尽管 ColBERT 等后期交互模型在各种检索任务中表现优异，但它们需要为文档中的每个词元存储一个稠密向量，导致索引体积极为庞大。以往研究试图通过统计或经验手段删减“重要性低”的词元向量来缓解这一问题，但其方法要么缺乏严谨的理论支撑，要么效果不佳。为解决这些缺陷，我们提出一个立足于高维空间几何的新框架，将词元剪枝形式化为嵌入空间中的 Voronoi 单元估计问题。通过把词元的影响力解释为对应 Voronoi 区域的大小，我们的方法能够在保持检索性能的同时，以理论驱动的方式削减索引规模。实验表明，该策略不仅是一种具有竞争力的剪枝方案，还能帮助提升并解释稠密检索系统中词元级的行为。

title: Fine-grained Motion Retrieval via Joint-Angle Motion Images and Token-Patch Late Interaction
summary: Text-motion retrieval aims to learn a semantically aligned latent space between natural language descriptions and 3D human motion skeleton sequences, enabling bidirectional search across the two modalities. Most existing methods use a dual-encoder framework that compresses motion and text into global embeddings, discarding fine-grained local correspondences, and thus reducing accuracy. Additionally, these global-embedding methods offer limited interpretability of the retrieval results. To overcome these limitations, we propose an interpretable, joint-angle-based motion representation that maps joint-level local features into a structured pseudo-image, compatible with pre-trained Vision Transformers. For text-to-motion retrieval, we employ MaxSim, a token-wise late interaction mechanism, and enhance it with Masked Language Modeling regularization to foster robust, interpretable text-motion alignment. Extensive experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art text-motion retrieval approaches while offering interpretable fine-grained correspondences between text and motion. The code is available in the supplementary material.
translated_summary: 文本-动作检索旨在学习自然语言描述与3D人体骨架序列之间语义对齐的潜空间，从而支持两个模态的双向查询。现有方法大多采用双编码器框架，将动作和文本压缩为全局嵌入，舍弃了细粒度的局部对应关系，导致准确率低。此外，这类全局嵌入方法对检索结果的可解释性也有限。为解决上述不足，本文提出一种基于关节角、具有可解释性的动作表征：将关节级局部特征映射成结构化的伪图像，从而兼容预训练的 Vision Transformer。针对“文搜动作”任务，我们引入 MaxSim——一种基于 token 的后期交互机制，并用掩码语言建模（MLM）正则化进一步增强，以获得鲁棒且可解释的文本-动作对齐。在 HumanML3D 和 KIT-ML 上的大量实验表明，本方法超越了当前 SOTA 的文本-动作检索性能，并能提供文本与动作之间可解释的细粒度对应关系。代码已在补充材料中发布。

title: Overview of the TREC 2025 Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) Track
summary: The second edition of the TREC Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) Track advances research on systems that integrate retrieval and generation to address complex, real-world information needs. Building on the foundation of the inaugural 2024 track, this year's challenge introduces long, multi-sentence narrative queries to better reflect the deep search task with the growing demand for reasoning-driven responses. Participants are tasked with designing pipelines that combine retrieval and generation while ensuring transparency and factual grounding. The track leverages the MS MARCO V2.1 corpus and employs a multi-layered evaluation framework encompassing relevance assessment, response completeness, attribution verification, and agreement analysis. By emphasizing multi-faceted narratives and attribution-rich answers from over 150 submissions this year, the TREC 2025 RAG Track aims to foster innovation in creating trustworthy, context-aware systems for retrieval augmented generation.
translated_summary: TREC检索增强生成（RAG）赛道第二版进一步推进了将“检索”与“生成”融合以应对复杂真实信息需求的研究。在2024年首届赛道基础上，本年度的挑战首次引入“长、多句的叙事型查询”，更贴切地反映深度搜索任务中日渐增长的“推理型答案”需求。参赛团队需设计端到端“检索+生成”流水线，同时确保系统的透明性与答案的可溯源性。赛道使用 MS MARCO V2.1 语料，并构建多层次的评测体系，包括相关性评估、答案完整性、引用验证与一致性分析。通过对今年 150 余份提交的“复杂叙事查询”及“富含引用的高质量答案”的深入研究，TREC 2025 RAG 赛道旨在推动可信赖、上下文感知、具备引用机制的检索增强生成系统的创新发展。

title: RecThinker: An Agentic Framework for Tool-Augmented Reasoning in Recommendation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have revolutionized recommendation agents by providing superior reasoning and flexible decision-making capabilities. However, existing methods mainly follow a passive information acquisition paradigm, where agents either rely on static pre-defined workflows or perform reasoning with constrained information. It limits the agent's ability to identify information sufficiency, often leading to suboptimal recommendations when faced with fragmented user profiles or sparse item metadata. To address these limitations, we propose RecThinker, an agentic framework for tool-augmented reasoning in recommendation, which shifts recommendation from passive processing to autonomous investigation by dynamically planning reasoning paths and proactively acquiring essential information via autonomous tool-use. Specifically, RecThinker adopts an Analyze-Plan-Act paradigm, which first analyzes the sufficiency of user-item information and autonomously invokes tool-calling sequences to bridge information gaps between available knowledge and reasoning requirements. We develop a suite of specialized tools for RecThinker, enabling the model to acquire user-side, item-side, and collaborative information for better reasoning and user-item matching. Furthermore, we introduce a self-augmented training pipeline, comprising a Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) stage to internalize high-quality reasoning trajectories and a Reinforcement Learning (RL) stage to optimize for decision accuracy and tool-use efficiency. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that RecThinker consistently outperforms strong baselines in the recommendation scenario.
translated_summary:
大型语言模型（LLM）凭借卓越的推理能力与灵活的决策手段，彻底革新了推荐智能体。然而，现有方法大多采用被动信息获取范式，即智能体要么依赖静态预定义流程，要么受限于已给出的信息进行推理。此类范式制约了智能体判断信息是否充足的能力，致使在用户画像碎片化或物品元数据稀疏的情况下，推荐结果往往次优。

为克服上述局限，我们提出 RecThinker，一个面向推荐场景的增维工具推理框架。它将推荐过程从“被动处理”转变为“自主探查”，通过动态规划推理路径，并主动借助自主工具使用来获取关键信息。具体而言，RecThinker 遵循“分析-规划-行动”范式：先评估用户-物品信息的充足度，再自主调用一系列工具以弥合可用知识与推理需求间的信息缺口。

我们为此框架开发了一整套专用工具，使模型能够获取用户侧、物品侧及协同信息，从而实现更精准的推理与用户-物品匹配。此外，我们设计了自增强式训练流水线：先以监督微调（SFT）内化高质量推理路径，再借助强化学习（RL）阶段同时优化决策准确率和工具使用效率。

在多基准数据集上的大量实验表明，RecThinker 在推荐场景中始终优于强大的基线模型。

title: MITRA: An AI Assistant for Knowledge Retrieval in Physics Collaborations
summary: Large-scale scientific collaborations, such as the Compact Muon Solenoid (CMS) at CERN, produce a vast and ever-growing corpus of internal documentation. Navigating this complex information landscape presents a significant challenge for both new and experienced researchers, hindering knowledge sharing and slowing down the pace of scientific discovery. To address this, we present a prototype of MITRA, a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based system, designed to answer specific, context-aware questions about physics analyses. MITRA employs a novel, automated pipeline using Selenium for document retrieval from internal databases and Optical Character Recognition (OCR) with layout parsing for high-fidelity text extraction. Crucially, MITRA's entire framework, from the embedding model to the Large Language Model (LLM), is hosted on-premise, ensuring that sensitive collaboration data remains private. We introduce a two-tiered vector database architecture that first identifies the relevant analysis from abstracts before focusing on the full documentation, resolving potential ambiguities between different analyses. We demonstrate the prototype's superior retrieval performance against a standard keyword-based baseline on realistic queries and discuss future work towards developing a comprehensive research agent for large experimental collaborations.
translated_summary: 像 CERN 的紧凑型缪子螺线管（CMS）这类大规模科学合作会不断累积庞大且持续增长的内部文档语料库。要在这一复杂的信息环境中高效导航，对新老研究者均构成严峻挑战，严重阻碍知识共享并拖慢科学发现的步伐。为此，我们推出 MITRA 原型系统——一套基于检索增强生成（RAG）的解决方案，专门面向物理分析提出具有情境感知的针对性问答。MITRA 构建了一条新型自动化流水线：利用 Selenium 从内部数据库中批量获取文档，结合光学字符识别（OCR）与版面解析技术实现高保真度文本提取。关键是，系统从嵌入模型到大语言模型（LLM）全部部署在本地，杜绝任何敏感合作数据外泄。我们设计了两级向量数据库架构：第一级先从摘要层面识别相关分析，再在第二级深入定位其完整文档——这层过滤可消除不同分析间的潜在歧义。在贴近真实场景的问答任务上，MITRA 原型相比传统关键词基线取得显著检索性能提升，并为构建面向大型实验合作的完备研究智能体奠定了后续发展方向。

title: Automatic Cardiac Risk Management Classification using large-context Electronic Patients Health Records
summary: To overcome the limitations of manual administrative coding in geriatric Cardiovascular Risk Management, this study introduces an automated classification framework leveraging unstructured Electronic Health Records (EHRs). Using a dataset of 3,482 patients, we benchmarked three distinct modeling paradigms on longitudinal Dutch clinical narratives: classical machine learning baselines, specialized deep learning architectures optimized for large-context sequences, and general-purpose generative Large Language Models (LLMs) in a zero-shot setting. Additionally, we evaluated a late fusion strategy to integrate unstructured text with structured medication embeddings and anthropometric data. Our analysis reveals that the custom Transformer architecture outperforms both traditional methods and generative \acs{llm}s, achieving the highest F1-scores and Matthews Correlation Coefficients. These findings underscore the critical role of specialized hierarchical attention mechanisms in capturing long-range dependencies within medical texts, presenting a robust, automated alternative to manual workflows for clinical risk stratification.
translated_summary: 为突破老年心血管风险管理人工行政编码的局限，本研究提出了一套基于非结构化电子病历（EHR）的自动分类框架。我们在3,482 例荷兰纵向临床病历的数据集上，比较了三种建模范式：传统机器学习基线、针对长序列优化的专用深度学习架构，以及在零样本条件下使用的通用生成式大型语言模型（LLM）。同时，我们评估了一种后期融合策略，将非结构化文本与结构化药物特征及人体测量学数据相结合。结果显示，定制的 Transformer 架构在 F1 分数和马修斯相关系数上均超过传统方法与生成式 LLM，突出专用层级注意力机制在捕捉医学文本长程依赖关系中的关键作用，为临床风险分层提供了稳健的全自动替代方案。

title: Understanding the Interplay between LLMs' Utilisation of Parametric and Contextual Knowledge: A keynote at ECIR 2025
summary: Language Models (LMs) acquire parametric knowledge from their training process, embedding it within their weights. The increasing scalability of LMs, however, poses significant challenges for understanding a model's inner workings and further for updating or correcting this embedded knowledge without the significant cost of retraining. Moreover, when using these language models for knowledge-intensive language understanding tasks, LMs have to integrate relevant context, mitigating their inherent weaknesses, such as incomplete or outdated knowledge. Nevertheless, studies indicate that LMs often ignore the provided context as it can be in conflict with the pre-existing LM's memory learned during pre-training. Conflicting knowledge can also already be present in the LM's parameters, termed intra-memory conflict. This underscores the importance of understanding the interplay between how a language model uses its parametric knowledge and the retrieved contextual knowledge. In this talk, I will aim to shed light on this important issue by presenting our research on evaluating the knowledge present in LMs, diagnostic tests that can reveal knowledge conflicts, as well as on understanding the characteristics of successfully used contextual knowledge.
translated_summary: 语言模型(LM)通过训练过程以一种参数化形式获取知识，并将其嵌入到自身权重之中。然而，随着模型规模的急剧扩张，深入理解其内部机制，以及在不付出重训高昂代价的前提下修正或更新已嵌入知识，变得越来越困难。当这些大模型被应用于知识密集型语言理解任务时，它们仍需借助上下文信息来弥补自身知识的不完整或过时等固有问题。但已有研究发现，由于上下文常与预训练阶段获得的“记忆”相悖，模型往往选择忽视上下文。此外，模型参数内部本身就可能存在相互矛盾的“记忆”，这被称为“内在记忆冲突”。这两种现象都提醒我们，深入探究语言模型何时调用参数化知识、何时采纳检索到的上下文知识至关重要。本次报告中，我将围绕这一问题，展示我们团队在以下方面的工作：评估语言模型储存的知识、设计诊断测试来显式发现知识冲突，以及刻画哪些上下文知识能被模型成功利用的共同特征。

title: PRECEPT: Planning Resilience via Experience, Context Engineering & Probing Trajectories A Unified Framework for Test-Time Adaptation with Compositional Rule Learning and Pareto-Guided Prompt Evolution
summary:
LLM agents that store knowledge as natural language suffer steep retrieval degradation as condition count grows, often struggle to compose learned rules reliably, and typically lack explicit mechanisms to detect stale or adversarial knowledge. We introduce PRECEPT, a unified framework for test-time adaptation with three tightly coupled components: (1) deterministic exact-match rule retrieval over structured condition keys, (2) conflict-aware memory with Bayesian source reliability and threshold-based rule invalidation, and (3) COMPASS, a Pareto-guided prompt-evolution outer loop. Exact retrieval eliminates partial-match interpretation errors on the deterministic path (0% by construction, vs 94.4% under Theorem~B.6's independence model at N=10) and supports compositional stacking through a semantic tier hierarchy; conflict-aware memory resolves static--dynamic disagreements and supports drift adaptation; COMPASS evaluates prompts through the same end-to-end execution pipeline.
  Results (9--10 seeds): PRECEPT achieves a +41.1pp first-try advantage over Full Reflexion (d>1.9), +33.3pp compositional generalization (d=1.55), 100% $P_1$ on 2-way logistics compositions (d=2.64), +40--55pp continuous learning gains, strong eventual robustness under adversarial static knowledge (100% logistics with adversarial SK active; partial recovery on integration), +55.0pp drift recovery (d=0.95, p=0.031), and 61% fewer steps. Core comparisons are statistically significant, often at p<0.001.
translated_summary: 以自然语言存储知识的 LLM 智能体在条件数量上升时检索性能急剧退化，往往难以可靠地组合已学规则，且通常缺少显式机制检测过时或恶意知识。本文提出 PRECEPT，一个用于测试时自适应的统一框架，由三个紧密耦合的组件构成：（1）在结构化条件键上做确定性精确匹配规则检索；（2）通过贝叶斯信源可靠性和阈值失效策略实现的冲突感知记忆；（3）COMPASS——一个由帕累托梯度引导的提示进化外循环。精确检索消除了确定性路径上的部分匹配解释错误（按构造为 0%，而定理 B.6 给出的独立性模型在 N=10 时为 94.4%），并通过语义层次结构支持可组合堆叠；冲突感知记忆可解决静态—动态冲突并支持漂移适应；COMPASS 借助同一条端到端执行管线来评估提示。实验结果（9–10 个种子）：PRECEPT 相比 Full Reflexion 在首次成功上领先 41.1pp（d>1.9），在组合泛化上领先 33.3pp（d=1.55），在两路物流组合上实现 P₁=100%（d=2.64），在连续学习上提升 40–55pp，在对抗性静态知识（存在恶意静态知识）下最终恢复 100% 物流准确度并实现部分集成恢复，漂移恢复提升 55.0pp（d=0.95，p=0.031），任务步数减少 61%。核心对比差异显著，通常 p<0.001。

title: TA-Mem: Tool-Augmented Autonomous Memory Retrieval for LLM in Long-Term Conversational QA
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) has exhibited strong reasoning ability in text-based contexts across various domains, yet the limitation of context window poses challenges for the model on long-range inference tasks and necessitates a memory storage system. While many current storage approaches have been proposed with episodic notes and graph representations of memory, retrieval methods still primarily rely on predefined workflows or static similarity top-k over embeddings. To address this inflexibility, we introduced a novel tool-augmented autonomous memory retrieval framework (TA-Mem), which contains: (1) a memory extraction LLM agent which is prompted to adaptively chuck an input into sub-context based on semantic correlation, and extract information into structured notes, (2) a multi-indexed memory database designed for different types of query methods including both key-based lookup and similarity-based retrieval, (3) a tool-augmented memory retrieval agent which explores the memory autonomously by selecting appropriate tools provided by the database based on the user input, and decides whether to proceed to the next iteration or finalizing the response after reasoning on the fetched memories. The TA-Mem is evaluated on the LoCoMo dataset, achieving significant performance improvements over existing baseline approaches. In addition, an analysis of tool use across different question types also demonstrates the adaptivity of the proposed method.
translated_summary:
大型语言模型（LLM）在各类文本任务中展现出卓越的推理能力，然而受限于上下文窗口，难以胜任超长范围推理任务，因此迫切需要构建外部记忆存储系统。尽管已有研究利用情节式笔记或图结构表示外部记忆，其检索机制仍主要依赖固定工作流或基于静态嵌入的 Top-k 相似度匹配，缺乏灵活性。为此，本文提出工具增强的自主记忆检索框架（TA-Mem），包含三部分：
1. 记忆提取式 LLM 智能体，可根据输入的语义相关性自适应切分子上下文，并将信息提炼为结构化笔记；
2. 多重索引记忆数据库，同时支持基于键值的精准查找与基于相似度的向量检索；
3. 工具增强记忆检索智能体，能够根据用户指令自主调用数据库提供的各类工具，对记忆展开迭代式探索，并在每次检索后基于推理结果决定继续下一轮或终止并给出最终回复。
在 LoCoMo 长文本推理评测上的实验表明，TA-Mem 较现有基线方法取得显著性能提升；对不同问题类型的工具使用分析亦进一步验证了该方法的自适应特性。

title: Diagnosing and Repairing Citation Failures in Generative Engine Optimization
summary: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) aims to improve content visibility in AI-generated responses. However, existing methods measure contribution-how much a document influences a response-rather than citation, the mechanism that actually drives traffic back to creators. Also, these methods apply generic rewriting rules uniformly, failing to diagnose why individual document are not cited. This paper introduces a diagnostic approach to GEO that asks why a document fails to be cited and intervenes accordingly. We develop a unified framework comprising: (1) the first taxonomy of citation failure modes spanning different stages of a citation pipeline; (2) AgentGEO, an agentic system that diagnoses failures using this taxonomy, selects targeted repairs from a corresponding tool library, and iterates until citation is achieved; and (3) a document-centric benchmark evaluating whether optimizations generalize across held-out queries. AgentGEO achieves over 40% relative improvement in citation rates while modifying only 5% of content, compared to 25% for baselines. Our analysis reveals that generic optimization can harm long-tail content and some documents face challenges that optimization alone cannot fully address-findings with implications for equitable visibility in AI-mediated information access.
translated_summary:
生成式引擎优化（GEO）的目标是在 AI 生成的回复中提升内容可见度。然而，现有方法衡量的是“贡献度”（文档对回复的影响大小），而非真正能够为创作者带来流量的“被引”。此外，这些方法以通用重写规则一视同仁地处理文档，无法诊断单篇文档为何未被引用。本文提出一种面向 GEO 的诊断范式：先追问“文档为何未被引”，再针对性地干预。我们构建了一个统一框架，包含：
（1）首个贯穿引用流水线的“引用失败模式”分类；
（2）AgentGEO——一个基于该分类诊断失败原因、从配套工具库中选择针对性修复手段，并迭代直至引用的智能系统；
（3）以文档为中心的基准，用于验证优化是否在外部查询中保持泛化。

与基线相比，AgentGEO 仅改动 5% 的内容就实现超过 40% 的引用率相对提升，而基线需改动 25%。分析进一步发现：通用优化可能损害长尾内容；部分文档面临超出优化可解决范围的问题。这些发现对实现 AI 中介信息获取中的公平可见度具有启示意义。

title: Evoking User Memory: Personalizing LLM via Recollection-Familiarity Adaptive Retrieval
summary: Personalized large language models (LLMs) rely on memory retrieval to incorporate user-specific histories, preferences, and contexts. Existing approaches either overload the LLM by feeding all the user's past memory into the prompt, which is costly and unscalable, or simplify retrieval into a one-shot similarity search, which captures only surface matches. Cognitive science, however, shows that human memory operates through a dual process: Familiarity, offering fast but coarse recognition, and Recollection, enabling deliberate, chain-like reconstruction for deeply recovering episodic content. Current systems lack both the ability to perform recollection retrieval and mechanisms to adaptively switch between the dual retrieval paths, leading to either insufficient recall or the inclusion of noise. To address this, we propose RF-Mem (Recollection-Familiarity Memory Retrieval), a familiarity uncertainty-guided dual-path memory retriever. RF-Mem measures the familiarity signal through the mean score and entropy. High familiarity leads to the direct top-K Familiarity retrieval path, while low familiarity activates the Recollection path. In the Recollection path, the system clusters candidate memories and applies alpha-mix with the query to iteratively expand evidence in embedding space, simulating deliberate contextual reconstruction. This design embeds human-like dual-process recognition into the retriever, avoiding full-context overhead and enabling scalable, adaptive personalization. Experiments across three benchmarks and corpus scales demonstrate that RF-Mem consistently outperforms both one-shot retrieval and full-context reasoning under fixed budget and latency constraints. Our code can be found in the Reproducibility Statement.
translated_summary:
个性化大型语言模型（LLM）依靠记忆检索来融合用户特有的历史记录、偏好和上下文。现有方法要么一次性将全部历史记忆塞进提示，导致开销巨大且难以扩展；要么简化为单次相似度搜索，仅能捕捉表面线索。认知科学研究揭示，人类记忆以双重机制运作：熟悉感提供快速但粗略的识别，回忆则支持专人般的链式重建，深入复现情节内容。现有系统既缺乏“回忆”检索能力，也没有在两条路径间自适应切换的机制，从而带来回忆不足或噪声混入的问题。

针对此，我们提出 RF-Mem（回忆–熟悉双通道记忆检索器），以熟悉感的不确定性为指引，实现双路径检索。RF-Mem 通过均值分数和熵计算熟悉感信号：高熟悉感触发“熟悉”路径，直接返回 top-K 记忆；低熟悉感则激活“回忆”路径。在此路径中，系统对候选记忆进行聚类，并与查询进行 α-混合，以迭代方式在嵌入空间中扩展证据，模拟审慎的上下文重建。该设计在人类式的双重识别机制中嵌入检索器，既避免了全上下文开销，又实现可扩展、自适应的个性化。

在三个基准和多个语料规模上的实验表明，RF-Mem 在固定预算与延迟约束下，始终优于单次检索和全上下文推理。代码已置于可复现性声明中。

title: DataFactory: Collaborative Multi-Agent Framework for Advanced Table Question Answering
summary: Table Question Answering (TableQA) enables natural language interaction with structured tabular data. However, existing large language model (LLM) approaches face critical limitations: context length constraints that restrict data handling capabilities, hallucination issues that compromise answer reliability, and single-agent architectures that struggle with complex reasoning scenarios involving semantic relationships and multi-hop logic.
