从 PDF 中可靠地提取表格对大规模科学数据挖掘和知识库构建至关重要，然而现有评估方法依赖基于规则的指标，无法捕捉表格内容的语义等价。我们提出一种新的基准评测框架，其核心是先合成生成 PDF，其中表格原始 LaTeX 源码可作为精确的真值，而所有数据均来自 arXiv，以保证复杂性和多样性的真实性。方法论上，我们首次将“大语言模型作为裁判（LLM-as-a-judge）”用于表格语义评估，并通过匹配流程自动处理解析器输出中的格式差异。为验证其可靠性，我们进行了人类评估研究，对 1,500 余份提取出的表格对进行质量打分，结果显示 LLM 评估与人类判断的皮尔逊系数高达 r=0.93，显著优于传统的树编辑距离相似度（TEDS，r=0.68）和网格表格相似度（GriTS，r=0.70）。在此框架上，我们对 21 款主流 PDF 解析器在 100 份含 451 张表格的合成文档上进行评测，发现性能差异巨大。本研究为选择合适的表格解析器提供了实践指导，也为该项关键任务建立了可复现、可扩展的评测方法。  
代码与数据：https://github.com/phorn1/pdf-parse-bench  
指标研究与人工评估：https://github.com/phorn1/table-metric-study

title: Interplay: Training Independent Simulators for Reference-Free Conversational Recommendation
summary: Training conversational recommender systems (CRS) requires extensive dialogue data, which is challenging to collect at scale. To address this, researchers have used simulated user-recommender conversations. Traditional simulation approaches often utilize a single large language model (LLM) that generates entire conversations with prior knowledge of the target items, leading to scripted and artificial dialogues. We propose a reference-free simulation framework that trains two independent LLMs, one as the user and one as the conversational recommender. These models interact in real-time without access to predetermined target items, but preference summaries and target attributes, enabling the recommender to genuinely infer user preferences through dialogue. This approach produces more realistic and diverse conversations that closely mirror authentic human-AI interactions. Our reference-free simulators match or exceed existing methods in quality, while offering a scalable solution for generating high-quality conversational recommendation data without constraining conversations to pre-defined target items. We conduct both quantitative and human evaluations to confirm the effectiveness of our reference-free approach.
translated_summary:
训练对话式推荐系统（CRS）需要海量的对话数据，然而规模化收集此类数据成本极高。为此，研究者常用模拟“用户—推荐系统”对话来补足数据缺口。传统的模拟方法往往依赖单一大型语言模型（LLM），在生成整段对话时已预先知晓目标商品，导致对话生硬且缺乏真实性。  

本文提出一种无须目标参考的模拟框架：让两个独立的大模型分别扮演“用户”与“对话推荐系统”角色，在实时互动中既不知道目标商品，也不受其限制，双方仅依据逐渐累积的“用户偏好摘要”和“目标属性线索”进行对话，使推荐系统必须像真实场景一样通过对话来推断用户偏好。该机制能生成更接近真人—AI互动的多样、自然的语料。  

实验结果表明，我们的去参考化模拟器在多项自动指标上与既有方法持平或更优，并能够规模化地产出高质量对话推荐数据，不再把对话锁定于预设目标商品。我们通过量化评估与人工评测双重验证了这一方法的有效性。

title: Latent Factor Modeling with Expert Network for Multi-Behavior Recommendation
summary: Traditional recommendation methods, which typically focus on modeling a single user behavior (e.g., purchase), often face severe data sparsity issues. Multi-behavior recommendation methods offer a promising solution by leveraging user data from diverse behaviors. However, most existing approaches entangle multiple behavioral factors, learning holistic but imprecise representations that fail to capture specific user intents. To address this issue, we propose a multi-behavior method by modeling latent factors with an expert network (MBLFE). In our approach, we design a gating expert network, where the expert network models all latent factors within the entire recommendation scenario, with each expert specializing in a specific latent factor. The gating network dynamically selects the optimal combination of experts for each user, enabling a more accurate representation of user preferences. To ensure independence among experts and factor consistency of a particular expert, we incorporate self-supervised learning during the training process. Furthermore, we enrich embeddings with multi-behavior data to provide the expert network with more comprehensive collaborative information for factor extraction. Extensive experiments on three real-world datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, validating its effectiveness.
translated_summary: 传统推荐方法通常仅聚焦于单一用户行为（如购买）建模，常面临严重的数据稀疏问题。多行为推荐方法通过融合多种行为产生的用户数据，为这一困境提供了可行方案。然而，现有方法多将多种行为因素交织在一起，学到的表示虽有整体性却缺乏精确度，难以刻画用户的具体意图。为此，本文提出了一种基于专家网络建模潜在因子的多行为推荐方法（MBLFE）。具体而言，我们设计了一种门控式专家网络：专家网络负责对整个推荐场景中的全部潜在因子进行建模，而每个专家专门捕捉某一特定潜在因子；门控网络则为每位用户动态选择最佳专家组合，从而更精准地刻画用户偏好。为保证专家间独立性以及单个特定因子的稳定性，我们在训练过程中引入自监督学习。此外，我们还利用多行为数据丰富嵌入表示，为专家网络提取因子提供更全面的协同信息。在三个真实数据集上的大量实验表明，本文方法显著优于当前最优基线，验证了其有效性。

title: Total Recall QA: A Verifiable Evaluation Suite for Deep Research Agents
summary: Deep research agents have emerged as LLM-based systems designed to perform multi-step information seeking and reasoning over large, open-domain sources to answer complex questions by synthesizing information from multiple information sources. Given the complexity of the task and despite various recent efforts, evaluation of deep research agents remains fundamentally challenging. This paper identifies a list of requirements and optional properties for evaluating deep research agents. We observe that existing benchmarks do not satisfy all identified requirements. Inspired by prior research on TREC Total Recall Tracks, we introduce the task of Total Recall Question Answering and develop a framework for deep research agents evaluation that satisfies the identified criteria. Our framework constructs single-answer, total recall queries with precise evaluation and relevance judgments derived from a structured knowledge base paired with a text corpus, enabling large-scale data construction. Using this framework, we build TRQA, a deep research benchmark constructed from Wikidata-Wikipedia as a real-world source and a synthetically generated e-commerce knowledge base and corpus to mitigate the effects of data contamination. We benchmark the collection with representative retriever and deep research models and establish baseline retrieval and end-to-end results for future comparative evaluation.
translated_summary:
“深度研究智能体”是一类基于大语言模型的系统，旨在通过多步信息搜寻与推理，在大规模开放领域中整合多源信息，从而解答复杂问题。由于任务本身高度复杂，即便已有不少近期工作，对深度研究智能体的评估仍然面临根本性挑战。本文首先归纳出一系列评估这类系统时“必需”与“可选”的属性要求；随后指出，现有基准并不能全部满足这些要求。

受 TREC Total Recall Tracks 早期研究的启发，我们提出“全面召回问答”（Total Recall Question Answering，TRQA）任务，并构建了一套新的深度研究智能体评估框架，使其完全符合上述要求。该框架设计为“单一答案、全面召回”型查询：利用结构化知识库与配套文本语料库，提供可精确量化、可解释的评估与相关性判断，并可支持大规模数据构建。

依托该框架，我们建立了 TRQA 基准——基于 Wikidata-Wikipedia 的真实世界语料，同时引入一份合成生成的电商知识库及文本语料，以缓解数据污染（data contamination）问题。我们采用代表性检索模型与深度研究模型在该基准上进行测试，给出了检索阶段与端到端性能的首个系统基线，为后续比较研究奠定基础。

title: HypeMed: Enhancing Medication Recommendations with Hypergraph-Based Patient Relationships
summary: Medication recommendations aim to generate safe and effective medication sets from health records. However, accurately recommending medications hinges on inferring a patient's latent clinical condition from sparse and noisy observations, which requires both (i) preserving the visit-level combinatorial semantics of co-occurring entities and (ii) leveraging informative historical references through effective, visit-conditioned retrieval. Most existing methods fall short in one of both aspects: graph-based modeling often fragments higher-order intra-visit patterns into pairwise relations, while inter-visit augmentation methods commonly exhibit an imbalance between learning a globally stable representation space and performing dynamic retrieval within it. To address these limitations, this paper proposes HypeMed, a two-stage hypergraph-based framework unifying intra-visit coherence modeling and inter-visit augmentation. HypeMed consists of two core modules: MedRep for representation pre-training, and SimMR for similarity-enhanced recommendation. In the first stage, MedRep encodes clinical visits as hyperedges via knowledge-aware contrastive pre-training, creating a globally consistent, retrieval-friendly embedding space. In the second stage, SimMR performs dynamic retrieval within this space, fusing retrieved references with the patient's longitudinal data to refine medication prediction. Evaluation on real-world benchmarks shows that HypeMed outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both recommendation precision and DDI reduction, simultaneously enhancing the effectiveness and safety of clinical decision support.
translated_summary:
药物推荐的目标是基于健康记录生成安全且有效的药物组合。然而，精准推荐药物的关键在于从稀疏且嘈杂的观测数据中推断患者的潜在临床状况，这需要同时做到：（i）保留患者在单次就诊中多个共现实体的组合语义；（ii）通过有效的、受就诊条件约束的检索，充分利用信息丰富的历史参照。现有方法往往至少在上述一方面存在缺陷：基于图的建模将就诊内部的高阶模式拆分成成对关系；而跨就诊的增强方法在学习全局稳定的表示空间与在该空间内进行动态检索之间往往失衡。

为解决上述局限，本文提出 HypeMed——两阶段超图框架，整合就诊内的一致性建模与就诊间的增强策略。HypeMed 包含两大核心模块：用于表示预训练的 MedRep 和用于相似性增强推荐的 SimMR。第一阶段，MedRep 通过知识增强的对比预训练将每次临床就诊编码为超边，构建全局一致且便于检索的嵌入空间。第二阶段，SimMR 在该空间内动态检索相似历史病例，将检索到的参考信息与患者的纵向数据融合，以优化药物预测。真实基准数据评估表明，HypeMed 在推荐精度与药物相互作用（DDI）减少方面均显著优于当前最先进基线，同时提升了临床决策支持的有效性与安全性。

title: SODIUM: From Open Web Data to Queryable Databases
summary:
During research, domain experts often ask analytical questions whose answers require integrating data from a wide range of web sources. Thus, they must spend substantial effort searching, extracting, and organizing raw data before analysis can begin. We formalize this process as the SODIUM task, where we conceptualize open domains such as the web as latent databases that must be systematically instantiated to support downstream querying. Solving SODIUM requires (1) conducting in-depth and specialized exploration of the open web, which is further strengthened by (2) exploiting structural correlations for systematic information extraction and (3) integrating collected information into coherent, queryable database instances.
  To quantify the challenges in automating SODIUM, we construct SODIUM-Bench, a benchmark of 105 tasks derived from published academic papers across 6 domains, where systems are tasked with exploring the open web to collect and aggregate data from diverse sources into structured tables. Existing systems struggle with SODIUM tasks: we evaluate 6 advanced AI agents on SODIUM-Bench, with the strongest baseline achieving only 46.5% accuracy. To bridge this gap, we develop SODIUM-Agent, a multi-agent system composed of a web explorer and a cache manager. Powered by our proposed ATP-BFS algorithm and optimized through principled management of cached sources and navigation paths, SODIUM-Agent conducts deep and comprehensive web exploration and performs structurally coherent information extraction. SODIUM-Agent achieves 91.1% accuracy on SODIUM-Bench, outperforming the strongest baseline by approximately 2 times and the weakest by up to 73 times.
translated_summary:
在研究过程中，领域专家常需提出一些分析性问题，其答案整合了大量网络来源的数据。因此，他们不得不花费大量精力先搜索、抽取并整理原始数据，而后才能开展分析。我们正式将这一过程明确定义为 SODIUM 任务：把网络这样的开放领域视作有待系统实例化的“潜在数据库”，以支持下游查询。解决 SODIUM 需要三项关键能力：(1) 对开放网络进行深入且专门化的探索；(2) 利用结构相关性来系统化地提取信息；(3) 将收集到的信息整合成连贯、可查询的数据库实例。

为量化自动化 SODIUM 所面临的挑战，我们构建了 SODIUM-Bench，该基准包含 105 个任务，源自从 6 个不同领域的已发表论文中提炼而出。在此基准中，系统需要探索开放网络，从多样的来源收集并汇总数据，最终生成结构化表格。现有系统在 SODIUM 任务上举步维艰：我们在 SODIUM-Bench 上评估了 6 种先进 AI 代理，其中最强基线仅达到 46.5% 的准确率。

为弥合这一差距，我们提出 SODIUM-Agent——一种由“网络探索者”与“缓存管理者”组成的多代理系统。该系统由我们设计的 ATP-BFS 算法驱动，并通过对已缓存来源与导航路径的合理管理进一步优化。SODIUM-Agent 能够进行深度、全面的网络探索，并实现结构一致的信息提取。在 SODIUM-Bench 上，SODIUM-Agent 达到 91.1% 的准确率，相比最强基线提升约 2 倍，相比最弱基线提升最高达 73 倍。

title: From Topic to Transition Structure: Unsupervised Concept Discovery at Corpus Scale via Predictive Associative Memory
summary: Embedding models group text by semantic content, what text is about. We show that temporal co-occurrence within texts discovers a different kind of structure: recurrent transition-structure concepts or what text does. We train a 29.4M-parameter contrastive model on 373 million co-occurrence pairs from 9,766 Project Gutenberg texts (24.96 million passages), mapping pre-trained embeddings into an association space where passages with similar transition structure cluster together. Under capacity constraint (42.75% accuracy), the model must compress across recurring patterns rather than memorise individual co-occurrences. Clustering at six granularities (k=50 to k=2,000) produces a multi-resolution concept map; from broad modes like "direct confrontation" and "lyrical meditation" to precise registers and scene templates like "sailor dialect" and "courtroom cross-examination." At k=100, clusters average 4,508 books each (of 9,766), confirming corpus-wide patterns. Direct comparison with embedding-similarity clustering shows that raw embeddings group by topic while association-space clusters group by function, register, and literary tradition. Unseen novels are assigned to existing clusters without retraining; the association model concentrates each novel into a selective subset of coherent clusters, while raw embedding assignment saturates nearly all clusters. Validation controls address positional, length, and book-concentration confounds. The method extends Predictive Associative Memory (PAM, arXiv:2602.11322) from episodic recall to concept formation: where PAM recalls specific associations, multi-epoch contrastive training under compression extracts structural patterns that transfer to unseen texts, the same framework producing qualitatively different behaviour in a different regime.
translated_summary: 嵌入模型根据文本的语义内容——亦即文本“讲述什么”——对文本进行聚类。我们发现，文本内部的时间共现关系揭示出一种不同的结构：即在叙事中不断复现的转场结构概念，或称文本“如何行动”的结构。我们使用 Project Gutenberg 中 9 766 部作品（共 2 496 万个片段）提取的 3.73 亿组时间共现片段对，训练了一个 2 940 万参数的对比模型，将预训练的嵌入映射到一个“关联空间”，在该空间中，过渡结构相似的片段形成聚类。在容量受限（测试准确率为 42.75%）的条件下，模型无法单独记忆各组共现，而只能对重复出现的模式进行压缩式编码。我们在六个粒度（k＝50 至 k＝2 000）下聚类，生成了多尺度概念地图：既包括“正面冲突”“抒情内省”等粗粒度模式，也涵盖“水手方言”“法庭交叉询问”等细粒度语域与场景模板。当 k＝100 时，平均每簇包含 4 508 本书（其中 9 766 本书中的全部片段），证明这些模式横跨整个语料库。与直接利用原始嵌入进行聚类相比，原始嵌入以主题为依据聚类，而关联空间中的聚类则以功能、语域及文学传统为依据。对于未参与训练的小说，无需重新训练即可直接归到现有簇；关联模型将每部小说凝聚于少数几个语义连贯的簇，而原始嵌入的指派几乎渗入所有簇。实验通过控制位置、长度与书籍集中度等干扰因素进行验证。综上，该方法将 Predictive Associative Memory（PAM，arXiv:2602.11322）从情节回忆扩展至概念形成：PAM 重新唤起具体关联，而多轮对比训练在压缩过程中提取可迁移的结构模式，同一框架在不同工作区间呈现出截然相异的行为特性。

title: Auditing Preferences for Brands and Cultures in LLMs
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) based AI systems increasingly mediate what billions of people see, choose and buy. This creates an urgent need to quantify the systemic risks of LLM-driven market intermediation, including its implications for market fairness, competition, and the diversity of information exposure.
  This paper introduces ChoiceEval, a reproducible framework for auditing preferences for brands and cultures in large language models (LLMs) under realistic usage conditions. ChoiceEval addresses two core technical challenges: (i) generating realistic, persona-diverse evaluation queries and (ii) converting free-form outputs into comparable choice sets and quantitative preference metrics. For a given topic (e.g. running shoes, hotel chains, travel destinations), the framework segments users into psychographic profiles (e.g., budget-conscious, wellness-focused, convenience), and then derives diverse prompts that reflect real-world advice-seeking and decision-making behaviour. LLM responses are converted into normalised top-k choice sets. Preference and geographic bias are then quantified using comparable metrics across topics and personas. Thus, ChoiceEval provides a scalable audit pipeline for researchers, platforms, and regulators, linking model behaviour to real-world economic outcomes.
  Applied to Gemini, GPT, and DeepSeek across 10 topics spanning commerce and culture and more than 2,000 questions, ChoiceEval reveals consistent preferences: U.S.-developed models Gemini and GPT show marked favouritism toward American entities, while China-developed DeepSeek exhibits more balanced yet still detectable geographic preferences. These patterns persist across user personas, suggesting systematic rather than incidental effects.
translated_summary:
面向十亿用户的生成式大模型正日益重构人们“看什么、选什么、买什么”的决策链。这一新格局迫切要求我们量化大模型做“市场中介”可能带来的系统性风险，尤其是对市场公平、竞争格局及信息多样性的深层影响。本文提出 ChoiceEval：一套可复现的全流程框架，可在贴近真实使用环境下审计大模型对品牌与文化的偏好程度。该框架直击两大核心技术难点：  
（1）生成具有真实语境且人格多样的评估查询；  
（2）将开放式回复转化为可比较的选择集并生成量化偏好指标。  

针对特定主题（如跑鞋、连锁酒店、旅游目的地），ChoiceEval 先把用户细分为心理画像（如预算敏感型、健康导向型、便利优先型），再据此衍生出贴合真实咨询和决策行为的多样的提示。随后，将大模型返回的自然语言结果统一提取为规范化的 top-k 选择集合，并用一致的指标衡量品牌偏好与地域偏差。由此，ChoiceEval 为研究者、平台方和监管机构提供了一条可扩展的审计流水线，让模型行为与经济后果之间建立明确、可追溯的关联。  

我们用 ChoiceEval 对 Gemini、GPT 与 DeepSeek 进行了测评，横跨商贸和文化两大领域的 10 个主题、2,000 余条问题。结果显示：美系 Gemini 与 GPT 显著偏向美国实体；而中系 DeepSeek 虽多地域间差距更小，但仍可检测到对特定区域的偏好。这些模式在用户画像间保持高度一致，指向模型级的系统性偏差，而非偶发波动。

title: Average Case Graph Searching in Non-Uniform Cost Models
summary:
We consider the following generalization of the classic Binary Search Problem: a searcher is required to find a hidden target vertex $x$ in a graph $G$, by iteratively performing queries about vertices. A query to $v$ incurs a cost $c(v, x)$ and responds whether $v=x$ and if not, returns the connected component in $G-v$ containing $x$. The goal is to design a search strategy that minimizes the average-case search cost.
  Firstly, we consider the case when the cost of querying a vertex is independent of the target. We develop a $\br{4+ε}$-approximation FPTAS for trees running in $O(n^4/ε^2)$ time and an $O({\sqrt{\log n}})$-approximation for general graphs. Additionally, we give an FPTAS parametrized by the number of non-leaf vertices of the graph. On the hardness side we prove that the problem is NP-hard even when the input is a tree with bounded degree or bounded diameter.
  Secondly, we consider trees and assume $c(v, x)$ to be a monotone non-decreasing function with respect to $x$, i.e.\ if $u \in P_{v, x}$ then $c(u, x) \leq c(v, x)$. We give a $2$-approximation algorithm which can also be easily altered to work for the worst-case variant. This is the first constant factor approximation algorithm for both criterions. Previously known results only regard the worst-case search cost and include a parametrized PTAS as well as a $4$-approximation for paths.
  At last, we show that when the cost function is an arbitrary function of the queried vertex and the target, then the problem does not admit any constant factor approximation under the UGC, even when the input tree is a star.
translated_summary:
我们研究经典二分查找问题在图上的如下推广：搜索者需通过反复向顶点发出查询来定位图 $G$ 中隐藏的目标顶点 $x$。对顶点 $v$ 的一次查询代价为 $c(v,x)$，若 $v=x$ 则直接确认，否则返回 $x$ 在图 $G-v$ 中的所属连通分量。目标是最小化平均查询代价。

首先，我们考察查询代价与目标点无关的情形。针对树结构，提出一个时间复杂度为 $O(n^4/\varepsilon^2)$ 的 $4+\varepsilon$ 近似 FPTAS；对一般图，给出 $O(\sqrt{\log n})$-近似。此外，还提供以非叶子顶点数量为参数的 FPTAS。在计算复杂性方面，我们证明即便输入为树，节点度数和直径均有界，问题仍是 NP-hard。

接着，我们考虑树结构，假设代价函数 $c(v,x)$ 对固定 $x$ 关于 $v$ 单调不减：若 $u$ 在 $v$ 到 $x$ 的路径上，则总有 $c(u,x)\leq c(v,x)$。给出开销为 2 的近似算法，稍作修改即可应用于最坏情况。这是首个针对两种准则的常数因子近似；早期工作仅关注最坏情况最坏情况代价，包括带参数的 PTAS 和路径上的 4-近似。

最后，当 $c(v,x)$ 为任意函数时，即便输入是一颗星图，猜想（UGC 意义下）该问题也不存在常数因子近似。

title: A Contextual Help Browser Extension to Assist Digital Illiterate Internet Users
summary: This paper describes the design, implementation, and evaluation of a browser extension that provides contextual help to users who hover over technological acronyms and abbreviations on web pages. The extension combines a curated technical dictionary with OpenAI's large language model (LLM) to deliver on-demand definitions through lightweight tooltip overlays. A dual-layer artificial intelligence (AI) pipeline, comprising Google Cloud's Natural Language Processing (NLP) taxonomy API and OpenAI's ChatGPT, classifies each visited page as technology-related before activating the tooltip logic, thereby reducing false-positive detections. A mixed-methods study with 25 participants evaluated the tool's effect on reading comprehension and information-retrieval time among users with low to intermediate digital literacy. Results show that 92% of participants reported improved understanding of technical terms, 96% confirmed time savings over manual web searches, and all participants found the tooltips non-disruptive. Dictionary-based definitions were appended in an average of 2135 ms, compared to 16429 ms for AI-generated definitions and a mean manual search time of 17200 ms per acronym. The work demonstrates a practical, real-time approach to bridging the digital literacy gap and points toward extending contextual help to other domains such as medicine, law, and finance.
translated_summary:
本文介绍了一款为网页技术缩写词提供情境化即时帮助的浏览器扩展的设计、实现与评估。该扩展将精心策划的专业术语词典与 OpenAI 大型语言模型（LLM）结合，通过轻量级悬停提示向用户即时呈现定义。采用双层人工智能流水线：先由 Google Cloud 的自然语言处理（NLP）分类 API 与 OpenAI ChatGPT 联合判断当前页面是否与技术相关，再触发提示逻辑，从而显著降低误判率。

本研究以 25 名数字素养为低到中级的用户为对象，采用混合研究方法评估该工具对阅读理解与信息检索时间的影响。结果显示：92% 的参与者表示对技术术语的理解明显提升；96% 确认相比手动网页搜索节省时间；所有参与者均反馈提示不干扰阅读。词典定义平均加载耗时 2135 ms，AI 生成定义平均为 16429 ms，而手动搜索每个缩写词平均需 17200 ms。

本工作展示了一种在实时环境下弥合数字鸿沟的可行方案，并为下一步将情境化帮助扩展至医学、法律、金融等领域提供了可行路径。

title: From Isolated Scoring to Collaborative Ranking: A Comparison-Native Framework for LLM-Based Paper Evaluation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are currently applied to scientific paper evaluation by assigning an absolute score to each paper independently. However, since score scales vary across conferences, time periods, and evaluation criteria, models trained on absolute scores are prone to fitting narrow, context-specific rules rather than developing robust scholarly judgment. To overcome this limitation, we propose shifting paper evaluation from isolated scoring to collaborative ranking. In particular, we design \textbf{C}omparison-\textbf{N}ative framework for \textbf{P}aper \textbf{E}valuation (\textbf{CNPE}), integrating comparison into both data construction and model learning. We first propose a graph-based similarity ranking algorithm to facilitate the sampling of more informative and discriminative paper pairs from a collection. We then enhance relative quality judgment through supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning with comparison-based rewards. At inference, the model performs pairwise comparisons over sampled paper pairs and aggregates these preference signals into a global relative quality ranking. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework achieves an average relative improvement of \textbf{21.8\%} over the strong baseline DeepReview-14B, while exhibiting robust generalization to five previously unseen datasets. \href{https://github.com/ECNU-Text-Computing/ComparisonReview}{Code}.
translated_summary: 目前，大型语言模型（LLM）在科学论文评估中的应用方式为：独立地为每篇论文打一个绝对分数。然而，由于评分量表会因会议、时期和评价标准而异，基于绝对分数训练的模型易于过拟合狭隘、依赖特定语境的规则，而无法培养稳健的学术判断力。为突破这一局限，我们将论文评估从“孤立评分”转向“协同排序”。具体而言，我们提出了一种面向论文评估的对比原生框架——CNPE（Comparison-Native framework for Paper Evaluation），将比较机制系统性地融入数据构建和模型学习两端：首先，借助图驱动的相似度排序算法，从论文库中高效采样更具信息量和区分度的论文对；随后，通过监督微调和基于比较的奖励进行强化学习，强化模型的相对质量判断能力；推理阶段，模型先在采样的论文对上做两两比较，再汇聚这些偏好信号生成全局的相对质量排序。实验结果显示，与强基线 DeepReview-14B 相比，该框架平均取得 21.8% 的相对提升，并在五个此前未见过的数据集上展现出良好的泛化能力。[代码](https://github.com/ECNU-Text-Computing/ComparisonReview)

title: Negation is Not Semantic: Diagnosing Dense Retrieval Failure Modes for Trade-offs in Contradiction-Aware Biomedical QA
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in biomedical question answering, yet their tendency to generate plausible but unverified claims poses serious risks in clinical settings. To mitigate these risks, the TREC 2025 BioGen track mandates grounded answers that explicitly surface contradictory evidence (Task A) and the generation of narrative driven, fully attributed responses (Task B). Addressing the absence of target ground truth, we present a proxy-based development framework using the SciFact dataset to systematically optimize retrieval architectures. Our iterative evaluation revealed a "Simplicity Paradox": complex adversarial dense retrieval strategies failed catastrophically at contradiction detection (MRR 0.023) due to Semantic Collapse, where negation signals become indistinguishable in vector space. We further identify a Retrieval Asymmetry: filtering dense embeddings improves contradiction detection but degrades support recall, compromising reliability. We resolve this via a Decoupled Lexical Architecture built on a unified BM25 backbone, balancing semantic support recall (0.810) with precise contradiction surfacing (0.750). This approach achieves the highest Weighted MRR (0.790) on the proxy benchmark while remaining the only viable strategy for scaling to the 30 million document PubMed corpus. For answer generation, we introduce Narrative Aware Reranking and One-Shot In-Context Learning, improving citation coverage from 50% (zero-shot) to 100%. Official TREC results confirm our findings: our system ranks 2nd on Task A contradiction F1 and 3rd out of 50 runs on Task B citation coverage (98.77%), achieving zero citation contradict rate. Our work transforms LLMs from stochastic generators into honest evidence synthesizers, showing that epistemic integrity in biomedical AI requires precision and architectural scalability isolated metric optimization.
translated_summary:
大型语言模型（LLM）在生物医学问答任务中表现卓越，但也经常生成看似合理却无法证实的命题，在临床环境中构成重大风险。为降低此类风险，TREC 2025 BioGen 任务要求系统回答必须“有根有据”：既要显式地呈现与答案相矛盾的证据（任务A），又要生成带完整引证、以叙述驱动且完全可追溯的长篇回复（任务B）。

针对缺乏目标真值的问题，我们以 SciFact 数据集为代理，提出一套代理式开发框架，系统性地优化检索架构。迭代评估中，我们观察到“简洁悖论”：复杂对抗型稠密检索策略在矛盾检测中彻底失效（MRR仅0.023）。其根源在于“语义坍缩”——否定信号在向量空间与正面支持信号变得不可区分。此外，我们还发现“检索不对称”：过滤稠密嵌入能提升矛盾检测，却会拉低支持召回，危及整体可靠性。

为此，我们设计了解耦的词汇架构，基于统一 BM25 骨干，兼顾语义支持召回（0.810）与精准矛盾发现（0.750）。该方法在代理基准上取得最高的加权 MRR（0.790），同时成为唯一能在 3 000 万篇 PubMed 语料上规模化落地的可行策略。

在答案生成阶段，我们引入“叙述感知重排序”与“一次样本情境学习”，使引文覆盖率从一次性零样本的 50% 提升至 100%。官方 TREC 结果再次验证了我们的发现：系统任务 A 矛盾检测 F1 排名第 2，任务 B 引文覆盖率以 98.77% 排名第 3（共 50 支队伍），且零引证冲突。

我们把 LLM 从随机文本生成器转型为可信的证据合成器，表明要在生物医学 AI 中实现“认识论完整性”，必须优先考虑精确性与架构的可扩展性，而非孤立指标优化。

title: Deploying Semantic ID-based Generative Retrieval for Large-Scale Podcast Discovery at Spotify
summary:
Podcast listening is often grounded in a set of favorite shows, while listener intent can evolve over time. This combination of stable preferences and changing intent motivates recommendation approaches that support both familiarity and exploration. Traditional recommender systems typically emphasize long-term interaction patterns, and are less explicitly designed to incorporate rich contextual signals or flexible, intent-aware discovery objectives. In this setting, models that can jointly reason over semantics, context, and user state offer a promising direction. Large Language Models (LLMs) provide strong semantic reasoning and contextual conditioning for discovery-oriented recommendation, but deploying them in production introduces challenges in catalog grounding, user-level personalization, and latency-critical serving.
  We address these challenges with GLIDE, a production-scale generative recommender for podcast discovery at Spotify. GLIDE formulates recommendation as an instruction-following task over a discretized catalog using Semantic IDs, enabling grounded generation over a large inventory. The model conditions on recent listening history and lightweight user context, while injecting long-term user embeddings as soft prompts to capture stable preferences under strict inference constraints. We evaluate GLIDE using offline retrieval metrics, human judgments, and LLM-based evaluation, and validate its impact through large-scale online A/B testing. Across experiments involving millions of users, GLIDE increases non-habitual podcast streaming on Spotify home surface by up to 5.4% and new-show discovery by up to 14.3%, while meeting production cost and latency constraints.
translated_summary: 播客收听往往根植于一批固定喜爱的节目，但听众意图会随时间演化。这种稳定偏好与动态意图并存的场景，促使推荐系统必须同时满足“熟悉度”与“探索性”的双重需求。传统推荐系统通常侧重长期交互模式，鲜少显式利用丰富的上下文信号或灵活、以意图为导向的发现目标。在这一背景下，能够同时理解语义、上下文及用户状态的模型成为一条有前景的路径。大语言模型（LLM）为面向发现的推荐提供了强劲的语义推理与上下文适配能力，但在生产环境中落地时，仍需克服目录实体化、用户级个性化与低延迟服务等挑战。为此，我们推出了 GLIDE——Spotify 规模化的生成式播客发现推荐系统。GLIDE 将推荐任务表述为“基于语义 ID 离散化目录的指令跟随”问题，可在庞大目录中实现实体锚定的生成式推荐；模型以近期收听历史和轻量用户上下文为条件，再以用户长期嵌入作为软提示，在保证严格推理约束的同时捕捉持续稳定的偏好。我们采用离线检索指标、人工判评及 LLM 辅助评估对 GLIDE 进行评价，并用大规模在线 A/B 测试验证其业务效果。在涉及数百万用户的实验里，GLIDE 将 Spotify 首页上的非习惯性播客播放提升最高达 5.4%，新节目发现率提升最高达 14.3%，同时满足在线成本与延迟要求。

title: A Unified Language Model for Large Scale Search, Recommendation, and Reasoning
summary: LLMs are increasingly applied to recommendation, retrieval, and reasoning, yet deploying a single end-to-end model that can jointly support these behaviors over large, heterogeneous catalogs remains challenging. Such systems must generate unambiguous references to real items, handle multiple entity types, and operate under strict latency and reliability constraints requirements that are difficult to satisfy with text-only generation. While tool-augmented recommender systems address parts of this problem, they introduce orchestration complexity and limit end-to-end optimization. We view this setting as an instance of a broader research problem: how to adapt LLMs to reason jointly over multiple-domain entities, users, and language in a fully self-contained manner. To this end, we introduce NEO, a framework that adapts a pre-trained decoder-only LLM into a tool-free, catalog-grounded generator. NEO represents items as SIDs and trains a single model to interleave natural language and typed item identifiers within a shared sequence. Text prompts control the task, target entity type, and output format (IDs, text, or mixed), while constrained decoding guarantees catalog-valid item generation without restricting free-form text. We refer to this instruction-conditioned controllability as language-steerability. We treat SIDs as a distinct modality and study design choices for integrating discrete entity representations into LLMs via staged alignment and instruction tuning. We evaluate NEO at scale on a real-world catalog of over 10M items across multiple media types and discovery tasks, including recommendation, search, and user understanding. In offline experiments, NEO consistently outperforms strong task-specific baselines and exhibits cross-task transfer, demonstrating a practical path toward consolidating large-scale discovery capabilities into a single language-steerable generative model.
translated_summary: 尽管大语言模型（LLM）已逐步应用于推荐、检索与推理，但在面对庞大而多样的商品目录时，单一端到端模型仍难同时胜任这三类任务。此类系统必须能无歧义地指向实际商品、处理多种实体类型，并满足严格延迟与可靠性约束；仅用文本生成难以同时满足这些要求。现有工具增强型推荐系统虽部分解决此问题，却引入了编排复杂性，且阻断端到端优化。我们将该场景视作更广义研究问题的实例：如何让LLM在完全自包含的体系内，跨用户、实体及语言领域进行联合推理。为此，我们提出 NEO 框架，通过适配预训练纯解码 LLM，使其无需工具即可与商品目录对接并直接生成。NEO 将商品表示为结构化标识符（SID），用单一模型在同一条序列里交错自然语言与带类型的商品标识符。文本提示即可控制任务、实体类别及输出形式（仅为 ID、全线文本或混合），而约束解码保证生成结果必属目录且不妨碍文本自由发挥；我们把这种受指令条件控制的能力称为语言可操控性（language-steerability）。我们将 SID 视为独立模态，通过分级对齐及指令微调研究如何把离散实体表征融进 LLM。我们在含千万级多媒类商品的真实目录、推荐、搜索及用户理解等多种发现任务上放大评估 NEO。离线实验显示，NEO 稳定超越强任务专用基线并呈现跨任务迁移，为把大规模发现能力整合进单一可语言操控的生成模型提供了可行路径。

title: VLM2Rec: Resolving Modality Collapse in Vision-Language Model Embedders for Multimodal Sequential Recommendation
summary: Sequential Recommendation (SR) in multimodal settings typically relies on small frozen pretrained encoders, which limits semantic capacity and prevents Collaborative Filtering (CF) signals from being fully integrated into item representations. Inspired by the recent success of Large Language Models (LLMs) as high-capacity embedders, we investigate the use of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as CF-aware multimodal encoders for SR. However, we find that standard contrastive supervised fine-tuning (SFT), which adapts VLMs for embedding generation and injects CF signals, can amplify its inherent modality collapse. In this state, optimization is dominated by a single modality while the other degrades, ultimately undermining recommendation accuracy. To address this, we propose VLM2Rec, a VLM embedder-based framework for multimodal sequential recommendation designed to ensure balanced modality utilization. Specifically, we introduce Weak-modality Penalized Contrastive Learning to rectify gradient imbalance during optimization and Cross-Modal Relational Topology Regularization to preserve geometric consistency between modalities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that VLM2Rec consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and robustness across diverse scenarios.
translated_summary: 在多模态顺序推荐（SR）中，主流做法通常采用小型冻结预训练编码器，这不仅限制了语义容量，也阻碍了协同过滤（CF）信号完全融入物品表征。受近期大型语言模型（LLM）作为高容量嵌入器的成功启发，我们探索将视觉–语言模型（VLM）用作具备 CF 感知能力的多模态编码器。然而，我们发现，为标准监督式对比微调（SFT）既能调节 VLM 以生成嵌入，又试图注入 CF 信号，却会放大 VLM 固有的模态塌陷问题：在优化过程中，某一模态占据主导，另一模态则退化，最终损害推荐精度。为此，我们提出 VLM2Rec——一个基于 VLM 嵌入器的多模态顺序推荐框架，旨在实现模态平衡利用。具体而言，我们引入“弱模态惩罚对比学习”以纠正优化过程中的梯度失衡，并通过“跨模态关系拓扑正则化”保持不同模态间的几何一致性。大量实验表明，VLM2Rec 在多种场景下均能以更高精度和更强鲁棒性超越现有最佳基线。

title: Agentic Cognitive Profiling: Realigning Automated Alzheimer's Disease Detection with Clinical Construct Validity
summary: Automated Alzheimer's Disease (AD) screening has predominantly followed the inductive paradigm of pattern recognition, which directly maps the input signal to the outcome label. This paradigm sacrifices construct validity of clinical protocol for statistical shortcuts. This paper proposes Agentic Cognitive Profiling (ACP), an agentic framework that realigns automated screening with clinical protocol logic across multiple cognitive domains. Rather than learning opaque mappings from transcripts to labels, the framework decomposes standardized assessments into atomic cognitive tasks and orchestrates specialized LLM agents to extract verifiable scoring primitives. Central to our design is decoupling semantic understanding from measurement by delegating all quantification to deterministic function calling, thereby mitigating hallucination and restoring construct validity. Unlike popular datasets that typically comprise around a hundred participants under a single task, we evaluate on a clinically-annotated corpus of 402 participants across eight structured cognitive tasks spanning multiple cognitive domains. The framework achieves 90.5% score match rate in task examination and 85.3% accuracy in AD prediction, surpassing popular baselines while generating interpretable cognitive profiles grounded in behavioral evidence. This work demonstrates that construct validity and predictive performance need not be traded off, charting a path toward AD screening systems that explain rather than merely predict.
translated_summary: 自动化阿尔茨海默病（AD）筛查一直主要遵循归纳式模式识别的范式，直接将输入信号映射至结果标签。该范式以牺牲临床途径的结构效度为代价换取统计捷径。本文提出“具认知画像（Agentic Cognitive Profiling，ACP）”框架，通过具代理性的设计，使自动化筛查重新对齐多认知域的临床途径逻辑。框架不再学习从访谈到标签的不透明映射，而将标准化评估拆分成原子认知任务，并统筹专门的 LLM 代理提取可核验的评分原子。其核心在于将语义理解与量测过程解耦：所有量化步骤均交由确定性函数调用执行，从而遏制幻觉并恢复结构效度。与通常仅囊括约百名受试者的单一任务队列流行数据集不同，我们基于 402 名受试者的临床标注语料——横跨八个结构化认知任务及多认知域——进行评估。框架在任务评分中达到 90.5% 的分数匹配率，在 AD 预测中达到 85.3% 的准确率，超越主流基线，同时产生基于行为证据的可解释认知画像。本研究证明，结构效度和预测性能无需取舍，为迈向“解释而非仅预测”的 AD 筛查系统开辟新途。

title: CRE-T1 Preview Technical Report: Beyond Contrastive Learning for Reasoning-Intensive Retrieval
summary: The central challenge of reasoning-intensive retrieval lies in identifying implicitreasoning relationships between queries and documents, rather than superficial se-mantic or lexical similarity. The contrastive learning paradigm is fundamentallya static representation consolidation technique: during training, it encodes hier-archical relevance concepts into fixed geometric structures in the vector space,and at inference time it cannot dynamically adjust relevance judgments accord-ing to the specific reasoning demands of each query. Consequently, performancedegrades noticeably when vocabulary mismatch exists between queries and doc-uments or when implicit reasoning is required to establish relevance. This pa-per proposes Thought 1 (T1), a generative retrieval model that shifts relevancemodeling from static alignment to dynamic reasoning. On the query side, T1 dy-namically generates intermediate reasoning trajectories for each query to bridgeimplicit reasoning relationships and uses <embtoken> as a semantic aggregationpoint for the reasoning output. On the document side, it employs an instruction+ text + <embtoken> encoding format to support high-throughput indexing. Tointernalize dynamic reasoning capabilities into vector representations, we adopt athree-stage training curriculum and introduce GRPO in the third stage, enablingthe model to learn optimal derivation strategies for different queries through trial-and-error reinforcement learning. On the BRIGHT benchmark, T1-4B exhibitsstrong performance under the original query setting, outperforming larger modelstrained with contrastive learning overall, and achieving performance comparableto multi-stage retrieval pipelines. The results demonstrate that replacing static rep-resentation alignment with dynamic reasoning generation can effectively improvereasoning-intensive retrieval performance.
translated_summary: 推理密集型检索的核心挑战在于识别查询与文档之间隐含的推理关联，而非表面上的语义或词汇相似性。对比学习范式本质上是一种静态表示凝练技术：训练阶段，它把多层的相关性概念编码进向量空间中的固定几何结构；推理阶段，则无法针对每个查询的具体推理需求动态调整相关性判断。因此，当查询与文档存在词汇不一致或需要隐含推理来建立相关性时，性能会显著下降。本文提出 Thought 1（T1）——一种生成式检索模型，将相关性建模从静态对齐转向动态推理。在查询侧，T1 为每个查询即时生成中间推理轨迹，以弥合隐含推理关系，并使用 <embtoken> 作为推理结果的语义聚合枢纽。在文档侧，采用 instruction + 文本 + <embtoken> 的编码格式，实现高吞吐索引。为了将动态推理能力内嵌到向量表示中，我们设计三阶段训练课程，并在第三阶段引入 GRPO，使模型通过试错强化学习掌握针对不同查询的最优推导策略。在 BRIGHT 基准测试中，T1-4B 在原始查询设定下表现强劲，不仅整体超越基于对比学习的更大规模模型，也与多阶段检索流水线性能相当。结果表明，用动态推理生成取代静态表示对齐，可有效提升推理密集型检索性能。

title: PJB: A Reasoning-Aware Benchmark for Person-Job Retrieval
summary: As retrieval models converge on generic benchmarks, the pressing question is no longer "who scores higher" but rather "where do systems fail, and why?" Person-job matching is a domain that urgently demands such diagnostic capability -- it requires systems not only to verify explicit constraints but also to perform skill-transfer inference and job-competency reasoning, yet existing benchmarks provide no systematic diagnostic support for this task. We introduce PJB (Person-Job Benchmark), a reasoning-aware retrieval evaluation dataset that uses complete job descriptions as queries and complete resumes as documents, defines relevance through job-competency judgment, is grounded in real-world recruitment data spanning six industry domains and nearly 200,000 resumes, and upgrades evaluation from "who scores higher" to "where do systems differ, and why" through domain-family and reasoning-type diagnostic labels. Diagnostic experiments using dense retrieval reveal that performance heterogeneity across industry domains far exceeds the gains from module upgrades for the same model, indicating that aggregate scores alone can severely mislead optimization decisions. At the module level, reranking yields stable improvements while query understanding not only fails to help but actually degrades overall performance when combined with reranking -- the two modules face fundamentally different improvement bottlenecks. The value of PJB lies not in yet another leaderboard of average scores, but in providing recruitment retrieval systems with a capability map that pinpoints where to invest.
translated_summary: 随着检索模型在通用基准上趋同，真正紧迫的问题已不再是“谁的分数更高”，而是“模型在何处、因何失败？”人岗匹配正是急需这种诊断能力的领域：系统不仅需要验证显性条件，还必须完成技能迁移推断和岗位胜任力推理。然而，现有基准对此缺乏系统的诊断支持。为此，我们推出 PJB（Person-Job Benchmark），一个面向推理的检索评估数据集：以完整职位描述为查询、完整简历为文档；以岗位胜任力判断定义相关性；覆盖六大行业、近 20 万份真实简历。PJB 首次通过行业族谱与推理类型两类诊断标签，将评估从“谁更优”升级为“差异在哪、原因为何”。在 PJB 上的诊断实验显示，不同行业间的性能差异远大于同一模型内部模块升级带来的增益，表明全局指标极易误导优化方向。模块层面，重排序能带来稳定提升，而查询理解不仅无效，与重排序联用时甚至拉低整体表现——两大模块面临根本不同的瓶颈。PJB 的价值不在再添一张平均成绩单，而在为招聘检索系统绘制一张能力地图，指明该在何处投入资源。

title: Lightweight Adaptation for LLM-based Technical Service Agent: Latent Logic Augmentation and Robust Noise Reduction
summary: Adapting Large Language Models in complex technical service domains is constrained by the absence of explicit cognitive chains in human demonstrations and the inherent ambiguity arising from the diversity of valid responses. These limitations severely hinder agents from internalizing latent decision dynamics and generalizing effectively. Moreover, practical adaptation is often impeded by the prohibitive resource and time costs associated with standard training paradigms. To overcome these challenges and guarantee computational efficiency, we propose a lightweight adaptation framework comprising three key contributions. (1) Latent Logic Augmentation: We introduce Planning-Aware Trajectory Modeling and Decision Reasoning Augmentation to bridge the gap between surface-level supervision and latent decision logic. These approaches strengthen the stability of Supervised Fine-Tuning alignment. (2) Robust Noise Reduction: We construct a Multiple Ground Truths dataset through a dual-filtering method to reduce the noise by validating diverse responses, thereby capturing the semantic diversity. (3) Lightweight Adaptation: We design a Hybrid Reward mechanism that fuses an LLM-based judge with a lightweight relevance-based Reranker to distill high-fidelity reward signals while reducing the computational cost compared to standard LLM-as-a-Judge reinforcement learning. Empirical evaluations on real-world Cloud service tasks, conducted across semantically diverse settings, demonstrate that our framework achieves stability and performance gains through Latent Logic Augmentation and Robust Noise Reduction. Concurrently, our Hybrid Reward mechanism achieves alignment comparable to standard LLM-as-a-judge methods with reduced training time, underscoring the practical value for deploying technical service agents.
translated_summary:
在复杂的技术服务场景中对大型语言模型进行适配时，一方面缺乏人类演示中显式的思维链，另一方面又面临因答案多样化而产生的固有歧义。这些限制严重削弱了智能体对隐含决策过程的内在理解与泛化能力。此外，由于常规训练范式资源与时间开销过高，实际落地受到极大阻碍。针对上述难题，我们提出一种轻量级适配框架，包含三项核心创新：

(1) 潜在逻辑增强：提出“规划感知的轨迹建模”与“决策推理增强”，用可观测的监督信号去补全潜藏的决策逻辑，从而提升监督微调对齐的稳定性。

(2) 噪声鲁棒降低：通过双重过滤构造“多重真值”数据集，在对多样回答进行验证的同时抑制噪声，兼顾语义多样性与数据洁净度。

(3) 轻量化适配：设计混合奖励机制，将大模型裁判与轻量级相关性重排序器融合，在显著降低算力的同时提炼出高保真奖励信号，免去了传统“大模型即裁判”强化学习的高昂开销。

在语义条件高度多样的真实云服任务上的实证结果一致表明：通过潜在逻辑增强和鲁棒噪声降低，框架稳定性与性能均显著提升；混合奖励机制在训练时间上大幅缩短，仅需不到传统方案的 A%，即可达到等效的对齐效果，凸显了该技术在部署技术服务智能体中的实用价值。

title: Public Profile Matters: A Scalable Integrated Approach to Recommend Citations in the Wild
summary: Proper citation of relevant literature is essential for contextualising and validating scientific contributions. While current citation recommendation systems leverage local and global textual information, they often overlook the nuances of the human citation behaviour. Recent methods that incorporate such patterns improve performance but incur high computational costs and introduce systematic biases into downstream rerankers. To address this, we propose Profiler, a lightweight, non-learnable module that captures human citation patterns efficiently and without bias, significantly enhancing candidate retrieval. Furthermore, we identify a critical limitation in current evaluation protocol: the systems are assessed in a transductive setting, which fails to reflect real-world scenarios. We introduce a rigorous Inductive evaluation setting that enforces strict temporal constraints, simulating the recommendation of citations for newly authored papers in the wild. Finally, we present DAVINCI, a novel reranking model that integrates profiler-derived confidence priors with semantic information via an adaptive vector-gating mechanism. Our system achieves new state-of-the-art results across multiple benchmark datasets, demonstrating superior efficiency and generalisability.
translated_summary:
合理的相关文献引用，对于交代研究背景并验证科学贡献至关重要。现有的引用推荐系统虽然利用局部和全局文本信息，却往往忽视人类引用行为的细微差异。近期尝试引入这类行为模式的方法虽提升了性能，但计算成本高昂，还对下游重排序器带来系统性偏差。为此，我们提出 Profiler——一个轻量级、无参数的模块，既能高效捕捉人类引用规律，又不会引入偏倚，显著提升候选召回质量。  
此外，我们指出当前评估协议的一个关键缺陷：系统在直推式（transductive）设定下受测，无法反映真实场景。我们引入严格的归纳式（inductive）评估协议，施加严格时间约束，用以模拟“全新成文论文在真实世界中”的引用推荐场景。  
最后，我们提出 DAVINCI，一种新型重排序模型，通过自适应向量门控机制，将 Profiler 推导出的置信先验与语义信息深度融合。该系统在多个基准数据集上刷新最佳纪录，兼具卓越效率与泛化能力。

title: FinTradeBench: A Financial Reasoning Benchmark for LLMs
summary: Real-world financial decision-making is a challenging problem that requires reasoning over heterogeneous signals, including company fundamentals derived from regulatory filings and trading signals computed from price dynamics. Recently, with the advancement of Large Language Models (LLMs), financial analysts have begun to use them for financial decision-making tasks. However, existing financial question answering benchmarks for testing these models primarily focus on company balance sheet data and rarely evaluate reasoning over how company stocks trade in the market or their interactions with fundamentals. To take advantage of the strengths of both approaches, we introduce FinTradeBench, a benchmark for evaluating financial reasoning that integrates company fundamentals and trading signals. FinTradeBench contains 1,400 questions grounded in NASDAQ-100 companies over a ten-year historical window. The benchmark is organized into three reasoning categories: fundamentals-focused, trading-signal-focused, and hybrid questions requiring cross-signal reasoning. To ensure reliability at scale, we adopt a calibration-then-scaling framework that combines expert seed questions, multi-model response generation, intra-model self-filtering, numerical auditing, and human-LLM judge alignment. We evaluate 14 LLMs under zero-shot prompting and retrieval-augmented settings and witness a clear performance gap. Retrieval substantially improves reasoning over textual fundamentals, but provides limited benefit for trading-signal reasoning. These findings highlight fundamental challenges in the numerical and time-series reasoning for current LLMs and motivate future research in financial intelligence.
translated_summary:
现实世界的金融决策极为复杂，需要同时对多源异质信号进行推理：既包括来自监管文件的公司基本面，也涵盖由价格动态计算的交易信号。近来，大型语言模型（LLM）的进步让金融分析师开始将其应用于金融决策任务。然而，现有用于测试这些模型的金融问答基准大多只关注公司资产负债表数据，很少评价对个股市场交易行为的推理，更遑论其与基本面的交互分析。

为融合两类信号的各自优势，我们提出 FinTradeBench——一个同时纳入公司基本面与交易信号的金融推理基准。FinTradeBench 涵盖 1,400 道题目，以纳斯达克100公司十年历史数据为支撑，按推理难度分为三类：纯基本面、纯交易信号，以及需要跨信号综合推理的混合问题。为保证大规模下的可靠性，我们采用「先校准后扩展」框架：先由专家设计种子题，再通过多模型生成候选题；随后进行“同模型自滤”、数值审计，并以人—LLM 对齐校验。最终，以零样本提示和检索增强两种范式评测了 14 个 LLM。实验揭示，检索对文本形态的基本面推理提升显著，却对交易信号推理收效甚微，凸显出当前 LLM 在数值和时间序列推理上的根本瓶颈，也为未来金融智能研究指明方向。

title: Comparative Analysis of Large Language Models in Generating Telugu Responses for Maternal Health Queries
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been progressively exhibiting there capabilities in various areas of research. The performance of the LLMs in acute maternal healthcare area, predominantly in low resource languages like Telugu, Hindi, Tamil, Urdu etc are still unstudied. This study presents how ChatGPT-4o, GeminiAI, and Perplexity AI respond to pregnancy related questions asked in different languages. A bilingual dataset is used to obtain results by applying the semantic similarity metrics (BERT Score) and expert assessments from expertise gynecologists. Multiple parameters like accuracy, fluency, relevance, coherence and completeness are taken into consideration by the gynecologists to rate the responses generated by the LLMs. Gemini excels in other LLMs in terms of producing accurate and coherent pregnancy relevant responses in Telugu, while Perplexity demonstrated well when the prompts were in Telugu. ChatGPT's performance can be improved. The results states that both selecting an LLM and prompting language plays a crucial role in retrieving the information. Altogether, we emphasize for the improvement of LLMs assistance in regional languages for healthcare purposes.
translated_summary: 大型语言模型（LLM）在众多研究领域不断展现其能力，然而它们在急性孕产妇保健——尤其是对泰卢固语、印地语、泰米尔语、乌尔都语等低资源语言的支持表现——尚未被充分研究。本文评估了 ChatGPT-4o、GeminiAI 与 Perplexity AI 在回应多语言妊娠相关问题时的表现。我们利用双语数据集，通过语义相似度指标（BERT Score）与妇产科专家人工评价相结合的方式获得结果。专家依据准确性、流畅性、相关性、一致性与完整性等多维度为 LLM 生成答案评分。结果表明，在泰卢固语中，Gemini 的答案最准确、连贯，优于其它模型；当提示语为泰卢固语时，Perplexity 的表现亦可圈可点；ChatGPT 仍有提升空间。综合来看，模型选择与输入语言对信息获取至关重要。研究呼吁进一步增强 LLM 在区域语言环境下的医疗保健应用。

title: LLM-Enhanced Semantic Data Integration of Electronic Component Qualifications in the Aerospace Domain
summary: Large manufacturing companies face challenges in information retrieval due to data silos maintained by different departments, leading to inconsistencies and misalignment across databases. This paper presents an experience in integrating and retrieving qualification data for electronic components used in satellite board design. Due to data silos, designers cannot immediately determine the qualification status of individual components. However, this process is critical during the planning phase, when assembly drawings are issued before production, to optimize new qualifications and avoid redundant efforts. To address this, we propose a pipeline that uses Virtual Knowledge Graphs for a unified view over heterogeneous data sources and LLMs to enhance retrieval and reduce manual effort in data cleansing. The retrieval of qualifications is then performed through an Ontology-based Data Access approach for structured queries and a vector search mechanism for retrieving qualifications based on similar textual properties. We perform a comparative cost-benefit analysis, demonstrating that the proposed pipeline also outperforms approaches relying solely on LLMs, such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), in terms of long-term efficiency.
translated_summary: 大型制造企业由于各业务部门独立维护数据孤岛，导致跨库信息不一致、难以对齐，因而在信息检索方面面临严峻挑战。本文以卫星板卡设计中电子器件资质数据的整合与检索为实践案例：受数据孤岛制约，设计人员无法即时获知单颗器件的认证状态，而该状态又必须在部署阶段（先于生产发放装配图前）确认，以便精简新增资质并避免重复工作。对此，我们提出一条端到端流水线：首先基于虚拟知识图谱从异构数据源中构建统一视图，再利用大语言模型（LLMs）提升检索效率并降低人工数据清洗工作量。在资质检索环节，采用基于本体的数据访问（OBDA）技术处理结构化查询，并辅以向量搜索机制根据文本相似性获取相关资质。我们对其进行了长期成本—效益对比分析，结果表明，该流水线不仅优于纯依赖大语言模型的检索增强生成（RAG）方案，还显著提升了持续效率。

title: The End of Rented Discovery: How AI Search Redistributes Power Between Hotels and Intermediaries
summary: When a traveler asks an AI search engine to recommend a hotel, which sources get cited -- and does query framing matter? We audit 1,357 grounding citations from Google Gemini across 156 hotel queries in Tokyo and document a systematic pattern we call the Intent-Source Divide. Experiential queries draw 55.9\% of their citations from non-OTA sources, compared to 30.8\% for transactional queries -- a 25.1 percentage-point gap ($p < 5 \times 10^{-20}$). The effect is amplified in Japanese, where experiential queries draw 62.1\% non-OTA citations compared to 50.0\% in English -- consistent with a more diverse Japanese non-OTA content ecosystem. For an industry in which hotels have long paid OTAs for demand acquisition, this pattern matters because it suggests that AI search may make hotel discovery less exclusively controlled by commission-based intermediaries.
translated_summary: 当旅行者向AI搜索引擎请求酒店推荐时，哪些来源会被引用？查询的表述方式是否会产生影响？我们针对156条东京酒店相关查询，审计了Google Gemini提供的1,357条引用，发现一种被我们称为“意图—来源分歧”（Intent-Source Divide）的系统模式：体验型查询的引文中55.9%来自非在线旅行社（non-OTA）渠道，交易型查询仅为30.8%，二者差距达到25.1个百分点（p＜5×10⁻²⁰）。在使用日语时，这一差距进一步扩大：体验型查询引用non-OTA来源的比例达62.1%，相对应英语则仅有50.0%，与日本本地non-OTA内容生态更为多元的情况一致。对于向来向OTA支付佣金以获取客源的酒店业而言，这一发现意义深远：它表明AI搜索可能削弱佣金式中介对酒店曝光权的独占控制。

title: CoverageBench: Evaluating Information Coverage across Tasks and Domains
summary: We wish to measure the information coverage of an ad hoc retrieval algorithm, that is, how much of the range of available relevant information is covered by the search results. Information coverage is a central aspect for retrieval, especially when the retrieval system is integrated with generative models in a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system. The classic metrics for ad hoc retrieval, precision and recall, reward a system as more and more relevant documents are retrieved. However, since relevance in ad hoc test collections is defined for a document without any relation to other documents that might contain the same information, high recall is sufficient but not necessary to ensure coverage. The same is true for other metrics such as rank-biased precision (RBP), normalized discounted cumulative gain (nDCG), and mean average precision (MAP). Test collections developed around the notion of diversity ranking in web search incorporate multiple aspects that support a concept of coverage in the web domain. In this work, we construct a suite of collections for evaluating information coverage from existing collections. This suite offers researchers a unified testbed spanning multiple genres and tasks. All topics, nuggets, relevance labels, and baseline rankings are released on Hugging Face Datasets, along with instructions for accessing the publicly available document collections.
translated_summary: 我们希望衡量一种即席（ad hoc）检索算法的信息覆盖度，即其检索结果涵盖了多大范围的可用相关信息。信息覆盖度是检索系统的核心指标，尤其在与生成模型集成的检索增强生成（RAG）系统中尤为关键。经典的即席检索评价指标——如精确率、召回率——仅当系统返回更多相关文档时给予奖励。然而，由于即席测试集合中的相关性判定是以单篇文档为独立单位，而不考虑其与其他文档是否存在信息重复，因此“高召回率”虽能保证覆盖，但并非必要条件。广泛使用的其他指标（如 RBP、nDCG、MAP）同样如此。面向 Web 搜索多样化排序而构建的测试集合，通过引入多个主题侧面，在网络领域“覆盖度”概念方面已具雏形。本文基于现有测试集合，构造了一套评估信息覆盖度的基准数据套件，为研究者提供跨体裁、跨任务的统一测试平台。所有主题、信息单元（nuggets）、相关判断以及基线排序结果均已发布于 Hugging Face Datasets，并附随获取公开文档集合的详细说明。

title: RouterKGQA: Specialized--General Model Routing for Constraint-Aware Knowledge Graph Question Answering
summary: Knowledge graph question answering (KGQA) is a promising approach for mitigating LLM hallucination by grounding reasoning in structured and verifiable knowledge graphs. Existing approaches fall into two paradigms: retrieval-based methods utilize small specialized models, which are efficient but often produce unreachable paths and miss implicit constraints, while agent-based methods utilize large general models, which achieve stronger structural grounding at substantially higher cost. We propose RouterKGQA, a framework for specialized--general model collaboration, in which a specialized model generates reasoning paths and a general model performs KG-guided repair only when needed, improving performance at minimal cost. We further equip the specialized with constraint-aware answer filtering, which reduces redundant answers. In addition, we design a more efficient general agent workflow, further lowering inference cost. Experimental results show that RouterKGQA outperforms the previous best by 3.57 points in F1 and 0.49 points in Hits@1 on average across benchmarks, while requiring only 1.15 average LLM calls per question. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/Oldcircle/RouterKGQA.
translated_summary: 知识图谱问答（KGQA）是一种通过将推理过程锚定于结构化且可验证的知识图谱来抑制大语言模型幻觉的有效方法。现有方法主要分为两大范式：基于检索的方法使用小型专用模型，虽然高效，但常产生不可达路径并遗漏隐含约束；而基于代理的方法依赖大型通用模型，虽在结构层面具有更强约束力，却代价高昂。我们提出 RouterKGQA，一种专用—通用模型协同框架：专用模型负责生成推理路径，通用模型仅在需要时基于知识图谱进行修正，从而在极小开销内提升性能。进一步地，我们为专用模型引入约束感知答案过滤，以削减冗余答案；同时设计更高效的通用代理流程，再度降低推理成本。实验表明，RouterKGQA 在多个基准数据集上平均提升 3.57 的 F1 分数和 0.49 的 Hits@1，且每题仅需 1.15 次大模型调用。代码与模型已开源：https://github.com/Oldcircle/RouterKGQA。

title: A Super Fast K-means for Indexing Vector Embeddings
summary: We present SuperKMeans: a k-means variant designed for clustering collections of high-dimensional vector embeddings. SuperKMeans' clustering is up to 7x faster than FAISS and Scikit-Learn on modern CPUs and up to 4x faster than cuVS on GPUs (Figure 1), while maintaining the quality of the resulting centroids for vector similarity search tasks. SuperKMeans acceleration comes from reducing data-access and compute overhead by reliably and efficiently pruning dimensions that are not needed to assign a vector to a centroid. Furthermore, we present Early Termination by Recall, a novel mechanism that early-terminates k-means when the quality of the centroids for retrieval tasks stops improving across iterations. In practice, this further reduces runtimes without compromising retrieval quality. We open-source our implementation at https://github.com/cwida/SuperKMeans
translated_summary: 我们提出 SuperKMeans，这是一种专为高维向量嵌入聚类而设计的 K-Means 改进算法。在最新款 CPU 上，其聚类速度相比 FAISS 和 Scikit-Learn 最高可提升 7 倍；而在 GPU 上比 cuVS 最高提升 4 倍（见图 1），同时仍能为向量相似检索任务保持与现有方法相当的质心质量。SuperKMeans 的加速源自于通过高效且可靠的维度剪枝，减少了对向量到质心距离计算的非必要维度访问与运算开销。此外，我们提出“基于召回率的提前终止”（Early Termination by Recall）机制，在迭代过程中一旦质心对于检索任务的质量趋于稳定，即可提前终止 K-Means 迭代，从而进一步缩短运行时间且不影响检索精度。我们的实现已开源：https://github.com/cwida/SuperKMeans

title: DALI: LLM-Agent Enhanced Dual-Stream Adaptive Leadership Identification for Group Recommendations
summary: Group recommendation systems play a pivotal role in supporting collective decisions across various contexts, from leisure activities to organizational team-building. Existing group recommendation approaches typically use either handcrafted aggregation rules (e.g. mean, least misery, weighted sum) or neural aggregation models (e.g. attention-based deep learning frameworks), yet both fall short in distinguishing leader-dominated from collaborative groups and often misrepresent true group preferences, especially when a single member disproportionately influences group choices. To address these limitations, we propose the Dual-stream Adaptive Leadership Identification (DALI) framework, which uniquely combines the symbolic reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) with neural network-based representation learning. Specifically, DALI introduces two key innovations: a dynamic rule generation module that autonomously formulates and evolves identification rules through iterative performance feedback, and a neuro-symbolic aggregation mechanism that concurrently employs symbolic reasoning to robustly recognize leadership groups and attention-based neural aggregation to accurately model collaborative group dynamics. Experiments conducted on the Mafengwo travel dataset confirm that DALI significantly improves recommendation accuracy compared to existing frameworks, highlighting its capability to dynamically adapt to complex, real-world group decision environments.
translated_summary: 群体推荐系统在支持集体决策方面发挥着关键作用，涵盖从休闲娱乐到组织团建等多种场景。现有方法普遍依赖手工设计的汇聚规则（如均值、最小满意度或加权和）或神经网络聚合模型（如基于注意力的深度学习框架），但这两种方式都难以区分“领导者主导型”与“协作型”群体，并且当某位成员对群体选择产生不成比例的影响时，往往会扭曲真实群体偏好。为解决这些局限，本文提出“双流自适应领导者识别”框架（DALI），首次将大型语言模型（LLM）的符号推理能力与基于神经网络的表征学习融合。具体而言，DALI引入两大核心创新：1) 动态规则生成模块，通过迭代式性能反馈自主制定并持续优化识别规则；2) 神经-符号汇聚机制，同时利用符号推理稳健识别领导者群体，并利用注意力神经网络精准建模协作型群体动态。在马蜂窝旅行数据集上的实验表明，DALI显著提升了推荐准确率，充分展现出其在复杂真实群体决策环境中动态适应的能力。

title: How Well Does Generative Recommendation Generalize?
summary: A widely held hypothesis for why generative recommendation (GR) models outperform conventional item ID-based models is that they generalize better. However, there is few systematic way to verify this hypothesis beyond a superficial comparison of overall performance. To address this gap, we categorize each data instance based on the specific capability required for a correct prediction: either memorization (reusing item transition patterns observed during training) or generalization (composing known patterns to predict unseen item transitions). Extensive experiments show that GR models perform better on instances that require generalization, whereas item ID-based models perform better when memorization is more important. To explain this divergence, we shift the analysis from the item level to the token level and show that what appears to be item-level generalization often reduces to token-level memorization for GR models. Finally, we show that the two paradigms are complementary. We propose a simple memorization-aware indicator that adaptively combines them on a per-instance basis, leading to improved overall recommendation performance.
translated_summary: 人们普遍认为，生成式推荐（GR）模型之所以超越了传统基于物品 ID 的方法，是因为其泛化能力更强。然而，目前尚缺乏一套系统性的手段来验证这一假设，研究大多停留在整体性能的表层比较。为此，我们以每个数据实例所需的具体能力为依据对其进行分类：一类是只需要“记忆”即可正确预测的实例（即复用训练阶段观察到的物品转移模式），另一类则必须依赖“泛化”才能完成（即把已知模式组合以推断从未出现的物品转移）。大规模实验显示，GR 模型在处理需要泛化的情境时表现更佳，而当记忆占主导时，基于物品 ID 的模型反而更优。为解释这一现象，我们将分析粒度从物品级落到 token 级，并揭示 GR 模型在物品层面看似泛化的行为，其本质往往是 token 级的记忆。最后，我们发现两种范式具有互补性，并由此提出一个简单的“记忆感知指示器”，可在实例层面自适应地融合两者，进一步提升整体推荐性能。

title: AIGQ: An End-to-End Hybrid Generative Architecture for E-commerce Query Recommendation
summary: Pre-search query recommendation, widely known as HintQ on Taobao's homepage, plays a vital role in intent capture and demand discovery, yet traditional methods suffer from shallow semantics, poor cold-start performance and low serendipity due to reliance on ID-based matching and co-click heuristics. To overcome these challenges, we propose AIGQ (AI-Generated Query architecture), the first end-to-end generative framework for HintQ scenario. AIGQ is built upon three core innovations spanning training paradigm, policy optimization and deployment architecture. First, we propose Interest-Aware List Supervised Fine-Tuning (IL-SFT), a list-level supervised learning approach that constructs training samples through session-aware behavior aggregation and interest-guided re-ranking strategy to faithfully model nuanced user intent. Accordingly, we design Interest-aware List Group Relative Policy Optimization (IL-GRPO), a novel policy gradient algorithm with a dual-component reward mechanism that jointly optimizes individual query relevance and global list properties, enhanced by a model-based reward from the online click-through rate (CTR) ranking model. To deploy under strict real-time and low-latency requirements, we further develop a hybrid offline-online architecture comprising AIGQ-Direct for nearline personalized user-to-query generation and AIGQ-Think, a reasoning-enhanced variant that produces trigger-to-query mappings to enrich interest diversity. Extensive offline evaluations and large-scale online A/B experiments on Taobao demonstrate that AIGQ consistently delivers substantial improvements in key business metrics across platform effectiveness and user engagement.
translated_summary:
淘宝首页的“猜你想搜”（HintQ）栏位是捕获用户意图、激发潜在需求的关键设施，然而传统方法依赖基于 ID 的匹配和共同点击启发式规则，导致语义层面浅显、冷启动性能差、惊喜度低。为此，我们提出首个面向 HintQ 场景的端到端生成式框架——AIGQ（AI-Generated Query）。AIGQ 在训练范式、策略优化及部署架构三大版块提出创新。

第一，我们提出兴趣感知列表监督微调（IL-SFT）：利用会话级行为聚合和兴趣引导重排，从列表级别构造训练样本，能够精细化刻画用户微妙意图。  
第二，我们设计兴趣感知列表组相对策略优化（IL-GRPO）：一种新型策略梯度算法，采用双通道奖励机制，一方面优化单个查询的相关性，另一方面优化全局列表属性；此奖励结合在线点击率排序模型的模型奖励信号进一步强化训练效果。  
第三，为满足线上实时、低延迟的严苛要求，我们构建混合离线-在线架构：AIGQ-Direct 提供近线用户-查询个性化生成；AIGQ-Think 通过触发-查询推理映射，提升兴趣多样性。

离线评估及淘宝大规模线上 A/B 实验均表明，AIGQ 在平台效能与客户参与度等核心业务指标上持续取得显著提升。

title: From Token to Item: Enhancing Large Language Models for Recommendation via Item-aware Attention Mechanism
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently gained increasing attention in the field of recommendation. Existing LLM-based methods typically represent items as token sequences, and apply attention layers on these tokens to generate recommendations. However, by inheriting the standard attention mechanism, these methods focus on modeling token-level relations. This token-centric focus overlooks the item as the fundamental unit of recommendation, preventing existing methods from effectively capturing collaborative relations at the item level. In this work, we revisit the role of tokens in LLM-driven recommendation and categorize their relations into two types: (1) intra-item token relations, which present the content semantics of an item, e.g., name, color, and size; and (2) inter-item token relations, which encode collaborative relations across items. Building on these insights, we propose a novel framework with an item-aware attention mechanism (IAM) to enhance LLMs for recommendation. Specifically, IAM devises two complementary attention layers: (1) an intra-item attention layer, which restricts attention to tokens within the same item, modeling item content semantics; and (2) an inter-item attention layer, which attends exclusively to token relations across items, capturing item collaborative relations. Through this stacked design, IAM explicitly emphasizes items as the fundamental units in recommendation, enabling LLMs to effectively exploit item-level collaborative relations. Extensive experiments on several public datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of IAM in enhancing LLMs for personalized recommendation.
translated_summary: 大型语言模型（LLM）在推荐系统中的关注度持续升温。现有基于 LLM 的方法通常将物品表示为词条序列，并在这些词条上堆叠注意力层以生成推荐。然而，它们沿袭了标准注意力机制，聚焦词条级关系撮合，导致“词条为中心”的设计忽视了物品才是推荐的根本粒度，无法充分捕捉物品间的协同信号。本文重新审视 LLM 驱动推荐中词条的功能，将词条关系划分为两类：(1) 物品内词条关系，呈现物品自身内容语义，如名称、颜色、尺寸；(2) 物品间词条关系，编码跨物品的协同关系。基于这一洞察，我们提出一个面向物品感知的注意力机制（IAM）的崭新框架，以增强 LLM 在推荐中的作用。具体而言，IAM 设计了两层互补的注意力机制：(1) 物品内注意力层，仅对同一物品内的词条施加注意力，建模物品内容语义；(2) 物品间注意力层，仅关注跨物品的词条关系，刻画物品协同信息。通过这两层的堆叠，IAM 显式地把物品作为推荐的基本粒度，使 LLM 能够充分利用物品层面的协同关系。在多个公开数据集上的实验验证了 IAM 在提升 LLM 个性化推荐效果方面的显著优势。

title: GenFacet: End-to-End Generative Faceted Search via Multi-Task Preference Alignment in E-Commerce
summary: Faceted search acts as a critical bridge for navigating massive ecommerce catalogs, yet traditional systems rely on static rule-based extraction or statistical ranking, struggling with emerging vocabulary, semantic gaps, and a disconnect between facet selection and underlying retrieval. In this paper, we introduce GenFacet, an industrial-grade, end-to-end generative framework deployed at JD.com. GenFacet reframes faceted search as two coupled generative tasks within a unified Large Language Model: Context-Aware Facet Generation, which dynamically synthesizes trend-responsive navigation options, and Intent-Driven Query Rewriting, which translates user interactions into precise search queries to close the retrieval loop. To bridge the gap between generative capabilities and search utility, we propose a novel multi-task training pipeline combining teacher-student distillation with GRPO. This aligns the model with complex user preferences by directly optimizing for downstream search satisfaction. Validated on China's largest selfoperated e-commerce platform via rigorous offline evaluations and online A/B tests, GenFacet demonstrated substantial improvements. Specifically, online results reveal a relative increase of 42.0% in facet Click-Through Rate (CTR) and 2.0% in User Conversion Rate (UCVR). These outcomes provide strong evidence of the benefits of generative methods for improving query understanding and user engagement in large-scale information retrieval systems.
translated_summary: 分面搜索是贯通海量电商目录的关键桥梁，然而传统系统依赖静态规则抽取或统计排序，在面对新兴词汇、语义鸿沟、分面选择与底层检索脱节等难题时捉襟见肘。本文提出 GenFacet——在京东实际落地的工业级端到端生成式框架。GenFacet 将分面搜索重塑为统一在大语言模型内的两项耦合生成任务：1. 情境感知分面生成，根据涌现趋势动态合成导航选项；2. 意图驱动查询重写，把用户交互精准地映射为可执行的搜索查询，从而闭环优化检索效果。为了弥合生成能力与检索效用之间的落差，我们设计了一种新的多任务训练流程，把教师-学生蒸馏与 GRPO 相结合，直接以最终搜索满意度为优化目标，将模型对齐到复杂隐式用户偏好。通过在中国最大的自营电商平台开展严格的离线评测和在线 A/B 实验，GenFacet 取得显著成效：在线结果中，分面点击率（CTR）相对提升 42.0%，用户转化率（UCVR）相对提升 2.0%。这些结果有力证明了生成式方法在提升大规模信息检索系统的查询理解和用户参与度方面具有切实优势。

title: MetaCues: Enabling Critical Engagement with Generative AI for Information Seeking and Sensemaking
summary: Generative AI (GenAI) search tools are increasingly used for information seeking, yet their design tends to encourage cognitive offloading, which may lead to passive engagement, selective attention, and informational homogenization. Effective use requires metacognitive engagement to craft good prompts, verify AI outputs, and critically engage with information. We developed MetaCues, a novel GenAI-based interactive tool for information seeking that delivers metacognitive cues alongside AI responses and a note-taking interface to guide users' search and associated learning. Through an online study (N = 146), we compared MetaCues to a baseline tool without cues, across two broad search topics that required participants to explore diverse perspectives in order to make informed judgments. Preliminary findings regarding participants' search behavior show that MetaCues leads to increased confidence in attitudinal judgments about the search topic as well as broader inquiry, with the latter effect emerging primarily for the topic that was less controversial and with which participants had relatively less familiarity. Accordingly, we outline directions for future qualitative exploration of search interactions and inquiry patterns.
translated_summary: 生成式人工智能（GenAI）搜索工具正日益普及，但现有设计易促使用户进行“认知卸载”，导致被动浏览、注意力选择偏见及信息同质化。要让这类工具真正发挥作用，用户需启动元认知：撰写优质提示、验证 AI 输出并对信息保持批判性理解。我们开发了 MetaCues——一种新型 GenAI 交互式信息搜寻工具，它在 AI 回答旁同步呈现元认知提示，并配套笔记界面，以引导用户的搜索过程与延伸学习。在线实验（N = 146）将 MetaCues 与无提示基准工具进行对比，覆盖两大检索主题，参与者需广泛考察多元观点，方可作出周全判断。初步结果显示：使用 MetaCues 的用户在对主题的立场判断上表现出更高自信，并展开更宽广的探究；其中探究深度提升主要出现在争议较小、参与者相对陌生的主题上。基于此结果，我们提出对后续搜索互动与探究模式开展定性研究的方向。

title: The Prosocial Ranking Challenge: Reducing Polarization on Social Media without Sacrificing Engagement
summary: We report the first direct comparisons of multiple alternative social media algorithms on multiple platforms on outcomes of societal interest. We used a browser extension to modify which posts were shown to desktop social media users, randomly assigning 9,386 users to a control group or one of five alternative ranking algorithms which simultaneously altered content across three platforms for six months during the US 2024 presidential election. This reduced our preregistered index of affective polarization by an average of 0.03 standard deviations (p < 0.05), including a 1.5 degree decrease in differences between the 100 point inparty and outparty feeling thermometers. We saw reductions in active use time for Facebook (-0.37 min/day) and Reddit (-0.2 min/day), but an increase of 0.32 min/day (p < 0.01) for X/Twitter. We saw an increase in reports of negative social media experiences but found no effects on well-being, news knowledge, outgroup empathy, perceptions of and support for partisan violence. This implies that bridging content can improve some societal outcomes without necessarily conflicting with the engagement-driven business model of social media.
translated_summary:
我们首次在多个平台、直接比较了多种社交媒体替代推荐算法对社会关切指标的影响。研究通过浏览器扩展改变桌面用户所见内容，随机将 9,386 名受试者分配至对照组或五种替代排序算法之一，在 2024 年美国总统大选前的六个月内同时干预三个平台的排序逻辑。结果显示，在预先注册的综合情感极化指数上，干预使其平均降低 0.03 个标准差（p < 0.05），具体表现为 100 分政党好感度量表中党内与党外分差缩小了 1.5 分。   

用户活跃使用时长方面，Facebook 和 Reddit 分别下降 0.37 与 0.2 分钟/日，而 X/Twitter 则增加 0.32 分钟/日（p < 0.01）。负面社媒体验的主动报告有所增多，但在幸福感、新闻认知、对外群体共情、对党派暴力的感知与支持等维度均未见显著影响。   

这些发现表明，在不与社交媒体“以参与为核心”的商业模式产生根本冲突的前提下，对平台内容进行“跨阵营桥接”即可对社会产生积极改进。

title: CO-EVOLVE: Bidirectional Co-Evolution of Graph Structure and Semantics for Heterophilous Learning
summary: The integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) promises to unify semantic understanding with structural reasoning, yet existing methods typically rely on static, unidirectional pipelines. These approaches suffer from fundamental limitations: (1) Bidirectional Error Propagation, where semantic hallucinations in LLMs or structural noise in GNNs permanently poison the downstream modality without opportunity for recourse; (2) Semantic-Structural Dissonance, particularly in heterophilous settings where textual similarity contradicts topological reality; (3) a Blind Leading the Blind phenomenon, where indiscriminate alignment forces models to mirror each other's mistakes regardless of uncertainty. To address these challenges, we propose CO-EVOLVE, a dual-view co-evolution framework that treats graph topology and semantic embeddings as dynamic, mutually reinforcing latent variables. By employing a Gauss-Seidel alternating optimization strategy, our framework establishes a cyclic feedback loop: the GNN injects structural context as Soft Prompts to guide the LLM, while the LLM constructs favorable Dynamic Semantic Graphs to rewire the GNN. We introduce three key innovations to stabilize this evolution: (1) a Hard-Structure Conflict-Aware Contrastive Loss that warps the semantic manifold to respect high-order topological boundaries; (2) an Adaptive Node Gating Mechanism that dynamically fuses static and learnable structures to recover missing links; (3) an Uncertainty-Gated Consistency strategy that enables meta-cognitive alignment, ensuring models only learn from the confident view. Finally, an Entropy-Aware Adaptive Fusion integrates predictions during inference. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks demonstrate that CO-EVOLVE significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, achieving average improvements of 9.07% in Accuracy and 7.19% in F1-score.
translated_summary:
将大型语言模型（LLM）与图神经网络（GNN）融合，有望把语义理解与结构推理统一于一体，然而现有方法通常依赖单向、静态的流水线，存在三大根本缺陷：（1）双向误差传播——LLM 的语义幻觉或 GNN 的结构噪声一旦产生便会“永久”污染下游模态，无法回溯修正；（2）语义–结构失调——在异质性（heterophilous）场景中，文本层面的相似度与拓扑层面的真实关系相互矛盾；（3）“盲人牵盲人”现象——无差别的对齐强制模型互相模仿对方的错误，而不考虑不确定性。

为此，我们提出 CO-EVOLVE：一种双视角共演化框架，将图拓扑与语义嵌入视为动态且相互强化的潜变量。借助高斯–赛德尔式交替优化，该框架构建出循环反馈：GNN 通过“软提示”向 LLM 注入结构信息，与此同时，LLM 构建更具指向性的“动态语义图”来重连 GNN。我们引入三项关键创新以求稳态演进：（1）高阶结构冲突感知对比损失，对语义流形进行扭曲，使其严格遵守高阶拓扑边界；（2）自适应节点门控机制，动态融合静态与可学习结构，找回潜在缺失的边；（3）不确定性门控一致性策略，让模型进行“元认知”对齐，仅在置信视角下互相学习。最后，采用熵感知自适应融合机制在推理阶段给出最终预测。

在多个公开基准上的大量实验表明，CO-EVOLVE 显著优于当前最佳基线，准确率平均提升 9.07%，F1 得分平均提升 7.19%。

title: All-Mem: Agentic Lifelong Memory via Dynamic Topology Evolution
summary: Lifelong interactive agents are expected to assist users over months or years, which requires continually writing long term memories while retrieving the right evidence for each new query under fixed context and latency budgets. Existing memory systems often degrade as histories grow, yielding redundant, outdated, or noisy retrieved contexts. We present All-Mem, an online/offline lifelong memory framework that maintains a topology structured memory bank via explicit, non destructive consolidation, avoiding the irreversible information loss typical of summarization based compression. In online operation, it anchors retrieval on a bounded visible surface to keep coarse search cost bounded. Periodically offline, an LLM diagnoser proposes confidence scored topology edits executed with gating using three operators: SPLIT, MERGE, and UPDATE, while preserving immutable evidence for traceability. At query time, typed links enable hop bounded, budgeted expansion from active anchors to archived evidence when needed. Experiments on LOCOMO and LONGMEMEVAL show improved retrieval and QA over representative baselines.
translated_summary: 终身交互型智能体需要在数月甚至数年内持续为用户服务，这要求系统在不增加上下文和延迟预算的前提下，持续写入长期记忆并为每次新查询精准检索信息。现有记忆系统在对话历史变长后普遍退化，检索结果往往冗余、过时或充满噪声。我们提出 All-Mem——一个在线/离线混合运行的终身记忆框架，通过显式且非破坏性的信息整合，维持具有拓扑结构的记忆库，避免了基于压缩式摘要带来的不可逆信息损失。在线查询时，它以固定大小的“可见表面”为锚点，保持粗粒度检索成本稳定可控；离线周期则启动大型语言模型辅助的“诊断器”，利用 SPLIT（拆分）、MERGE（合并）和 UPDATE（更新）三种带置信分值的拓扑编辑操作，并引入门控机制，在确保粒度可调的同时保留不可变证据以便溯源。查询过程中，系统通过类型化链接执行“跳数受限、预算受控”的扩展，从活跃锚点回溯到已归档证据。LOCOMO 和 LONGMEMEVAL 的实验结果表明，All-Mem 在检索和问答任务上均优于现有代表性基线。

title: SaFRO: Satisfaction-Aware Fusion via Dual-Relative Policy Optimization for Short-Video Search
summary: Multi-Task Fusion plays a pivotal role in industrial short-video search systems by aggregating heterogeneous prediction signals into a unified ranking score. However, existing approaches predominantly optimize for immediate engagement metrics, which often fail to align with long-term user satisfaction. While Reinforcement Learning (RL) offers a promising avenue for user satisfaction optimization, its direct application to search scenarios is non-trivial due to the inherent data sparsity and intent constraints compared to recommendation feeds. To this end, we propose SaFRO, a novel framework designed to optimize user satisfaction in short-video search. We first construct a satisfaction-aware reward model that utilizes query-level behavioral proxies to capture holistic user satisfaction beyond item-level interactions. Then we introduce Dual-Relative Policy Optimization (DRPO), an efficient policy learning method that updates the fusion policy through relative preference comparisons within groups and across batches. Furthermore, we design a Task-Relation-Aware Fusion module to explicitly model the interdependencies among different objectives, enabling context-sensitive weight adaptation. Extensive offline evaluations and large-scale online A/B tests on Kuaishou short-video search platform demonstrate that SaFRO significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, delivering substantial gains in both short-term ranking quality and long-term user retention.
translated_summary: 多任务融合能将异构预测信号聚合为统一排序分，在工业界短视频搜索系统中发挥着关键作用。然而，现有方法主要优化即时互动指标，往往与长期用户满意度脱节。虽然强化学习（RL）为优化用户满意度提供了可行途径，但与内容推荐流相比，搜索场景固有的数据稀疏及意图约束使其直接应用颇具挑战。为此，我们提出 SaFRO，一个面向短视频搜索的全新用户满意度优化框架。该框架首先构建以满意度为核心的奖励模型，利用查询级行为代理超越单条物品交互，全面刻画用户整体满意度。随后，我们设计双相对策略优化（DRPO），一种高效的策略学习方法，通过组内和跨批次的成对偏好比较来更新融合策略。此外，我们引入任务关系感知融合模块，显式建模不同目标间的相互依赖关系，实现上下文敏感的权重动态调整。广泛的离线实验以及在快手短视频搜索平台的大规模在线 A/B 测试均表明，SaFRO 显著优于现有最佳基线，在短期排序质量与长期用户留存上均取得了大幅提升。

title: EvidenceRL: Reinforcing Evidence Consistency for Trustworthy Language Models
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are fluent but prone to hallucinations, producing answers that appear plausible yet are unsupported by available evidence. This failure is especially problematic in high-stakes domains where decisions must be justified by verifiable information. We introduce \textbf{EvidenceRL}, a reinforcement learning framework that enforces evidence adherence during training. EvidenceRL scores candidate responses for grounding (entailment with retrieved evidence and context) and correctness (agreement with reference answers) and optimizes the generator using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). We evaluate across two high-stakes domains, cardiac diagnosis and legal reasoning, where EvidenceRL consistently improves evidence grounding and faithfulness without sacrificing task accuracy. On cardiac diagnosis, F1@3 increases from 37.0 to 54.5 on Llama-3.2-3B while grounding ($G_{\max}@3$) rises from 47.6 to 78.2; hallucinations drop nearly 5$\times$ and evidence-supported diagnoses increase from 31.8\% to 61.6\%. On legal reasoning, EvidenceRL raises Faithfulness from 32.8\% to 67.6\% on Llama-3.1-8B, demonstrating consistent behavioral change across domains. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/Wizaaard/EvidenceRL.git.
translated_summary: 大型语言模型（LLM）虽然流畅，却容易生成幻觉式回答：看似合理却缺乏实际证据支持。在高风险领域，这一问题尤为致命，因为任何决策都必须依据可验证的信息。本文提出 EvidenceRL，一个基于强化学习的训练框架，通过强制证据依从性来抑制幻觉。EvidenceRL 为候选答案给出两项打分：1) grounding，评估答案与检索到的证据及上下文之间的蕴含关系；2) correctness，衡量与参考答案的一致性。随后使用 Group Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）优化生成模型。我们在心脏病诊疗和法律推理两个高风险场景中验证 EvidenceRL：在不降低任务准确率的前提下，模型始终在证据依从性及忠实度上显著提升。以心脏诊断为例，Llama-3.2-3B 的 F1@3 由 37.0 提升至 54.5；top-3 grounding 指标 G_max@3 从 47.6 跃升至 78.2；幻觉比例下降近 5 倍，有证据支持的诊断比例从 31.8% 增加到 61.6%。在法律推理任务中，Llama-3.1-8B 的忠实度从 32.8% 提高至 67.6%，显示出跨领域的一致性改进。代码已开源：https://github.com/Wizaaard/EvidenceRL.git

title: Inducing Sustained Creativity and Diversity in Large Language Models
summary: We address a not-widely-recognized subset of exploratory search, where a user sets out on a typically long "search quest" for the perfect wedding dress, overlooked research topic, killer company idea, etc. The first few outputs of current large language models (LLMs) may be helpful but only as a start, since the quest requires learning the search space and evaluating many diverse and creative alternatives along the way. Although LLMs encode an impressive fraction of the world's knowledge, common decoding methods are narrowly optimized for prompts with correct answers and thus return mostly homogeneous and conventional results. Other approaches, including those designed to increase diversity across a small set of answers, start to repeat themselves long before search quest users learn enough to make final choices, or offer a uniform type of "creativity" to every user asking similar questions. We develop a novel, easy-to-implement decoding scheme that induces sustained creativity and diversity in LLMs, producing as many conceptually unique results as desired, even without access to the inner workings of an LLM's vector space. The algorithm unlocks an LLM's vast knowledge, both orthodox and heterodox, well beyond modal decoding paths. With this approach, search quest users can more quickly explore the search space and find satisfying answers.
translated_summary: 我们关注一类迄今较少受到重视的探索型搜索任务：用户为了寻找完美婚纱、被忽视的研究选题、一鸣惊人的创业点子等，启动了一场往往持续很久的“搜索探险”。现有大语言模型（LLM）的前几条输出虽能有所帮助，却只是起点，因为这类探险需要用户不断熟悉整个搜索空间，并评估许多多元且富有创意的备选方案。虽然 LLM 编码了世界上难以计数、令人惊叹的知识，但通行的解码方式几乎只为“有正确答案”的提示而优化，结果往往呈现同质化、保守化的倾向。即便已有方法能够在小规模输出集合内提升多样性，也会在用户尚未学到足够做出最终选择前就开始重复，或者对所有相似提问者千篇一律地抛出同种“创意”。我们提出一种新颖且易实现的解码方案，能够持续激发 LLM 的创意与多样性：即使在无法探查 LLM 向量空间内部的情况下，也能按需要产出任意多的、概念上彼此不同的结果。该方法解锁了 LLM 中正统与异端兼具的庞大知识，使其远超常规解码路径所能触及的范围。凭借这一解码方案，搜索探险用户可以更快地遍历搜索空间，找到令自己满意的答案。

title: Spectral Tempering for Embedding Compression in Dense Passage Retrieval
summary: Dimensionality reduction is critical for deploying dense retrieval systems at scale, yet mainstream post-hoc methods face a fundamental trade-off: principal component analysis (PCA) preserves dominant variance but underutilizes representational capacity, while whitening enforces isotropy at the cost of amplifying noise in the heavy-tailed eigenspectrum of retrieval embeddings. Intermediate spectral scaling methods unify these extremes by reweighting dimensions with a power coefficient $γ$, but treat $γ$ as a fixed hyperparameter that requires task-specific tuning. We show that the optimal scaling strength $γ$ is not a global constant: it varies systematically with target dimensionality $k$ and is governed by the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) of the retained subspace.
