方法：本研究提出一种由智能体（agent）编排的数字孪生框架，借助 OpenClaw 的主动“心跳”机制与模块化智能体技能（Agent Skills）实现自治。该自治智能体编排数字孪生（AADT）系统可持续监测本地与外部数据流（如患者自报表型、变异分类数据库更新），并自动完成数据采集、标准化、状态更新和基于触发条件的分析工作流。

结果：原型验证表明，智能体编排能保证 MDT 状态与纵向表型更新及不断演进的基因组知识持续同步。在罕见病场景下，该技术能够实现更早诊断、更准确地疾病进展建模。论文面向“变异重新解读”和“纵向表型追踪”两项典型案例，展示 AADT 如何在研究与临床照护中实现及时且可审计的信息更新。

结论：AADT 框架突破了 MDT 实时同步的关键瓶颈，从而支持可扩展且持续更新的患者模型。文章还讨论了数据安全考量，并通过人-环回（human-in-the-loop）系统设计提出了缓解策略。

title: Text Data Integration
summary: Data comes in many forms. From a shallow perspective, they can be viewed as being either in structured (e.g., as a relation, as key-value pairs) or unstructured (e.g., text, image) formats. So far, machines have been fairly good at processing and reasoning over structured data that follows a precise schema. However, the heterogeneity of data poses a significant challenge on how well diverse categories of data can be meaningfully stored and processed. Data Integration, a crucial part of the data engineering pipeline, addresses this by combining disparate data sources and providing unified data access to end-users. Until now, most data integration systems have leaned on only combining structured data sources. Nevertheless, unstructured data (a.k.a. free text) also contains a plethora of knowledge waiting to be utilized. Thus, in this chapter, we firstly make the case for the integration of textual data, to later present its challenges, state of the art and open problems.
translated_summary: 数据形态多种多样。从表层来看，可大致分为结构化（如关系表、键值对）与非结构化（如文本、图像）两类。迄今，机器已能较好地遵循精确模式处理并推理结构化数据。然而，数据的异构性给各类数据的有意义存储与处理带来巨大挑战。作为数据工程管线中的关键环节，数据集成通过整合异源数据并为终端用户提供统一的数据访问途径来解决这一问题。目前，绝大多数集成系统仍局限于结构化数据源的整合。事实上，非结构化数据（即自由文本）也蕴藏着等待挖掘的丰富知识。因此，本章首先论证文本数据集成之必要，继而阐述其面临的挑战，概述最新研究进展，并提出尚未解决的开放问题。

title: Resolving the Robustness-Precision Trade-off in Financial RAG through Hybrid Document-Routed Retrieval
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems for financial document question answering typically follow a chunk-based paradigm: documents are split into fragments, embedded into vector space, and retrieved via similarity search. While effective in general settings, this approach suffers from cross-document chunk confusion in structurally homogeneous corpora such as regulatory filings. Semantic File Routing (SFR), which uses LLM structured output to route queries to whole documents, reduces catastrophic failures but sacrifices the precision of targeted chunk retrieval. We identify this robustness-precision trade-off through controlled evaluation on the FinDER benchmark (1,500 queries across five groups): SFR achieves higher average scores (6.45 vs. 6.02) and fewer failures (10.3% vs. 22.5%), while chunk-based retrieval (CBR) yields more perfect answers (13.8% vs. 8.5%). To resolve this trade-off, we propose Hybrid Document-Routed Retrieval (HDRR), a two-stage architecture that uses SFR as a document filter followed by chunk-based retrieval scoped to the identified document(s). HDRR eliminates cross-document confusion while preserving targeted chunk precision. Experimental results demonstrate that HDRR achieves the best performance on every metric: an average score of 7.54 (25.2% above CBR, 16.9% above SFR), a failure rate of only 6.4%, a correctness rate of 67.7% (+18.7 pp over CBR), and a perfect-answer rate of 20.1% (+6.3 pp over CBR, +11.6 pp over SFR). HDRR resolves the trade-off by simultaneously achieving the lowest failure rate and the highest precision across all five experimental groups.
translated_summary:
针对金融文档问答的检索增强生成（RAG）系统通常采用“切块”范式：先将文档拆分成片段，再映射到向量空间并通过相似度搜索检索。这种方法在一般场景虽有效，但在监管申报这类结构高度同质的数据集中，易因跨文档块混淆而失效。语义文件路由（SFR）利用大型语言模型的结构化输出将查询直接路由到“整篇”文档，虽显著降低灾难性失败，却牺牲了切块检索的精准度。  
利用 FinDER 基准（1,500 条查询，覆盖五个组别）的受控评估，我们首次明确揭示了这种稳健性与精准度的权衡：SFR 平均得分更高（6.45 对 6.02）且失败率更低（10.3% 对 22.5%），而切块检索（CBR）则给出更多“答案完全正确”的查询（13.8% 对 8.5%）。  

为解决这一矛盾，我们提出混合文档路由检索（HDRR）——一项两阶段架构：第一阶段用 SFR 筛选相关文档，第二阶段仅在已识别文档内部执行切块检索。HDRR 既消除了跨文档混淆，又保持了目标块的精确性。实验结果表明，HDRR 在所有指标上均最优：平均得分 7.54（比 CBR 高 25.2%，比 SFR 高 16.9%），失败率仅 6.4%，正确率 67.7%（较 CBR 提升 18.7 个百分点），完全正确率 20.1%（较 CBR 提升 6.3 个百分点，较 SFR 提升 11.6 个百分点）。HDRR 在五个实验组中均同时实现了最低失败率与最高精准度，从而彻底解决了稳健性与精准度的权衡问题。

title: Structural Feature Engineering for Generative Engine Optimization: How Content Structure Shapes Citation Behavior
summary:
The proliferation of AI-powered search engines has shifted information discovery from traditional link-based retrieval to direct answer generation with selective source citation, creating new challenges for content visibility. While existing Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) approaches focus primarily on semantic content modification, the role of structural features in influencing citation behavior remains underexplored.
  In this paper, we propose GEO-SFE, a systematic framework for structural feature engineering in generative engine optimization. Our approach decomposes content structure into three hierarchical levels: macro-structure (document architecture), meso-structure (information chunking), and micro-structure (visual emphasis), and models their impact on citation probability across different generative engine architectures. We develop architecture-aware optimization strategies and predictive models that preserve semantic integrity while improving structural effectiveness.
  Experimental evaluation across six mainstream generative engines demonstrates consistent improvements in citation rate (17.3 percent) and subjective quality (18.5 percent), validating the effectiveness and generalizability of the proposed framework. This work establishes structural optimization as a foundational component of GEO, providing a data-driven methodology for enhancing content visibility in LLM-powered information ecosystems.
translated_summary: 随着 AI 搜索引擎的迅猛发展，信息发现已从传统的基于链接的检索转向直接生成答案、并附带选择性来源引述的模式，而这对内容可见度提出了新的挑战。现有 GEO（生成引擎优化）研究多聚焦于语义层面的调整，结构特征如何影响被引用行为仍鲜少触及。本文提出 GEO-SFE，一套面向生成引擎优化的结构性特征工程系统化框架。该框架将内容结构划分为三级层次：宏观结构（文档架构）、介观结构（信息块切分）与微观结构（视觉强调），进而量化其针对不同生成引擎架构下的被引用概率之作用。我们设计了既感知模型架构又能保持语义完整性的优化策略和预测模型，以提升结构性效能。在六大主流生成引擎上开展的实验表明：平均被引用率提升 17.3%，主观质量评分提升 18.5%，一致验证了该框架的有效性与可泛化性。本研究将结构优化确立为 GEO 不可或缺的基础组成，并提供一套数据驱动的方法论，帮助内容在 LLM 驱动的信息生态中获得更优可见度。

title: Rewrite the News: Tracing Editorial Reuse Across News Agencies
summary: This paper investigates sentence-level text reuse in multilingual journalism, analyzing where reused content occurs within articles. We present a weakly supervised method for detecting sentence-level cross-lingual reuse without requiring full translations, designed to support automated pre-selection to reduce information overload for journalists (Holyst et al., 2024). The study compares English-language articles from the Slovenian Press Agency (STA) with reports from 15 foreign agencies (FA) in seven languages, using publication timestamps to retain the earliest likely foreign source for each reused sentence. We analyze 1,037 STA and 237,551 FA articles from two time windows (October 7-November 2, 2023; February 1-28, 2025) and identify 1,087 aligned sentence pairs after filtering to the earliest sources. Reuse occurs in 52% of STA articles and 1.6% of FA articles and is predominantly non-literal, involving paraphrase and compositional reuse from multiple sources. Reused content tends to appear in the middle and end of English articles, while leads are more often original, indicating that simple lexical matching overlooks substantial editorial reuse. Compared with prior work focused on monolingual overlap, we (i) detect reuse across languages without requiring full translation, (ii) use publication timing to identify likely sources, and (iii) analyze where reused material is situated within articles. Dataset and code: https://github.com/kunturs/lrec2026-rewrite-news.
translated_summary: 本研究探讨多语新闻中的句子级文本重用，并分析被复用内容在整篇文章中的分布。我们提出一种弱监督方法，可在无需完整翻译的情况下识别跨语言句子级复用，目标是为记者自动预筛信息、减轻信息过载（Holyst 等，2024）。研究将斯洛文尼亚通讯社（STA）的英文报道与 15 家外媒（FA）使用七种语言撰写的报道进行比对，并以发布时间戳保留每条被复用句子最早可能的外媒来源。我们在两个时段（2023 年 10 月 7 日至 11 月 2 日，以及 2025 年 2 月 1–28 日）分析了 1,037 篇 STA 报道与 237,551 篇 FA 报道，并按最早来源筛选后得到 1,087 对齐的句子对。52 % 的 STA 文章存在复用，仅 1.6 % 的 FA 文章被复用，且复用多为非字面改写，包含改写性转述以及对多来源内容的组合重用。被复用内容倾向于出现在英语稿件的中段与末尾，导语多为原创，这说明仅凭字面匹配难以捕捉大量编辑层面的复用。与以往只关注单语重叠的研究相比，我们做到：(i) 无需完整翻译即可跨语言检测复用；(ii) 用发布时间锁定可能来源；(iii) 分析复用材料在文章中的位置。数据集与代码：https://github.com/kunturs/lrec2026-rewrite-news

title: Cold-Starts in Generative Recommendation: A Reproducibility Study
summary: Cold-start recommendation remains a central challenge in dynamic, open-world platforms, requiring models to recommend for newly registered users (user cold-start) and to recommend newly introduced items to existing users (item cold-start) under sparse or missing interaction signals. Recent generative recommenders built on pre-trained language models (PLMs) are often expected to mitigate cold-start by using item semantic information (e.g., titles and descriptions) and test-time conditioning on limited user context. However, cold-start is rarely treated as a primary evaluation setting in existing studies, and reported gains are difficult to interpret because key design choices, such as model scale, identifier design, and training strategy, are frequently changed together. In this work, we present a systematic reproducibility study of generative recommendation under a unified suite of cold-start protocols.
translated_summary: 冷启动推荐仍是动态、开放型平台的核心挑战：在交互信号极为稀疏甚至缺失的条件下，模型既要为新注册用户推荐（用户冷启动），又要向已有用户推荐新上线的商品（物品冷启动）。近年来，基于预训练语言模型（PLM）的生成式推荐器被寄予厚望，希望能借助商品语义信息（如标题、描述）及在测试阶段对有限用户上下文的条件建模来缓解冷启动问题。然而，现有研究极少将冷启动作为主要评估设定，且由于模型规模、标识符设计和训练策略等关键设计因素常被同时改动，导致难以解释已报告的收益。为此，本文在统一的冷启动协议套件下，对生成式推荐方法展开系统的可复现研究。

title: Drift-Aware Continual Tokenization for Generative Recommendation
summary: Generative recommendation commonly adopts a two-stage pipeline in which a learnable tokenizer maps items to discrete token sequences (i.e. identifiers) and an autoregressive generative recommender model (GRM) performs prediction based on these identifiers. Recent tokenizers further incorporate collaborative signals so that items with similar user-behavior patterns receive similar codes, substantially improving recommendation quality. However, real-world environments evolve continuously: new items cause identifier collision and shifts, while new interactions induce collaborative drift in existing items (e.g., changing co-occurrence patterns and popularity). Fully retraining both tokenizer and GRM is often prohibitively expensive, yet naively fine-tuning the tokenizer can alter token sequences for the majority of existing items, undermining the GRM's learned token-embedding alignment. To balance plasticity and stability for collaborative tokenizers, we propose DACT, a Drift-Aware Continual Tokenization framework with two stages: (i) tokenizer fine-tuning, augmented with a jointly trained Collaborative Drift Identification Module (CDIM) that outputs item-level drift confidence and enables differentiated optimization for drifting and stationary items; and (ii) hierarchical code reassignment using a relaxed-to-strict strategy to update token sequences while limiting unnecessary changes. Experiments on three real-world datasets with two representative GRMs show that DACT consistently achieves better performance than baselines, demonstrating effective adaptation to collaborative evolution with reduced disruption to prior knowledge. Our implementation is publicly available at https://github.com/HomesAmaranta/DACT for reproducibility.
translated_summary: 生成式推荐系统通常采用两阶段流程：首先用一个可学习的分词器将物品映射为离散 token 序列（即物品标识符），再由自回归生成式推荐模型（GRM）基于这些标识符进行预测。近期的分词器进一步引入协同信号，使得拥有相似用户行为模式的物品获得相似的编码，大幅提升推荐质量。然而，真实环境不断演变：一方面，新物品会引起标识符冲突与迁移；另一方面，新增交互会造成已有物品的协同漂移（如共现模式与流行度的变化）。若完全重新训练分词器与 GRM，代价极高；而简单地微调分词器，则可能导致大量已有物品的 token 序列发生变化，破坏 GRM 已习得的 token-嵌入对齐关系。为了在协同分词器中同时兼顾可塑性与稳定性，我们提出 DACT——漂移感知的持续分词框架，包含两个阶段：① 分词器微调阶段，联合训练一个协同漂移识别模块（CDIM），输出物品级的漂移置信度，从而对漂移物品与稳定物品实施差异化优化；② 采用“由松弛到严格”策略的层次化编码重分配，更新物品的 token 序列同时限制不必要的变更。在三个真实数据集、使用两种代表性 GRM 的实验表明，DACT 始终优于现有基线，能够在适应协同演变的同时显著减少对旧知识的扰动。为便于复现，我们的实现已开源：https://github.com/HomesAmaranta/DACT。

title: Agenda-based Narrative Extraction: Steering Pathfinding Algorithms with Large Language Models
summary: Existing narrative extraction methods face a trade-off between coherence, interactivity, and multi-storyline support. Narrative Maps supports rich interaction and generates multiple storylines as a byproduct of its coverage constraints, though this comes at the cost of individual path coherence. Narrative Trails achieves high coherence through maximum capacity path optimization but provides no mechanism for user guidance or multiple perspectives. We introduce agenda-based narrative extraction, a method that bridges this gap by integrating large language models into the Narrative Trails pathfinding process to steer storyline construction toward user-specified perspectives. Our approach uses an LLM at each step to rank candidate documents based on their alignment with a given agenda while maintaining narrative coherence. Running the algorithm with different agendas yields different storylines through the same corpus. We evaluated our approach on a news article corpus using LLM judges with Claude Opus 4.5 and GPT 5.1, measuring both coherence and agenda alignment across 64 endpoint pairs and 6 agendas. LLM-driven steering achieves 9.9% higher alignment than keyword matching on semantic agendas (p=0.017), with 13.3% improvement on \textit{Regime Crackdown} specifically (p=0.037), while keyword matching remains competitive on agendas with literal keyword overlap. The coherence cost is minimal: LLM steering reduces coherence by only 2.2% compared to the agenda-agnostic baseline. Counter-agendas that contradict the source material score uniformly low (2.2-2.5) across all methods, confirming that steering cannot fabricate unsupported narratives.
translated_summary: 现有叙事抽取方法不得不在连贯性、交互性与多故事线能力三者之间做权衡。Narrative Maps 虽支持丰富交互，并将其覆盖约束的副产品生成为多条故事线，却牺牲了个体路径的连贯性。Narrative Trails 通过最大容量路径优化实现了高度连贯性，却没有提供用户引导或多角度切换的机制。本文提出“议程式叙事抽取”，借助将大模型整合进 Narrative Trails 的路径搜索过程，使故事线构建能够被用户给定的视角所引导。我们让大模型在每一步按给定议程对候选文档排序，同时保持叙事的连贯性。针对不同议程运行算法，便可在同一语料上得到不同的故事线。我们在新闻文章语料上进行评估，使用 Claude Opus 4.5 与 GPT 5.1 作为大模型评委，对 64 组终点-起点对及 6 个议程测试连贯性与议程对齐度。大模型引导在语义型议程上较关键词匹配提高 9.9% 的对齐度（p=0.017），具体到“政权镇压”议程更提升 13.3%（p=0.037）；若议程与语料存在字面关键词重叠，关键词匹配仍具竞争力。对比无语程基线，大模型引导仅带来 2.2% 的连贯性下降。所有方法在面对与源材料相悖的“反议程”时，分数均低至 2.2–2.5，证明引导无法编造无凭据的叙事。

title: Semantic Interaction for Narrative Map Sensemaking: An Insight-based Evaluation
summary: Semantic interaction (SI) enables analysts to incorporate their cognitive processes into AI models through direct manipulation of visualizations. While SI frameworks for narrative extraction have been proposed, empirical evaluations of their effectiveness remain limited. This paper presents a user study that evaluates SI for narrative map sensemaking, involving 33 participants under three conditions: a timeline baseline, a basic narrative map, and an interactive narrative map with SI capabilities. The results show that the map-based prototypes yielded more insights than the timeline baseline, with the SI-enabled condition reaching statistical significance and the basic map condition trending in the same direction. The SI-enabled condition showed the highest mean performance; differences between the map conditions were not statistically significant but showed large effect sizes (d > 0.8), suggesting that the study was underpowered to detect them. Qualitative analysis identified two distinct SI approaches-corrective and additive-that enable analysts to impose quality judgments and organizational structure on extracted narratives. We also find that SI users achieved comparable exploration breadth with less parameter manipulation, suggesting that SI serves as an alternative pathway for model refinement. This work provides empirical evidence that map-based representations outperform timelines for narrative sensemaking, along with qualitative insights into how analysts use SI for narrative refinement.
translated_summary: 语义交互（SI）使分析人员能够通过对可视化的直接操作，直接在 AI 模型中融入自身的认知加工。虽然已有面向叙事抽取的 SI 框架，但其有效性尚缺乏实证检验。本文通过一项用户实验来评估叙事地图取证场景中的 SI，33 名参与者被分配到三种条件：时间轴基线、仅含最基础交互的叙事地图、以及具备 SI 能力的交互叙事地图。结果表明，地图原型比时间轴基线产生了更多洞察，启用 SI 的条件达到了统计显著性，基础地图的方向亦与之相同。SI 条件的平均表现最高；尽管两种地图条件之间差异未达统计显著性，但效应量为极大（d > 0.8），提示本研究效能不足以检出这一差异。定性分析揭示出两类不同的 SI 策略——“矫正式”与“增补式”，分别使分析人员能对抽取的叙事施加质量判断与组织重构。我们还发现，使用 SI 的用户在探索的广度上与其他条件相当，却减少了参数调节，这暗示 SI 提供了模型优化的替代途径。本研究为“基于地图的表征优于时间线进行叙事取证”提供了实证证据，并深入揭示了分析人员如何借 SI 精炼叙事。

title: Storing Less, Finding More: How Novelty Filtering Improves Cross-Modal Retrieval on Edge Cameras
summary: Always-on edge cameras generate continuous video streams where redundant frames degrade cross-modal retrieval by crowding correct results out of top-k search. This paper presents a streaming retrieval architecture: an on-device epsilon-net filter retains only semantically novel frames, building a denoised embedding index; a cross-modal adapter and cloud re-ranker compensate for the compact encoder's weak alignment. A single-pass streaming filter outperforms offline alternatives (k-means, farthest-point, uniform, random) across eight vision-language models (8M-632M) on two egocentric datasets (AEA, EPIC-KITCHENS). Combined, the architecture reaches 45.6% Hit@5 on held-out data using an 8M on-device encoder at an estimated 2.7 mW.
translated_summary: 始终开启的边缘摄像头会持续生成视频流，其中冗余帧会通过挤出正确结果而损害跨模态检索效果。本文提出一套流式检索架构：本地设备上的 ε-网格过滤器仅保留语义新颖帧，构建一个去噪的嵌入索引；跨模态适配器和云端重排序器弥补紧凑型编码器对齐能力的不足。单次流式过滤在八个规模从800万到6.32亿参数的跨模态视觉–语言模型上、于两个离线方法（k-Means、最远点采样、均匀采样与随机采样）之上均取得更好表现；在两个第一人称视频数据集（AEA、EPIC-KITCHENS）上的实验再次印证了该结果。整个系统在仅用800万参数本地编码器、约2.7 mW功耗下，在保留数据上达到 45.6% Hit@5 的检索精度。

title: On Strengths and Limitations of Single-Vector Embeddings
summary:
Recent work (Weller et al., 2025) introduced a naturalistic dataset called LIMIT and showed empirically that a wide range of popular single-vector embedding models suffer substantial drops in retrieval quality, raising concerns about the reliability of single-vector embeddings for retrieval. Although (Weller et al., 2025) proposed limited dimensionality as the main factor contributing to this, we show that dimensionality alone cannot explain the observed failures. We observe from results in (Alon et al., 2016) that $2k+1$-dimensional vector embeddings suffice for top-$k$ retrieval. This result points to other drivers of poor performance. Controlling for tokenization artifacts and linguistic similarity between attributes yields only modest gains. In contrast, we find that domain shift and misalignment between embedding similarities and the task's underlying notion of relevance are major contributors; finetuning mitigates these effects and can improve recall substantially.
  Even with finetuning, however, single-vector models remain markedly weaker than multi-vector representations, pointing to fundamental limitations. Moreover, finetuning single-vector models on LIMIT-like datasets leads to catastrophic forgetting (performance on MSMARCO drops by more than 40%), whereas forgetting for multi-vector models is minimal.
  To better understand the gap between performance of single-vector and multi-vector models, we study the drowning in documents paradox (Reimers \& Gurevych, 2021; Jacob et al., 2025): as the corpus grows, relevant documents are increasingly "drowned out" because embedding similarities behave, in part, like noisy statistical proxies for relevance. Through experiments and mathematical calculations on toy mathematical models, we illustrate why single-vector models are more susceptible to drowning effects compared to multi-vector models.
translated_summary: 近期工作（Weller 等，2025）发布了一个名为 LIMIT 的自然场景数据集，并经验性地指出，一大批流行的单向量嵌入模型在该数据集上的检索质量出现了显著下降，引发了对单向量嵌入可靠性的担忧。虽然（Weller 等，2025）把维度受限视为主要原因，但我们证明仅凭维度无法解释所观测到的失效。参考（Alon 等，2016）的结果可以发现，对于 top-k 检索任务，2k+1 维的向量嵌入已足够。由此提示必然存在其他关键失效因子。当我们控制分词伪影和属性之间的语言相似性后，提升幅度有限。相比之下，我们发现领域迁移、以及嵌入相似度与任务本体相关性之间的失配，才是导致性能劣化的主导因素；微调能够有效抑制这些影响，并显著提升召回率。即便经过微调，单向量模型仍显著弱于多向量表征，这揭示了单向量方法的根本局限。此外，在类似 LIMIT 的数据集上微调单向量模型会引发灾难性遗忘——在 MSMARCO 任务上的性能下降超过 40%；而多向量模型几乎不会发生遗忘。为更深入理解单向量与多向量模型的性能鸿沟，我们进一步研究了“文档淹没悖论”（Reimers & Gurevych, 2021；Jacob 等, 2025）：随着语料规模扩大，相关文档被不断“淹没”，因为嵌入相似度对相关性来说在很大程度上只是带有噪声的统计代理。我们在简化数学模型和实际实验中均验证了单向量模型为何比多向量模型更容易受到淹没效应的影响。

title: Aligning Multimodal Sequential Recommendations via Robust Direct Preference Optimization with Sparse MoE
summary: Preference-based alignment objectives have been widely adopted, from RLHF-style pairwise learning in large language models to emerging applications in recommender systems. Yet, existing work rarely examines how Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) behaves under implicit feedback, where unobserved items are not reliable negatives. We conduct systematic experiments on multimodal sequential recommendation to compare common negative-selection strategies and their interaction with DPO training. Our central finding is that a simple modification, replacing deterministic hard negatives with stochastic sampling from a dynamic top-K candidate pool, consistently improves ranking performance. We attribute its effectiveness to two factors: (1) reducing erroneous suppressive gradients caused by false negatives, and (2) retaining informative hard signals while smoothing optimization via controlled stochasticity. With an optional sparse Mixture-of-Experts encoder for efficient capacity scaling, RoDPO achieves up to 5.25% NDCG@5 on three Amazon benchmarks, with nearly unchanged inference cost.
translated_summary: 基于偏好的对齐目标已广泛应用于大语言模型的 RLHF 式成对学习，并正在拓展到推荐系统等新场景。然而，现有工作极少探究 DPO（Direct Preference Optimization）在“隐性反馈”条件下的表现——此时未曝光的物品并不能被视为可靠的负样本。我们围绕多模态序列推荐开展了系统实验，比较常见负例采样策略与 DPO 训练之间的交互效应。核心发现是：只需将原本确定的 hard negat​​ive 替换为“从动态 top-K 候选池中随机抽样”的简单策略，就能稳定提升排序性能。其有效性主要源于两方面：(1) 减轻因假阴例而产生的错误抑制梯度；(2) 在保留富含信息的 hard signal 同时，通过受控的随机性平滑优化过程。可选的稀疏 MoE 编码器可在几乎不增加推理开销的前提下实现容量扩展。最终提出的 RoDPO 在三个 Amazon 基准数据集上最高可提升 5.25% 的 NDCG@5。

title: APEX-EM: Non-Parametric Online Learning for Autonomous Agents via Structured Procedural-Episodic Experience Replay
summary:
LLM-based autonomous agents lack persistent procedural memory: they re-derive solutions from scratch even when structurally identical tasks have been solved before. We present \textbf{APEX-EM}, a non-parametric online learning framework that accumulates, retrieves, and reuses structured procedural plans without modifying model weights. APEX-EM introduces: (1) a \emph{structured experience representation} encoding the full procedural-episodic trace of each execution -- planning steps, artifacts, iteration history with error analysis, and quality scores; (2) a \emph{Plan-Retrieve-Generate-Iterate-Ingest} (PRGII) workflow with Task Verifiers providing multi-dimensional reward signals; and (3) a \emph{dual-outcome Experience Memory} with hybrid retrieval combining semantic search, structural signature matching, and plan DAG traversal -- enabling cross-domain transfer between tasks sharing no lexical overlap but analogous operational structure. Successful experiences serve as positive in-context examples; failures as negative examples with structured error annotations.
  We evaluate on BigCodeBench~\cite{zhuo2025bigcodebench}, KGQAGen-10k~\cite{zhang2025kgqagen}, and Humanity's Last Exam~\cite{phan2025hle} using Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Opus 4.5. On KGQAGen-10k, APEX-EM achieves 89.6\% accuracy versus 41.3\% without memory (+48.3pp), surpassing the oracle-retrieval upper bound (84.9\%). On BigCodeBench, it reaches 83.3\% SR from a 53.9\% baseline (+29.4pp), exceeding MemRL's~\cite{memrl2025} +11.0pp gain under comparable frozen-backbone conditions (noting backbone differences controlled for in our analysis). On HLE, entity graph retrieval reaches 48.0\% from 25.2\% (+22.8pp). Ablations show component value is task-dependent: rich judge feedback is negligible for code generation but critical for structured queries (+10.3pp), while binary-signal iteration partially compensates for weaker feedback.
translated_summary:
基于大语言模型的自主代理缺乏持久性过程记忆：即便面对结构完全相同的问题，也需从零开始重新推导解决方案。我们提出 APEX-EM——一种无需修改模型权重即可**累积、检索并复用结构化过程计划**的非参数在线学习框架。APEX-EM 包含三个核心组件：

（1）**结构化经验表示**：完整记录每次执行的“过程-情节”轨迹，包括规划步骤、生成产物、迭代历史、错误分析和质量评分；  
（2）**PRGII**（Plan-Retrieve-Generate-Iterate-Ingest）工作流：任务验证器提供多维度奖励信号，实现计划的持续优化和自动演进；  
（3）**双重效果经验记忆**：混合检索机制融合语义搜索、结构签名匹配和计划 DAG 遍历，可在**零词汇重叠但操作结构相似**的任务之间实现**跨领域跨任务迁移**。成功的经验被作为正例上下文示范，失败经验则带结构化错误标注，充作负例。

我们在 **BigCodeBench**、**KGQAGen-10k**、**Humanity's Last Exam** 数据集上，用 Claude Sonnet 4.5 与 Opus 4.5 测试：  
• **KGQAGen-10k**：APEX-EM 把准确率从 41.3% 提升到 89.6%（+48.3 个百分点），超越**神谕检索上界 84.9%**。  
• **BigCodeBench**：成功率从 53.9% 飙升到 83.3%（+29.4 个百分点），在冻结主干网络的同级别方法里远高于 MemRL 的 +11.0 个百分点（已控制主干差异）。  
• **HLE**：实体图检索任务从 25.2% 提升到 48.0%（+22.8 个百分点）。

消融实验表明，各模块的贡献随任务而异：  
- 在代码生成中，精细的法官级反馈几近零增益，而对结构化查询则至关重要（+10.3 pp）。  
- 仅使用二分类信号的版本，能在一定程度上弥补弱反馈带来的性能短板。

title: Zero-shot Cross-domain Knowledge Distillation: A Case study on YouTube Music
summary:
Knowledge Distillation (KD) has been widely used to improve the quality of latency sensitive models serving live traffic. However, applying KD in production recommender systems with low traffic is challenging: the limited amount of data restricts the teacher model size, and the cost of training a large dedicated teacher may not be justified. Cross-domain KD offers a cost-effective alternative by leveraging a teacher from a data-rich source domain, but introduces unique technical difficulties, as the features, user interfaces, and prediction tasks can significantly differ.
  We present a case study of using zero-shot cross-domain KD for multi-task ranking models, transferring knowledge from a (100x) large-scale video recommendation platform (YouTube) to a music recommendation application with significantly lower traffic. We share offline and live experiment results and present findings evaluating different KD techniques in this setting across two ranking models on the music app. Our results demonstrate that zero-shot cross-domain KD is a practical and effective approach to improve the performance of ranking models on low traffic surfaces.
translated_summary:
知识蒸馏（KD）已被广泛用于提升面向实时流量的低延迟模型的质量。然而，在流量较低的生产级推荐系统中运用 KD 仍面临诸多挑战：数据量稀缺限制了教师模型的规模，而为小规模任务单独训练大型教师模型的成本又难以被证明合理。跨领域 KD 通过利用数据丰富的源域教师，成为一种更具成本效益的替代方案，但由于特征、用户界面和预测任务在各域间差异显著，这一做法也带来特有的技术难题。

我们在一个多任务排序模型中对零样本跨领域 KD 进行了案例研究：将知识从规模放大 100 倍的视频推荐平台（YouTube）迁移到流量远低的音乐推荐应用。文中分享了离线及线上实验结果，并对比评估了多种 KD 技术在该场景下、两款音乐 App 排序模型中的表现。实验表明，零样本跨领域 KD 能有效提升低流量场景下排序模型的性能，是一种既实用又高性价比高方案。

title: Calibrated Fusion for Heterogeneous Graph-Vector Retrieval in Multi-Hop QA
summary:
Graph-augmented retrieval combines dense similarity with graph-based relevance signals such as Personalized PageRank (PPR), but these scores have different distributions and are not directly comparable. We study this as a score calibration problem for heterogeneous retrieval fusion in multi-hop question answering. Our method, PhaseGraph, maps vector and graph scores to a common unit-free scale using percentile-rank normalization (PIT) before fusion, enabling stable combination without discarding magnitude information.
  Across MuSiQue and 2WikiMultiHopQA, calibrated fusion improves held-out last-hop retrieval on HippoRAG2-style benchmarks: LastHop@5 increases from 75.1% to 76.5% on MuSiQue (8W/1L, p=0.039) and from 51.7% to 53.6% on 2WikiMultiHopQA (11W/2L, p=0.023), both on independent held-out test splits. A theory-driven ablation shows that percentile-based calibration is directionally more robust than min-max normalization on both tune and test splits (1W/6L, p=0.125), while Boltzmann weighting performs comparably to linear fusion after calibration (0W/3L, p=0.25). These results suggest that score commensuration is a robust design choice, and the exact post-calibration operator appears to matter less on these benchmarks.
translated_summary:
图增强检索把稠密相似度与基于图的相关性信号（如个性化 PageRank，PPR）相结合，但这两种分数的分布差异大，无法直接可比。本文将该现象视为多跳问答中异构检索融合的分值校准问题。我们提出的 PhaseGraph 方法，通过百分位秩归一化（PIT）把向量和图的分值映射到同一无量纲尺度后再融合，在保持幅度信息的前提下实现稳定混合。

在 MuSiQue 与 2WikiMultiHopQA 上，校准融合在 HippoRAG2 风格的基准测试中提升了最后一步检索表现：LastHop@5 由 75.1% 提高到 76.5%（MuSiQue 8W/1L，p=0.039），由 51.7% 提高到 53.6%（2WikiMultiHopQA 11W/2L，p=0.023），结果均来自独立保留测试集。理论驱动的消融实验表明，基于百分位的校准在权重变化时（1W/6L，p=0.125）比最小–最大归一化更具方向鲁棒性；校准后，Boltzmann加权与线性融合的表现在统计上差异不显著（0W/3L，p=0.25）。这些结果说明分值对齐是一个稳健的设计选择，且在这些基准上，校准后的具体融合操作影响较小。

title: ORBIT: Scalable and Verifiable Data Generation for Search Agents on a Tight Budget
summary: Search agents, which integrate language models (LMs) with web search, are becoming crucial for answering complex user queries. Constructing training datasets for deep research tasks, involving multi-step retrieval and reasoning, remains challenging due to expensive human annotation, or cumbersome prerequisites. In this work, we introduce ORBIT, a training dataset with 20K reasoning-intensive queries with short verifiable answers, generated using a frugal framework without relying on paid API services. The modular framework relies on four stages: seed creation, question--answer pair generation, and two stages of verification: self and external. ORBIT spans 15 domains and each training pair requires 4--5 reasoning steps, with external search verification required from the complete web. We train Qwen3-4B as the base model on ORBIT using GRPO and evaluate it on Wikipedia question answering tasks. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that ORBIT-4B achieves strong performance among sub-4B LLMs as search agents, proving the utility of synthetic datasets. Our framework, code and datasets are open-sourced and available publicly.
translated_summary: 将语言模型（LM）与网络搜索相结合的搜索代理，在回答复杂查询时正变得愈发关键。针对需要多步检索与推理的深层研究任务构建训练数据集，历来因高昂的人工标注成本或繁琐的前置条件而步履维艰。本文提出 ORBIT：一个包含 2 万条侧重推理的查询–答案对的新型训练集，其答案简短且可验证，全部通过一个无需付费 API 的节俭框架自动生成。该模块化框架包含四大阶段：种子创建 → 问答对生成 → 两轮验证（自我验证 + 外部验证）。ORBIT 横跨 15 个领域，每对实例平均需 4–5 步推理，并要求以全网搜索进行外部验证。我们以 ORBIT 为训练语料，采用 GRPO 算法在 Qwen3-4B 基座上微调，并在 Wikipedia 问答任务中进行评估。大量实验表明，ORBIT-4B 在参数不足 40 亿的搜索代理模型中表现突出，充分验证了合成数据的价值。本研究所用框架、代码与数据集已全部开源，向公众开放。

title: From Validity to Inter-Subjectivity: An Argument for Reliability Signals in Search Environments
summary: Search engines and information platforms are increasingly scrutinized for their role in spreading misinformation. Traditional responses often focus on detecting falsehoods or verifying the ultimate validity of claims. This paper argues that such a validity-centered framing is inadequate for the epistemic challenges of search environments.
translated_summary: 搜索引擎和信息平台因其在传播虚假信息中的角色而受到日益严格的审视。传统应对措施通常侧重于识别不实内容或对声明的最终真实性进行核验。本文指出，这种以“真实性验证”为核心的框架，不足以应对搜索环境中的认知/知识论挑战。

title: Narrative Fingerprints: Multi-Scale Author Identification via Novelty Curve Dynamics
summary: We test whether authors have characteristic "fingerprints" in the information-theoretic novelty curves of their published works. Working with two corpora -- Books3 (52,796 books, 759 qualifying authors) and PG-19 (28,439 books, 1,821 qualifying authors) -- we find that authorial voice leaves measurable traces in how novelty unfolds across a text. The signal is multi-scale: at book level, scalar dynamics (mean novelty, speed, volume, circuitousness) identify 43% of authors significantly above chance; at chapter level, SAX motif patterns in sliding windows achieve 30x-above-chance attribution, far exceeding the scalar features that dominate at book level. These signals are complementary, not redundant. We show that the fingerprint is partly confounded with genre but persists within-genre for approximately one-quarter of authors. Classical authors (Twain, Austen, Kipling) show fingerprints comparable in strength to modern authors, suggesting the phenomenon is not an artifact of contemporary publishing conventions.
translated_summary: 我们检验“信息论新颖性曲线”是否能捕捉作者的特有“指纹”。基于两个语料库——Books3（52,796 部作品，759 位符合条件的作者）和 PG-19（28,439 部作品，1,821 位符合条件的作者）——发现作者叙事声音在新颖性的文本展开方式中留下了可测痕迹。该信号呈多尺度特征：在整书层面，用标量动态（平均新颖性、变化速率、总体量、迂回程度）可使 43% 的作者显著高于随机水平；在章节层面，滑动窗内的 SAX 基序模式将作者归属准确率提升到随机水平的 30 倍，远优于整书层面占主导的标量特征。两类信号互补而非冗余。我们进一步表明，作者指纹部分受体裁混淆，但在同一体裁内部，约四分之一的作者仍可被稳健识别。经典作家（马克·吐温、奥斯汀、吉卜林）的指纹强度与现代作家相当，说明这一现象并非当代出版惯例的偶然产物。

title: Aligning Recommendations with User Popularity Preferences
summary: Popularity bias is a pervasive problem in recommender systems, where recommendations disproportionately favor popular items. This not only results in "rich-get-richer" dynamics and a homogenization of visible content, but can also lead to misalignment of recommendations with individual users' preferences for popular or niche content. This work studies popularity bias through the lens of user-recommender alignment. To this end, we introduce Popularity Quantile Calibration, a measurement framework that quantifies misalignment between a user's historical popularity preference and the popularity of their recommendations. Building on this notion of popularity alignment, we propose SPREE, an inference-time mitigation method for sequential recommenders based on activation steering. SPREE identifies a popularity direction in representation space and adaptively steers model activations based on an estimate of each user's personal popularity bias, allowing both the direction and magnitude of steering to vary across users. Unlike global debiasing approaches, SPREE explicitly targets alignment rather than uniformly reducing popularity. Experiments across multiple datasets show that SPREE consistently improves user-level popularity alignment while preserving recommendation quality.
translated_summary:
流行度偏差是推荐系统中普遍存在的问题，导致推荐结果过度偏向热门物品。这不仅加剧了“强者愈强”的马太效应，造成可见内容的同质化，还可能使推荐系统与用户对于热门或小众内容的个性化偏好产生严重错位。本文从“用户—推荐系统对齐”视角重新审视流行度偏差，并首次提出“流行度分位校准”（Popularity Quantile Calibration）指标框架，用于精确量化用户历史偏好中的物品流行度分布与推荐结果之间的错位程度。

在该对齐度量基础上，我们进一步提出SPREE——一种面向序列式推荐系统在推断阶段的无训练纠偏方法。SPREE基于激活操纵思想，在表示空间中显式识别出“流行度方向”，并依据每位用户的个人流行度偏差估计值自适应地调整模型激活。与对所有用户统一削弱流行度的全局去偏不同，SPREE允许调整方向和幅度均随用户而异，真正做到“以用户为中心的对齐”。在多个公开数据上的实验一致表明：SPREE在保持推荐质量的同时，显著提升了用户层面的流行度对齐程度。

title: Doctor-RAG: Failure-Aware Repair for Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (Agentic RAG) has become a widely adopted paradigm for multi-hop question answering and complex knowledge reasoning, where retrieval and reasoning are interleaved at inference time. As reasoning trajectories grow longer, failures become increasingly common. Existing approaches typically address such failures by either stopping at diagnostic analysis or rerunning the entire retrieval-reasoning pipeline, which leads to substantial computational overhead and redundant reasoning. In this paper, we propose Doctor-RAG (DR-RAG), a unified diagnose-and-repair framework that corrects failures in Agentic RAG through explicit error localization and prefix reuse, enabling minimal-cost intervention. DR-RAG decomposes failure handling into two consecutive stages: (i) trajectory-level failure diagnosis and localization, which attributes errors to a coverage-gated taxonomy and identifies the earliest failure point in the reasoning trajectory; and (ii) tool-conditioned local repair, which intervenes only at the diagnosed failure point while maximally reusing validated reasoning prefixes and retrieved evidence. By explicitly separating error attribution from correction, DR-RAG enables precise error localization, thereby avoiding expensive full-pipeline reruns and enabling targeted, efficient repair. We evaluate DR-RAG across three multi-hop question answering benchmarks, multiple agentic RAG baselines, and different backbone models. Experimental results demonstrate that DR-RAG substantially improves answer accuracy while significantly reducing reasoning token consumption compared to rerun-based repair strategies.
translated_summary: 代理式检索增强生成（Agentic RAG）已成为多跳问答与复杂知识推理的通用范式，在推理阶段交错执行检索与推理。随着推理轨迹持续加长，失败愈发频繁。现有方法通常陷入困境：要么止于诊断分析，要么重新运行整个“检索+推理”流程，带来高昂计算开销与冗余推理。本文提出 DR-RAG（Doctor-RAG），一个“诊断-修复”统一框架，通过显式错误定位与前缀复用在代理式 RAG 内进行低成本修正。DR-RAG 将故障处理划分为连续两阶段：（i）轨迹级故障诊断与定位——依据“基于覆盖率”的分类体系归因错误，并找到推理轨迹中最早的失效点；（ii）工具条件局部修复——仅在被诊断的失效点介入，最大化复用已验证的推理前缀与检索证据。通过将错误归因与修正明确分离，DR-RAG 实现精准错误定位，避免昂贵全链路重跑，支持针对性、高效修复。我们在三个多跳问答基准、多种代理式 RAG 基线及不同 backbone 模型上评估 DR-RAG。实验结果表明，相比重跑式修复策略，DR-RAG 在显著提升答案准确率的同时，大幅减少推理 token 消耗。

title: Revisiting Human-in-the-Loop Object Retrieval with Pre-Trained Vision Transformers
summary: Building on existing approaches, we revisit Human-in-the-Loop Object Retrieval, a task that consists of iteratively retrieving images containing objects of a class-of-interest, specified by a user-provided query. Starting from a large unlabeled image collection, the aim is to rapidly identify diverse instances of an object category relying solely on the initial query and the user's Relevance Feedback, with no prior labels. The retrieval process is formulated as a binary classification task, where the system continuously learns to distinguish between relevant and non-relevant images to the query, through iterative user interaction. This interaction is guided by an Active Learning loop: at each iteration, the system selects informative samples for user annotation, thereby refining the retrieval performance. This task is particularly challenging in multi-object datasets, where the object of interest may occupy only a small region of the image within a complex, cluttered scene. Unlike object-centered settings where global descriptors often suffice, multi-object images require more adapted, localized descriptors. In this work, we formulate and revisit the Human-in-the-Loop Object Retrieval task by leveraging pre-trained ViT representations, and addressing key design questions, including which object instances to consider in an image, what form the annotations should take, how Active Selection should be applied, and which representation strategies best capture the object's features. We compare several representation strategies across multi-object datasets highlighting trade-offs between capturing the global context and focusing on fine-grained local object details. Our results offer practical insights for the design of effective interactive retrieval pipelines based on Active Learning for object class retrieval.
translated_summary:
我们在现有方法基础上，重新审视“人机协同的目标检索”任务。该任务要求在仅依赖用户提供的查询以及用户相关性反馈、不利用任何先验标签的条件下，从大规模未标注图像库中，迭代地检索包含用户感兴趣目标类别的图像，并快速挖掘多样化的目标实例。我们将检索过程建模为二元分类问题：系统通过在每轮交互中持续学习区分与查询相关的和无关的图像。

交互由一个主动学习循环驱动：每一轮，系统挑选最具信息量的样本供用户标注，从而持续优化检索效果。当面对本任务最具挑战性的“多目标数据集”时——其中感兴趣目标仅占图像极小区域，且场景复杂、杂糅——传统的全局描述符已不足敷用，必须采用更精细的局部描述符。

本文利用预训练 ViT 表征，全面重述并规范化了“人机协同的目标检索”任务，并逐一解决关键设计问题：应在图像中关注哪些目标实例、用户应提供何种形式的标注、如何实施主动选择、以及何种表征策略最能捕捉目标的细粒度特征。我们在多目标数据集上比较了多种表征策略，揭示了全局上下文与局部细节之间的权衡。

实验结果为基于主动学习的交互式目标类别检索流程的构建提供了切实可行的洞察。

title: A novel three-step approach to forecast firm-specific technology convergence opportunity via multi-dimensional feature fusion
summary: As a crucial innovation paradigm, technology convergence (TC) is gaining ever-increasing attention. Yet, existing studies primarily focus on predicting TC at the industry level, with little attention paid to TC forecast for firm-specific technology opportunity discovery (TOD). Moreover, although technological documents like patents contain a rich body of bibliometric, network structure, and textual features, such features are underexploited in the extant TC predictions; most of the relevant studies only used one or two dimensions of these features, and all the three dimensional features have rarely been fused. Here we propose a novel approach that fuses multi-dimensional features from patents to predict TC for firm-specific TOD. Our method comprises three steps, which are elaborated as follows. First, bibliometric, network structure, and textual features are extracted from patent documents, and then fused at the International Patent Classification (IPC)-pair level using attention mechanisms. Second, IPC-level TC opportunities are identified using a two-stage ensemble learning model that incorporates various imbalance-handling strategies. Third, to acquire feasible firm-specific TC opportunities, the performance metrics of topic-level TC opportunities, which are refined from IPC-level opportunities, are evaluated via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) with a large language model (LLM). We prove the effectiveness of our proposed approach by predicting TC opportunities for a leading Chinese auto part manufacturer, Zhejiang Sanhua Intelligent Controls co., ltd, in the domains of thermal management for energy storage and robotics. In sum, this work advances the theory and applicability of forecasting firm-specific TC opportunity through fusing multi-dimensional features and leveraging LLM-as-a-judge for technology opportunity evaluation.
translated_summary: 作为一项关键的范式创新，技术融合（Technology Convergence, TC）日益受到关注。然而，现有研究主要聚焦于在产业层级预测 TC，极少关注企业特有的技术机会发现（Technology Opportunity Discovery, TOD）。此外，尽管专利等科技文献中蕴含了丰富的书目计量、网络结构与文本特征，但目前 TC 预测对这些特征利用不足；多数研究仅使用一到两个维度，三种维度的特征从未被完整融合。为此，本文提出了一种融合专利多维特征的新方法，以面向企业个体开展 TC 预测。方法分三步：首先，从专利文献中提取书目计量、网络结构与文本三类特征，通过注意力机制在两层面的国际专利分类（IPC）对上进行融合；其次，构建一个包含多重不平衡处理策略的两阶段集成学习模型，识别 IPC 层 TC 机会；最后，以大型语言模型（LLM）相结合的提升检索生成（RAG）手段，对由 IPC 级机会进一步提炼出的主题级 TC 机会进行绩效评价，从而得到切合企业实际的可行性 TC 机会。我们以浙江三花智能控制股份有限公司（领域：储能热管理与机器人）为样本，验证了所提方法的有效性。总体而言，本文通过多维特征融合和 LLM“即评即用”技术机会评估，推动了面向企业的 TC 机会预测理论及实践应用。

title: STCALIR: Semi-Synthetic Test Collection for Algerian Legal Information Retrieval
summary: Test collections are essential for evaluating retrieval and re-ranking models. However, constructing such collections is challenging due to the high cost of manual annotation, particularly in specialized domains like Algerian legal texts, where high-quality corpora and relevance judgments are scarce. To address this limitation, we propose STCALIR, a framework for generating semi-synthetic test collections directly from raw legal documents. The pipeline follows the Cranfield paradigm, maintaining its core components of topics, corpus, and relevance judgments, while significantly reducing manual effort through automated multi-stage retrieval and filtering, achieving a 99% reduction in annotation workload. We validate STCALIR using the Mr. TyDi benchmark, demonstrating that the resulting semi-synthetic relevance judgments yield retrieval effectiveness comparable to human-annotated evaluations (Hit@10 \approx 0.785). Furthermore, system-level rankings derived from these labels exhibit strong concordance with human-based evaluations, as measured by Kendall's τ (0.89) and Spearman's \r{ho} (0.92). Overall, STCALIR offers a reproducible and cost-efficient solution for constructing reliable test collections in low-resource legal domains.
translated_summary: 测试集是评估检索与重排序模型必不可少的资源。然而，其构建过程因人工注释成本高昂而困难重重，在阿尔及利亚法律文本等专业领域尤为突出，这些领域既缺乏高质量语料，也缺少可靠的相关性判断。为突破这一瓶颈，本文提出 STCALIR——一种能够从原始法律文档直接生成半合成测试集的框架。该流程严格遵循 Cranfield 评测范式，保留了“主题、文档库、相关性判断”三大核心要素；同时，通过自动化的多阶段检索与过滤，把人工标注工作量锐减 99%。我们在 Mr. TyDi 基准上的实验表明，用 STCALIR 生成的半合成相关性标签所得到的检索效果与人工注释几乎等同（Hit@10 ≈ 0.785）。此外，基于这些标签得到的系统级排名与人工评估高度一致，Kendall τ 为 0.89，Spearman ρ 达 0.92。总体而言，STCALIR 为资源匮乏的法律领域提供了一种可复现、低成本的测试集构建方案。

title: Common TF-IDF variants arise as key components in the test statistic of a penalized likelihood-ratio test for word burstiness
summary: TF-IDF is a classical formula that is widely used for identifying important terms within documents. We show that TF-IDF-like scores arise naturally from the test statistic of a penalized likelihood-ratio test setup capturing word burstiness (also known as word over-dispersion). In our framework, the alternative hypothesis captures word burstiness by modeling a collection of documents according to a family of beta-binomial distributions with a gamma penalty term on the precision parameter. In contrast, the null hypothesis assumes that words are binomially distributed in collection documents, a modeling approach that fails to account for word burstiness. We find that a term-weighting scheme given rise to by this test statistic performs comparably to TF-IDF on document classification tasks. This paper provides insights into TF-IDF from a statistical perspective and underscores the potential of hypothesis testing frameworks for advancing term-weighting scheme development.
translated_summary: TF-IDF 是一种经典公式，广泛用于识别文档中的重要词汇。本文证明，在捕获词汇突发性（又称词汇过度离散）的惩罚似然比检验框架下，TF-IDF 形式的权重会自然地作为检验统计量而出现。在我们的模型中，备择假设利用带 Gamma 惩罚的 Beta-二项分布族对文档集进行建模，从而刻画词汇突发性；而零假设则假定单词在文档中呈二项分布，无法反映词汇突发性。我们发现，由该检验统计量导出的词汇加权方案在文档分类任务上表现与 TF-IDF 相当。本文为TF-IDF 提供了统计学视角的新阐释，并突显了假设检验框架在推动词汇加权方案发展方面的潜力。

title: UniMixer: A Unified Architecture for Scaling Laws in Recommendation Systems
summary: In recent years, the scaling laws of recommendation models have attracted increasing attention, which govern the relationship between performance and parameters/FLOPs of recommenders. Currently, there are three mainstream architectures for achieving scaling in recommendation models, namely attention-based, TokenMixer-based, and factorization-machine-based methods, which exhibit fundamental differences in both design philosophy and architectural structure. In this paper, we propose a unified scaling architecture for recommendation systems, namely \textbf{UniMixer}, to improve scaling efficiency and establish a unified theoretical framework that unifies the mainstream scaling blocks. By transforming the rule-based TokenMixer to an equivalent parameterized structure, we construct a generalized parameterized feature mixing module that allows the token mixing patterns to be optimized and learned during model training. Meanwhile, the generalized parameterized token mixing removes the constraint in TokenMixer that requires the number of heads to be equal to the number of tokens. Furthermore, we establish a unified scaling module design framework for recommender systems, which bridges the connections among attention-based, TokenMixer-based, and factorization-machine-based methods. To further boost scaling ROI, a lightweight UniMixing module is designed, \textbf{UniMixing-Lite}, which further compresses the model parameters and computational cost while significantly improve the model performance. The scaling curves are shown in the following figure. Extensive offline and online experiments are conducted to verify the superior scaling abilities of \textbf{UniMixer}.
translated_summary: 近年来，推荐模型的缩放规律受到广泛关注，这些规律揭示了推荐器性能与参数量或计算量之间的对应关系。目前，实现模型扩缩的主流架构主要有三类：基于注意力、基于 TokenMixer 以及基于因子机的方法，它们在设计理念与结构设计上均存在根本差异。本文提出一种面向推荐系统的统一扩缩架构——【UniMixer】，不仅提升扩缩效率，而且建立了一个能够统一上述主流缩放模块的理论框架。通过将基于规则的 TokenMixer 转化为等效参数化结构，我们构建了一个广义参数化特征混合单元，使 token 混合模式在模型训练阶段即可被学习并优化。该广义参数化 token 混合同时打破 TokenMixer 中“头数必须等于 token 数”的限制。此外，我们给出了推荐系统的一体化扩缩模块设计范式，将注意力型、TokenMixer 型与因子机型方法统一在同一框架之下。为进一步提升扩缩投资回报率（ROI），我们设计了轻量版 UniMixing 模块——【UniMixing-Lite】，在大幅压缩参量与计算量的同时显著提升模型性能，其缩放曲线如下文所示。大量离线及在线实验验证了 UniMixer 的优越扩展能力。

title: Lipschitz Dueling Bandits over Continuous Action Spaces
summary: We study for the first time, stochastic dueling bandits over continuous action spaces with Lipschitz structure, where feedback is purely comparative. While dueling bandits and Lipschitz bandits have been studied separately, their combination has remained unexplored. We propose the first algorithm for Lipschitz dueling bandits, using round-based exploration and recursive region elimination guided by an adaptive reference arm. We develop new analytical tools for relative feedback and prove a regret bound of $\tilde O\left(T^{\frac{d_z+1}{d_z+2}}\right)$, where $d_z$ is the zooming dimension of the near-optimal region. Further, our algorithm takes only logarithmic space in terms of the total time horizon, best achievable by any bandit algorithm over a continuous action space.
translated_summary: 我们首次研究了具有 Lipschitz 结构的连续动作空间下的随机对偶老虎机（stochastic dueling bandits），其中反馈仅为比较信号。尽管对偶老虎机和 Lipschitz 老虎机分别已有研究，但两者的结合尚未被探索。我们提出了首个适用于 Lipschitz 对偶老虎机的算法，该算法采用基于回合的探索方式，并借助自适应参考臂引导递归区域淘汰。我们针对相对反馈开发了新的分析工具，并证明了遗憾界为 $\tilde O\left(T^{\frac{d_z+1}{d_z+2}}\right)$，其中 $d_z$ 为近优区域的 zooming 维度。此外，该算法的空间需求仅随总时间跨度呈对数级增长，这是任何连续动作空间老虎机算法所能达到的最佳空间复杂度。

title: MOON3.0: Reasoning-aware Multimodal Representation Learning for E-commerce Product Understanding
summary: With the rapid growth of e-commerce, exploring general representations rather than task-specific ones has attracted increasing attention. Although recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have driven significant progress in product understanding, they are typically employed as feature extractors that implicitly encode product information into global embeddings, thereby limiting their ability to capture fine-grained attributes. Therefore, we argue that leveraging the reasoning capabilities of MLLMs to explicitly model fine-grained product attributes holds significant potential. Nevertheless, achieving this goal remains non-trivial due to several key challenges: (i) long-context reasoning tends to dilute the model's attention to salient information in the raw input; (ii) supervised fine-tuning (SFT) primarily encourages rigid imitation, limiting the exploration of effective reasoning strategies; and (iii) fine-grained details are progressively attenuated during forward propagation. To address these issues, we propose MOON3.0, the first reasoning-aware MLLM-based model for product representation learning. Our method (1) employs a multi-head modality fusion module to adaptively integrate raw signals; (2) incorporates a joint contrastive and reinforcement learning framework to autonomously explore more effective reasoning strategies; and (3) introduces a fine-grained residual enhancement module to progressively preserve local details throughout the network. Additionally, we release a large-scale multimodal e-commerce benchmark MBE3.0. Experimentally, our model demonstrates state-of-the-art zero-shot performance across various downstream tasks on both our benchmark and public datasets.
translated_summary: 随着电子商务的迅猛发展，相较于特定任务表征，构建通用产品表征已受到越来越多的关注。近期的多模态大语言模型（MLLM）虽然显著推动了产品理解，但大多仅被用作特征提取器，将产品信息隐含地编码为全局嵌入，从而限制了对细粒度属性的捕捉能力。因此，我们认为充分利用 MLLM 的推理能力并显式建模细粒度产品属性潜力巨大。然而，这一目标极具挑战性，主要原因包括：（i）长上下文推理会使模型对输入关键信息的关注被稀释；（ii）监督式微调（SFT）主要鼓励刚性模仿，抑制了对高效推理策略的主动探索；（iii）在前向传播过程中，细粒度细节会逐步衰减。为此，我们提出 MOON3.0 —— 首个面向产品表征学习的推理感知 MLLM 框架。该方法 ① 设计多头模态融合模块自适应整合原始信号；② 引入联合对比与强化学习框架，自主探索更高效的推理策略；③ 提出细粒度残差增强模块，在整个网络中递进保留局部细节。同时，我们发布了大规模多模态电商评测基准 MBE3.0。实验表明，MOON3.0 在自有基准及多个公开数据集的多项下游任务上均取得了领先的零样本性能。

title: Evidence Units: Ontology-Grounded Document Organization for Parser-Independent Retrieval
summary: Structured documents--tables paired with captions, figures with explanations, equations with the paragraphs that interpret them--are routinely fragmented when indexed for retrieval. Element-level indexing treats every parsed element as an independent chunk, scattering semantically cohesive units across separate retrieval candidates. This paper presents a parser-independent pipeline that constructs Evidence Units (EUs): semantically complete document chunks that group visual assets with their contextual text. We introduce four contributions: (1) ontology-grounded role normalization extending DoCO that maps heterogeneous parser outputs to a unified semantic schema; (2) a semantic global assignment algorithm that optimally assigns paragraphs to EUs via a full similarity matrix; (3) a graph-based decision layer in Neo4j that formalizes EU construction rules and validates completeness through two invariants; and (4) cross-parser validation showing EU spatial footprints converge across MinerU and Docling, with gains preserved under parser-induced bbox variance. Experiments on OmniDocBench v1.0 (1,340 pages; 1,551 QA pairs) show EU-based chunking improves retrieval LCS by +0.31 (0.50 to 0.81). Recall@1 increases from 0.15 to 0.51 (3.4x) and MinK decreases from 2.58 to 1.72. Cross-parser results confirm the gain (LCS +0.23 to +0.31) is preserved across parsers. Text queries show the most dramatic gain: Recall@1 rises from 0.08 to 0.47.
translated_summary:
结构化文档——表格与其标题、图形与其说明、方程与其解读——在检索索引时往往被拆得支离破碎。元素级索引把每一处解析结果都视为独立片段，将语义完整的整体切成散布于不同检索候选中的零散部分。  
本文提出一种与解析器无关的流水线，构建“证据单元（EUs）”：把视觉资产与相应上下文文本聚合为语义完整的文档块。四项核心贡献如下：  
（1）基于 DoCO 扩展的本体约束角色规范化，将不同解析器的异构输出统一映射至同一语义模式；  
（2）语义全局分配算法，通过全文段-证据单元相似度矩阵，最优地把段落归入对应的 EUs；  
（3）Neo4j 上的图式决策层，将以规则为核心的 EU 建构形式化，并以两个不变式验证完整性；  
（4）跨解析器一致性验证，表明 EU 空间足迹在 MinerU 与 Docling 方法下趋于收敛，且在解析器引起的 bbox 扰动下优势依旧。  

在 OmniDocBench v1.0（1,340 页、1,551 问答对）上的实验表明，基于 EU 的分块方法把检索 LCS 从 0.50 提升至 0.81（↑+0.31）。Recall@1 从 0.15 提升到 0.51（提高 3.4 倍），MinK 由 2.58 降至 1.72。跨解析器结果证实，此增益在不同解析器上仍稳居 LCS +0.23～+0.31。文本查询收益尤其显著：Recall@1 从 0.08 跃升至 0.47。

title: FGR-ColBERT: Identifying Fine-Grained Relevance Tokens During Retrieval
summary: Document retrieval identifies relevant documents but does not provide fine-grained evidence cues, such as specific relevant spans. A possible solution is to apply an LLM after retrieval; however, this introduces significant computational overhead and limits practical deployment. We propose FGR-ColBERT, a modification of ColBERT retrieval model that integrates fine-grained relevance signals distilled from an LLM directly into the retrieval function. Experiments on MS MARCO show that FGR-ColBERT (110M) achieves a token-level F1 of 64.5, exceeding the 62.8 of Gemma 2 (27B), despite being approximately 245 times smaller. At the same time, it preserves retrieval effectiveness (99% relative Recall@50) and remains efficient, incurring only a ~1.12x latency overhead compared to the original ColBERT.
translated_summary: 文档检索能找出相关文档，却无法提示细粒度证据，例如具体相关片段。一种补救策略是在检索后调用大语言模型（LLM），但这带来高昂的计算成本，阻碍实际部署。我们提出 FGR-ColBERT，它对 ColBERT 检索模型进行修改，将由 LLM 提炼出的细粒度相关信号直接融合进检索函数。在 MS MARCO 的实验表明，FGR-ColBERT（110 M 参数）的 token 级 F1 达到 64.5，超过 Gemma 2（27 B 参数）的 62.8，而模型规模仅为其约 1/245。同时，FGR-ColBERT 保持了检索效果（相对 Recall@50 为 99%），并保持高效，相比原 ColBERT 仅增加约 1.12 倍延迟。

title: Multi-Agent Video Recommenders: Evolution, Patterns, and Open Challenges
summary: Video recommender systems are among the most popular and impactful applications of AI, shaping content consumption and influencing culture for billions of users. Traditional single-model recommenders, which optimize static engagement metrics, are increasingly limited in addressing the dynamic requirements of modern platforms. In response, multi-agent architectures are redefining how video recommender systems serve, learn, and adapt to both users and datasets. These agent-based systems coordinate specialized agents responsible for video understanding, reasoning, memory, and feedback, to provide precise, explainable recommendations. In this survey, we trace the evolution of multi-agent video recommendation systems (MAVRS). We combine ideas from multi-agent recommender systems, foundation models, and conversational AI, culminating in the emerging field of large language model (LLM)-powered MAVRS. We present a taxonomy of collaborative patterns and analyze coordination mechanisms across diverse video domains, ranging from short-form clips to educational platforms. We discuss representative frameworks, including early multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) systems such as MMRF and recent LLM-driven architectures like MACRec and Agent4Rec, to illustrate these patterns. We also outline open challenges in scalability, multimodal understanding, incentive alignment, and identify research directions such as hybrid reinforcement learning-LLM systems, lifelong personalization and self-improving recommender systems.
translated_summary:
视频推荐系统是人工智能最受欢迎且影响最深远的应用之一，它塑造了数十亿用户的内容消费方式，并对文化产生深刻影响。然而，传统的单一模型推荐器仅优化静态互动指标，越来越难以满足现代平台的动态需求。对此，多智能体架构正在重新定义视频推荐系统如何为用户和数据集提供服务、学习和自我适应。基于智能体的系统通过协调专门负责视频理解、推理、记忆与反馈的智能体，提供精准且可解释的推荐。

本综述追踪了多智能体视频推荐系统（MAVRS）的演进历程，融合多智能体推荐系统、基础模型和对话式 AI 的思想，最终聚焦于以大语言模型（LLM）驱动的 MAVRS 这一新兴领域。我们提出了一种协同模式分类法，并剖析在短视频、教育平台等多种视频场景下的协调机制。我们通过早期多智能体强化学习（MARL）系统 MMRF 以及近期由 LLM 驱动的 MACRec 和 Agent4Rec 等代表性框架，来阐明这些协同模式。最后，我们讨论了可扩展性、多模态理解、激励对齐等悬而未决的挑战，并指出诸如混合强化学习-LLM 系统、终身个性化和自完善推荐系统等未来研究方向。

title: AstroConcepts: A Large-Scale Multi-Label Classification Corpus for Astrophysics
summary: Scientific multi-label text classification suffers from extreme class imbalance, where specialized terminology exhibits severe power-law distributions that challenge standard classification approaches. Existing scientific corpora lack comprehensive controlled vocabularies, focusing instead on broad categories and limiting systematic study of extreme imbalance. We introduce AstroConcepts, a corpus of English abstracts from 21,702 published astrophysics papers, labeled with 2,367 concepts from the Unified Astronomy Thesaurus. The corpus exhibits severe label imbalance, with 76% of concepts having fewer than 50 training examples. By releasing this resource, we enable systematic study of extreme class imbalance in scientific domains and establish strong baselines across traditional, neural, and vocabulary-constrained LLM methods. Our evaluation reveals three key patterns that provide new insights into scientific text classification. First, vocabulary-constrained LLMs achieve competitive performance relative to domain-adapted models in astrophysics classification, suggesting a potential for parameter-efficient approaches. Second, domain adaptation yields relatively larger improvements for rare, specialized terminology, although absolute performance remains limited across all methods. Third, we propose frequency-stratified evaluation to reveal performance patterns that are hidden by aggregate scores, thereby making robustness assessment central to scientific multi-label evaluation. These results offer actionable insights for scientific NLP and establish benchmarks for research on extreme imbalance.
translated_summary: 科学多标签文本分类长期被极端类别失衡困扰：专业术语呈现严重的幂律分布，令常规分类方法难以奏效。现有科学语料普遍缺乏完整的受控词表，仅在粗粒度类别上做标注，极端失衡的系统研究因此受限。我们发布 AstroConcepts 语料：含 21,702 篇已发表天体物理论文的英文摘要，以“统一天文学叙词表”中的 2,367 个概念作为标签。该语料存在极端的标签失衡——76% 的概念训练样本不足 50 例。通过开放这一资源，我们既为科学领域的极端失衡研究提供可控平台，也为传统方法、神经网络方法及受词汇限制的大型语言模型建立了强基线。实验揭示三大模式，带来科学文本分类的新洞见：首先，在天体物理分类任务中，受词汇约束的 LLM 与领域适配模型表现相当，提示参数高效方案具备可行性；其次，领域适配对低频专业术语的收益更大，但所有方法的绝对性能仍然受限；最后，我们提出“频率分层评估”，以揭示被整体指标掩盖的性能模式，从而强调鲁棒性评估在科学多标签任务中的核心地位。上述结果为科学 NLP 提供了可落地的启示，并为极端失衡研究确立了新基准。

title: Optimizing RAG Rerankers with LLM Feedback via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Rerankers play a pivotal role in refining retrieval results for Retrieval-Augmented Generation. However, current reranking models are typically optimized on static human annotated relevance labels in isolation, decoupled from the downstream generation process. This isolation leads to a fundamental misalignment: documents identified as topically relevant by information retrieval metrics often fail to provide the actual utility required by the LLM for precise answer generation. To bridge this gap, we introduce ReRanking Preference Optimization (RRPO), a reinforcement learning framework that directly aligns reranking with the LLM's generation quality. By formulating reranking as a sequential decision-making process, RRPO optimizes for context utility using LLM feedback, thereby eliminating the need for expensive human annotations. To ensure training stability, we further introduce a reference-anchored deterministic baseline. Extensive experiments on knowledge-intensive benchmarks demonstrate that RRPO significantly outperforms strong baselines, including the powerful list-wise reranker RankZephyr. Further analysis highlights the versatility of our framework: it generalizes seamlessly to diverse readers (e.g., GPT-4o), integrates orthogonally with query expansion modules like Query2Doc, and remains robust even when trained with noisy supervisors.
translated_summary: 重排序器在优化检索增强生成（RAG）的结果方面具有关键作用。然而，现有重排序模型通常仅依靠静态人工标注的相关性标签独立训练，这一做法与下游文本生成的过程完全脱节。这种隔离造成了根本性的错位：信息检索指标认定的“主题相关”文档，未必能真正为大语言模型（LLM）生成准确答案提供所需价值。为弥合这一鸿沟，本文提出“重排序偏好优化”（RRPO）：一种通过强化学习直接对齐重排序器与LLM生成质量的框架。该框架将重排序建模为序列决策过程，利用LLM反馈来优化语境效用，彻底摆脱昂贵人工标注。为保证训练稳定，我们进一步引入基于参考的确定性基线。在多个知识密集型基准上进行的大量实验表明，RRPO显著优于包括强大列表重排序器RankZephyr在内的多种先进基线。进一步分析凸显了本框架的多功能性：能无缝迁移至不同读者模型（如GPT-4o），可与Query2Doc等查询扩展模块正交结合，并对带噪声的“弱监督”保持鲁棒。

title: Do We Need Bigger Models for Science? Task-Aware Retrieval with Small Language Models
summary: Scientific knowledge discovery increasingly relies on large language models, yet many existing scholarly assistants depend on proprietary systems with tens or hundreds of billions of parameters. Such reliance limits reproducibility and accessibility for the research community. In this work, we ask a simple question: do we need bigger models for scientific applications? Specifically, we investigate to what extent carefully designed retrieval pipelines can compensate for reduced model scale in scientific applications. We design a lightweight retrieval-augmented framework that performs task-aware routing to select specialized retrieval strategies based on the input query. The system further integrates evidence from full-text scientific papers and structured scholarly metadata, and employs compact instruction-tuned language models to generate responses with citations. We evaluate the framework across several scholarly tasks, focusing on scholarly question answering (QA), including single- and multi-document scenarios, as well as biomedical QA under domain shift and scientific text compression. Our findings demonstrate that retrieval and model scale are complementary rather than interchangeable. While retrieval design can partially compensate for smaller models, model capacity remains important for complex reasoning tasks. This work highlights retrieval and task-aware design as key factors for building practical and reproducible scholarly assistants.
translated_summary: 科学知识的发现日益倚重大型语言模型，然诸多现存学术助手依赖数百亿甚至千亿级参数量的私有系统，致使研究社区在可复现性与可得性上受限。本文提出一个本质问题：科学应用是否必须采用更大模型？具体而言，我们探究精心设计的检索管道能在多大程度上弥补模型规模的缩减。我们设计了一种轻量级检索增强框架，该框架通过任务感知路由，依据输入查询动态选择专用检索策略；同时整合学术论文全文与结构化元数据证据，并利用紧凑型指令微调语言模型生成带引用的答案。我们在多种学术任务上评估该框架，涵盖单篇及多篇场景下的学术问答（QA）、领域迁移下的生物医学 QA，以及科学文本压缩。结果显示，检索能力与模型规模互补而非可相互替代：尽管精巧的检索设计可在一定程度上弥补小模型的不足，复杂推理任务仍对模型容量提出要求。本研究强调，检索与任务感知设计是构建实用且可复现的学术助手的关键因素。

title: Diagnosing Translated Benchmarks: An Automated Quality Assurance Study of the EU20 Benchmark Suite
summary: Machine-translated benchmark datasets reduce costs and offer scale, but noise, loss of structure, and uneven quality weaken confidence. What matters is not merely whether we can translate, but also whether we can measure and verify translation reliability at scale. We study translation quality in the EU20 benchmark suite, which comprises five established benchmarks translated into 20 languages, via a three-step automated quality assurance approach: (i) a structural corpus audit with targeted fixes; (ii) quality profiling using a neural metric (COMET, reference-free and reference-based) with translation service comparisons (DeepL / ChatGPT / Google); and (iii) an LLM-based span-level translation error landscape. Trends are consistent: datasets with lower COMET scores exhibit a higher share of accuracy/mistranslation errors at span level (notably HellaSwag; ARC is comparatively clean). Reference-based COMET on MMLU against human-edited samples points in the same direction. We release cleaned/corrected versions of the EU20 datasets, and code for reproducibility. In sum, automated quality assurance offers practical, scalable indicators that help prioritize review -- complementing, not replacing, human gold standards.
translated_summary:
机器翻译的基准数据集能够降低成本并扩大规模，但也带来了噪声、结构损失和质量不均等问题，削弱了研究人员的信任。关键在于：不仅要“能”翻译，还要在大规模场景下“测”与“证”翻译的可靠性。为此，我们以 EU20 基准套件为研究对象。该套件涵盖五个成熟数据集，被机器翻译为 20 种语言。我们提出三阶段的自动化质量保证流程：

(1) 结构语料审计，定位并修复针对性和系统性缺陷；  
(2) 基于神经指标 COMET（含无参考和有参考两种模式）的质量画像，并对 DeepL、ChatGPT 和 Google 三大主流翻译引擎进行对比；  
(3) 借助大语言模型开展 span-level 的翻译错误摸排，生成详细的错误地形图。

趋势高度一致：在数据集层面，COMET 得分越低的集合，span-level 的准确率/误译率缺陷占比越高（尤其体现在 HellaSwag；ARC 相对干净）。将 MMLU 的参考式 COMET 分值与少量人工精校样本对比，结论仍保持一致。

我们已公开发布经过清洗 / 校正的 EU20 数据集及完整复现代码。总结而言，自动化质量保证提供了实际可行、可扩展的指标，可帮助用户优先聚焦被标记的问题区域——它是对人工金标准的补充，而非替代。

title: From BM25 to Corrective RAG: Benchmarking Retrieval Strategies for Text-and-Table Documents
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems critically depend on retrieval quality, yet no systematic comparison of modern retrieval methods exists for heterogeneous documents containing both text and tabular data. We benchmark ten retrieval strategies spanning sparse, dense, hybrid fusion, cross-encoder reranking, query expansion, index augmentation, and adaptive retrieval on a challenging financial QA benchmark of 23,088 queries over 7,318 documents with mixed text-and-table content. We evaluate retrieval quality via Recall@k, MRR, and nDCG, and end-to-end generation quality via Number Match, with paired bootstrap significance testing. Our results show that (1) a two-stage pipeline combining hybrid retrieval with neural reranking achieves Recall@5 of 0.816 and MRR@3 of 0.605, outperforming all single-stage methods by a large margin; (2) BM25 outperforms state-of-the-art dense retrieval on financial documents, challenging the common assumption that semantic search universally dominates; and (3) query expansion methods (HyDE, multi-query) and adaptive retrieval provide limited benefit for precise numerical queries, while contextual retrieval yields consistent gains. We provide ablation studies on fusion methods and reranker depth, actionable cost-accuracy recommendations, and release our full benchmark code.
translated_summary:
检索增强生成（RAG）系统严重依赖检索质量，然而，针对同时包含文本与表格的异构文档，当前仍缺乏对现代检索方法的系统化对比。我们在一个富有挑战性的金融问答基准上，跨越 7,318 篇混合文本与表格的文档、共设 23,088 个问句，对十种检索策略进行评测，涵盖稀疏检索、稠密检索、混合融合、交叉编码器重排、查询扩展、索引增强及自适应检索。我们以 Recall@k、MRR 与 nDCG 评估检索质量，以 Number Match 评估端到端生成质量，并使用配对自助法显著性检验。结果表明：  
1) 将混合检索与神经重排结合的两阶段管道，在 Recall@5 达到 0.816，MRR@3 达到 0.605，大幅超越所有单阶段方法；  
2) 在金融文档场景下，BM25 优于当前最优的稠密检索，质疑了“语义搜索普遍更优”的常规假设；  
3) 对精确数值型查询，HyDE、多查询等扩展方法与自适应检索的收益有限，而语境化检索带来持续增益。  

我们还在融合方法、重排深度上进行了消融实验，给出可落地的成本–精度建议，并开源完整的基准代码。

title: STABLE: Efficient Hybrid Nearest Neighbor Search via Magnitude-Uniformity and Cardinality-Robustness
summary: Hybrid Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search (Hybrid ANNS) is a foundational search technology for large-scale heterogeneous data and has gained significant attention in both academia and industry. However, current approaches overlook the heterogeneity in data distribution, thus ignoring two major challenges: the Compatibility Barrier for Similarity Magnitude Heterogeneity and the Tolerance Bottleneck to Attribute Cardinality. To overcome these issues, we propose the robuSt heTerogeneity-Aware hyBrid retrievaL framEwork, STABLE, designed for accurate, efficient, and robust hybrid ANNS under datasets with various distributions. Specifically, we introduce an enhAnced heterogeneoUs semanTic perceptiOn (AUTO) metric to achieve a joint measurement of feature similarity and attribute consistency, addressing similarity magnitude heterogeneity and improving robustness to datasets with various attribute cardinalities. Thereafter, we construct our Heterogeneous sEmantic reLation graPh (HELP) index based on AUTO to organize heterogeneous semantic relations. Finally, we employ a novel Dynamic Heterogeneity Routing method to ensure an efficient search. Extensive experiments on five feature vector benchmarks with various attribute cardinalities demonstrate the superior performance of STABLE.
translated_summary: 混合近似最近邻搜索（Hybrid ANNS）是面向大规模异构数据的基础检索技术，已在学术界和工业界受到广泛关注。然而，现有方法忽视数据分布的异质性，导致两大核心挑战被长期搁置：相似性幅值异构带来的兼容屏障（Compatibility Barrier for Similarity Magnitude Heterogeneity）以及属性基数差异造成的容忍瓶颈（Tolerance Bottleneck to Attribute Cardinality）。为突破这两大桎梏，我们提出鲁棒、可感知异质性的混合检索框架——robuSt heTerogeneity-Aware hyBrid retrievaL framEwork（简称 STABLE），旨在在不同数据分布条件下实现精准、高效且稳健的混合 ANNS。具体而言，我们引入 enhAnced heterogeneoUs semanTic perceptiOn 度量（AUTO），统一表征特征相似度与属性一致性，直接解决相似性幅值分布差异，并显著提升对多属性基数场景的鲁棒性。基于 AUTO，我们构建异构语义关系图（Heterogeneous sEmantic reLation graPh，HELP）索引，以此高效组织异构语义关联。随后，独创的动态异构路径（Dynamic Heterogeneity Routing）策略确保检索过程的高效性。在五个具有不同属性基数的特征向量基准数据集上的大量实验表明，STABLE 在性能显著优于现有方法。

title: ReFormeR: Learning and Applying Explicit Query Reformulation Patterns
summary: We present ReFormeR, a pattern-guided approach for query reformulation. Instead of prompting a language model to generate reformulations of a query directly, ReFormeR first elicits short reformulation patterns from pairs of initial queries and empirically stronger reformulations, consolidates them into a compact library of transferable reformulation patterns, and then selects an appropriate reformulation pattern for a new query given its retrieval context. The selected pattern constrains query reformulation to controlled operations such as sense disambiguation, vocabulary grounding, or discriminative facet addition, to name a few. As such, our proposed approach makes the reformulation policy explicit through these reformulation patterns, guiding the LLM towards targeted and effective query reformulations. Our extensive experiments on TREC DL 2019, DL 2020, and DL Hard show consistent improvements over classical feedback methods and recent LLM-based query reformulation and expansion approaches.
translated_summary: 我们提出了 **ReFormeR**，一种以模式为指导的查询重写方法。与传统的直接提示大语言模型生成改写不同，ReFormeR 首先通过分析原始查询与其对应的高质量改写，提炼出若干简短的改写“模式”，并将这些模式压缩整合成可迁移的紧凑模式库。当面对新查询时，系统会依据其检索场景为该查询选取最适配的重写模式。被选中的模式会以受控操作（如义消歧、术语映射、区分性侧面信息的补充等）来规范约束最终的重写过程。如此，ReFormeR 将这些“模式”显式地定义为改写策略，精准引导大模型完成目标明确且高效的查询改写。在 TREC DL 2019、DL 2020 以及 DL Hard 上的大量实验表明，ReFormeR 均显著优于经典反馈方法以及现有的基于大模型的查询改写和扩展方法。

title: ORBIT: Scalable and Verifiable Data Generation for Search Agents on a Tight Budget
summary: Search agents, which integrate language models (LMs) with web search, are becoming crucial for answering complex user queries. Constructing training datasets for deep research tasks, involving multi-step retrieval and reasoning, remains challenging due to expensive human annotation, or cumbersome prerequisites. In this work, we introduce ORBIT, a training dataset with 20K reasoning-intensive queries with short verifiable answers, generated using a frugal framework without relying on paid API services. The modular framework relies on four stages: seed creation, question-answer pair generation, and two stages of verification: self and external. ORBIT spans 15 domains and each training pair requires 4-5 reasoning steps, with external search verification required from the complete web. We train Qwen3-4B as the base model on ORBIT using GRPO and evaluate it on Wikipedia question answering tasks. Extensive experiment results demonstrate that ORBIT-4B achieves strong performance among sub-4B LLMs as search agents, proving the utility of synthetic datasets. Our framework, code and datasets are open-sourced and available publicly.
translated_summary: 搜索智能体将语言模型与网络搜索相结合，已成为回答复杂用户查询的关键技术。然而，针对需多步检索与推理的“深度研究”任务构建训练数据集，仍受限于高昂的人工标注成本或繁琐的前置条件。本文提出 ORBIT——一个包含 2 万条高挑战性查询的训练集，所有问题均附简短、可验证答案，可在不依赖付费 API 的前提下按需生成。其低成本模块化框架分为四阶段：种子构建、问题-答案对生成、自检验证与外部验证。ORBIT 覆盖 15 个领域；每对训练样本均需约 4–5 步推理，且必须经全网外部搜索验证方可确定。我们以 ORBIT 为基础，使用 GRPO 微调参数量为 4B 的 Qwen3 模型，并在维基百科问答任务上进行评估。大量实验表明，ORBIT-4B 在参数量 <4B 的 LLM 搜索智能体中取得显著领先地位，证明了合成数据目录的实用价值。框架、代码及数据集已完全开源并对外公开。

title: OkanNet: A Lightweight Deep Learning Architecture for Classification of Brain Tumor from MRI Images
summary: Medical imaging techniques, especially Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI), are accepted as the gold standard in the diagnosis and treatment planning of neurological diseases. However, the manual analysis of MRI images is a time-consuming process for radiologists and is prone to human error due to fatigue. In this study, two different Deep Learning approaches were developed and analyzed comparatively for the automatic detection and classification of brain tumors (Glioma, Meningioma, Pituitary, and No Tumor). In the first approach, a custom Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture named "OkanNet", which has a low computational cost and fast training time, was designed from scratch. In the second approach, the Transfer Learning method was applied using the 50-layer ResNet-50 [1] architecture, pre-trained on the ImageNet dataset. In experiments conducted on an extended dataset compiled by Masoud Nickparvar containing a total of $7,023$ MRI images, the Transfer Learning-based ResNet-50 model exhibited superior classification performance, achieving $96.49\%$ Accuracy and $0.963$ Precision. In contrast, the custom OkanNet architecture reached an accuracy rate of $88.10\%$; however, it proved to be a strong alternative for mobile and embedded systems with limited computational power by yielding results approximately $3.2$ times faster ($311$ seconds) than ResNet-50 in terms of training time. This study demonstrates the trade-off between model depth and computational efficiency in medical image analysis through experimental data.
translated_summary: 医学影像技术，尤其是磁共振成像（MRI），在神经系统疾病的诊断与治疗规划中已被公认为黄金标准。然而，放射科医师人工判读MRI图像不仅耗时，而且因疲劳容易产生人为误差。本研究提出并对比了两种基于深度学习的自动脑肿瘤（胶质瘤、脑膜瘤、垂体瘤以及无肿瘤）检测与分类方法。第一种方法设计了一个从头构建的轻量级卷积神经网络架构——“OkanNet”，具有算力需求低、训练速度快的特点；第二种方法采用在ImageNet数据集上预训练的50层ResNet-50架构，进行迁移学习。在Masoud Nickparvar整理的扩展数据集（共含7 023张MRI图像）上的实验结果表明，基于迁移学习的ResNet-50模型分类表现最佳：准确率96.49%，精确率0.963。相比之下，自定义的OkanNet架构准确率为88.10%，但由于训练时间仅需311秒，比ResNet-50快约3.2倍，因此在算力受限的移动或嵌入式设备中仍是一个有力折衷方案。实验数据清晰揭示了医学影像分析中模型深度与计算效率之间的权衡。

title: Transforming OPACs into Intelligent Discovery Systems: An AI-Powered, Knowledge Graph-Driven Smart OPAC for Digital Libraries
summary: Traditional Online Public Access Catalogues (OPACs) are becoming less effective due to the rapid growth of scholarly literature. Conventional search methods, such as keyword indexing and Boolean queries, often fail to support efficient knowledge discovery. This paper proposes a Smart OPAC framework that transforms traditional OPACs into intelligent discovery systems using artificial intelligence and knowledge graph techniques. The framework enables semantic search, thematic filtering, and knowledge graph-based visualization to enhance user interaction and exploration. It integrates multiple open scholarly data sources and applies semantic embeddings to improve relevance and contextual understanding. The system supports exploratory search, semantic navigation, and refined result filtering based on user-defined themes. Quantitative evaluation demonstrates improvements in retrieval efficiency, relevance, and reduction of information overload. The proposed approach offers practical implications for modernizing digital library services and supports next-generation research workflows. Future work includes user-centric evaluation, personalization, and dynamic knowledge graph updates.
translated_summary: 传统的在线公共检索目录（OPAC）由于学术文献的爆炸式增长而逐渐失效。关键词索引和布尔检索等经典检索方式越来越难以支持高效的知识发现。本文提出一种“智能 OPAC”框架，借助人工智能与知识图谱技术，将传统 OPAC 升级为智慧型发现系统。该框架实现语义检索、主题过滤以及基于知识图谱的可视化，显著提升用户的交互与探索体验。系统整合多源开放学术数据，利用语义嵌入提升检索相关性与语境理解；支持探索式检索、语义式导航以及基于用户自定义主题的精确结果过滤。定量评估显示，该系统在检索效率、结果相关度、信息过载缓解等方面均有显著改善。研究成果对数字化图书馆服务的现代化升级具有现实指导意义，可有效支撑新一代科研工作流。后续工作将聚焦以用户为中心的评估、个性化推荐及知识图谱的动态更新。

title: UniMixer: A Unified Architecture for Scaling Laws in Recommendation Systems
summary: In recent years, the scaling laws of recommendation models have attracted increasing attention, which govern the relationship between performance and parameters/FLOPs of recommenders. Currently, there are three mainstream architectures for achieving scaling in recommendation models, namely attention-based, TokenMixer-based, and factorization-machine-based methods, which exhibit fundamental differences in both design philosophy and architectural structure. In this paper, we propose a unified scaling architecture for recommendation systems, namely \textbf{UniMixer}, to improve scaling efficiency and establish a unified theoretical framework that unifies the mainstream scaling blocks. By transforming the rule-based TokenMixer to an equivalent parameterized structure, we construct a generalized parameterized feature mixing module that allows the token mixing patterns to be optimized and learned during model training. Meanwhile, the generalized parameterized token mixing removes the constraint in TokenMixer that requires the number of heads to be equal to the number of tokens. Furthermore, we establish a unified scaling module design framework for recommender systems, which bridges the connections among attention-based, TokenMixer-based, and factorization-machine-based methods. To further boost scaling ROI, a lightweight UniMixing module is designed, \textbf{UniMixing-Lite}, which further compresses the model parameters and computational cost while significantly improve the model performance. The scaling curves are shown in the following figure. Extensive offline and online experiments are conducted to verify the superior scaling abilities of \textbf{UniMixer}.
translated_summary: 近年来，推荐模型的扩展规律受到了越来越多的关注，这些规律刻画了推荐器性能与其参数量/FLOPs 之间的关系。在实际落地中，目前主要有三种主流架构可实现推荐模型的扩展：基于注意力、基于 TokenMixer 以及基于因子分解机的方法；它们在设计思想与架构细节上呈现出根本性差异。本文提出一种面向推荐系统的统一扩展架构——\textbf{UniMixer}，旨在提升扩展效率，并建立一套统一的理论框架，将上述三种主流扩展“模块”在理论上统一起来。具体地，我们把原本基于规则的 TokenMixer 转化为对应的可学习参量化结构，构造出一种泛化的参量化特征混合组件，使得 token 混合模式可在模型训练过程中被自动优化和学习。通过该泛化参量化 token 混合，我们解除了 TokenMixer 对“头数必须等于 token 数”的频率约束。进一步，我们构建了一个统一的推荐系统扩展模块设计框架，弥合了注意力、TokenMixer 与因子分解机方法之间的鸿沟。为了提升扩展 ROI，我们又提出轻量级 UniMixing 模块——\textbf{UniMixing-Lite}，在进一步压缩参数规模与计算开销的同时，仍显著提升模型性能。文中的扩展曲线直观地展示了其效果。大量离线与在线实验共同验证，\textbf{UniMixer} 具备杰出的扩展能力。

title: PRISM: LLM-Guided Semantic Clustering for High-Precision Topics
summary: In this paper, we propose Precision-Informed Semantic Modeling (PRISM), a structured topic modeling framework combining the benefits of rich representations captured by LLMs with the low cost and interpretability of latent semantic clustering methods. PRISM fine-tunes a sentence encoding model using a sparse set of LLM- provided labels on samples drawn from some corpus of interest. We segment this embedding space with thresholded clustering, yielding clusters that separate closely related topics within some narrow domain. Across multiple corpora, PRISM improves topic separability over state-of-the-art local topic models and even over clustering on large, frontier embedding models while requiring only a small number of LLM queries to train. This work contributes to several research streams by providing (i) a student-teacher pipeline to distill sparse LLM supervision into a lightweight model for topic discovery; (ii) an analysis of the efficacy of sampling strategies to improve local geometry for cluster separability; and (iii) an effective approach for web-scale text analysis, enabling researchers and practitioners to track nuanced claims and subtopics online with an interpretable, locally deployable framework.
translated_summary:
本文提出精准信息语义建模（PRISM），一种结构化主题建模框架，兼顾了大语言模型捕获的丰富表征优势与潜在语义聚类方法的低成本和可解释性。PRISM 通过少量由大语言模型提供的标签对一个句子编码模型进行微调，这些标签取样自目标语料。我们在该嵌入空间中以阈值聚类进行分割，从而在一个狭窄领域内将紧密相关的主题彼此分离。  
在多个语料上的实验表明，PRISM 在主题可分离性方面不仅优于当前最先进的局部主题模型，甚至超过了基于前沿大型嵌入模型的聚类方案，而训练仅需调用少量大语言模型查询次数。本文对以下研究方向做出贡献：(i) 提供“师-生”流水线，将稀疏的大语言模型监督蒸馏到轻量级主题发现模型；(ii) 分析不同的采样策略如何改善局部几何结构以提升聚类分离性；(iii) 提出一种适用于网络级文本分析的高效方法，使研究者和从业者能够以可解释且本地部署的框架，在线追踪微妙的论点与子主题。

title: User-Aware Conditional Generative Total Correlation Learning for Multi-Modal Recommendation
summary: Multi-modal recommendation (MMR) enriches item representations by introducing item content, e.g., visual and textual descriptions, to improve upon interaction-only recommenders. The success of MMR hinges on aligning these content modalities with user preferences derived from interaction data, yet dominant practices based on disentangling modality-invariant preference-driving signals from modality-specific preference-irrelevant noises are flawed. First, they assume a one-size-fits-all relevance of item content to user preferences for all users, which contradicts the user-conditional fact of preferences. Second, they optimize pairwise contrastive losses separately toward cross-modal alignment, systematically ignoring higher-order dependencies inherent when multiple content modalities jointly influence user choices. In this paper, we introduce GTC, a conditional Generative Total Correlation learning framework. We employ an interaction-guided diffusion model to perform user-aware content feature filtering, preserving only personalized features relevant to each individual user. Furthermore, to capture complete cross-modal dependencies, we optimize a tractable lower bound of the total correlation of item representations across all modalities.
